title: Kristotɔwo ƒe Dutanyanyuigblɔlawo ƒe Ameɖibɔ Gbãtɔ si le Nigeria
text:
Kristotɔwo ƒe Dutanyanyuigblɔlawo ƒe Ameɖibɔ Gbãtɔ si le Nigeria, si wogayɔna be Kristotɔ Gbãtɔwo ƒe Dutanyanyuigblɔlawo ƒe Tsiẽƒe le Badagry, nye ameɖibɔ si me woɖi ƒe alafa 19 lia kple 20 lia me Europa Kristotɔ Dutanyanyuigblɔla siwo ku le Badagry dugã me kple eƒe nutowo me. Ameɖiƒea le dua ƒe Kɔdzi Mɔdodo Gã la to. Eƒe Plus Code ƒe nɔnɔmetatawo le Google Maps dzi enye CV7Q+CPR, 103101, Badagry, Nigeria. Nuŋlɔɖi aɖewo gblɔ be woɖi dutanyanyuigblɔla siwo wu 200 le afisia. Wotu kpe xɔasi aɖe tsɔ ɖo ŋku dutanyanyuigblɔla kukuawo dzi. Egbea la, ameɖibɔa nye ŋutinya me teƒe siwo hea tsaɖilawo vaa Badagry dugã me la dometɔ ɖeka.

Nyadzɔdzɔ
Europatɔ geɖe ku le Afrika ƒe akpa vovovowo le ɣeyiɣi si me Europatɔwo wɔ Afrikatɔwo kluviwoe, Kristotɔwo ƒe Dutanyanyuigblɔlawo ƒe ɣeyiɣia, kple dutanyigbadziɖuɖu ƒe ɣeyiɣia me le anyigbagã la dzi. Europatɔ siawo dometɔ geɖe ku le asrã kple dzoxɔxɔ ƒomevi vovovo siwo ŋu dzɔdzɔmeŋusẽ aɖeke menɔ wo dometɔ akpa gãtɔ si o eye atike nyui aɖeke menɔ wo ŋu ɣemaɣi o ta. Emegbe kura hafi wova ke ɖe quinine ŋu be wòawɔ avu kple asrã. Esiae nye nɔnɔme si me Europa Kristotɔ Dutanyanyuigblɔla geɖe siwo ʋu yi Badagry dugã me tso ƒe 1845 me la ku le eye woɖi wo ɖe dua me.
Esi Europa dutanyanyuigblɔla gbãtɔwo va ɖo Badagry megbe kpuie hafi woŋlɔ ame gbãtɔ si ku le wo dome la ɖi. Aƒenɔ Eliza Phillips Gollmer, si nye mawunyadɔgbedelawo ƒe ŋgɔnɔlawo dometɔ ɖeka, Bubutɔ Charles Andrew Gollmer (amesi wòɖe le srɔ̃a gbãtɔ ƒe ku megbe do ŋgɔ le Sierra Leone le nɔnɔme mawo tɔgbe me) srɔ̃, ye nye ame gbãtɔ le dutanyanyuigblɔlawo ƒe ŋkɔ didiawo dome ku kple/alo ameɖiɖi le Badagry si akplɔe ɖo. Aƒenɔ Gollmer ku le April 11, 1845 dzi, le dɔléle sesẽ aɖe si xɔ ɣleti etɔ̃ ƒe dɔléle sesẽ aɖe megbe. Esi woɖii le teƒe sia hafi woɖo dutanyanyuigblɔlawo ƒe ameɖibɔa.
Europa dutanyanyuigblɔla bubu siwo ku eye woɖi wo ɖe afisia dometɔ aɖewoe nye Aƒenɔ Müller, si nye Osɔfo J. C. Müller srɔ̃ si ku le February 26, 1848 dzi; kple Eugene Celadon Van Cooten (Netherlandtɔ amekola aɖe) kple srɔ̃a Emily Primrose Van Cooten, amesiwo ku le asrã sesẽ aɖe ta le March 13, 1851, kple May 17, 1850 dzi.

Europatɔ bubuwo hã nɔ anyi siwo togbɔ be womenye dutanyanyuigblɔlawo o hã la, woɖi wo ɖe ameɖibɔ sia me. Kpɔɖeŋu aɖee nye Aƒetɔ George Brand, si nye Britaintɔwo ƒe Aɖaŋuɖotakpekpe le Lagos si nɔ anyi le dutanyigbadziɖuɖua me si ku le dɔdzẽ kple dzoxɔxɔ ta le June 16, 1860 dzi. Woɖi Afrika dutanyanyuigblɔla aɖewo hã ɖe afima, abe Aƒetɔ Edward Philips, si nye Sierra Leoniatɔ mawunyadɔgbedelawo ƒe nufiala aɖe si asrãdɔ ku le March 13, 1847. Aƒetɔ Mark Willoughby, si nye Gollmer ƒe Sierra Leoniagbe me gbegɔmeɖela, si ku le May 9, 1847 dzi hã nɔ anyi. ƒe 1850 me, le dɔléle aɖe si nɔ anyi ɣeyiɣi didi aɖe megbe. Le ƒe bla nane siwo va yi nyitsɔ laa me la, woɖi Nigeriatɔwo ƒe ɣeyiɣia me nunɔla ʋɛ aɖewo, vevietɔ Anglikan kple Methodist subɔsubɔha la hã ɖe ameɖibɔ sia me. Katolikotɔwo ƒe Dutanyanyuigblɔlawo kple eƒe Afrika Dutanyanyuigblɔlawo ƒe Habɔbɔ si le dua me la ƒe ameɖiƒe ɖe vovo le Topo Ƒukpo dzi afisi woƒe dɔdasi ƒe akpa gãtɔ nɔ te ɖo.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

Ameɖibɔwo le Nigeria

title: Yves Apollinaire Pede
text:
Yves Apollinaire Pede (wodzi le ƒe 1959 me, le Abomey) nye Beninois Vodou nutala. Esi wode dɔ asi nɛ be wòagbugbɔ nɔnɔmetatawo awɔ na Abomey Blemanudzraɖoƒea vɔ la, Ewɔ ame xɔŋkɔwo abe Nelson Mandela ene ƒe nɔnɔmetata siwo wotsɔ ke wɔe. Vivivi la, eƒe susu va nɔ avɔlɔlɔ̃ ŋu, eye wònɔ ŋku lém ɖe Haiti kple Cuba Vodou nutalawo ŋu be woaxɔ gbɔgbɔ. Wonyae hã ɖe eƒe siminti ƒe nɔnɔmetata gãwo kple bas-reliefs ta, eye wogblɔ be "etsɔ ɖe le eme etɔxɛe" ɖe Kulito ŋu, Fon nya aɖe si gɔme ŋutɔŋutɔe nye "amesi tso kumɔ dzi". Enɔ Ouidah,si nye xexeame ƒe Voduntɔwo ƒe aɖaŋudɔwo ƒe dɔwɔƒe, si ƒe ƒe sia ƒe ƒe azãɖuɖu le.

Mixlɔ̃ nu be viaŋutsu Lionel Pede dze agbagba be yeadzra fofoa ƒe nutatawo to facebook dzi.
Emegbe Lionel meɖoa nuawo ɖa gbeɖe o eye emegbe wòfi ga le nuƒlelaa si. Mègawɔ ‘nubabla’kplii o. Esia nye nye ŋutɔ nye nuteƒekpɔkpɔ, eye woɖoe be nyatakakaawo naxlɔ̃ nu ame bubu siwo nutataawo ƒe nu lé dzi na.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

Agbemeŋutinya
Ame siwo wodzi le ƒe 1959 me

title: Venita Akpofure
text:
Venita Akpofure (wodzi le 1 Dzove 1987) nye Britain-Nigeria fefewɔla kple video vixen. Exɔ ŋkɔ abe aƒe me tɔ ene le Big Brother Naija ƒe ɣeyiɣi enelia me Ewɔa akpa vevi aɖe le Nengi me le Africa Magic ƒe Unmarried me.

Le gɔmedzedzea me
Wodzi Akpofure le United Kingdom eye wògatso Delta State le Nigeria. Etsi le Benin, Edo State afisi wòde Míaƒe Aƒenɔ Apostolowo le eƒe gɔmedzesuku hafi trɔ yi England. Esrɔ̃ Akɔntabubu le Kingston Hertfordshire Yunivɛsiti le United Kingdom.

Dᴐwᴐna
Akpofure wɔ Mimi ƒe akpa le AY Makun ƒe Ay’s Crib me eye wògakpɔ gome le 2Face Idibia ƒe Ihe Ne Me kple Mukulu si Skales wɔ me abe video vixen ene. Hafi wòawɔ dɔ le Big Brother Naija me la, wonyae nyuie ɖe eƒe akpa si wòwɔ le Mukulu me ta.

Ewɔ dɔ abe adzɔnu ƒe ŋkɔ ƒe amedɔdɔ na First City Monument Bank, Martini Rose kple Mouka Foam. Enye Hawaii adzalẽ ƒe amedɔdɔ kpe ɖe Mercy Eke kple Sophie Alakija ŋu.

Enye aƒe me tɔ le Big Brother Naija ƒe ɣeyiɣi enelia me eye wonyae le fefea ƒe ŋkeke 41 lia dzi si wɔe be wònye aƒe me tɔ 20 siwo woɖe le aƒea me la dometɔ 11 lia.

Ame ŋutɔ ƒe agbenɔnɔ
Enye vidada si si vi eve le eye wòɖe Terna Tarka ƒe 4 sɔŋ. Egblɔ le May ƒe gbebiame aɖe me kple Punch le ƒe 2021 me be ye srɔ̃ dzodzo nye nyametsotso sesẽtɔ kekeake siwo yewɔ la dometɔ ɖeka eye be yeda akpe ɖe yeƒe kpekpeɖeŋunaɖoɖoa ta.

Wowɔ dɔ na Akpofure be wòadzi no ɖe edzi le Quartz Clinic, Istanbul le ƒe 2020. Eƒo nu tso eƒe nuteƒekpɔkpɔ ŋu le eƒe YouTube channel dzi.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

Agbemeŋutinya
Ame siwo wodzi le ƒe 1987 me

title: Bisola Aiyeola
text:
Bisola Aiyeola (wodzi le 21 Dzove 1986) nye Nigeriatɔ fefewɔla kple hadzila. Le ƒe 2017 me la, Bisola va zu Big Brother Naija ƒe evelia gbãtɔ. Le ƒe 2018 me la, exɔ AMVCA ƒe Mɔfiame ƒe Kafukafu le ƒe 2018 Africa Magic Viewers Choice Awards me.

Nusᴐsrɔ̃
Bisola de National Open University of Nigeria afisi wòsrɔ̃ asitsatsa dzikpɔkpɔ le.

Dᴐwᴐna
Aiyeola dze le ƒe 2017 ƒe Big Brother Naija ƒe fefe siwo kplɔ wo nɔewo ɖo me afisi wònye evelia ƒe evelia. Aiyeola nye hoʋlilaawo dometɔ ɖeka le MTN Project Fame West Africa le ƒe 2008 me afisi wòva xɔ nɔƒe 5 lia eye Iyanya ɖu dzi le. Tso ƒe 2011-2013 me la, Bisola nye Billboard Nigeria ƒe television dzi wɔnawo dzikpɔla zi ɖeka si woɖe fia le Silverbird Television dzi. Le ƒe 2017 me la, woɖo Bisola na City People Movie Award na Ƒea ƒe Nyaɖeɖefia (Eŋlisigbe) kpe ɖe Zainab Balogun, Somkele Iyamah, Seun Ajayi ŋu. Le ƒe 2018 me la, Bisola xɔ Trail Blazer ƒe Kafukafu le AMVCA. Ewɔ eƒe ŋgɔdonya abe nuwɔla ene le Introducing the Kujus me.

Ame ŋutɔ ƒe agbenɔnɔ
Vinyɔnuvi aɖe le Aiyeola si fifia. Le August 2018 me la, Aiyeola vinyɔnu fofo ku le dɔléle aɖe.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

Agbemeŋutinya
Ame siwo wodzi le ƒe 1986 me

title: Teniola Aladese
text:
Teniola Aladese nye Nigeriatɔ fefewɔla, fefewɔla, kple fefewɔlawo ƒe nufiala.

Ɖevimenɔɣi
Wodzi Aladese le Lagos Dukɔa me eye wòsrɔ̃ Amehawo ƒe Kadodo le Covenant Yunivɛsiti.

Dᴐwᴐna
Aladese wɔ dɔ abe nuwɔwɔ ƒe ɖoɖowɔla ene le Africa Magic Original Films siwo wu 30 me tso ƒe 2013 va ɖo ƒe 2015 me. Eva xɔ ŋkɔ le esi wòwɔ akpa vevi aɖe abe Akweyon ene le 'Jemeji' si me wònye Production Manager hã le me vɔ megbe.

Le ƒe 2015 me la, edze le Perfectly Flawed me. Le ƒe 2018 me la, enye flidzinuwɔla na 'Forbidden'.

Sinimawo ƒe nɔnɔmetatawo

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

Agbemeŋutinya

title: Sophie Alakija
text:
Sophie Rammal Alakija (nye Rammal) nye fefewɔla le Nigeria sinima me.

Ame ŋutɔ ƒe agbenɔnɔ
Wodzi Alakija le February 8 lia dzi le Islamtɔwo ƒe ƒome aɖe si nye Efik kple Lebanontɔwo ƒe dzidzime me.

Dᴐwᴐna
Alakija dze le Holla le wò ŋutsuvi hadzidzi video me si me eƒe ahiãvi tsãtɔ Wizkid nye ɣeɖula vevitɔ le ƒe 2010 me.
Ewɔ akpa aɖe le sinima geɖewo me, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye Drawing Strands, Getting over him, kple Small Chops. Le ƒe 2017 me la, ewɔ akpa aɖe le TV dzi wɔna si nye Scandals me, si nye Ghana kple Nigeria ƒe nuwɔwɔ aduadu. Le ƒe 2019 me la, ewɔ akpa aɖe le television dzi wɔna si nye Halita me eye emegbe wòwɔ akpa aɖe le television dzi wɔna si nye Assistant Madams me. Ewɔ akpa vevi aɖe hã le Timini Egbuson ƒe Moslem srɔ̃ me le ƒe 2020 me. Azɔ hã, nyitsɔ laa le sinima si nye My village people me le ƒe 2021 me.

Sinimawo ƒe nɔnɔmetatawo

Numekugbalẽwo

Agbemeŋutinya

title: Hauwa Allahbura
text:
Hauwa Allahbura nye Nollywood fefewɔla kple sinimawɔla. Enye Cut24 Productions ƒe dɔdzikpɔlagã eye wòwɔ sinima geɖewo eye wòkpɔ wo dzi siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye Gidi Blues (2016) The Eve (2018), kple Code Wilo (2019). Eyae nye Pull Up Naija, ƒuƒoƒo aɖe si le Nigeria sɔhɛwo nya nu tso mɔnu si dzi woato akpɔ gome le tiatiawɔblɔɖe ƒe ɖoɖoa me vevie ŋu la ɖola.

Ɖevimenɔɣi kple sukudede
Wodzii le Lagos Dukɔa me le dukɔmeviwo ƒe dukɔmevinyenye ƒe dɔwɔlawo ƒe ƒome aɖe me. Le alesi fofoa ƒe dɔa le ta la, ede gɔmedzesukuwo le teƒe vovovo etɔ̃; Dukɔwo Dome Suku si le Crescent, si le Lagos; Dukɔwo Dome Suku si le Crescent, si le Kano; kple Franseawo ƒe Dukɔwo Dome Suku, Badagry. Le eƒe sekɛndrisuku ta la, ede Kpovitɔwo ƒe Sekɛndrisuku, Minna, Niger State; kple Dukɔa ƒe Dziɖuɖu Kɔledzi, Ilorin, Kwara Nutome. Exɔ eƒe ɖaseɖigbalẽ gbãtɔ le Ŋutinya kple dukɔwo dome Nusɔsrɔ̃ me le Nasarawa Dukɔa ƒe Yunivɛsiti, Keffi. Enye London Sinima Suku nuwula hã; New York Dukɔa ƒe Yunivɛsiti, kple Montana Dukɔa ƒe Yunivɛsiti.

Dᴐwᴐna
Allahbura dze eƒe fefewɔwɔ gɔme abe Nyateƒe TV dzi wɔnawo wɔla ene. Eyi ɖawɔ dodokpɔ eye wotiae be wòava wɔ ɖeka kple Mnet Ƒomea ƒe TV le DSTV dzi wònɔ Maro ƒe nɔnɔme wɔm le Tinsel. Tso ɣemaɣi la, ewɔ sinima vovovowo eye wòwɔ wo dometɔ aɖewoe nye Battle Ground: African Magic, Las Gidi Vice, Gidi Blues (2016) The Eve (2018), Code Wilo (2019). Ede dzi ƒo na sɔhɛwo be woakpɔ gome le ƒe 2023 ƒe Nigeria ƒe dutoƒotiatiawɔɣi si gbɔna me.

Sinimawo ƒe nɔnɔmetatawo
Gidi ƒe blues (ƒe 2016)
Eve la (ƒe 2018)

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

Agbemeŋutinya

title: Ada Ameh
text:
Ada Ameh (15 Dame 1974 – 17 Siamlɔm 2022) nye Nigeriatɔ fefewɔla si zã ƒe blaeve kple edzivɔ le Nigeria sinimawɔƒe eye wòɖe dzesi wu le eƒe nɔnɔme abe Anita ene le ƒe 1996 sinima si ƒe tanyae nye Domitilla me kple abe Emu Johnson ene le sinima si xɔ kafukafu me Nigeriatɔwo ƒe television dzi wɔna siwo ƒe tanyae nye The Johnsons. Ameh le The Johnsons television dzi wɔnawo me la, woɖee fia kpe ɖe Nollywood fefewɔla bubuwo abe Charles Inojie, Chinedu Ikedieze, kple Olumide Oworu ŋu.

Ɖevimenɔɣi kple sukudede
Ameh, togbɔ be Idoma vidzidzie wònye le Benue Nutome hã la, wodzii henyii le Ajegunle le Lagos Nutome, si nye Nigeria ƒe dzigbeɣetoɖoƒe ƒe anyigba ƒe akpa aɖe si me Nigeriatɔwo ƒe Yorubagbedolawo ƒe akpa gãtɔ le. Ameh xɔ gɔmedzesuku kple sekɛndrisuku siaa le Lagos Dukɔa me gake ava dzudzɔ sukudede mlɔeba ne exɔ ƒe 14, ƒe si me wòdzi vianyɔnuvi la ke.

Dᴐwᴐna
Le ƒe 1995 me la, Ameh va zu Nigeria sinima dɔwɔƒe Nollywood ƒe akpa aɖe le se nu eye wòxɔ eƒe sinima ƒe akpa gbãtɔ le ƒe 1996 me, afisi wòwɔ Anita ƒe akpa le sinima si nye Domitila me, si va kpɔ dzidzedze ŋutɔ. Zeb Ejiro ye wɔ sinima sia hekpɔ edzi. Ameh hã nɔ Nigeria TV dzi wɔna si ƒe tanyae nye The Johnsons, si hã va zu dɔ si kpɔ dzidzedze si xɔ kafukafu.

Ame ŋutɔ ƒe agbenɔnɔ
Ameh ku ƒomea me tɔ geɖe: nyitsɔ laa la, eya ŋutɔ vinyɔnuvi, si wòdzi esime wòxɔ ƒe 14. Vianyɔnu ku le Kele 2020 me. Ameh ku esi wòdze anyi le Warri le 17 Siamlɔm 2022 dzi esime wòxɔ ƒe 48.
 Exɔ susu ƒe lãmesẽnyawo do ŋgɔ na eƒe ku.[12][13]

title: Chidinma and Chidiebere Aneke
text:
Chidinma kple Chidiebere Aneke nye venɔvi siwo sɔ le Nollywood dɔwɔƒe si ame geɖe yɔna be Aneke venɔviwo. Wodzi wo le Nigeria ƒe dzigbeɣedzeƒe gome, Enugu Nutome tututu eye woawoe nye nya mamlɛtɔ na Aneke ƒomea. Wonye fefewɔlawo kple sinimawɔlawo.

Ɖevimenɔɣi kple sukudede
Wodzi Chidinmma kple Chidiebere le 6 Dasiamime 1986 dzi le Enugu State, Nigeria ɖe srɔ̃ geɖe ƒe aƒe si me srɔ̃ etɔ̃ le me. Fofo kesinɔtɔ aɖe nɔ wo si si kpɔa egbɔ be wodzra wo ɖo nyuie gake nuwo trɔ esi wo fofo ku eye woma eƒe nunɔamesiwo ɖe ƒome gã me tɔwo dome. Woxɔ woƒe Gɔmedzesuku ƒe Dzodzo ƒe Ðaseɖigbalẽ kple Sekɛndrisuku ƒe ɖaseɖigbalẽwo le Enugu Nutome. Le woƒe gɔmedzesuku kple sekɛndrisuku megbe la, Chidinma kple Chidiebere yi Nigeria Yunivɛsiti, Nsuka afisi wowu suku nu le kple Bachelor le Mass Communication kple Bachelor le Gadzraɖoƒe kple Ganyawo me le wo nɔewo yome.

Dᴐwᴐna
Aneke venɔviawo va ge ɖe Nollywood dɔwɔƒea le ƒe 1999 me eye wowɔ akpa le sinima ‘Ebuka’ si dzɔ be enye woƒe sinima gbãtɔ me. Sinima si nye ‘Ebuka’ na wokpɔ ŋgɔyiyi le Nollywood me. Le ƒe 2004 me la, Aneke venɔviawo xɔ ŋkɔ kple sinima si nye ‘Desperate Twins’ si na woɖo wo ɖe The Most Promising Acts to Watch le African Magic Viewers’ Choice Award me. Wowɔ akpa aɖe le sinima siwo wu 80 me. Wowɔ Nollywood sinima geɖewo abe; ‘Isiaku ƒe Dzi’, ‘Onochie’, ‘Dzidzedzekpɔkpɔ Gbãtɔ’’, kple ‘Adaora’.

Sinimawo ƒe nɔnɔmetatawo

Didi be yeaxɔ ŋkɔ si gblẽ.

title: Uzoamaka Aniunoh
text:
Uzoamaka Doris Aniunoh nye Nigeriatɔ agbalẽŋlɔla kple fefewɔla. Enye MTV Shuga ƒe akpadzikpɔla edziedzi si dzena le nudzɔdzɔ geɖewo me siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye gbãtɔ kple adelia.

Agbenɔnɔ
Wodzi Aniuno le Onitsa. Esrɔ̃ nu le Nigeria Yunivɛsiti eye wòxɔ amewo ɖe blog aɖe si wòwɔ la dzi. Le ƒe 2015 me la, eʋu yi UK afisi wòsrɔ̃ nuwɔwɔ ƒe nuŋɔŋlɔ le Birmingham Yunivɛsiti eye wòxɔ master ƒe ɖaseɖigbalẽ.

Fefewɔla

Etrɔ yi Nigeria le ƒe 2017 me eye wòde dodokpɔ siwo wowɔ le gaglãgbe na sinima yeye aɖe si ŋkɔe nye MTV Shuga. Enye fefewɔla ʋɛ siwo wotia la dometɔ ɖeka elabena eƒe akpa si wòawɔe nye Cynthia. Exɔ Niyi Akinmolayan ƒe aɖaŋuɖoɖo le dzadzraɖo ɖe dodokpɔa ŋu me eye aɖaŋuɖoɖo ma ke na wòwɔ akpa aɖe le "Rumor Has It" na Ndani TV me.

Enye ame vevi aɖe le sinima "Stuck" me kple Seun Ajayi kple Lala Akindoju.

Series adelia le MTV Shuga trɔ gbɔ be woatu ɖe Nigeria ake eye Aniunoh wɔ nubabla be wòagawɔ Cynthia ake le ƒe ma ƒe series sub-titred "Tiatia". Hati fefewɔlawo dometɔ aɖewoe nye Timini Egbuson, Rahama Sadau, Yakubu Mohammed, Bukola Oladipupo, Helena Nelson kple Ruby Akabueze.
Aniunoh nɔ MTV Shuga ƒe series 6 me eye Cynthia ƒe akpaa de eme esi wòyi ɖe mini-series aɖe si ƒe tanyae nye MTV Shuga Alone Together me si te gbe ɖe Coronavirus ƒe kuxiwo dzi le 20 April 2020. Tunde Aladese ye ŋlɔ series la eye woɖea gbeƒãe zã sia zã - eƒe megbedelawo dometɔ aɖewoe nye Dukɔ Ƒoƒuawo. Wotu nudzɔdzɔ siwo kplɔ wo nɔewo ɖo le Nigeria, South Africa, Kenya kple Côte d’Ivoire eye ŋutinyaa ayi ŋgɔ to dzeɖoɖo siwo woawɔ le Internet dzi le teƒe si ameawo le dome zazã me. Fefewɔlawo siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye Lerato Walaza, Mamarumo Marokane, Jemima Osunde, Folu Storms kple Aniunoh ye awɔ sinimaɖeɖeawo katã.

Ewɔa Kumene ƒe akpa le Africa Magic ƒe Riona me.

Nigerian Entertainment Today ŋlɔe be enye Nigeria fefewɔla si wòle mɔ kpɔm na le ƒe 2021 me.

Ewɔ akpa vevi aɖe hã kpe ɖe Neo Akpofure ŋu le sinima kpui si nye Sister Rose me. Enɔ sinima kpui aɖe si nye Title Ije hã me.

Agbalẽŋlɔla
Aniunoh hã nye agbalẽŋlɔla eye wota agbalẽwo kpɔ. Nigeriatɔ agbalẽŋlɔla Chimamanda Ngozi Adichie ye trɔ asi le eƒe agbalẽ si nye Balcony ƒe akpa aɖe ŋu eye wòtae.

title: Igbo (gbegbᴐgblᴐ)
text:
Igbo nye gbe si wodona le Nigeria. Ame siwo wu miliɔn 18 ye gblɔnɛ. Igbo nye gbeɖiɖi si me gbeɖiɖi le. Woŋlɔ gbea ɖe Romatɔwo ƒe nuŋɔŋlɔa me.

Gbegbɔgblɔwo

title: Gungbe
text:
Gungbe nye gbe si le "Gbe" gbewo ƒe ƒuƒoƒo me. Ogutɔ siwo le Benin kple Nigeria ye donae. Gbe sia sɔ kple Fongbe. Eɖi Agbome, Kpase, Maxi kple Weme (Ouémé) gbegbɔgblɔwo hã. Enye gbe evelia si wodona wu le Benin. Wozãnɛ le suku aɖewo me le Ouémé Dɔwɔƒe si le Benin.

Wodonɛ le Benin ƒe dzigbe koŋ le Porto-Novo, Sème, Bonou, Adjara, Avrankou, Dangbo, Missérété, Akpro-Missérété, Cotonou kple du bubu siwo me Ogutɔwo le.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

gbegbɔgblɔwo

title: Abakouande
text:
Abakouande nye kɔƒe aɖe le Assoli Nutome le Kara Nutome le Togo ƒe dzieheɣedzeƒe gome.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Seychelles
text:
Seychelles nye Afrika dukɔ le India Ƒua me. Eƒe fiadu enye Victoria. Gbe siwo wodona le dziɖuɖudɔwɔƒewoe nye Creole, Eŋlisigbe, kple Fransegbe. Enye dukɔ si me ƒukpo 115 le. Seychelles le Madagascar ƒe dzieheɣedzeƒe gome eye wòdidi tso Kenya ƒe ɣedzeƒe gome abe kilometa 1,600 ene. Nuto siwo le Seychelles dometɔ aɖewoe nye: Anse Boileau, Takamaka kple Cote D’Or. Enye Afrika dukɔ si me amewo mele o wu, eye wobu akɔnta be ƒe 2020 ƒe amewo ƒe xexlẽme nye 98,462.

Seychelles ƒe dukplɔla enye Wavel Ramkalawan.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

Afrika dukɔwo
Afrika ƒe ɣetoɖoƒe dukɔwo

title: Komi Sélom Klassou
text:
Komi Sélom Klassou (wodzi le February 10, 1960  nye Togo dunyahela. Enye Togo ƒe Dukplɔlagã tso ƒe 2015 va ɖo ƒe 2020.

Wodzii le kɔƒe si nye Notsé, le Haho. Yunivɛsiti ƒe ɖaseɖigbalẽ le esi le
anyigbaŋutinunya me eye wònye ɖɔkta le tsi ƒe yame ƒe nɔnɔme ŋuti nunya me.

Exɔ Dekɔnuwo, Sɔhɛwo, Kamedefefe kple Sukudede ƒe dɔwɔƒewo eye emegbe
wònye Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe ƒe zimenɔla ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ hafi Dukplɔla Faure
Gnassingbé tiae Dukplɔlagã le June 5, 2015 dzi, le dukplɔla ƒe tiatia megbe. Eɖo
eƒe dziɖuɖu si me ame 22 le (nyɔnu 4 hã le eme) le eƒe tiatia megbe eye wòna ŋkɔa na dutoƒo le June 28, 2015 dzi.

title: Fambaré Ouattara Natchaba
text:
Fambaré Ouattara Natchaba (17 Afɔfiɛ 1945 – 15 Kele 2020) nye Togo dunyahela. Enye Togo Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe ƒe Dukplɔla tso Anyɔnyɔ 2000 va ɖo Dzodze 2005 me.

Natchaba ku le 15 Kele 2020 dzi le ƒe 75 xɔxɔ me.

title: Kwassi Klutse
text:
Kwassi Klutse (wodzi le 29 Siamlɔm 1945) nye Togo dunyahela. Wodzii le Agbélouvé, le Zio Nutome. Enye Togo ƒe Dukplɔlagã tso 20 Dasiamime 1996 vaseɖe 21 Dame 1999.

title: Tammari (gbegbɔgblɔ)
text:
Tammari nye gbe si wodona le Benin kple Togo. Wogayɔa esia be Ditammari. Tammaritɔ siwo le Benin kple Togo la dometɔ akpa gãtɔ doa gbea.

gbegbɔgblɔwo

title: Haffon
text:
Haffon (1695–1727) nye Ouidah Fiaɖuƒea ƒe dziɖula mamlɛtɔ hafi Dahomey ƒe aʋakɔwo xɔe le ƒe 1727 me.
Wodzi Haffon le ƒe 1695 me, eye wòva zu Whydah ƒe Fia le ƒe 1708 me. Womeɖo fiakuku nɛ le wɔna aɖe si wowɔ le se nu le Savi o vaseɖe April 1725 me. Srɔ̃nyɔnu 40 siwo wòlɔ̃na wu la nɔ eƒe fiakuku ɖuɖu ƒe azãa me. Ƒe 1725 ƒe ŋkekea nye esi Chevalier des Marchais gblɔ gake egbegbe agbalẽnyala aɖewo ʋli nya be edzɔ le ƒe 1717-1718 me.

Nusiwo ŋu woƒo nu tsoe

title: Toffa I
text:
Fia Toffa I (1850-1908) nye Hogbonu, alo Ajase, fiaɖuƒea ƒe dziɖula. Hogbonu nye Benin ƒe nuto aɖe si woyɔna egbea be Porto-Novo.

Esi wòva zu dziɖula le ƒe 1874 me la, exɔ ŋkɔ le eƒe nuwɔwɔ faa kple nuwɔwɔ aduadu kple dutanyigbadziɖulawo ta. Ede dzi ƒo na eƒe dɔwɔlawo be woade Franseawo ƒe sukuwo be woaxɔ ɣetoɖoƒetɔwo ƒe hehe eye wòɖe mɔ ɖe Islam kple Kristotɔnyenye hã ŋu be woage ɖe dukɔa me eye woanɔ anyi ɖekae kple subɔsubɔha siwo tso blemakɔnu abe Orisa ene. Gake nubabla si nɔ Toffa I kple Abomey-fiawo dome la medze edzi gbeɖe o.
Toffa ƒe kpememe aɖe le Porto-Novo.

title: Olu Abejoye
text:
Olu Abejoye nye Olu ewo lia le Warri si ɖu Itsekiri kple non Itsekiri amewo dzi le fiaɖuƒea me. Enye Olu Omoluyiri, si nye Olu asheke lia le Warri Fiaɖuƒea ƒe viŋutsu. Exɔ ɖe fofoa, Olu Omoluyiri teƒe abe Warri ƒe Olu ewo  lia ene. Eƒe Portugalgbe me ŋkɔe nye Luigi. Viaŋutsu Olu Akenjoye ye va xɔ ɖe

title: Irène Assiba d'Almeida
text:
Irène Assiba d'Almeida nye Benintɔ hakpanyaŋlɔla, gbegɔmeɖela kple agbalẽŋutinunyala. Enye Francophone Nusɔsrɔ̃ Kple Fransegbe Ŋuti Nufialagã le Arizona Yunivɛsiti.

Agbe
Wodzi Irène Assiba d’Almeida le Dakar, Senegal, eye dzilawo nye Dahomeyantɔwo. Ede suku le Benin hafi xɔ BA le Amiens Yunivɛsiti le France, M.Phil le Ibadan Yunivɛsiti le Nigeria. Exɔ eƒe PhD le ƒe 1987 me le Emory Yunivɛsiti le United States. Ewɔ dɔ aduadu kple Olga Mahougbe tsɔ ɖe Chinua Achebe ƒe agbalẽ si nye Arrow of God gɔme ɖe Fransegbe  
D'Almeida ƒe agbalẽ gbãtɔ, Francophone Afrika nyɔnu agbalẽŋlɔlawo, woxɔ nyuie be "nudzɔdzɔ aɖe ŋutɔ na Afrika, Nyɔnuwo kple Francophone  Eyae nye Afrika AgbalẽsɔsrɔHabɔbɔƒe Takpekpe si wowɔ le Arizona Yunivɛsiti le ƒe 2010 me ƒe takpekpe. Wota nudzɔdzɔawo abe Eco-imagination: Afrika kple dutatɔwo ƒe agbalẽwo kple nusiwo li tegbee (2013).Professor Irène Assiba d'Almeida

Dɔwɔwɔwo
Fransegbe me Afrika nyɔnu agbalẽŋlɔlawo: ɖoɖoezizi ƒe ƒuƒlu la tsɔtsrɔ̃. Gainesville: Florida Yunivɛsiti ƒe Nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe, 1994.
(ed.) Nyawo ƒe tsidzadza: nyɔnuwo ƒe hakpanyawo ƒe ƒuƒoƒo le gbe eve me le Fransegbe me Afrika. Charlottesville: Virginia Yunivɛsiti ƒe Nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe, 2009. Janis A. Mayes ye ɖe egɔme.
(ed. kple John Conteh-Morgan) "Wowó gbãtɔ si wɔ xexewo": nuŋɔŋlɔwo le Werewere Liking ƒe aɖaŋudɔwo kple nuŋɔŋlɔwo ŋu. Amsterdam; New York: Rodopi, ƒe 2010.
ed. kple Lucie Viakinnou-Brinson kple Thelma Pinto) Eco-imagination: Afrika kple dutatɔwo ƒe agbalẽwo kple nusiwo li tegbee. Trenton, New Jersey: Afrika Xexeame ƒe Nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe, 2013.
(ed. kple Sonia Lee) Essais kple nuŋlɔɖiwo le Afrikatɔwo ƒe francophones ŋu: un autre regard sur l'Afrique. Paris: L’Harmattan, ƒe 2015 me.
(Kepler Elsie Augustave) Autour de "L'enfant noir" si nye Camara Laye: ƒe ɖoɖo si wowɔ ɖe atsyɔ̃ɖoɖo ŋu. Paris: le Harmattan, ƒe 2018 me.

Nusiwo ŋu woƒo nu tsoe

title: Olu Atogbuwa
text:
Olu Atogbuwa nye Olu 14 lia si tso Warri si ɖu Warri Fiaɖuƒea dzi. Exɔ ɖe fofoa, Olu Akengboye teƒe abe Olu 14 lia si le Warri ene.  Exɔ dzesideŋkɔa, Ogiame Atogbuwa. Eƒe Portugalgbe me ŋkɔe nye Manuel Octobia. Esi wòyi be yeanɔ fofoawo gbɔ la, Olu Erejuwa I va xɔ ɖe eteƒe le ƒe 1760 lɔƒo lɔƒo.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Baba Yabo
text:
Dèhoumon Adjagnon  (13 Tedoxe 1925 – 1 Dzodze 1985), si wonya nyuie wu kple eƒe fefewɔƒe ŋkɔ Baba Yabo la nye Benintɔ nukokoedonamela kple fefewɔla. Etrɔ asi le Benin ƒe fefewɔƒewo ŋu to eƒe nukokoedoname ƒe atsyã kple ŋutinyagbɔgblɔ si to vovo la dzi. Enye nukokoedonamela xɔŋkɔwo dometɔ ɖeka le dukɔa me.

Ame ŋutɔ ƒe agbenɔnɔ
Wodzi Yabo le Porto-Novo, Benin, le Tedoxe 13, 1925.  Eyae nye Frédéric Jol Avo fofo.

Eƒe dɔwɔɖui ƒe agbe
Baba Yabo dze fefewɔwɔ gɔme le fefewɔƒewo le ƒe 1980 ƒeawo me kpe ɖe eƒe Towa konou ƒuƒoƒo, Mamoudou Eyissê si woyɔna be Mister Okéké, kple Antoine Sokênou ŋu.

Ale si woɖoa ŋku edzii
Baba Yabo ƒe kpememe aɖe si kɔkɔ meta 2 li si wotu tsɔ ɖo ŋku edzi le Zèvou nuto me le Porto-Novo.

title: Jérôme Nouhouaï
text:
Jérôme Nouhouaï nye Benintɔ agbalẽŋlɔla aɖe. Wodzii le Abomey le ƒe 1973. Esrɔ̃ nu le Germany eye wòle Cotonou hele dɔ wɔm fifia. Enye Caravane du livre hehenanadɔ si wowɔ le Afrika la ƒe akpa aɖe.
Nouhouaï ŋlɔ agbalẽ eve: Le piment des plus beaux jours (Le Serpent à Plumes, 2010) kple La mort du lendemain (Présence Africaine, 2010).

title: François Okioh
text:
François Sourou Okioh (wodzi le ƒe 1950 me Léma, Dassa-Zoumè) nye Benintɔ sinimaŋlɔla, nudzikpɔla, nuwɔla, agbalẽŋlɔla kple hakpanyaŋlɔla. 
Ewɔ dɔ le nuŋlɔɖi kple television dzi sinima siwo wu alafa ɖeka ŋu.
Esrɔ̃ nu le Sinima Kple TV Suku si le Nuwɔnawo Ŋuti Nusrɔ̃ƒe le Prague.  
Le ƒe 1973 me la, eɖo Habɔbɔ si nye Dekɔnuwo ƒe Kadodo kple ŋgɔyiyi (ACCD).

title: Emmanuel Oshoffa
text:
Emmanuel Mobiyina Oshoffa (ŋkɔ bliboa '' Emmanuel Mobiyina Dzoɖa Adebowale Abiodun vihan Oshoffa, wodzi le 25 Dzome 1948) nye Kristo ƒe Dziƒoha (CCC) ƒe nunɔla kple gbɔgbɔ me ta. Togbɔ be Emmanuel Oshoffa kpɔa ŋusẽ ɖe sɔlemeha la ƒe akpa suetɔ kekeake dzi, kple Mɔzɔzɔ Kɔkɔe ƒe du si le Imeko afisi woɖi eɖola, fofoa, le hã la, akpa aɖe si le ho ʋlim kplii bua Beni Omoge, si wogblɔ be eyae xɔ ɖe Maforikan Surulere teƒe be eyae nye yewo ŋutɔ yewoƒe akpaa ƒe ŋgɔnɔla. Woɖo Oshoffa be wòanye CCC ƒe tatɔ le Dzome 2002 me. abe pastɔ Philip Hunsu Ajose teƒenɔla ene, si ku le March 2001. Mobiyina Oshoffa nye Pastor Gɔmeɖoanyila (Bubutɔ Nyagblɔɖila Samuel Bilewou Joseph Oshoff si megali o) ƒe viŋutsu gbãtɔ eye wònye Kristo ƒe Dziƒoha la ƒe akpa gã la ƒe nunɔla, le xexeame katã.
Wodzi oshuffa le ƒe 1948 me le Kpave, French Dahomey (si nye Benin fifia), eye wònye hadziha si le Port Novo sɔlemexɔ me la me tɔ hafi ʋu yi France. Abe alesi fofoa gblɔe ene la, eya kple Sadrak Gbãtɔ ƒe kɔdzidzikpɔlawo koe nya afisi sɔlemeha la ɖola le gaƒoƒo blaeve vɔ ene kple edzivɔ le afɔku si dzɔ le Anyɔnyɔ 1985. Eyata enɔ nɔnɔme me be wòagblɔ nyagblɔɖila la ƒe ɣeyiɣi mamlɛawo ŋuti nuŋlɔɖi aɖewo. Oshoffa de yunivɛsiti le Paris, eye wòxɔ eƒe ɖaseɖigbalẽ le lãwo ƒe nugbagbeŋutinunya me le ƒe 1976 me eye wòxɔ master ƒe ɖaseɖigbalẽ le Nugbagbeŋutinunya Yunivɛsiti, Nancy, France le ƒe 1977 me. France ƒe Saɖaganutoa kple Ƒutadukɔwo ƒe Dɔwɔƒewo kple Anyigbamama siwo ƒe akpa gãtɔ nye Ivory Coast Dziƒo.
Kristotɔwo ɖo eye Ɣetoɖoƒe Indiatɔ geɖe yia afima enuenu, kpakple bubuwo; tso ƒe 1986 me la, Emmanuel Oschoffa ye nɔ ŋgɔ nɛ. Woɖoe France ƒe CCC Nutomehabɔbɔ ƒe tatɔ to amesi do ŋgɔ nɛ, Bubutɔ Abiodun Bada dzi le ƒe 1997 me. Nyatakakatsoƒe bubuwo gblɔ be ƒe 1987. Le ƒe 1989 me la, Emmanuel Oshoffa na nyɔnyrɔ congotɔ ɖɔkta kple Katolikotɔ, Malela, si va Paris hena amekoko, eyata edze sɔlemexɔa gɔme le Brazzaville. Le Dzome 2002 me, esime wònɔ dzadzram ɖo be yeazɔ mɔ tso France ayi Port-Novo la, woyɔe va Imeko be wòanye sɔlemeha la ƒe nunɔla.

title: Aisha Tsamiya
text:
Aisha Aliyu si wonya kple fefewɔƒe ŋkɔ Aisha Aliyu Tsamiya nye Kannywood fefewɔla kple nuwɔla si va xɔ ŋkɔ le sinima salma me.

Dɔwɔɖui ƒe agbe
Aisha wɔ akpa aɖe le Zeenat me abe ame vevitɔ ene le afisi wòwɔ nu abe vifofo kesinɔtɔ aɖe ƒe vinyɔnu ene.

title: Dukɔa ƒe Aɖaŋuɖoha si Kpɔa Amerika Kple Arabtɔwo Ƒe Kadodowo Gbɔ
text: Dukɔa ƒe Aɖaŋuɖoha si Kpɔa Amerikatɔwo Kple Arabiatɔwo ƒe Kadodowo Gbɔ (NCUSAR) nye Amerikatɔwo ƒe habɔbɔ si mekpɔa viɖe aɖeke tso eme o si ƒe taɖodzinue nye be yeana Amerikatɔwo ƒe sidzedze kple gɔmesese nanyo ɖe edzi le Arab-dukɔwo ŋu.

title: Augustine Obiora Akubeze
text:
Augustine Obiora Akubeze nye Nigeriatɔ Katoliko Ha la ƒe nunɔlagã eye wònye Roma Katolikotɔwo ƒe Saɖaganutome si le Benin City ƒe bisiɔpgã, tso ƒe 2011 me.
Le Tedoxe 18, 2011 dzi la, Vatican Nyatakaka Dɔwɔƒe ka nya ta be Papa Benedict XVI ɖo Bisiɔp Augustine Obiora Akubeze si le Roma Katolikotɔwo ƒe Saɖaganuto si le Uromi, Nigeria, me be wòanye Roma Katolikotɔwo ƒe Saɖaganutome si le Benin City, Nigeria, ƒe dugã me bisiɔpgã, si adze dɔwɔwɔ gɔme tso Tedoxe 28, 2011. E wodzii le Kaduna, Nigeria le ƒe 1956 me; woɖoe nunɔla le ƒe 1987 me eye wòkɔ bisiɔp le ƒe 2006 me.

Nusiwo ŋu woƒo nu tsoe

title: David Asante
text: David Asante (23 December 1834 – 13 October 1892) nye gbeŋutinunyala, gbeŋutinunyala, gbegɔmeɖela kple Akantɔ gbãtɔ si nye mawunyadɔgbedela le Basel Nyanyuigblɔlawo ƒe Dutanyanyuigblɔlawo ƒe Habɔbɔ me. Enye Afrikatɔ evelia si Basel Mission na hehe le Europa le Americo-Liberia sɔlemehakplɔla, George Peter Thompson megbe. Asante wɔ dɔ kplikplikpli kple Germanytɔ mawunyadɔgbedela kple gbeŋutinunyala, Johann Gottlieb Christaller kple ehati gbeŋutinunyala siwo nye afimatɔwo, Theophilus Opoku, Jonathan Palmer Bekoe, kple Paul Staudt Keteku le Biblia gɔmeɖeɖe ɖe Twigbe me ƒe xexlẽme.

title: Pontevedra
text:
Pontevedra nye Spain dugã enye. Eƒe dukɔmenɔlawo ƒe xexlẽme ɖo 83,260 lɔƒo (2020).

Nya siawo ƒe tsoƒe

title: TRT Kurdî
text: TRT Kurdî nye mɔ̃ vovovo vevitɔwo dometɔ ɖeka si ɖea gbeƒã tso Dɔkɔ eye wòɖea eƒe wɔna vovovoawo katã ɖe go le Kurdgbe me.Tɔdzisasrã deŋgɔ siwo naa wɔna vovovoawo katã kple modzakaɖeɖe siwo wodina ɣesiaɣi kple esiwo wodina ɖaa la dometɔ ɖeka, eye wònye nu vovovo kple mɔ̃ si wometsɔ nya ɣaɣlawo ŋlɔe o si naa wɔna vovovo geɖe siwo hea nukpɔla geɖewo ƒe susu elabena enye mɔnu vovovo vevitɔwo dometɔ ɖeka.Enye satelait-mɔ̃ dzi si wometsɔ nya ɣaɣlawo ŋlɔe o si naa nu geɖe femaxee Enye wɔna siwo kaka ɖe teƒe geɖe siwo le ame geɖe si la dometɔ ɖeka, eye enye satelait-dɔwɔƒe siwo ɖea nyadzɔdzɔ vovovo kple dukɔwo dome nyadzɔdzɔwo kple xexeame ƒe nuŋlɔtsi gbogbo aɖewo siwo wokpɔna le mɔ geɖe nu siwo sɔ kple bubuwo le akpa geɖe kple xexeame katã ƒe nyadzɔdzɔwo katã siwo ame siwo katã di be yewoanya di be yewoakpɔ la dometɔ ɖeka hã .Nudzɔdzɔ vevitɔwo kple esiwo dzɔ nyitsɔ laa siwo li le xexeame katã, eye wònye mɔ̃ siwo ɖea gbeƒã le Kurdgbe me na ame siwo katã doa Kurdgbe eye wotsɔa nu naa amewo la dometɔ ɖeka Eɖea gbeƒã 24 gaƒoƒo Nutsotso, nutsotso alo eme manɔmee, eye wònye Turkeytɔwo ƒe TRT television dɔwɔƒe ƒe ɖoɖoa ƒe akpa aɖe, eye ame geɖe lɔ̃a ekpɔkpɔ, amesiwo di be yewoakpɔ wɔna vovovo geɖe siwo li eye wokaka ɖe mɔ ɖesiaɖe dzi kple mɔ ɖesiaɖe dzi.Eya wodia le eƒe ɣeyiɣi ƒe didime tɔtrɔ le Nilesat satelait dzi, si wodi le mɔ̃ vovovo geɖewo dzi.Enye mɔ̃ vevitɔwo dometɔ ɖeka hã si ɖea eƒe wɔnawo katã ɖe go tso Turkey ƒe eme eye woɖenɛ fiana le teƒe vovovo geɖewo kple dukɔwo katã me be èdi be yeanya Xexeame ƒe nyadzɔdzɔwo le Kurdgbe me.

title: Pashtgbe
text:
Wodonɛ abe gbe si wodona abe gbe si wodona ene akpa gãtɔ to Pashtun to vovovo me tɔwo dome, enye Afghanistan ƒe gbe eve siwo wodona le dziɖuɖudɔwɔƒewo dometɔ ɖeka kpe ɖe Darigbe, ŋu eye enye Pakistan ƒe nutome gbe evelia, si wodona koŋ le Khyber Pakhtunkhwa kple Balochistan ƒe dziehenutowo me .  Nenema. ke eyae nye gbe vevitɔ si Pashtuntɔ siwo le xexeame godoo la dona. Pashtogbedolawo ƒe xexlẽme katã ade  40 miliɔn ya teti,  togbɔ be akɔntabubu aɖewo gblɔ be esɔ gbɔ wu 60 miliɔn hã.

title: Virgil Abloh
text:
Virgil Abloh (Anyɔnyɔ 30, 1980 –
Adeɛmekpɔxe 28, 2021) nye Amerikatɔ aɖaŋuwɔla kple  
Abloh nye atsyãwɔƒe si nye Off-White si le Milan,
si nye atsyãwɔƒe aɖe si wòɖo le ƒe 2013 me la ƒe dɔdzikpɔlagã hã.
Abloh ku le kansa ta le November 28,
2021 dzi le Chicago, Illinois esime wòxɔ ƒe 41.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Dan Kwasi Abodakpi
text:
Dan Kwasi Abodakpi (wodzi le 27 Afɔfiɛ 1950) nye Ghana dunyahela eye wònye Ghana
Dukɔ Enelia ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe Enelia me tɔ si le Keta nuto teƒe le Volta Nutome.
Ewɔ dɔ abe Asitsatsa kple Dɔwɔƒewo ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla tsã ene.

Agbenɔƒe gbãtɔ kple sukudede
Wodzi Abodakpi le Keta le Volta Nutome le Ghana le 27 Afɔfiɛ 1950 dzi.
Ede Pennsylvania Yunivɛsiti eye wòxɔ Xexemenunya ƒe Ðɔkta.Ede Ghana Yunivɛsiti hã eye wòxɔ eƒe Dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya ƒe Dzeside.

Dᴐwᴐna
Abodakpi nye atikeŋutinunyala le eƒe dɔ me eye wònye Ghana Dukɔ Enelia ƒe
Sewɔtakpekpe Enelia me tɔ na Keta Nutome tso ƒe 1997 va ɖo ƒe 2009 me.

Dunyahehe
Abodakpi nye Dukɔa ƒe Demokrasi Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ.
Wotiae ɖe Ghana dukɔ enelia ƒe sewɔtakpekpe gbãtɔ me le 7 January
1993 dzi esi wogblɔ be enye dziɖula le ƒe 1992 Ghana sewɔtakpekpe
ƒe tiatia si wowɔ le 29 December 1992 dzi vɔ megbe.

Ƒe 2000 ƒe Tiatiawɔblɔɖe 
Wotia Abodakpi be wòanye sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ na Keta nuto
me le ƒe 2000 Ghana ƒe dutoƒotiatiawɔɣi. Eɖu dzi le tiatiawɔblɔɖea me
le Dukɔa ƒe Demokrasi Sewɔtakpekpea ƒe tikiti dzi.
Eƒe nuto nye sewɔtakpekpe ƒe zikpui 17 le zikpui 19 siwo Dukɔa ƒe
Demokrasi Sewɔtakpekpea xɔ le tiatia ma me na Volta Nutome la ƒe akpa aɖe.
Dukɔa ƒe Demokrasi Sewɔtakpekpea xɔ sewɔtakpekpe ƒe
zikpui 92 le zikpui 200 me le Ghana dukɔa ƒe sewɔtakpekpe 3 lia me.
Wotiae kple akɔdada 25,090 le akɔdada 27,853 siwo katã sɔ la dome.
Wotiae kple akɔdada 25,090 le akɔdada 27,853 siwo katã sɔ la dome.
Esia sɔ kple akɔdada siwo katã sɔ la ƒe 90.9%.
Wotiae ɖe Chris Archmann-Ackummey si le Dukɔa ƒe Ðɔɖɔɖoha me,
Emmanuel K. Vorkeh si le Dukɔlɔ̃ha Yeyea me, Gladys Adzo
Tsikpo si le Takpekpea me Dukɔa ƒe Dunyaheha me kple Ferdinanad
Fiawoo-Piccolo si le Dukɔa ƒe Dukɔa ƒe Takpekpe me.
Woxɔ akɔdada 898, 847, 519 kple 244 le akɔdada siwo katã sɔ siwo wowɔ me.
Esiawo sɔ kple 3.3%, 3.1%, 1.9% kple 0.9% le akɔdada siwo katã wowɔ me.

Ame ŋutɔ ƒe agbenɔnɔ 
Abodakpi nye Kristotɔ.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Suad Abdi
text:
Suad Ibrahim Abdi nye nyɔnuwo ƒe gomenɔamesi taʋlila tso Somaliland.
Enye dukɔa teƒenɔla na Progressio eye wònye aʋawɔla veviedonula hã be woaʋu demokrasi na nyɔnuwo le dukɔa me ƒe 25 kple edzivɔ.
Ele du ƒum be yeaxɔ zikpui le sewɔtakpekpea me tso Maroodi Jeex gbɔ le ƒe sia ƒe tiatiawɔɣi, si woawɔ le May 31, 2021 dzi.

dᴐwᴐna
Suad Ibrahim Abdi nye hadomenuwɔla le Somaliland tso ƒe 1996 me.
Enye Somaliland Dukɔa ƒe Nyɔnuwo ƒe Habɔbɔ
(Nagaad) si wòkpe asi ɖe eŋu woɖo le ƒe 1997 me la me tɔ.
Enye Somaliland dukɔa teƒenɔla na Progressio,
dukɔwo dome habɔbɔ si menye dziɖuɖu tɔ o si le
demokrasi ƒe aʋa wɔm le dukɔa me.
Progressio na eŋutinunyalawo be woado alɔ nutoa me habɔbɔ siwo le dɔ wɔm le dɔa me ƒe dɔwɔwɔ eye wòna ŋkuléleɖenuŋulawo na ƒe 2010 Somaliland dukplɔla ƒe tiatia si wògblɔ be ablɔɖe kple dzɔdzɔenyenye le eme.

Abdi le aʋa wɔm be woawɔ ɖe Somaliland ƒe sewɔtakpekpe
me tɔwo ƒe 20% ƒe xexlẽme dzi be woanye nyɔnuwo.
Fifia la, sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ ɖeka koe nye nyɔnu le ame 164 dome.
Hamemegãwo ƒe Aƒe (xɔgã) xe mɔ ɖe sewɔtakpekpea
ƒe se eve siwo wowɔ va yi nu alo nyaʋiʋli ƒe ɣeyiɣi vɔ.
Abdi gblɔ be yeatsi tre ɖe ƒe 2015 ƒe tiatiawɔɣia (wohe ɖe megbe va ɖo ƒe 2017 me) gake yemadi be yeazu dziɖuɖumegã o.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Immaculate Akello
text:
Immaculate Akello (wodzi le ƒe 1996 me) nye Ugandatɔ hadome dɔwɔla,
yame ƒe nɔnɔme ƒe tɔtrɔ taʋlila, Amegbetɔ ƒe gomenɔamesi
taʋlila kple senyala si ƒe taɖodzinu vevitɔe nye be yeatrɔ
kɔƒenutome nyɔnuwo ƒe agbenɔnɔ le Uganda ƒe dziehe.
Akello nye Generation Engage Network, si nye habɔbɔ si sɔhɛwo
kplɔna si léa ŋku ɖe nutome ƒe gomenɔamesiwo kple
nutome ƒe demokrasi ŋu le Dziehe kple Titina Uganda la ɖola.
To habɔbɔ sia dzi la, enɔ Uganda teƒe le Vijjana Sewɔtakpekpe
me le ƒe 2018 me le Arusha, Tanzania eye wònye ƒe 2018 Dukɔa
ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe ƒe sɔhɛwo ƒe nyaʋiʋli ƒe nuƒola le Uganda.

Agbenɔƒe gbãtɔ kple sukudede
Akello srɔ̃ Se le Kampala Dukɔwo Dome Yunivɛsiti eye wòwu suku nu le May 2019 me.

dᴐwᴐna
Le ɣeyiɣi si me wònɔ Kampala Dukɔwo Dome Yunivɛsiti la,
Akello nye Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ le Senyawo gbɔ, enye
Nuwɔametɔwo teƒenɔla hã le Guild Union me.
Akolle wɔ dɔ kple Center for Policy Analysis (CEPA) si nye
habɔbɔ si mekpɔa viɖe aɖeke tso eme o si ʋlia Sewɔtakpekpe
ƒe demokrasi ta le Uganda ƒe sewɔtakpekpea te.
Eƒe susu vevitɔe nye dziɖuɖu kple demokrasi kpakple
sitsoƒedila siwo le Uganda ƒe gomenɔamesiwo.
Le ɣleti ɖeka ƒe dɔwɔwɔ kple CEPA megbe la, woyɔe be wòawɔ
dɔ kple Dukɔ Ƒoƒuawo le ɣletiwo ƒe nubabla si wodidi
ɖe edzi vaseɖe December 2019 megbe.

Kpɔe hã
Leah Namugerwa
Vanessa Nakate
Nyombi Morris
Maria Horne

title: Joseph Danlami Bagobiri
text:
Joseph Danlami Bagobiri (8 Adeɛmekpɔxe 1957 – 27 Dzodze 2018) nye Nigeria Roma Katoliko bisiɔp.

Woɖo Bagobiri nunɔlanyenye me le ƒe 1983 me, eye wònye Kafanchan ƒe bisiɔp tso ƒe 1995 me vaseɖe eƒe ku me le ƒe 2018 me.

title: Wilfred Chikpa Anagbe
text:
Wilfred Chikpa Anagbe C.M.F (wodzi le ƒe 1965 me) nye Nigeriatɔ Katoliko Ha la ƒe nunɔlagã, eye wònye bisiɔp le Roma Katoliko Saɖaganuto si le Makurdi me. Woɖoe Makurdi ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ bisiɔp le ƒe 2014 me, eye wòxɔ ɖe bisiɔp ƒe ɖoƒea teƒe le ƒe 2015 me.

title: Jane Anyango
text:
Jane Anyango Odongo nye Kenyatɔ si ʋlia ŋutifafa kple nyɔnuwo kple nyɔnuviwo ƒe gomenɔamesiwo ta.
Enye gbevovodolawo kple ŋutifafawɔla, eye wòle Kenya
ƒe aƒe madeamedziwo dometɔ ɖeka me.
Wonyae be eƒo nyɔnu alafa geɖe siwo kpe asi ɖe
ŋutasẽnuwɔwɔ le tiatiawɔwɔ megbe dzi ɖeɖe kpɔtɔ
ŋu le ƒe 2007 kple 2013 ƒe tiatiawɔɣiwo la nu ƒu.
Eƒe aɖaŋua dometɔ aɖewoe nye nyɔnuwo ƒe ŋusẽkpɔɖeamedzi zazã ɖe ŋutsu siwo he ŋutasẽnuwɔwɔa vɛ dzi, eƒe nyagbɔgblɔ si nye ‘ na avuwɔlawo nadzudzɔ ŋutasẽnuwɔwɔa’.
Eyae nye Polycom Development Project, si naa ŋusẽ nyɔnuviwo kple ɖetugbuiwo le Kibera xɔmanyamanyawo me la ɖola kple edzikpɔla.
Dɔa ku ɖe nyatiwo abe dzadzɛnyenye, yame ƒe nɔnɔme ƒe tɔtrɔ, ɖekawɔwɔ, gbenyigba dzi ɖoɖowɔwɔ, kple bubuawo ŋu.
Nusi koŋ ado tso eme le ɣeyiɣi didi aɖe megbee nye
be wòaɖo Dukɔ Ƒoƒuawo ƒe Ŋgɔyiyi si Li Eteƒe Didi ƒe
Taɖodzinu 10 lia gbɔ, si aɖe tasɔsɔmasɔ dzi akpɔtɔ.
Le ƒe 2010 me la, Peace X Peace habɔbɔa tsɔ
eƒe Community Peacebuilder Award nɛ.
Le ƒe 2016 me la, enye nyɔnu ene siwo wokpe va San Diego Yunivɛsiti ɣleti
eve le eƒe ƒe sia ƒe Nyɔnu Ŋutifafawɔlawo ƒe ɖoɖoa me la dometɔ ɖeka.

Agbenɔnɔ ƒe gɔmedzedze kple dɔwɔɖui
Wodzi Anyango le Nairobi, Kenya le March 17, 1970 dzi, eye wòʋu yi Kibera le ƒe 1989 me.
Le ŋutasẽnuwɔwɔ si do tso Kenya ƒe Dukplɔla ƒe tiatia si wowɔ le ƒe 2007 me ta la, Anyango wɔ ɖoɖo ɖe nyɔnuwo ŋu le Kibera tsɔ tsi tre ɖe ŋutasẽnuwɔwɔa ŋu.
Le ema megbe kpuie la, woɖo habɔbɔ si nye "Kibera Nyɔnuwo na Ŋutifafa".

title: Victor Adibe Chikwe

title: Dede Dolopei
text:
Dede Dolopei nye Liberia dziɖuɖudɔwɔla.

numeɖeɖe
Enye Nyateƒe Kple Dzadzraɖo Dɔwɔha si le Liberia ƒe zimenɔla ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ.
Ewɔ dɔ le habɔbɔ vovovo siwo menye dziɖuɖu tɔ o me
ku ɖe nyɔnuwo ƒe gomenɔamesiwo, ŋutifafa tutuɖo,
masɔmasɔwo gbɔ kpɔkpɔ kple susu kple hadome aɖaŋuɖoɖowo ŋu.
Exɔ ɖaseɖigbalẽ geɖe hã le Liberia Yunivɛsiti.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

Dzɔtsoƒewo

title: Safa Elagib
text:
Safaa El Agib Adam(wodzi le ƒe 1960 me, El-Geneina, Ɣetoɖoƒe Darfur, Sudan) nye hadomenuwɔla.
Esi Elagib wu suku nu le Khartoum Yunivɛsiti la, eva
ge ɖe Ðeviwo Ðeɖeɖa ƒe Ga (SCF) UK me ƒe ɖeka, eye wòwɔ
dɔ tso kpekpeɖeŋunadɔwo ŋu le Darfur kple
kpekpeɖeŋunana ƒe ɖoɖowɔwɔ le Port Sudan ŋu.
Fifia ele habɔbɔ geɖe me abe lɔlɔ̃nu faa dɔwɔla kple aɖaŋuɖola le ame ŋutɔ si ene.
Nusiwo ŋu Elagib ƒe susu le fifiae nye kpekpeɖeŋu nana nyɔnu
siwo ŋu mɔnukpɔkpɔ mele o kple abe ŋutifafa taʋlila ene.

Switzerland ƒe Ablɔɖe Kple Amegbetɔ ƒe Gomenɔamesiwo Ŋuti
Habɔbɔ na amegbetɔ ƒe gomenɔamesiwo ŋuti fetu Elagib.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Hannah Forster (aʋawɔla)
text:
Hannah J. Forster (wodzi le ƒe 1950 ƒeawo ƒe nuwuwu
lɔƒo) nye Gambiatɔ amegbetɔ ƒe gomenɔamesi.

Agbe
Forster de St. Joseph ƒe Dzadzraɖosuku kple St. Joseph ƒe Sekɛndrisuku.
Esi wòwɔ dɔ le ɔfisdɔ aɖe me ɣeyiɣi kpui aɖe vɔ la,
ewɔ dɔ le Gambia Dukɔa ƒe Agbalẽdzraɖo ƒe.
Emegbe ewu suku nu le Ghana Yunivɛsiti kple agbalẽdzraɖoƒeŋutinunya ƒe ɖaseɖigbalẽ eye emegbe wòwu suku nu le
Leoughborough Yunivɛsiti le Great Britain kple agbalẽdzraɖoƒe
kple nyatakakaŋutinunya ƒe ɖaseɖigbalẽ.
Le Sant’Anna Nusɔsrɔ̃ Deŋgɔwo ƒe Suku la, exɔ amegbetɔ ƒe
Gomenɔamesiwo Kple Masɔmasɔwo Dzikpɔkpɔ ƒe ɖaseɖigbalẽ.

Tso ƒe 1990 lɔƒo la, ewɔ dɔ le Afrika ƒe Demokrasi Kple Amegbetɔ ƒe
Gomenɔamesiwo Ŋuti Nusɔsrɔ̃ Dɔwɔƒe [de] (ACDHRS).
Le Zoe Tembo [de] ƒe ku kpata megbe la, woɖoe dɔwɔƒea ƒe dɔdzikpɔla le March 12, 2001 dzi.
Eyae nye dɔwɔla si nɔ dɔ wɔm ɣeyiɣi didi wu le ɣeyiɣi si me woɖoe ɖe dɔa me.
Vaseɖe esime wòxɔ dɔ sia la, enye Gambia Agbalẽdzraɖoƒe Kple Nyatakaka Dɔwɔƒe,
si kpɔa Gambia Dukɔa ƒe Agbalẽdzraɖoƒea dzi la ƒe Dukplɔla

Tsɔ kpe ɖe dɔ si wòwɔna le ACDHRS ŋu la, ekpɔa gome le habɔbɔ bubu geɖewo hã me.
Tso ƒe 2006 me la, enye Afrika Demokrasi Takpekpe ƒe zimenɔla eye wònye
Xexeame ƒe Demokrasi Habɔbɔ ƒe mɔfiame kɔmiti me tɔ eye wònye Demokrasi Dukɔwo ƒe Habɔbɔ kple me tɔ.
Ðekawɔwɔ na Afrika Nyɔnuwo ƒe Gomenɔamesiwo ƒe Aɖaŋuɖoha (SOAWR). 
Tso ƒe 1992 va ɖo ƒe 2009 me la, enye aɖaŋuɖola na Amegbetɔ ƒe
Gomenɔamesiwo Ŋuti Nyatakaka Kple Nuŋlɔɖiwo Ŋuti Ðoɖowo (HURIDOCS).
Tso ƒe 2004 va ɖo ƒe 2010 me la, efia nusɔsrɔ̃wo hã le Pretoria
Yunivɛsiti ƒe Amegbetɔ ƒe Gomenɔamesiwo Ŋuti Dɔwɔƒe.

Le ƒe 2007 me la, exɔ Dukɔwo Dome Nyɔnu Dzinɔameƒotɔwo ƒe Kafukafu
tso United States Dukɔa ƒe Dɔwɔƒe gbɔ, si Amerika Dudɔnunɔla si le Gambia, Joseph D. Stafford, tsɔ nɛ.

Forster ɖe srɔ̃ eye viwo le esi.

title: Jessie van Aalst
text:
Jessie van Aalst (wodzi le Dame 25, 1992)
nye Hollandtɔwo ƒe softball ƒola.Eƒoa
fefe kple Olympica Haarlem.Enye
Netherlands nyɔnuwo ƒe dukɔa ƒe bɔlƒoha me tɔ tso ƒe 2012.
Le dukɔa ƒe bɔlƒoha me la, eva zu Europa ʋiʋlidziɖula le ƒe 2022
