Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

Agbemeŋutinya

title: Alan Hoole
text:
Alan Norman Hoole (25 Afɔfiɛ 1942 – 8 Afɔfiɛ 2000) nye Saint Helena ƒe Dziɖuɖumegã,
Ascension kple Tristan da Cunha le ƒe 1991 kple 1995 dome,
emegbe ezu Anguilla ƒe Dudzikpɔla le ƒe 1995 kple 1996 dome.
Ede suku le Sheffield Yunivɛsiti kple Senyawo ƒe
Kɔledzi, London, eye wòwɔ dɔ abe senyala ene va yi.
Hoole ku le May 2000 me, esime wòxɔ ƒe 58.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Nazha El Khalidi
text:
Nazha El-Khalidi (Laayoune, Ɣetoɖoƒe Sahara, 27 December 1991)
nye Sahrawi nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔla kple aʋawɔla. Enye Equipe Media ƒe habɔbɔ me tɔ.

Le 21 August 2016 dzi la, Gendarmerie Royale lée le
Fem Lwad ƒuta esi wòlé wɔwɔfia aɖe si wowɔ tsɔ da asi ɖe
Ɣetoɖoƒe Sahara ƒe ɖokuisinɔnɔ dzi la ɖe mɔ̃ dzi vɔ megbe.
Enɔ dɔ wɔm na Ɣetoɖoƒe Sahara ƒe television dɔwɔƒe.

Le 4 December 2018 dzi la, wogalée ake esi wòɖe gbeƒãɖeɖe
bubu to Facebook dzi vɔ megbe, eye wodrɔ̃ ʋɔnui le 20 May 2019 dzi.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Mary Lokko
text:
Mary Lokko nye Ghanatɔ ʋiʋlila aɖe.

Lokko nɔ dɔ dzi vevie le Ɣetoɖoƒe Afrika Sɔhɛwo ƒe Habɔbɔ ƒe nyawo me le ƒe 1930-awo me,
eye wòƒo eɖokui ɖe numedzodzro siwo ku ɖe Italo kple Etiopia ƒe Aʋa
Evelia si nɔ edzi yim ɣemaɣi ŋu me gbã. Eƒe dzixɔsewo he nutoa me nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔlawo
ƒe susu, eye le Dzove 1936 me la, I. T. A. Wallace-Johnson do susua
ɖa be wòava zu yeƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ; esia wɔe be ɖewohĩ eyae nye
nyɔnu gbãtɔ le Ɣetoɖoƒe Afrika si xɔ ɖoƒe aɖe le dunyahehabɔbɔ aɖe me.
Ezã eƒe nuƒolanɔƒea tsɔ do alɔ nyɔnuwo ƒe gomekpɔkpɔ le Sɔhɛwo ƒe Habɔbɔ me.
Womenya nu boo aɖeke tso afisi wòtso alo eƒe agbe si wòva nɔ emegbe ŋu o.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Dandeson Crowther
text:
Dandeson Coates Crowther(24 September 1844 –1938) nye The Niger ƒe Saɖaganunɔlagã tso ƒe 1876 vaseɖe ƒe 1926.

Ajayi Crowther ƒe viŋutsu,Bisiɔp le Niger, kple Afrika Anglikan bisiɔp gbãtɔ le Nigeria exɔ hehe
le CMS Kɔledzi, Islington.Enɔ CMS Gbeŋutise Suku, Lagos ƒe gɔmeɖoanyi ƒe klass me le ƒe 1860
me.Woɖoe diakɔn le St Mary's Sɔlemexɔ me, Islington le June 10, 1870;eye wònye nunɔla le
March 12, 1871.Enɔ Bonny vaseɖe esime woɖoe be wòanye Archdeacon.

Nusiwo ŋu woƒo nu tsoe

title: Anthony Sanusi
text:
anthony Sanusi ƒe ŋkɔ
Tso Wikipedia, si nye numekugbalẽ si le ablɔɖe me
Ti kpo yi mɔfiamewo dziTrɔ yi didiƒe
Anthony Sanusi ye nye esia
Ijebu-Ode ƒe Bisiɔp (Emeritus) .
Sɔlemeha Roma Katoliko Sɔlemeha
Kpɔ Ijebu-Ode ƒe agbalẽa
Le dɔ dzi le ƒe 1969 - 1990 me
Nusi do ŋgɔ nɛ Ðeke meli o
Albert Ayinde Fasina si xɔ ɖe eteƒe
Nudɔdɔwo
Woɖoe ɖe ɖoɖo nu le 17 December 1944 dzi
Ame ŋutɔ ƒe nyatakakawo
Wodzii le 2 Dzove 1911 dzi
Iperu, Nigeria Nigeria ƒe aflaga.svg
Ku le 8 December 2009 (exɔ ƒe 98)
Previous post(s) Nunɔla
Anthony Saliu Sanusi (2 Dzove 1911 – 8 Dzove 2009) nye Nigeria Bisiɔp le Roma Katoliko Hamea me.
Wodzi Anthony Sanusi le Iperu, Nigeria le ƒe 1911 me.
Woɖoe nunɔla le December 17, 1944 dzi le Lagos, Nigeria. Woɖoe bisiɔp le Ijebu-Ode ƒe
saɖaganuto yeye si woɖo me le May 29, 1969 dzi eye wòxɔ eƒe bisiɔp ƒe kɔkɔenyenye le
August 1, 1969. Ekpɔtɔ nye bisiɔp le Ijebu-Ode saɖaganutoa me vaseɖe esime wòxɔ dzudzɔ
le dɔme le ƒe 1990 me.

        ==Kpɔe hã==

title: Niemat Kuku
text:
Niemat Kuku nye Sudantɔ ʋiʋlila, ŋgɔyiyi ŋuti nunyala kple The Gender Center for
Research and Training (GCRT) ƒe dɔdzikpɔla kple 3eɖola ɖeka le Sudan.
Kuku srɔ̃a nu hedoa alɔ nyɔnuwo ƒe gomenɔamesiwo kple ŋutsuwo kple nyɔnuwo
ƒe tasɔsɔ le Sudan eye wònye Reagan-Fascell Democracy Fellow.

Nyɔnuwo ƒe gomenɔamesiwo ŋuti numekuku
Kuku ŋlɔ akpa sesẽ si Sudan nyɔnuwo wɔ le dutoƒonyawo
me tso ƒe alafa blaevelia ƒe gɔmedzedze, do ŋgɔ na Xexemeʋa I,
le Anglo–Egiptetɔwo ƒe dutanyigbadziɖuɖu ƒe dziɖuɖu ɖe Sudan dzi la ɖi.
Le ƒe 2009 me, le ƒe 2010 ƒe Sudan ƒe si woɖo gbã be woawɔ le ƒe 2009 me lɔƒo la,dutoƒotiatiawɔɣi 
si woɖo gbã be woawɔ le ƒe 2009 me lɔƒo la,
Kuku ta numekuku aɖe tso dunyahehe ƒe kpekpeɖeŋunana
na afɔɖeɖe si woawɔ to quotas dzi ŋu abe mɔnu ŋutɔŋutɔ si dzi woato aɖo
nyɔnuwo ƒe gomekpɔkpɔ le dunyahehe me le dzɔdzɔenyenye me gbɔ ene.
Eƒo nu tso ƒe 2005 ƒe Ɣeyiɣi aɖe ƒe Dukɔa ƒe Dukplɔse ƒe akpa aɖewo ŋu siwo do
afɔɖeɖe si woawɔ atsɔ aɖo kpe edzii ɖe ŋgɔ, "aʋawɔwɔ" ɖe kɔnyinyi siwo gblẽa nu le
nyɔnuwo ƒe ɖoƒe kple bubu ŋu, kple vidzidzi ƒe gomenɔamesiwo,
atikewɔwɔdɔwo kple ɖeviwo dzi kpɔkpɔ na vidadawo ŋu.
Ekpɔe be dunyaheha gãwo katã da asi ɖe nyɔnuwo ƒe xexlẽme si woɖo ɖi na
amewo le tiatiawɔɣiwo dzi, eye xexlẽme si woɖo ɖi la to vovo tso 25 va ɖo 33 le alafa me.
Kuku gblɔ mɔnu tɔxɛ siwo hiã be nyɔnuwo ƒe gomenɔamesiwo
kple demokrasi nanyo ɖe edzi to tiatia siawo me la tsitotsito.

Nyɔnuwo ƒe gomenɔamesiwo taʋliha
Kuku nye amesiwo ɖo The Gender Center for Research
and Training (GCRT) le Khartoum la dometɔ ɖeka.
Le ƒe 2009 me, do ŋgɔ na ƒe 2010 ƒe Sudan ƒe dutoƒotiatia la,
Kuku do vevie nu le nyɔnuwo ƒe gomekpɔkpɔ le tiatiawɔblɔɖe me
ƒe dzidede ƒo me eye wòxɔ kpekpeɖeŋu tso dunyahela vovovowo gbɔ.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Michael Odogwu Elue
text:
michael Odogwu Elue ƒe nyawo
Tso Wikipedia, si nye numekugbalẽ si le ablɔɖe me
Ti kpo yi mɔfiamewo dziTrɔ yi didiƒe
Bubutɔ Gãtɔ Ðɔkta.
Michael Odogwu Elue ƒe agbalẽa
Nutoa me Roma Katoliko-ha si le Issele-Uku
Nudɔdɔwo
Woɖoe le August 18, 1984 dzi
Adzɔgbeɖeɖe le February 21, 2004 dzi
Anthony Olubunmi Kardinal Okogie ye ŋlɔe
Ame ŋutɔ ƒe nyatakakawo
Wodzii le April 4, 1956 dzi (ƒe 66) .
Akumazi Umuocha, si le Delta Nutome, Nigeria
Dukɔ si me ame tso Nigeriatɔ
Roma Katolikotɔwo ƒe subɔsubɔha
Dzila siwo nye Dominic kple Theresa Elue
Atsyãwo ƒe
Michael Odogwu Elue ƒe agbalẽa
Mitre gbadzaa 2.png
Nufiame ƒe atsyã Eƒe Aƒetɔ
Spoken style Wò Aƒetɔ
Subɔsubɔha ƒe atsyã Bishop
Bubutɔ gãtɔ Michael Odogwu Elue (wodzi le April 4, 1956 dzi), le Katoliko ƒome aɖe si me Aƒetɔ Dominic Elue kple Aƒenɔ Theresa Elue le siwo tso Akumazi Umuocha me le Ika Dzieheɣedzeƒe Nutomedziɖuɖu
Nutome le Delta State, Nigeria. Eyae nye viŋutsu gbãtɔ kple vi evelia le vi enyi ƒe ƒomea me. Fofoa ku le August 18, 1984 dzi, gbesigbe tututu woɖoe ɖe Katoliko nunɔlanyenye me.[citation needed]
 Hafi woaɖoe bisiɔp ƒe bisiɔp abe Issele-Uku saɖaganutoa ƒe bisiɔp etɔ̃lia ene, le February 21, 2004 dzi la,[1] Bisiɔp Odogwu xɔ lãnyinyi kple sukudede ƒe dɔ geɖe siwo me agbanɔamedzi le. Wo dometɔ xɔŋkɔwoe nye Nufialagã le All Saints Major Seminary Ekpoma, Nigeria, nunɔla na Subɔsubɔhawo Dome Dzeɖoɖo, liturgical commission me tɔ ne míayɔ ame ʋɛ aɖewo ko. Bisiɔp Odogwu xɔ Ðɔkta ƒe ɖaseɖigbalẽ le Biblia me mawunyaŋununya me le Yerusalem kple Roma Yunivɛsiti.
Kpɔe hã
Roma Katoliko-ha le Nigeria
Roma Katolikotɔwo ƒe saɖaganutowo ƒe ŋkɔwo le Nigeria
   ==Nusiwo ŋu woƒo nu tsoe==

title: Hadizatou Mani
text:
Hadizatou Mani (wodzi le ƒe 1984 me)nye amegbetɔ ƒe
gomenɔamesi taʋlila tso Niger si ʋli be yeaɖe ye
ɖokui tso kluvinyenye me le ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒewo.

Agbe
Wodzi Mani le ƒe 1984 me le Niger. Wodzrae wòzu kluvi esime wòxɔ ƒe wuieve ɖe dɔlar 500 nu.
Kluvinyenye nye sedzidada le Niger, gake tso ƒe 2003 me koe, eye wògadzena kokoko.
Wona wòwɔ dɔ eye wòdzi vi etɔ̃ na eƒe aƒetɔ.
Egblɔ be ye srɔ̃e ke menye yeƒe kluvi o.
Esia wɔe be etso enu be ewɔ srɔ̃tɔ eve esi wòɖe ŋutsu bubu.
Wode Mani gaxɔ me ɣleti ade gake wode dzi ƒo nɛ be wòatsɔ nya ɖe eƒe nyaa ŋu.

Esi wòzã ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒewo tsɔ te fli ɖe eƒe fɔbubua me vɔ la, wona dɔlar 20,000 ɖe nusiwo
dome wògblẽ ta eye emegbe wode bubu eŋu kple ƒe 2009 Dukɔwo Dome Nyɔnu
Dzinɔameƒotɔwo ƒe Kafukafu eye wònɔ Time Magazine ƒe ƒe 2009 ƒe ŋkɔwo me le
xexeame ƒe ame 100 siwo kpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe amewo dzi wu ƒe ŋkɔwo me.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Mohamed Farah Abdullahi
text:
Mohamed Farah Abdullahi, si wogayɔna be Hansharo (Somaligbe: Xansharo),
nye Somalia Demokrasihabɔbɔ ƒe ŋgɔnɔla.

Nyadzɔdzɔ
Somalia Democratic Alliance nye asrafowo ƒe akpa aɖe ƒe habɔbɔ
le Somaliland ƒe dzieheɣetoɖoƒe nuto siwo wogayɔna be SDA.
Woɖoe le ƒe 1989. Etsi tre ɖi na Gadabursi to si le Somaliland ƒe liƒowo me.
Etsi tre ɖi na Gadabursi to si le Somaliland ƒe liƒowo me.
Mele be woatɔtɔ kple Gadabursi habɔbɔ si nye
Horyal Democratic Front si tsi tre ɖe Derg ŋu le Ethiopia
ƒe liƒowo dzi si hã nye Gadabuursi to la tɔ o.
Kplɔla lae nye Mohamed Farah Abdullahi si wogayɔna be Hansharo.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Thomas Babington Macaulay
text:
thomas Babington Macaulay (Nigeria) ƒe ŋkɔe nye ame si.
Tso Wikipedia, si nye numekugbalẽ si le ablɔɖe me
Ti kpo yi mɔfiamewo dziTrɔ yi didiƒe
Thomas Babington ƒe agbalẽ si nye Macaulay
Wodzii le 17 Dzove 1826 dzi
Kissy, si tso Sierra Leone, si ŋkɔe nye
Ku le 17 Dzove 1878 (ƒe 52)
Lagos, Lagos ƒe Nutome
Wonyae be eɖo sekɛndrisuku gbãtɔ le Nigeria
Srɔ̃tɔ Abigail Crowther (si ku tso ƒe 1854-1878 me)
Ðeviwo nye Herbert Macaulay

Dzilawo
Ojo-Oriare (fofo) .
Kilangbe (dada) .
Ƒometɔwo Oliver Ogedengbe Macaulay (tɔgbuiyɔvi) .
Samuel Ajayi Crowther, (si nye srɔ̃a) .
Thomas Babington Macaulay (17 Dzove 1826[1] – 17 Dzove 1878[2]) nye Nigeria nunɔla kple nufiala, tatɔ
gbãtɔ kple CMS Gbeŋutise Suku, Lagos ɖola, kple Nigeria dukɔmeviʋawɔla Herbert Macaulay fofo.[3]

Agbe
Wodzi T. B. Macaulay le Kissy, Sierra Leone le January 17, 1826 dzi, eye dzila siwo nye Yorubatɔ siwo
Britaintɔwo ƒe Ɣetoɖoƒe Afrika ƒe Asrafoha na ablɔɖe tso Trans Atlantic Kluviwo ƒe Asitsatsa me la gbɔ.
Macaulay fofo nye Ojo-Oriare tso Ikirun le Oyo Nutome xoxoa me esime dadaa nye Kilangbe tso Ile-Ogbo
hã le Osun Nutome fifia (Oyo Nutome xoxoa). T.B. ƒe. Macaulay xɔ hehe le CMS Hehenaƒe, Islington kple
King's College, London.[4][5] T.B. ƒe. Macaulay nye Bisiɔp Samuel Ajayi Crowther ƒe hadɔwɔla sue aɖe,
amesi ƒe vinyɔnu evelia (Abigail Crowther) wòɖe le ƒe 1854 me.[2]

Ku
T. B. Maculay ku le eƒe dzigbezã dzi (17 January 1878) le asrãdɔ ta le Lagos [2] eye woɖii ɖe Ajele Tsiẽƒe.
Wotsɔ eƒe ŋkɔ na Babington Macaulay Junior Seminary, si nye xɔdɔmesuku si me wowɔa nu aduadu le le Ikorodu, Lagos.[6]

Nusiwo ŋu woƒo nu tsoe

title: David Leslie Smallman
text:
David Leslie Smallman nye Saint Helena, Ascension kple
Tristan da Cunha ƒe Dudzikpɔla le ƒe 1995 kple 1997 dome.
Exɔ ŋugbedodo tso HM Dziɖuɖu gbɔ le ƒe 1995 me be yeagbugbɔ
Britain Dukɔmevinyenye ana St Helena dukɔmeviwo.
Esia dzɔ le ƒe 2002 me, le David Hollamby ƒe Dziɖuɖumegãnyenye te.

Eyae nye Saint Helena ƒe Dudzikpɔla gbãtɔ si ɖi go ɖe Gough Ƒukpo dzi.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Eric Njuguna
text:
Eric Damien Njuguna (wodzi le ƒe 2003 lɔƒo) nye yame
ƒe nɔnɔme ŋuti nyaʋiʋlila tso Kenya.

Njuguna dze woƒe yame ƒe nɔnɔme ŋuti dɔa gɔme le ƒe
2017 me esi kuɖiɖi sesẽ si dzɔ le Nairobi gblẽ nu le
woƒe sukua ƒe tsidzɔƒewo ŋu vɔ megbe.
to ɖoɖowɔwɔ kple ƒuƒoƒo si nye Zero Hour eye emegbe Fiɖagbewo na Etsɔme Kenya me.
Le Dasiamime 2021 me la, Njuguna kpe ɖe Greta Thunberg,
Adriana Calderón, kple Farzana Faruk Jhumu ŋlɔ
nuŋɔŋlɔ aɖe si wota ɖe The New York Times me.
Woƒe nuŋɔŋlɔ si woŋlɔ ɖekae la te gbe ɖe UNICEF ƒe nyatakaka aɖe si wowɔ le ƒe
2021 me dzi si gblɔ be ɖevi biliɔn 2.2 le "afɔku gã aɖe
me" be woato yame ƒe nɔnɔme ƒe tɔtrɔ me tsonuwo me.
Emegbe le ƒe 2021 me la, Njuguna de Dukɔ Ƒoƒuawo ƒe
Yame ƒe Nɔnɔme ƒe Tɔtrɔ Takpekpe (COP26) si wowɔ le
ƒe 2021 me eye wònɔ Dzoɖagbewo teƒe na Etsɔme Kenya.
Le COP26 me la, Njuguna, kpakple Vanessa Nakate kple Elizabeth Wathuti,
kpe kple Dukɔ Ƒoƒuawo ƒe Agbalẽŋlɔlagã Antonio
Guterres be yewoadzro yame ƒe nɔnɔme ƒe tɔtrɔ me.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Aboubakar Soumahoro
text:
Aboubakar Soumahoro (wodzi le 6 Masa 1980) nye Italy-Ivory Coast dɔwɔlawo ƒe habɔbɔ me tɔ,
dɔwɔlawo ƒe taʋlila kple dunyahela, wotiam ɖe
Teƒenɔlawo ƒe Habɔbɔ me le ƒe 2022 ƒe Italy ƒe tiatiawɔɣi.
Eʋli agbledela siwo ʋu va Italy ƒe dɔwɔlawo ƒe gomenɔamesiwo ta.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

Agbemeŋutinya
Ame siwo wodzi le ƒe 1980 me

title: Editar Adhiambo Ochieng
text:
Editar Adhiambo Ochieng nye Kenyatɔ si ʋlia nyɔnuwo ƒe gomenɔamesiwo
ta eye wòdoa alɔ amesiwo tsi agbe le gbɔdɔdɔ ƒe ŋutasẽnuwɔwɔ me.
Le ƒe 2020 me la, Ochieng va zu ame gbãtɔ si xɔ Wangari Maathai ƒe
Kafukafu le Kenya ɖe eƒe akpa si wòwɔ tsɔ xe mɔ ɖe
COVID-19 dɔvɔ̃ ƒe kaka nu le Kibera xɔmanyamanyawo me ta.

Ame ŋutɔ ƒe agbenɔnɔ
Wodzi Ochieng henyii le Kibera, si nye aƒe madeamedzi gãtɔwo dometɔ ɖeka le Nairobi.
Esi wòxɔ ƒe ade la, wodɔ egbɔ sesẽe, eye esi wòxɔ ƒe 16 la,
wodɔ Ochieng gbɔ sesẽe le gbevuha aɖe me eye le ema megbe la,
amesiwo dze edzi la ƒo adegbe le dutoƒo le woƒe nuvlowɔwɔa ŋu.
Ochieng yɔ ame ŋutɔ ƒe nuteƒekpɔkpɔ siawo be wonye gbɔdɔdɔ ƒe
ŋutasẽnuwɔwɔ ɖe nyɔnuwo ŋu le ɖoɖo nu ƒe kpɔɖeŋuwo eye wòhe susu yi ŋusẽ
si le nyɔnuwo ƒe ŋusẽ ŋu le dzidodo le nuvlowɔwɔ mawo me dzi.
Ochieng gblɔ be susu sia si megahiã o lae nye nusi ʋãa eƒe dɔwɔwɔ.

Ame ŋutɔ ƒe agbenɔnɔ
Wodzi Ochieng henyii le Kibera, si nye aƒe madeamedzi gãtɔwo dometɔ ɖeka le Nairobi.
Enye nyɔnuwo ƒe nyagblɔɖila si ƒoa wo ɖokui ɖe amewo dome.
Eƒe dɔwɔƒea ƒe taɖodzinue nye be yeatu kplɔlanyenye ɖo ɖe ɖetugbuiwo dome,
si anye dzidzime geɖe ƒe ɖoɖowɔwɔ kple kadodo ƒe mɔnu.
Ochieng dea dzi ƒo na nyɔnuwo be woagblɔ woƒe ŋutinyawo eye woana
amewo nanya nu tso eŋu be woaɖe nuteƒekpɔkpɔ siawo ƒe ɖekawɔwɔ afia.
Dɔwɔƒe si dzi wòkpɔna la nyea kpekpeɖeŋunahabɔbɔ na nyɔnu siwo ŋu nu gblẽ le,
abe amesiwo dzona le ƒomedodo siwo me wowɔa ŋlɔmi le me ene.
Le Kenya dziɖuɖua ƒe nya nu la, nyɔnuwo kple nyɔnuvi siwo xɔ ƒe 15–49 ƒe 45% to ŋutasẽnuwɔwɔ me.
Womegblɔa nya geɖe ŋu nya o, eye ame ʋɛ aɖewo koe

Ochieng ƒe dɔa ku ɖe nya vovovo siwo nyɔnuwo doa goe le nutoa me ŋu.
Enaa dzadzɛnyenyetike nyɔnu siwo ŋu nu gblẽ le, edoa alɔ Dukɔ
Ƒoƒuawo ƒe Dedienɔnɔ Ŋuti Aɖaŋuɖoha ƒe Nyametsotso 1325 dzi wɔwɔ
be wòanye mɔ si dzi woato ade nyɔnuwo ŋutifafa kple dedienɔnɔ
ƒe ɖoɖowo me, eye wòfiaa nu nyɔnuwo tso woƒe
gomenɔamesi siwo le dukplɔsea me ŋu.
Enye Dɔwɔnu ƒe Ðoɖowɔla hã kple Peace Brigades International Kenya,
si wɔa dɔ aduadu kple Nairobi nyɔnu amegbetɔ ƒe gomenɔamesi taʋlila bubuwo (WHRD).
Enɔ ame 56+ siwo wolé le azɔlizɔzɔ aɖe me le July 7, 2020 dzi tsɔ tsi tre ɖe
kpovitɔwo ƒe ŋutasẽnuwɔwɔ ŋu la dome, elabena Kenya
kpovitɔwo wu ame 100 kple edzivɔ vaseɖe ɣemaɣi le ƒe 2020 me.

COVID-19 ƒe dɔvɔ̃
Le COVID-19 dɔvɔ̃a me la, Ochieng wɔ ɖoɖo ɖe ʋɔtru nu yi ʋɔtru nu dɔwo,
nuɖuɖunana, kple ametakpɔnu siwo woate ŋu azã ake na amesiwo tsi agbe
le gbɔdɔdɔ ƒe ŋutasẽnuwɔwɔ me kple nyɔnu siwo ŋu nu gblẽ le le nutoa me ŋu,
eye wòna nutoa me tɔwo nanya nu tso dɔvɔ̃a ŋu edziedzi.
Be Ochieng natsɔ nuɖuɖu kple kpekpeɖeŋunana aɖo nɔƒe gbãtɔ la,
ewɔ anyigbatata siwo me wowɔa nuto siwo me wole bɔbɔe le wu le nutoa me.
Eya hã ƒe dɔe nye be wòawɔ ‘Nyɔnunyawo ƒe Agbalẽdzraɖoƒe’,
si dina be yeafia nu ɖevi siwo mete ŋu dea suku le lãmesẽkuxia ta o.

Ochieng ʋli ho be yeaxɔ sewɔtakpekpe ƒe zikpui le Kibra Nutome le Ukweli
habɔbɔa ƒe tikiti dzi le November 7, 2019 ƒe tiatiawɔblɔɖe ƒe akpa aɖe me
gake medze edzi o, eye wòxɔ akɔdada 59 le ame 41,984 siwo katã da la dome.
Esia nye esi wòdze le ŋgɔdonyawo me eye wota eƒe ŋkɔ ɖe dunyahela siwo kpɔ
gome le tiatiawɔblɔɖe si wowɔ le ƒe 2019 ƒe November me ƒe hoʋiʋli ƒe ŋkɔwo me vɔ megbe.

Kafukafuwo nana
Le ƒe 2020 me la, wode dzesi nusiwo Ochieng wɔ le Kibera
le COVID-19 dɔvɔ̃a me esime wòxɔ Wangari Maathai ƒe
Kafukafu, si wɔe be eyae nye ame gbãtɔ si xɔ kafukafua.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Margaret Sekaggya
text:
Margaret Sekaggya nye Ugandatɔ senyala kple amegbetɔ ƒe gomenɔamesi taʋlila.

Wodzii le Kampala le Kele 23, 1949 dzi.
Le ƒe 1970 me la, edze nusɔsrɔ̃ gɔme le Makerere
Yunivɛsiti hena senyawo ŋuti ɖaseɖigbalẽ xɔxɔ.
Le ƒe 1990 me la, exɔ senyawo ŋuti ɖaseɖigbalẽ le Zambia Yunivɛsiti.
Ewɔ dɔ kple Uganda, Zambia, kple Dukɔ Ƒoƒuawo ƒe dziɖuɖuwo.
Tso ƒe 1996 va ɖo ƒe 2009 me la, ƒe si wòxɔ abe Uganda
Amegbetɔ ƒe Gomenɔamesiwo Ŋuti Kɔmiti ƒe zimenɔla ene.
Le ƒe 1995 me la, woɖoe Uganda Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe Kɔkɔtɔ ƒe ʋɔnudrɔ̃la kpɔ.
Ekpɔ gome le Uganda ƒe Dukplɔse 4 lia ƒe gbeƒãɖeɖe hã me le ƒe 1995 me.
Le ƒe 80-awo ƒe akpa gãtɔ me la, enɔ Dukɔ Ƒoƒuawo ƒe Namibia ƒe Dɔwɔƒe,
eye wònɔ dzadzram ɖo ɖe Namibia ƒe dɔwɔƒewo ŋu be woatrɔ ayi ɖokuisinɔnɔ me.
Tso ƒe 1978 va ɖo ƒe 1982 me la, enye ʋɔnudrɔ̃la si nɔ Lusaka.
Tso ƒe 2008 va ɖo ƒe 2014 me la, Sekaggya nye Dukɔ Ƒoƒuawo ƒe
nyatakakaxɔla tɔxɛ si kpɔa amegbetɔ ƒe gomenɔamesiwo taʋlilawo gbɔ.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Adjaratou Abdoulaye
text:
Adjaratou Abdoulaye nye Togo dunyahela kple
Pan-African Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ tso Togo.
Wotiae ɖe Togo Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me le ƒe 2007 ƒe sewɔtakpekpe
ƒe tiatia me, eye wònɔ Togo Dukɔa ƒe Takpekpea teƒe.
Wotiae ɖe Pan-African Parliament me hena ƒe 2009-2014 ƒe ɣeyiɣi

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Améyo Adja
text:
Améyo Adja (wodzi le  July 1956 me nye Togo dunyahela
kple Pan-African Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ tso Togo.

Wodzi Adja le Lomé. Wotiae be wòanye Togo Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ le
October 2002 ƒe sewɔtakpekpe ƒe tiatiawɔɣia me abe ame si le
Kpekpeɖeŋunana Demokrasi Kple Ŋgɔyiyi Ŋusẽdodo (RSDD) me tso Lomé ƒe
Nutome Evelia me ene, eye wòva zu Tsitretsiɖeŋulawo ƒe
Sewɔtakpekpe ƒe Ƒuƒoƒo ƒe Dukplɔla.
Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpea tiae ɖe ECOWAS Sewɔtakpekpea me le November
2, 2005 dzi, eye ame 68 siwo nɔ eteƒe la da asi ɖe edzi zi 59.

Wotiae hã be wòanye Pan-African Sewɔtakpekpea me tɔ,
eye wòva zu Togo me tɔ atɔ̃awo dometɔ ɖeka
esime wòdze kpekpe gɔme le March 2004 me.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Yaovi Adodo
text:
Yaovi Prosper Adodo (wodzi le 12 June 1942)
nye Togo dutadɔnunɔla kple dunyahela tsã.
Adodo nye Dutanyawo Gbɔkpɔla tso ƒe 1987 va ɖo ƒe 1991
le Dukplɔla Gnassingbé Eyadéma ƒe dziɖuɣi.
Tsɔ kpe ɖe eŋu la, ewɔ dɔ abe Ganyawo ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla ene tso ƒe 1988 va ɖo ƒe 1990 me.
Enye Ðoɖowɔwɔ kple Dɔwɔƒewo ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla tsã, le ɖoƒe sia me la,
ede asi ACP-EEC ƒe Nubabla Etɔ̃lia te le Lomé le December 8, 1984 dzi.

Woɖo Adodo be wòanye Ɣetoɖoƒe Afrika ƒe Ganyawo Kple Ganyawo ƒe Habɔbɔ
(UEMOA) ƒe Dɔwɔha me tɔ ade dometɔ ɖeka le January 30, 1995 dzi.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Jeannette D. Ahonsou
text:
Jeannette Délali Ahonsou (wodzi le ƒe 1954 me le Lavie) nye Togotɔ agbalẽŋlɔla.
Exɔ Eŋlisigbe me Dzeside le Benin Yunivɛsiti (si nye Lomé
Yunivɛsiti fifia) eye wònye Eŋlisigbe nufiala si xɔ dzudzɔ le dɔme.

Agbalẽwo ƒe xexlẽdzesiwo
Fransegbe koŋue wòŋlɔa nu eye wòta agbalẽ ene,
siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye Une Longue Histoire,
si na wòxɔ Prix Littéraire France-Togo le ƒe 1995 me.

Ahonsou, Jeannette (ƒe 1999) kple ame bubuwo. Une Longue Histoire (le Fransegbe me). Lomé: Tatawo Akpagnon. ISBN 2-86427-054-4 ƒe xexlẽdzesi.
—— (ƒe 2005). Le Trophee de Cristal (le Fransegbe me). Lomé: Les Editions ƒe agbalẽ si nye Rose Bleue. ISBN 2-914567-07-3 ƒe xexlẽdzesi.
Le Piège à Kakaɖedzinyawo (ƒe 2013). Lomé: Tatawo Awoudy.
ISBN 979 10 91011 21 1. Ƒe 1999 ƒe ɣleti gbãtɔ me
 Un Tunnel sans Bout (ƒe 2015). Lomé: Tata siwo nye Les Continents. ISBN 9-7829-1870-581-9 ƒe xexlẽdzesi

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

Kadodo siwo le gota

title: Ata Messan Ajavon Zeus
text:
Ata Messan Ajavon Zeus nye Togo dunyahela, eye wònye Save Togo
Collective ƒe zimenɔla tso esime woɖo habɔbɔa.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Robert Ajavon
text:
Robert Ajavon (wodzi le April 10, 1910-1996, Togo) nye Togo dunyahela
si wɔ dɔ le France ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tso ƒe 1952 va ɖo ƒe 1958 me.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Cynthia Akanga
text:
Cynthia Akanga nye Togo-Franse ɣeɖula, ɣeɖula, aɖaŋudɔwo
dzikpɔla kple fefe siwo woɖena fiana le agbe me dzikpɔla.
Le ƒe 1998 me la, edze le hadzidzi si nye "Notre-Dame de Paris" me.
Tso 18 April 2014 dzi la, edze le ɣeyiɣi evelia me le wɔna si nye The Best,
si woɖe ɖe go le TF1 dzi, si Estelle Denis kple Christophe Beaugrand wɔ.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Yézoumi Akogo
text:
Yézoumi Akogo nye agbledede ŋuti dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunyala
aɖe si tso Togo, eye wòde Benin Dukɔa ƒe Yunivɛsiti.
Eƒe numekukua dzro numiemie siwo wozãna le asi me abɔwo,
tubers kple atikewɔtiwo me ƒe kaka le vitro me.
Le ƒe 2000 me la, wona L’Oréal-UNESCO Nyɔnuwo ƒe
Dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya ƒe Kpekpeɖeŋunanae, si nana
amesiwo xɔe la te ŋu kpɔa ga tsɔ wɔa numekuku le gbeadzi.
Akogo wɔ dɔ tso okra ƒe kaka le vitro ŋu, kpakple kpɔɖeŋu
siwo wowɔ hena dodokpɔ ƒe numiemie ƒe nɔnɔmewɔwɔ ŋu.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Martin Aku
text:
Martin Aku (Anyɔnyɔ 2, 1913 le Lomé, Togo – Masa 17, 1970 le Lomé) nye Togo dunyahela si
wɔ dɔ le France Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tso ƒe 1946–1951.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Kangni Alem
text:
Kangni Alem (wodzi le 21 Afɔfiɛ1966 le Lomé) nye Togotɔ
agbalẽŋlɔla, gbegɔmeɖela kple agbalẽŋlɔla .
Enye fefeŋlɔla kple nufiala hã, amesi ɖo Atelier Théâtre
de Lomé ("Lomé ƒe Fefewɔƒe") le ƒe 1989 me.
Le ƒe 2003 me la, exɔ Black Literary Prize of Black
Africa ɖe eƒe agbalẽ si nye Cola Cola jazz ta.
Nusi hã ɖe dzesi enye eƒe ŋutinya kpuiwo nuƒoƒoƒu
abe La gazelle s'agenouille pour pleurer ene.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

Kadodo siwo le gota

title: Joseph Amedokpo
text:
Joseph Amedokpo nye Togotɔ nutala aɖe. Wodzii le Vogan,
Togo (Ɣetoɖoƒe Afrika), le ƒe 1946 me, eye wòʋu yi Lagos, Nigeria,
esime wòxɔ ƒe enyi, afisi wòxɔ eƒe sukudede kple aɖaŋudɔwo ƒe hehe le,
eye wòxɔ ɖaseɖigbalẽ le Yaba Asitsaƒe afisi wòsrɔ̃
aɖaŋudɔwɔwɔ le tso ƒe 1966 va ɖo ƒe 1968 me.

Amedokpo zãa ami siwo le nutoa me tsɔ taa nu eye eƒe avɔwo nye wɔkotoku siwo
wogbugbɔ zã, woklɔa wo hekekea wo. Eƒe studio la nye eƒe ƒomea ƒe
akpata ƒe akpa aɖe; gaxɔ si wotsɔ ga wɔe la kpɔa eta tso Afrikatɔwo
ƒe ɣe kple tsidzadza siwo dzana le ɣeyiɣi aɖewo me
la me. Wode dzesii le Europa kple United States.

Le November 2008 me la, wotia Amedokpo be wòanye nutala ene dometɔ
ɖeka na Dell ƒe Product RED ƒe ɖoɖoa abe xexeame katã ƒe aʋawɔwɔ kple
AIDS ƒe akpa aɖe ene. Nutala bubu siwo wotia dometɔ
aɖewoe nye Siobhan Gunning, Bruce Mau kple Mike Ming.

Fifia la, ga aɖeke mele Joseph Amedokpo si wòatsɔ
aƒle atike, aɖu nu nyuie alo akpɔ eƒe ƒomea dzi o.
Agent si dzra eƒe nuwɔwɔ, ɖeko wònaa euro 50 le ɣleti 6 ɖesiaɖe me.
Le gɔmedzedzea me la, womena mɔnukpɔkpɔe be wòaxlẽ eƒe nubabla o.
Keke alo ʋu, alo elektrikŋusẽ mele Joseph Amedokpo si le eƒe aƒe me o.
Gbe aɖewo la, ga menɔa esi wòatsɔ aƒle nusiwo hiã be
wòawɔ dɔ nyuie o; emegbe ele edzi be wòado ga le viawo si.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

Kadodo siwo le gota

title: Abra Amedomé
text:
Abra Amedomé, wodzi Abra Julie Mawupé Vovor nye Togo dunyahela nyɔnu.

Esi Abra Julie Amedome xɔ hehe abe atikewɔla ene le France, Montpellier,
eye wòtrɔ yi Togo eye wòva zu asitsala si kpɔ dzidzedze ŋutɔ.
Eyae nye atikewɔla nyɔnu gbãtɔ le Togo. Eɖe nufialagã
Antoine Afantchao Amedome (si nye atikewɔwɔ ŋuti nufialagã).
me la, eva zu Union National des Femmes Togolaise ƒe zimenɔla.
Le ƒe 1979 me la, eva zu hadomenyawo kple nyɔnuwo ƒe
nuwɔwɔ ƒe dɔdzikpɔla, eye wòyi dɔ sia dzi vaseɖe ƒe 1983 me.
Enye nyɔnu ade siwo woti ɖe Togo ƒe Sewɔtakpekpea me
le ƒe 1979 me la dometɔ ɖeka; ame mamlɛawoe nye Nuɖala Meatchi,
Kossiwa Monsila, Essohana Péré, Zinabou Touré, kple Adjoavi Trenou.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Kokou Agbemadon
text:
Kokou Solété Agbemadon (wodzi le Dame 23, 1951 le Lomé) nye Togo dunyahela le Rassemblement du peuple togolais (RPT) me.

Agbemeŋutinya
Agbemadon nye Tomenukuƒewo, Ŋusẽ kple Tsiwo ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla tso Masa 20, 2005 vaseɖe esime wotsɔ ŋkɔ na dziɖuɖu si kplɔe ɖo le Anyɔnyɔ 20, 2006 dzi.

Eyae nye ame gbãtɔ si nɔ RPT ƒe ametiakɔdala ƒe ŋkɔwo me na Yoto Nutome le Kele 2007 ƒe sewɔtakpekpe ƒe tiatiawɔɣi, gake tsitretsiɖeŋulawo ƒe Comité d'action pour le renouveau (CAR) ye xɔ zikpui etɔ̃awo katã le Yoto.

Wotia Agbemadon be wòanye RPT Titinakɔmiti me tɔ tso Yoto Nutome le akpahaa ƒe Takpekpe 9 lia me le Dzome 2006 me.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

Agbemeŋutinya
Ame siwo wodzi le ƒe 1951 me
Togotɔwo

title: Julien Amegandjin
text:
Julien Amegandjin (wodzi le Dame 2, 1940 le Togoville) nye Togotɔ agbalẽnyalagã.
Exɔ eƒe sukudede le Togo kple France, eye wòsrɔ̃
akɔntabubu kple akɔntabubu le Paris Yunivɛsiti.
Enye nufiala gbã le France, eye le ƒe 1970-awo me la, enye
Dukɔ Ƒoƒuawo ƒe Institut de Formation et de Recherche Demographiques
(Amewo ƒe Agbɔsɔsɔ Ŋuti Hehenaƒe Kple Numekuku
Dɔwɔƒe) ƒe dɔdzikpɔla le Yaounde, Cameroon.
Le ƒe 1986 me la, ezã ƒe ɖeka tsɔ dzra eƒe agbalẽ si nye
Démographie mathématique, si va zu nusrɔ̃gbalẽ vevi aɖe
na amewo ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ ŋuti nusrɔ̃viwo tso ɣemaɣi.
Tso ɣemaɣi la, etsɔ eɖokui na le Ɣetoɖoƒe Afrika koŋ, ɖe agbledede ŋuti akɔntabubuwo wɔwɔ ŋu.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Claude Améganvi
text:
Claude Henri Améganvi (wodzi le 12 Dasiamime 1953,
Lomé) nye Togotɔ Trotskytɔ kple dunyahela tsã.
Xɔtuɖaŋunyala le hehexɔxɔ me, eye le ƒe 1977 me la, eva ge ɖe
aboyo sukuviwo ƒe habɔbɔ me le France tsɔ tsi tre ɖe akpa
ɖeka ƒe dzizizidziɖuɖu si nye Gnassingbé Eyadéma ŋu.
Ekpe asi ɖe Togo Dɔwɔlawo ƒe Habɔbɔ si Kpɔa Demokrasi Ta (OTTD) ɖoɖo anyi ŋu le ƒe 1988 me.
Etrɔ yi Togo le ƒe 1991 me le dunyahehe me ablɔɖe ƒe ɣeyiɣi aɖe
me eye wònye amedɔdɔ le Dukɔa ƒe Takpekpea me eye emegbe
wònye Dukɔa ƒe Aɖaŋuɖotakpekpe Kɔkɔtɔ (trɔtrɔ ƒe sewɔtakpekpe).
Le Dzome 1991 me la, egayi aboyo me ake, fifia ya le Benin, vaseɖe ƒe 1997 me.
Le Dɔwɔlawo ƒe Habɔbɔ (PT) ƒe gɔmeɖoanyi me le ƒe 1998
me la, wotia Améganvi Dukɔa ƒe Ðoɖowɔla.
Ekpɔtɔ nye ɖeklemiɖela vevie le Eyadéma kple viaŋutsu Faure Gnassingbé ƒe dziɖuɖuwo ŋu.
Le Anyɔnyɔ 2002 me la, wotso afia nɛ be wòanɔ gaxɔ me ɣleti ene le esi wògblẽ
ŋkɔ nɛ ta; wogblɔ be ena Togo nyadzɔdzɔgbalẽ aɖe nya si ŋu kpeɖodzi mele o be
Forbes magazine yɔ Dukplɔla Eyadéma be enye xexeame ƒe kesinɔtɔwo dometɔ ɖeka. Wodzi tohehea ɖe edzi
va ɖo ɣleti ade, eye woɖe asi le Améganvi ŋu le Dzodze 2003 me.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Gad Ami
text:
Gad Ami nye ŋkɔ bubu na Amivi Gadegbeku (wodzi le ƒe
1958 me), si nye Fransegbe me agbalẽŋlɔla tso Togo.
Eyae nye nyɔnu agbalẽŋlɔla gbãtɔ le Togo.

Agbe
Le ƒe 2001 me la, eʋu yi United States.==Dɔwɔwɔwo==
Etrange domenyinu: roman [Domenyinu wɔnuku: agbalẽ aɖe]. Lomé: Nouvelles Tatawo ƒe afrikawo, 1985. ISBN 978-2723609319
La croix de la mariée: roman [Ŋugbetɔ ƒe atitsoga: agbalẽ aɖe]. Cotonou, Dukɔa ƒe Takpekpewo: Les Éditions du Flamboyant: Émeraude Éditions, 2014. ISBN 978-9991959504

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Jide Orire
text:
jide Orire nye Nigeria Pentekoste bisiɔp si wodzi le ƒe 1963.
Enye Save and Serve Christ Family
Church ƒe dzikpɔlagã le Ibadan.
wodzii le orire Fiaƒome me le Modakeke.
Enye nyagblɔɖila,srɔ̃ŋutsu kple fofo.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Denis Komivi Amuzu-Dzakpah
text:
Denis Komivi Amuzu-Dzakpah (wodzi le 10 Kele 1943 le
Kpogame Tahasi ) nye Togo Katoliko bisiɔp.

Woɖoe Lomé Nunɔla le Dame 22, 1972. Eɖoe Lomé ƒe Bisiɔpgã le
Masa 8, 2007 dzi, eye woɖoe bisiɔp le Dasiamime 15, 2007 dzi.
Papa Francis xɔ eƒe asiɖeɖe le dɔ ŋu le 23 Adeɛmekpɔxe 2019 dzi.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

Kadodo siwo le gota

title: Christelle Aquéréburu
text:
Christelle Aquéréburu nye Togotɔ sinimawɔla. Enye sinimasuku
si nye Ecole de cinéma au Togo (ECRAN) ɖola 
kple edzikpɔla, kple nuƒoƒo kple nukpɔkpɔ ƒe dɔwɔƒe si nye African Dreams ƒe dɔdzikpɔla.

Agbe
Christelle Aquéréburu ɖe asi le dɔwɔwɔ kple ƒudzidɔwɔƒe aɖe si le dukɔ geɖe me ŋu be yeaɖo ECRAN le ƒe 2009 me.
ECRAN fia nu sukuvi siwo wu 100 eye wòwɔ sinima kple nuŋlɔɖi 20.
Wotia ECRAN sukuvi ɖeka, Essi Névamé Akpandza, ƒe dɔwɔwɔ
ɖe Suku ƒe Sinimawo ƒe hatsotso me le ƒe 2013 FESPACO me.

Aquéréburu ɖe srɔ̃ eye vi etɔ̃ le esi.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Théo Ananissoh
text:
Théo Ananissoh (wodzi le ƒe 1962 me) nye Togotɔ agbalẽŋlɔla si le Germany. Esrɔ̃ egbegbe agbalẽwo kple agbalẽ siwo wotsɔ sɔ kple wo nɔewo le Paris III Yunivɛsiti: Sorbonne Nouvelle. Efia nu le France kple Germany, afisi wòʋu le le ƒe 1994 me.
Eƒe agbalẽwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye Lisahoé (ƒe 2005),
Un reptile par habitant (ƒe 2007), Ténèbres à midi (ƒe 2010), kple L’invitation (ƒe 2013), si Éditions Elyzad ta esime wònɔ Tunisia.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Germaine Kouméalo Anaté
text:
Germaine Kouméalo Anaté (wodzi le Masa 15, 1968 le Kazaboua, le Sotouboua
Nutome) nye Togo dziɖuɖumegã, agbalẽnyala kple agbalẽŋlɔla.
Le 17 Anyɔnyɔ 2013 dzi la, woɖoe Kadodo, Dekɔnuwo, Aɖaŋudɔwo kple
Dukɔmeviwo ƒe Hehenadɔwo ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla le Kwesi Ahoomey-Zunu1 ƒe dziɖuɖu me.
Enɔ Togo ƒe Suku Kɔkɔwo Kple Numekuku Dɔwɔƒe ƒe
Dɔwɔlawo ƒe Tatɔ ƒe ɖoƒe hafi wodoe ɖe ŋgɔ wòzu subɔla.
Esi wònye Nyatakakaŋutinunya Kple Kadodo Ŋuti Nunya ƒe ɖɔkta
ƒe ɖaseɖigbalẽ le Bordeaux III Yunivɛsiti le France ta la, enye nufiala kple numekula le
go sia me le Lomé kple Kara yunivɛsitiwo me. Anaté’ nye Togo Agbalẽŋlɔlawo
ƒe Habɔbɔ (AET) ƒe Dukplɔla eye wònye agbalẽ geɖe ŋlɔla.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: David Ananou
text:
David Ananou (ƒe 1917–2000) nye agbalẽŋlɔla
tso Togo, eye wònye agbalẽŋlɔla Le Fils du fétiche.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Ken Adam
text:
Sir Kenneth Hugo Adam (wodzi Klaus Hugo Adam ; 5 Dzodze 1921 – 10 Tedoxe 2016) nye
Britaintɔ sinimawɔla si wodzi le Germany. Wodzii le Berlin.
Wonya Adam nyuie ɖe eƒe nɔnɔmetata siwo wòwɔ na James
Bond ƒe sinima siwo wowɔ le ƒe 1960 kple 1970
ƒeawo me ta, kpakple Ðɔkta Strangelove hã ta.
Exɔ Academy ƒe Kafukafu eve (ƒe 1975, 1994) kple BAFTA ƒe Kafukafu eve (ƒe 1964, 1965).
Adam ku le London le 10 March 2016 dzi, esime wòxɔ ƒe 95.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

Nyatakakadzraɖoƒe bubuwo

title: Red Adams
text:
Charles Dwight "Red" Adams (Kele 7, 1921 – Dzove 18, 2017) nye
Amerikatɔ baseball ƒola bibi, ŋkutsala kple bɔlƒoƒo ƒe hehenala.
Eƒoa bɔl abe pitcher ene. Wonyae nyuie wu le esi wòƒo bɔl na Los
Angeles Angels eye emegbe wòzu ŋkutsalawo na Los Angeles Dodgers.
Eƒo bɔl na Chicago Cubs si le Major League Baseball (MLB) hã me le ƒe 1946. Wodzii le Parlier, California.

Adams ku le Dzove 18, 2017 dzi le Fresno, California esime wòxɔ ƒe 95.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

Nyatakakadzraɖoƒe bubuwo

title: Perry Miller Adato
text:
Perry Miller Adato (ƒe 1921 – Anyɔnyɔ 16, 2018) nye Amerikatɔ
nuŋlɔɖi film wɔla kple edzikpɔla kple agbalẽŋlɔla.
Wodzii le Yonkers, New York.

Adato xɔ Emmy ƒe Kafukafu le ƒe 1968 me ɖe eƒe sinima gbãtɔ si nye Dylan Thomas:
The World I Breathe ta. Wonyae hã ɖe eƒe sinima siwo nye Gertrude Stein:
When This You See, Remember Me le ƒe 1970. Le ƒe
1980 me la, exɔ Emmy ƒe ŋkɔxɔxɔ ɖe Picasso-A Painter’s Diary ta.

Adato ku le Anyɔnyɔ 16, 2018 dzi le Westport, Connecticut esime wòxɔ ƒe 97.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

Nyatakakadzraɖoƒe bubuwo

title: Ernest Patili Assi
text:
Ernest Patili Assi (Dzome 1936 – 16 Dzodze 1996), nye bisiɔp
gbãtɔ le Roma Katoliko Saɖaganutome le Kara, Togo.
Woɖoe nunɔlanyenye le Masa 28, 1964 dzi, woɖoe bisiɔp le saɖaganuto yeye si
woɖo la me le Kele 15, 1994 dzi gake ɣleti 18 koe wòku le.

Wodzii le Bohou nuto me eye wòdoa Kabiye kple Fransegbe.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Gnimdéwa Atakpama
text:
Gnimdéwa Atakpama (wodzi le 19 Afɔfiɛ 1977 le Lomé) nye Togo
nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔla, agbalẽŋlɔla kple Fransegbe nufiala.

Eŋlɔ ɖeviwo ƒe agbalẽ ene vaseɖe ƒe 2015 me: La désillusion (2003),
Tolo-Tolo (2004), Sauve-souris ! (2011) kple Surtout n'entrez ƒe ɣeɖuɖu le
kotoku me ! (ƒe 2012), si me woɖe mamlɛtɔa gɔme ɖe Italygbe me le ƒe 2013 me.
Le eƒe nuŋɔŋlɔ me la, ewɔa ŋusẽkpɔɖeamedzi siwo tso eya ŋutɔ ƒe ɖevime la ŋudɔ zi
geɖe. Le Dzome 2007 me la, enye Dukɔwo Dome Ŋutinyagbɔgblɔ
ƒe Ŋkekenyui kple Aɖaŋudɔwo ƒe tatɔ le Togo.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Barbro Hiort af Ornäs
text:
Barbro Hiort af Ornäs (28 Dasiamime 1921 – 28 Adeɛmekpɔxe 2015) nye Swedentɔ fefewɔla.
Wodzii le Gothenburg, Sweden. Exɔ Fefewɔla Nyuitɔ ƒe Kafukafu
le ƒe 1958 ƒe Cannes Sinimawɔƒea ɖe sinima si nye Brink of Life ta.
Wonyae hã ɖe eƒe akpa siwo wòwɔ le  Esi Dua Le Alɔ̃m, Nyɔnu
Siawo Katã, Anna ƒe Dzodzro, kple le Srɔ̃ɖeɖe ƒe Gɔmesese me.

Af Ornäs ku le Adeɛmekpɔxe 28, 2015 dzi le Gothenburg le dzɔdzɔmenuwo ta, eye wòxɔ ƒe 94.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

Nyatakakadzraɖoƒe bubuwo

title: Gianni Agnelli
text:
Giovanni "Gianni" Agnelli, OMRI, OML, OMCA, CGVM, CMG (Italiagbe: [ˈdʒanni aˈɲɛlli];
12 Tedoxe 1921 – 24 Dzove 2003), si wogayɔna be L'Avvocato ("Senyala"), nye Italytɔ asitsala.
Wonyae ɖe eƒe asitsadɔwɔwɔ le Fiat ta. Esi wònye Fiat ƒe tatɔ ta la, ekpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe Italy ƒe GDP ƒe 4.4% dzi.
Eyae nye kesinɔtɔ kekeake le egbegbe Italytɔwo ƒe ŋutinya me.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Louis Atayi
text:
Louis Atayi (Anyɔnyɔ 8, 1918 – Dzove 5, 2008) nye Togotɔ atikewɔla.
Wode dzesii le numekuku siwo wòwɔ na Xexeame ƒe
Lãmesẽ Habɔbɔa ta, vevietɔ le ƒe 1970 kple 1980 ƒeawo me.

Woɖoe Xexeame ƒe Lãmesẽ Habɔbɔ teƒenɔla le Congo(Brazzaville) Senegal,
Mauritania, The Gambia kple Côte d'Ivoire. Exɔ dzudzɔ le dɔme le ƒe
1985 me be yeava nɔ Lomé (Togo) afisi wòku le le Dzove 5, 2008 dzi.
Louis Anani Ayayi Atayi ta atikewɔwɔ ŋuti magazine kple agbalẽ gbogbo
aɖewo, eye wota wo dometɔ geɖe le eƒe ɣeyiɣi si me
wònɔ WHO le Brazzaville, Republic of the Congo me.
Ewɔ dɔ aduadu kple Benintɔ atikewɔla xɔŋkɔ Basile Adjou Moumouni le agbalẽ
gbogbo aɖewo me, eye le ƒe 1970 me la, woa kple Moumouni kpakple ame bubu
geɖe ta agbalẽ si nye, Une Conception intégrée des services de santé
publique dans la Région africaine., si nye numekuku tso dukɔa ƒe lãmesẽnya
siwo li fifia ŋu le Afrika nutoa me, le dɔ wɔm na Bureau régional de l’Afrique.
Atayi ɖe Eléonore d’Almeida eye wòdzi vi ene.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Barthélémy Attisso
text:
Barthélémy Attisso (ƒe 1945 – Dasiamime 29, 2021) nye Togo senyala kple gitaƒola si fia nu eɖokui,
si xɔ ŋkɔ wu le eƒe dɔwɔwɔ kple Pan-African haƒoha si le Senegal si nye Orchestra Baobab ta.

Agbemeŋutinya
Attisso, si wodzi le ƒe 1944 alo 1945 me la ʋu yi Dakar le ƒe 1966 me be yeasrɔ̃ se le Dakar Yunivɛsiti.
Exɔ gita be yeakpɔ ga, eƒoa ha le klabuwo me eye wòge ɖe Star Band haƒoha me.
Le ƒe 1970 ƒe gɔmedzedze la, eva ge ɖe Orchestra Baobab me,
eye wòdo sɔ le haƒoha la ƒe dzidzedzekpɔkpɔ me yi ƒe 1980 ƒeawo me.
Esi haƒohaa mu le ƒe 1987 me la, Attisso trɔ yi Togo be yeawɔ senyalawo.
Meƒo gita o vaseɖe ƒe 2001 ƒe ƒuƒoƒo yeyea me, eye wòƒo ha heɖi tsa kple
Orchestra Baobab tso ɣemaɣi, togbɔ be elé eƒe nuwɔna me ɖe asi le Lomé hã.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Richard Attipoé
text:
Richard Attipoé (20 Afɔfiɛ 1957 – 3 Masa 2007) nye Togo dunyahela.
Ewɔ dɔ le Togo dziɖuɖua me abe Sɔhɛwo kple Kamedefefewo ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla
ene tso Anyɔnyɔ 2006 vaseɖe Masa 2007 eye wònye Togo Dukɔa ƒe Kpekpeɖeŋunaha (RPT) si nɔ dzi ɖum la me tɔ.

Attipoé nye RPT ƒe ametiakɔdala Faure Gnassingbé ƒe akɔdada ƒe
dɔdzikpɔla le dukplɔla ƒe tiatia si wowɔ le Afɔfiɛ 24, 2005. Esi wòyi ɖada akɔ le
tiatiawɔgbe la, woƒoe, kpakple amedzikpɔla eve; egblɔ be
tsitretsiɖeŋulawo ƒe akpadzinɔlawo gbɔe amedzidzedze sia tso.

Woɖo Attipoé, si nye RPT ƒe Titinakɔmiti me tɔ, be wòanye Sɔhɛwo Kple
Kamedefefewo ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla le dziɖuɖu si woyɔ le Anyɔnyɔ 20, 2006 dzi la me.
Eku le Paramount Yameʋudɔwɔƒe ƒe helikɔpta ƒe afɔku me le Masa 3, 2007
dzi le Lungi Dukɔwo Dome Yameʋudzeƒe si te ɖe
Freetown, Sierra Leone ŋu kpe ɖe ame 21 bubuwo ŋu.
Attipoé nɔ Togotɔwo ƒe amedɔdɔ aɖe si de Afrika Dukɔwo ƒe Kplɔ̃ɖoƒe ƒe
bɔlƒoƒo ƒe dodokpɔ ƒe hoʋiʋli aɖe si wowɔ le Freetown le Sierra Leone kple Togo dome
la me; le bɔlƒoƒoa megbe la, wokɔ wo yi yameʋudzeƒea, afisi dzo dze helikɔpta la le
eye wòdze anyi esime wònɔ agbagba dzem be yeadze anyi. Woɖi Attipoé le Lomé le Masa 23 lia dzi.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Edem Awumey
text:
Edem Awumey (wodzi le ƒe 1975 me le Lomé, Togo) nye Togo-Canadatɔ agbalẽŋlɔla.
Wodzii le Togo eye wòde suku le France, eye wòle Gatineau, Quebec, tso ƒe 2005 me.

Eƒe agbalẽ gbãtɔ si nye Port-Mélo xɔ Grand prix littéraire d'Afrique noire le ƒe
2006 me, eye eƒe agbalẽ evelia si nye Les Pied dzadzra nye ame
si woɖo ɖe Prix Goncourt ƒe ŋkɔ kpui me le ƒe 2009 me.
Dirty Feet, si nye Les Pieds ƒe nudzadzrawo ƒe Eŋlisigbe me gɔmeɖeɖe si Lazer
Lederhendler ŋlɔ la hã nye ame si woɖo kpuie na ƒe 2011 ƒe Dudzikpɔlagã ƒe
Kafukafu na Fransegbe yi Eŋlisigbe me gɔmeɖeɖe kple ƒe 2012 ƒe ReLit ƒe Kafukafu na nyakpakpa.

Wota eƒe agbalẽ etɔ̃lia si nye Rose déluge le ƒe 2011 me, eye
wota eƒe agbalẽ enelia si nye Explication de la nuit le ƒe 2013 me.
Eyae nye Tierno Monénembo: le roman de l’exil, si nye Tierno
Monénembo ƒe dɔwɔwɔ ŋuti numekuku vevi aɖe hã ŋlɔla.
le roman de l’exil, si nye Tierno Monénembo ƒe dɔwɔwɔ ŋuti numekuku vevi aɖe.

Le ƒe 2018 ƒe Dudzikpɔlagã ƒe Kafukafuwɔƒea la, Phyllis Aronoff kple Howard Scott xɔ
Dudzikpɔlagã ƒe Kafukafu le Fransegbe me yi Eŋlisigbe me gɔmeɖeɖe me na Descent Into Night,
si nye Eŋlisigbe me gɔmeɖeɖe si nye Explication de la nuit.
Wota eƒe agbalẽ yeyetɔ kekeake si nye Mina parmi les ombres le ƒe 2018 ƒe adame.
Wotiae ɖe ŋkɔ kpui aɖe me na Dudzikpɔlagã ƒe Kafukafu na Fransegbe
me nyakpakpawo le ƒe 2019 ƒe Dudzikpɔlagã ƒe Kafukafuwɔƒea.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Siria
text:
Syria  alo Siria, alo (le se nu: Syria Arab Republic abe alesi eƒe ŋkɔe tso ƒe 1961 me ene), nye Arabiatɔwo ƒe xexeame wobu be titinadukɔ republic, si me nuto 14 le, eƒe fiadu kple gãtɔ kekeake du si nye Damasko .  Enɔ Titina Ɣedzeƒe nuto me le Ɣetoɖoƒe Asia ; Eƒe liƒo le dziehe kple Dɔkɔ, le ɣedzeƒe kple Iraq, le dzigbe kple Jordan, eye le ɣetoɖoƒe kple Palestina, Lebanon, kple Mediterranea Ƒua,   si ƒe lolome nye 185,180 kilometa sq, si ƒe anyigba kple numiemiewo kpakple lãwo ƒe nɔnɔme vovovowo le, eye yame ƒe nɔnɔme le Mediterranea-ƒua kple anyigba si me tsi medzana le o dome . Siria le Iraq xa be enye teƒe xoxotɔ kekeake si amegbetɔ ƒe dekɔnuwo ƒe vidzidɔ nɔ,  eye wòxɔ ŋkɔ le agbalẽnyalawo ƒe nufiafia siwo sɔ gbɔ wu nu tso Asiria ; Aleke kee wòɖale o, Siria ƒe ŋutinya me nuto to vovo tso egbegbe Siria-dukɔa gbɔ le kekeɖenudɔwɔwɔ kple teƒe si wòkeke ta, eye gbãtɔa ku ɖe Levant, alo Ɣletivimefakaka si Tsi Dzi, ŋu. Woke ɖe amegbetɔ ƒe dzesiwo ŋu le Siria tso ƒe akpe geɖe enye sia, eye wobu Damasko-dugã la be enye du xoxotɔ kekeake le xexeame, eye amegbetɔwo ƒe nɔƒe geɖe le dukɔa me tso Kpeɣeyiɣia me ke do tso ƒe alafa wuiɖekɛlia D.M.Ŋ., si yi dukɔa ƒe dekɔnu ƒe dzesidenu vevitɔ dzi vaseɖe esime wotsɔ eƒe akpa gãtɔ wɔ Arabtɔwoe le ƒe alafa wuiɖekɛlia M.Ŋ. Le Blematɔwo ƒe akpaa me la, dukɔa nye Seleucid Fiaɖuƒea ƒe akpa aɖe - vevietɔ Seleucid fiawo yɔ wo ɖokui be Siria Fia - eye emegbe Roma kple Byzantium Fiaɖuƒea; Le Titinaɣeyiɣiwo me le Levant dzi ɖuɖu megbe la, dukɔa nye Umayyad-dukɔa ƒe fiadu - Islam-dukɔ gãtɔ kekeake le ŋutinya me le anyigba ƒe lolome gome - eye le Abbasid-dukɔa me la, woɖo emirates kple dukɔ siwo kpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe amewo dzi geɖe, eye wokplɔe ɖo Ottoman Syria ɖoɖo anyi, si nɔ anyi vaseɖe Xexemeʋa Gbãtɔ me . Le aʋaa megbe la, Syria ƒe ɖokuisinɔnɔ woɖe gbeƒãe le March 8, 1920 dzi to Syria ƒe Takpekpe Gã la dzi, gake France gbe be yemada asi ɖe takpekpea dzi o, eye wòɖe gbeƒã mama ƒe sededewo le September 1920 me, emegbe kple vivivi vaseɖe ƒe 1936 me be woawɔ ɖeka kple dɔwɔƒe atɔ̃ siwo le Syria Republic, si xɔ ɖokuisinɔnɔ blibo le ƒe 1946 me, be wòawu Sewɔtakpekpe ƒe demokrasi ƒe ɣeyiɣi kpui, si me xaxa geɖe de dzesii, le ƒe 1963 me esime woɖo akpa ɖeka, sosialist ɖoɖo. Syria ƒe kuxia do mo ɖa le ƒe 2011 me, si na tsɔtsrɔ̃ geɖe va le dukɔa me, eye wogblɔ be enye afɔku gãtɔ kekeake le egbegbe ɣeyiɣia me. Woɖe dukplɔse si li fifia ɖe go le ƒe 2012 me, eye abe esi do ŋgɔ nɛ ene la, ƒe 1973 ƒe dukplɔsea gblɔ be dziɖuɖu ƒe ɖoɖoa nye dukplɔse kple dukplɔla tɔ .

Syria dukɔa, tso dukɔ madeŋgɔwo me, nye to vovovo me tɔwo, gbegbɔgblɔ kple subɔsubɔha vovovowo.Sunni Arabtɔwo siwo le Syria ye nye ame akpa gãtɔ kple amewo katã ƒe 63%; Ameawo katã ƒe dekɔnu ƒe nɔnɔme geɖewo li. Du siwo ɖe dzesi wu siwo me ame miliɔn eve kple edzivɔ le enye Aleppo kple Damasko; Amewo ƒe xexlẽme nye 22.5 miliɔn fifia, eye ʋuʋu yi dukɔ bubuwo me le dɔ dzi tso ƒe alafa wuiadelia me ke, eye Siriatɔwo ƒe nuto gã aɖewo le duta . Wobua Syria be enye dukɔ madeŋgɔwo dometɔ ɖeka, si ƒe ganyawo gbɔdzɔ, ga si wokpɔna le mama dedie nu bɔbɔ, eye nufitifitiwɔwɔ bɔ ɖe afisiafi. Le nyateƒe me la, ganyawo nɔ te ɖe agbledede, tsaɖiɖi, kple subɔsubɔdɔwo dzi, eye kesinɔnu siwo le anyigba te, siwo dometɔ aɖewo womede ga me haɖe o le.

title: George Akosa
text:
George Akosa nye Ghana dunyahela, enye Sewɔtakpekpe gbãtɔ me tɔ le Republic enelia me si le Mampong nuto si le Ashanti nutoa me teƒe.

Agbenɔnɔ ɖevime kple sukudede
Wodzi George le Mampong le Ashanti Nutome le Ghana.

Dunyahehe
Wotia George be wòanye sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ le National Democratic Congress (NDC) ƒe tikiti dzi le December 1992 ƒe Ghana sewɔtakpekpe ƒe tiatiawɔɣi na Mampong Nutome le Ashanti Nutome le Ghana.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Le Arbor
text: Le Arbor (Pɔlisigbe: W altanie) nye amitata si Polandtɔ nu ŋutɔŋutɔ nutala Aleksander Gierymski wɔ le ƒe 1882. Woɖee fia le Dukɔa ƒe Blemanudzraɖoƒe le Warsaw, Poland.

title: Garrick Sokari Braide
text:
Garrick Sokari Braide(ƒe 1882-1918)nye Afrikatɔ mawunyagblɔla.
Wodzi Braide le Obonoma le Niger
Delta nutoa me, eye wòtsi le Bakana.
Exɔ nyɔnyrɔ le ƒe 1910 me esime wòxɔ ƒe 28, eye woɖo kpe edzi le ƒe 1912 me.

Braide gblɔ Afrikatɔwo ƒe mɔnu bubu aɖe si woate ŋu azã ɖe nyanyuigbɔgblɔ si wozãna le blema teƒe.
Le esi teƒe be wòafia dzixɔsewo la, trɔ̃wo tsɔtsrɔ̃ koŋue wòwɔ aʋa.
Braide hã wɔ aʋa nyuie ŋutɔ ɖe ahanono ŋu.

Esi Braide kpɔ dzidzedze le amewo dada me vɔ la,eyomedzelawo va nɔ ebum be enye nyagblɔɖila
Ahanono ƒe ɖiɖi na dziɖuɖumegãwo,siwo tsi dzi ɖe adzɔxexe ƒe ga si dzi ɖe kpɔtɔ ŋu la, ku nu me le eŋu.
Wolé Braide le March 1916 me le nutsotso siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye be egblẽ ŋutifafa me ta.
Woɖe asi le Braide ŋu le gaxɔ me le ƒe 1918 me, eye wòku le ƒe ma ƒe nuwuwu.

Yomedzelawo ɖo Christ Army Church of Nigeria le ƒe 1916 me.

Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

title: Wilfred Chikpa Anagbe C.M.F
text:
wilfred Chikpa Anagbe C.M.F (wodzi le ƒe 1965 me) nye Nigeriatɔ Katoliko-ha la ƒe nunɔlagã,
eye wònye Roma Katoliko-ha si le Makurdi ƒe bisiɔp.
Woɖoe Makurdi ƒe bisiɔp kpeɖeŋutɔ le ƒe 2014 me,eye ​​wòxɔ ɖe bisiɔp ƒe ɖoƒe teƒe le ƒe 2015 me.
Anagbe wɔ dɔ siwo gbɔna le eƒe nunɔladɔa me:
 .1994 – 1998: Claretian PP ƒe Dɔwɔwɔwo ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla. le Nigeria
 .1996 – 1998: Sukudzikpɔla, Claretian Sukudzikpɔha
 .1998 – 2000: Petro Kɔkɔe ƒe Sɔlemeha, Gariki, Enugu ƒe Saɖaganunɔla ƒe saɖaganunɔla
 .2000 – 2004: Agbledzikpɔla, Claretian Agblededɔ, Utonkon
 .2003 – 2004: Fidelis Sɔlemeha Kɔkɔe ƒe Sɔlemeha ƒe Nunɔla, Allan, kple Utonkon ƒe Tatɔ le Otukpo ƒe Saɖaganutome
 .2004 – 2005: Mawunyasrɔ̃suku le Salamanca Yunivɛsiti (wotso eme esime wotiam be manye Nutome ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla)
 .2005 – 2015: Nutome Bursar na Claretiantɔwo le Nigeria
 .2008 – 2013: Claretian Generalate ƒe Ganyawo ƒe Aɖaŋuɖoha me tɔ le Rome
 .2009 – 2012: Asrafowo ƒe Sɔlemehakplɔla le Tudalawo ƒe Dɔwɔƒe 34 lia, Obinze
 .2013 – 2015: Asrafowo ƒe Sɔlemehakplɔla 3rd Battalion Effurun Barracks, Warri.

Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

title: Ebenezer Dimieari
text:
Ebenezer Tamunoteghe Dimieari CBE nye Nigeria Anglikan nunɔla xɔŋkɔ aɖe le ƒe alafa blaevelia ƒe domedome.

Ede suku le St Andrew's College Oyo kple St John's College, Durham;eye woɖoe le ƒe 1924 me.
Enye Niger ƒe Saɖaganunɔlagã tso ƒe 1939 va ɖo ƒe 1946;
ƒe Bonny tso ƒe 1946 va ɖo ƒe 1948; kple Niger Delta ƒe Bisiɔp tso ƒe 1949 vaseɖe ƒe 1960.
Wokɔe ŋu le June 29, 1949 dzi, to Geoffrey Fisher,
Canterbury ƒe Bisiɔpgã gbɔ, le St Paul ƒe Sɔlemexɔgã (London, UK),
be wòanye bisiɔp ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ na Cecil Patterson, Bisiɔp le Niger.
Ezu Niger Delta ƒe saɖaganutome bisiɔp gbãtɔ le saɖaganuto ma tutu me, le January 1, 1952 dzi.

Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

title: Peter Yariyok Jatau
text:
Peter Yariyok Jatau (5 August 1931 – 16 December 2020) nye Nigeria Roma Katoliko bisiɔpgã.

Wodzi Jatau le Nigeria eye woɖoe nunɔladɔ le ƒe 1963.
Ewɔ dɔ abe bisiɔpgã kpeɖeŋutɔ le Roma Katolikotɔwo
ƒe Saɖaganutomegã si le Kaduna,
Nigeria, tso ƒe 1972 va ɖo ƒe 1975 me eye wònye bisiɔpgã
le saɖaganutowo me tso ƒe 1975 va ɖo ƒe 2007.

De dzesii

title: Henry Johnson (priest
text:
Henry Johnson nye The Upper Nige
ƒe Saɖaganunɔlagã tso ƒe 1878
va ɖo ƒe 1891.

Wodzi Johnson le ƒe 1840 me abe Oyotɔwo ƒe Omoba ene.
Exɔ hehe na nunɔladɔ le Sɔlemeha ƒe
Dutanyanyuigblɔlawo ƒe Habɔbɔ ƒe Kɔledzi, Islington.
Woɖoe saɖaganunɔla le St. George ƒe Sɔlemexɔgã me, Sierra Leone
le ƒe 1866 me, eye woɖoe nunɔla le ƒe 1867.
Johnson subɔ le Fourah Bay, Sherbro kple Lokoja.
Woɖoe bubume M.A. le Cambridge Yunivɛsiti le ƒe 1886 me.

Johnson ku le ƒe 1901 me.

Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

title: Samuel Johnson
text:
Wodzi Samuel Johnson Creoletɔ si gbugbɔ xɔ ŋkɔ le Freetown, Sierra Leone, wònye Henry Erugunjinmi Johnson kple Sarah Johnson ƒe vi adre dometɔ etɔ̃lia le June 24, 1846. Wodzi fofoa, si tsɔ Yoruba ŋkɔ Erugunjinmi na eɖokui la, le ƒe 1810 me le dua me ƒe Oyo-Ile, si nye Oyo Fiaɖuƒea ƒe fiadu. Henry nye Omoba (fiavi) si tso Oyo-ƒomea me, eye wònye ƒe alafa 18 lia me alaafin (fia) Abiodun ƒe tɔgbuiyɔvi.Emegbe wolée le
Atlantik-ƒua ƒe Kluviwo ƒe Asitsatsa me gake dzɔgbenyuietɔe la wogbugbɔ mɔ nɛ yi Sierra Leone, abe Yorubatɔ geɖe ene, abe Samuel Ajayi Crowther (eƒe tɔɖiayɔvi si le didiƒe ʋĩ) kple ame bubuwo ene.
Emegbe edo go Samuel Johnson, amesi ƒe ŋkɔ wòtsɔ na viaŋutsu. Nɔviŋutsu tsitsi 2 nɔ Johnson si, Henry kple Nathaniel, kpakple nɔviŋutsu sue aɖe si ŋkɔe nye Obadiah. Henry kple Nathaniel siaa va zu mawunyadɔgbedelawo kple saɖaganunɔlawo abe Samuel ene, gake Obadiah ya va zu Yorubatɔwo ƒe atikewɔla gbãtɔ si nye afimatɔwo. Ewu eƒe sukudede nu le Sɔlemeha ƒe Dutanyanyuigblɔlawo ƒe Habɔbɔ (CMS) ƒe Hehenaƒe eye emegbe wòfia nu le nusi wova yɔ be Yorubatɔwo ƒe dukɔmeviʋa la me.

Johnson kple Charles Phillips, siwo hã le CMS me, wɔ ɖoɖo be woadzudzɔ aʋawɔwɔ le ƒe 1886 me eye emegbe wowɔ nubabla si na kakaɖedzi Ekiti-duwo ƒe ɖokuisinɔnɔ. Gake Ilorin gbe be yemadzudzɔ aʋawɔwɔ o, eye aʋaa yi edzi.Le ƒe 1880 me la, eva zu saɖaganunɔla eye le ƒe 1888 me la, ezu nunɔla. Enɔ Oyo tso ƒe 1881 me eye wòwu Yorubatɔwo ƒe ŋutinya
ŋuti dɔ aɖe nu
le ƒe 1897. Wogblɔ be nudzɔdzɔ sia tso esi wònɔ vɔvɔ̃m be yeƒe
amewo le woƒe ŋutinya bumee, eye be wova le Europa ŋutinya
nyanya gɔme nyuie wu gbɔ. Nukutɔe la, eƒe Britain
gbeƒãɖelawo tsɔ dɔ sia da ɖe teƒe si mesɔ o.

Le eƒe ku megbe la, nɔviaŋutsu Ðɔkta Obadiah Johnson gaƒo
agbalẽa nu ƒu hegbugbɔ ŋlɔe, eye wòzã bubumegã la ƒe
nuŋlɔɖi gbogboawo abe mɔfianu ene. Le ƒe 1921 me la, eɖee ɖe
go be A History of the Yorubas from the Earliest Times vaseɖe
Britaintɔwo ƒe Takpɔha ƒe Gɔmedzedze. Tso ɣemaɣi la, wotsɔ
agbalẽa sɔ kple The Decline and Fall of the Roman Empire si
Edward Gibbon ŋlɔ.

Agbalẽwo ƒe xexlẽdzesiwo
Falola, Toyin (1993), Mɔɖela, dulɔlɔ̃ kple blemafofo: Samuel
Johnson kple Yorubatɔwo, Madison, WI: Afrika Nusɔsrɔ̃ ƒe
Ðoɖowɔɖi, Univ. ƒe Wisconsin-Madison, ISBN 9780942615197.
Johnson, Samuel (ƒe 1921), Yorubatɔwo ƒe Ŋutinya, Lagos: CMS
Agbalẽdzraƒewo.

Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

Agbemeŋutinya

title: Sope Johnson
text:
Samuel Hugh Stowell Akinsope "Sope" Johnson (Tedoxe 1930 — Siamlɔm 2022) nye Kristo ƒe Sɔlemexɔgã, Lagos ƒe Nufialagã tso ƒe 1970 vaseɖe ƒe 1995.

Johnson de suku le King ƒe Kɔledzi, London kple Lichfield Mawunyasrɔ̃suku. Tso ƒe 1955 va ɖo ƒe 1962 me la, exɔ nuteƒekpɔkpɔ le London abe nudzraɖoƒedzikpɔla ene (si me ƒe eve nɔ St. Martin-in-the Fields hã le) hafi trɔ yi Nigeria be yeazu mawusubɔsubɔnyawo gbɔgblɔ ƒe tatɔ le Nigeria Nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe.

De dzesii

Agbemeŋutinya
Ame siwo wodzi le ƒe 1930 me
Ame siwo ku le ƒe 2022 me

title: Henry Johnson (nunɔla)
text:
Henry Johnson nye The Upper Niger ƒe Saɖaganunɔlagã tso ƒe 1878 va ɖo ƒe 1891.
Wodzi Johnson le ƒe 1840 me abe Oyotɔwo ƒe Omoba ene.
Exɔ hehe na nunɔladɔ le Sɔlemeha ƒe Dutanyanyuigblɔlawo ƒe Habɔbɔ ƒe Kɔledzi,
Islington. Woɖoe saɖaganunɔla le St.
George ƒe Sɔlemexɔgã me, Sierra Leone le ƒe 1866 me,
eye woɖoe nunɔla le ƒe 1867.
Johnson subɔ le Fourah Bay, Sherbro kple Lokoja.
Woɖoe bubume M.A. le Cambridge Yunivɛsiti le ƒe 1886 me.

Johnson ku le ƒe 1901 me.

Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

title: Seth Irunsewe Kale
text:
Seth Irunsewe Kale MBE, OON, CFR (Masa 6, 1904 – Adeɛmekpɔxe 19, 1994) nye Nigeria Anglikan bisiɔp si subɔ abe CMS Gbeŋutise Suku, Lagos ƒe Tatɔ tso ƒe 1944 va ɖo ƒe 1950 eye wònye Lagos Bisiɔp tso ƒe 1963 va ɖo ƒe 1974.

Wokɔe bisiɔp le Andrew Kɔkɔe ƒe Ŋkeke dzi (Adeɛmekpɔxe 1963), to Cecil Patterson, Ɣetoɖoƒe Afrika ƒe Bisiɔpgã gbɔ. Exɔ bubu si nye Afrikatɔ gbãtɔ si ɖe gbeƒã le St Paul ƒe Sɔlemexɔ xɔŋkɔ si le London me.

Agbenɔnɔ le ɖevime
Wodzi Kale be enye ƒome si me ame adre le la ƒe viŋutsu tsitsitɔ le Masa 6, 1904 dzi le Ipata, Mobalufon, le Odogbolu Nutomedziɖuɖu me le Ogun Nutome. Wogblɔ be edzilawo Pa Jacob & Mama Victoria Kale ye nye Kristotɔ gbãtɔ siwo trɔ dzime le kɔƒea me. Esi wodzii la, wona Yorubagbe me ŋkɔ Irunsewe si gɔmee nye “mí” (esia) “se” (edzɔna); “irun” (naneke kura o). Le Masa 25, 1904 dzi la, exɔ nyɔnyrɔ kple ŋkɔ Seth.

Nusᴐsrɔ̃
Edze eƒe sukudede gɔme le Christ Church Gɔmedzesuku, Porogun Ijebu-Ode le ƒe 1912 me eye emegbe wòde Ijebu Ode Gbeŋutise Suku.
Le ƒe 1931 me kple kpekpeɖeŋu tso Ijebu Ode Gbeŋutise Suku ƒe tatɔ
ɣemaɣi, Rev. I.O Ransome-Kuti gbɔ la, Kale va zu ame gbãtɔ si xɔ Mojola
Agbebi ƒe ɖaseɖigbalẽ xɔŋkɔa eye woxɔe ɖe Fourah Bay College, Sierra
Leone afisi wòxɔ Bachelor ƒe ɖaseɖigbalẽ blibo le ƒe Aɖaŋudɔwo. Le
ema megbe la, eyi edzi wɔ ƒe ɖeka bubu si kplɔe ɖo xɔ
Mawunyaŋutinunya ƒe Diploma le ƒe 1935. Le ƒe si kplɔe ɖo me la,
woxɔe ɖe dɔ me abe nufiala ene le CMS Gbeŋutise Suku, Lagos. Le ƒe
1939 me la, exɔ Sukudede ƒe ɖaseɖigbalẽ le London Yunivɛsiti.

Dᴐwᴐna
Kale trɔ gbɔ tso London eye woɖoe enumake CMS Gbeŋutisesuku
Lagos, ƒe tatɔ teƒenɔla, ƒe etɔ̃ koe wòxɔ hafi wòva zu Nigeriatɔ gbãtɔ si
woɖo sukua ƒe tatɔ le ƒe alafa blaevelia me. Le ƒe 1921 me la, Enye
Dukɔa ƒe Nufialawo ƒe Habɔbɔ ɖolawo dometɔ ɖeka, siwo dometɔ
aɖewoe nye Sukudzikpɔla ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ, Jonathan Lucas kple Rev. I.O
Ransome-Kuti.[4] Egakpɔtɔ nye sukutatɔ le CMS Gbeŋutise Suku, Lagos
esime wòzu saɖaganunɔla le Kristo ƒe Sɔlemeha, Lagos le ƒe 1942 me,
woɖoe nunɔla le eƒe saɖaganunɔla ƒe ƒezã dzi le ƒe 1943. Eva zu
Nigeriatɔ gbãtɔ si nye sukutatɔ le ɣeyiɣi didi sia me ɖo St. Andrew ƒe
Nufialawo ƒe Hehenasuku, Oyo, le ƒe 1951 me.[5] Wogblɔ be ena se
kple ɖoɖo gbugbɔ ɖo kɔledzi la me le ƒe geɖe ƒe nazãbubu,
vovototodedeameme, kple hadome vovototodedeameme, si ɖe fu na
kɔledzi la megbe . Le ƒe 1963 me, le Sɔlemeha ƒe Nunɔlawo ƒe
Takpekpe si wowɔ le Toronto me la, woti Bubutɔ Kale be manye Lagos ƒe
Bisiɔp eye woɖoe kɔkɔe le November 30, 1963 dzi.

Ame ŋutɔ ƒe agbenɔnɔ
Kale xɔ ƒe blaeve vɔ atɔ̃ esime wòɖe Juliana Oladunni Odukoya, si nye
Oluwa Idele si tso Ijebu-Ode ƒe tɔgbuiyɔvi. Wowɔ ɖeka kple srɔ̃tɔawo le
srɔ̃ɖeɖe kɔkɔe me le January 6, 1930 dzi le St. Savior’s Church, Italupe,
Ijebu-Ode

Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

Agbemeŋutinya
Ame siwo wodzi le ƒe 1904 me
Ame siwo ku le ƒe 1994 me

title: Domain name registrar
text:
Domenyiŋkɔwo ŋlɔla nye dɔwɔƒe si kpɔa Internet dzi domenyiŋusẽfianu ƒe ŋkɔwo dzadzraɖo dzi. Ele be domenyiŋusẽfianu ƒe ŋkɔ ŋlɔla naxɔ mɔ ɖe domenyiŋusẽfianu si le ɖoƒe kɔkɔ (gTLD) si nye generic top-level domain (gTLD) registry alo dukɔ ƒe code top-level domain (ccTLD) registry me. Agbalẽŋlɔla wɔa dɔ le domenyiŋusẽfianu ƒe ŋkɔ ŋɔŋlɔ ƒe dɔwɔƒe siwo woɖo ƒe mɔfiamewo nu.

Nyadzɔdzɔ 
Vaseɖe ƒe 1999 me la, Network Solutions Inc. (NSI) ye wɔa com, net, kple org top-level domains (TLDs) ƒe ŋkɔwo ŋɔŋlɔ ƒe dɔwɔƒewo. Tsɔ kpe ɖe domain name registry operator ƒe dɔwɔwɔ ŋu la, eya ɖeka kolia si ŋlɔa domain siawo hã. Gake dɔwɔƒe geɖe to agbalẽŋlɔlawo ƒe dɔwɔƒe siwo le wo ɖokui si vɛ. Le ƒe 1996 me la, dɔwɔƒe mawo dometɔ ɖeka, Ivan Pope ƒe dɔwɔƒe, NetNames, to asitsatsa ƒe ŋkɔ ŋɔŋlɔ ƒe dɔwɔƒe si le eɖokui si ƒe susu vɛ si adzra domenyiŋusẽfianu ƒe ŋkɔ ŋɔŋlɔ kple dɔ bubu siwo do ƒome kplii na dukɔa, eye wòaɖo dɔwɔƒe aɖe ƒe asitsaƒe ƒe alɔdze anyi nyuie eye ŋkɔ ŋɔŋlɔ ƒe dɔwɔƒewo nanye nudzrala gãwo .NSI xɔ kpɔɖeŋu sia, si na mlɔeba la, woma ŋkɔ ŋɔŋlɔ kple agbalẽŋlɔla ƒe dɔwo me.[cit

Le ƒe 1997 me la, PGMedia tsɔ nya ɖe NSI ŋu tsɔ tsi tre ɖe asitsatsa ŋu heyɔ DNS ƒe ke ƒe nuto be enye dɔwɔƒe vevi aɖe, eye wowɔ ɖeka kple United States Dukɔa ƒe Dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya Habɔbɔ (NSF) abe amesi wotsɔ nya ɖe eŋu le afɔɖeɖe sia me. Mlɔeba la, wona ablɔɖe NSI tso nyaʋiʋli siwo tsi tre ɖe asitsatsa ŋu me, gake nyaʋiʋlia he nyaƒoɖeamenu si sɔ vɛ be woagbugbɔ aɖo domenyiŋusẽfianu ƒe ŋkɔwo ƒe asi.

Le October 1998 me, le nyaƒoɖeamenu si tso domenyiŋusẽfianu ƒe ŋkɔ ŋɔŋlɔ ƒe asitsaha si nɔ dzidzim ɖe edzi kple ame bubu siwo tsɔ ɖe le eme gbɔ megbe la, wotrɔ asi le NSI ƒe nubabla kple United States ƒe Asitsanyawo Gbɔkpɔƒe ŋu.[2] Ðɔɖɔɖo sia bia be woawɔ ŋkɔ ŋɔŋlɔ ƒe ɖoɖo si woawɔ ɖekae si ado alɔ ŋkɔ ŋlɔla geɖe. Nuɖoanyi sia dze dɔwɔwɔ gɔme le se nu le November 30, 1999 dzi le Internet Dɔwɔƒe si Kpɔa Ŋkɔwo Kple Xexlẽdzesi Siwo Wode Asi Na (ICANN) ƒe dzikpɔkpɔ te, togbɔ be dodokpɔxɔdzikpɔla geɖewo nɔ ɖoɖoa zãm tso March 11, 1999. Tso ɣemaɣi la, ame 900 kple edzivɔwoe ge ɖe eme asi si wowɔna na domenyiŋkɔwo ŋɔŋlɔ ƒe dɔwɔƒewo.

Le agbalẽŋlɔla siwo ge ɖe asitsatsa me le gɔmedzedzea me dome la, wo dometɔ geɖe yi edzi le dzidzim ɖe edzi eye woƒo hoʋlilawo ta. GoDaddy ye nye agbalẽŋlɔla gãtɔ kekeake. Agbalẽŋlɔla bubu siwo wozãna le afisiafi dometɔ aɖewoe nye Enom, Tucows, kple Webcentral. Agbalẽŋlɔla siwo xɔ ŋgɔ le asitsatsa me le gɔmedzedzea me gake emegbe hoʋlilawo ƒo wo ta dometɔ aɖewoe nye Network Solutions kple Dotster.[citation needed]

Ele be agbalẽŋlɔla ɖesiaɖe si dzi ICANN da asi ɖo naxe fe si woɖo ɖi si nye Amerika dɔlar 4,000 kpe ɖe fe si trɔna ŋu.[3] Woɖoe be agbalẽŋlɔla ƒe fe siwo trɔna ƒe ƒuƒoƒo nanye Amerika dɔlar miliɔn 3.8. Hoʋiʋli si ŋkɔ ŋɔŋlɔ ƒe ɖoɖo si woama la na be nuwuwu zãlawo te ŋu tia agbalẽŋlɔla geɖe siwo naa dɔ vovovo siwo do ƒome kplii le asi vovovowo me la dome.

Agbalẽŋlɔla si woɖo 
Domain ŋkɔwo ŋɔŋlɔ ƒe dɔwɔƒewoe léa be na domenyinyi ŋuti nyatakakawo, eye wowɔa nubabla kple domenyiŋusẽfianu ƒe ŋkɔŋlɔlawo be woana ŋkɔ ŋɔŋlɔ ƒe dɔwɔnawo dukɔa. Zãla mamlɛtɔ tiaa agbalẽŋlɔla aɖe be wòana ŋkɔ ŋɔŋlɔ ƒe dɔwɔƒea, eye agbalẽŋlɔla ma va zua agbalẽŋlɔla si woɖo na domenyiŋusẽfianu si zãla la tia.

Agbalẽŋlɔla si woɖo koe ate ŋu atrɔ asi le nyatakaka siwo ku ɖe domenyiŋusẽfianu ƒe ŋkɔwo ŋu le ŋkɔ ŋɔŋlɔ ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe gã aɖe me alo atutu wo ɖa. Enye nusi bɔ be nuwuwu zãla natrɔ agbalẽŋlɔlawo, si ayɔ domenyiŋusẽfianu ƒe asitɔtrɔ ƒe ɖoɖo aɖe le agbalẽŋlɔla siwo ŋu nya ku ɖo dome, si dzi domenyiŋusẽfianu ƒe ŋkɔwo tsɔtsɔ yi teƒe bubu ƒe ɖoɖo tɔxɛwo kpɔa ŋusẽ ɖo.

Ne agbalẽŋlɔla ŋlɔ .com domenyiŋusẽfianu ŋkɔ ɖi na nuwuwu zãla aɖe la, ele be wòaxe ƒe sia ƒe fe si sɔ gbɔ wu si nye US$7.85 na VeriSign, si nye ŋkɔ ŋɔŋlɔ ƒe dɔwɔƒe na com, eye wòaxe US$0.18 ƒe sia ƒe ƒe dɔdzikpɔkpɔfe na ICANN. Domain ŋlɔlawo ƒe akpa gãtɔ ƒe asi dea asi woƒe dɔwɔnawo kple adzɔnuwo ŋu be woatsɔ akpɔ ƒe sia ƒe ƒe fewo kple dɔdzikpɔkpɔ ƒe fe siwo wòle be woaxe na ICANN siaa gbɔ. Mɔxenu siwo xea mɔ na gege ɖe agbalẽŋlɔla gbogbowo ƒe dɔwɔƒea me sɔ gbɔ na dɔwɔƒe yeye siwo si asisiwo mele xoxo o.

Agbalẽŋlɔla geɖe hã naa ŋkɔ ŋɔŋlɔ to nudzralawo ƒe habɔbɔ siwo do ƒome kplii dzi. Zãla mamlɛtɔ ŋlɔa ŋkɔ ɖe agbalẽŋlɔla gbɔ tẽ, alo le mɔ si mele tẽ o nu to nudzralawo ƒe hatsotso ɖeka alo esi wu nenema dzi. Tso ƒe 2010 me la, zi geɖe la, ga si wodzrana le asitsaƒewo la tsoa esi bɔbɔna abe dɔlar 7.50 ene ƒe sia ƒe va ɖo abe dɔlar 35 ene ƒe sia ƒe na domenyiŋusẽfianu ƒe ŋkɔ ŋɔŋlɔ bɔbɔe, togbɔ be zi geɖe la, ŋkɔŋlɔlawo ɖea asi dzi kpɔtɔna kura—ɣeaɖewoɣi femaxee gɔ̃ hã—ne wobiae kple nu bubuwo abe nyatakakadzraɖoƒewo ene hã subɔsubɔdɔwo wɔwɔ.

Ɣeyiɣi didi si woatsɔ aŋlɔ ŋkɔ ɖe domenyiŋusẽfianu ƒe ŋkɔ me enye ƒe 10. Agbalẽŋlɔla aɖewo naa ɣeyiɣi didi siwo ade ƒe 100,[citation needed] gake nu mawo bia be agbalẽŋlɔla nawɔ ŋkɔ yeye na woƒe asisi; ƒe 100 ƒe ŋkɔ ŋɔŋlɔ la manɔ ŋkɔ ŋɔŋlɔ ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe si dziɖuɖua da asi ɖo o.

DNS ƒe amedzrowɔwɔ 
Domenyiŋkɔ ƒe ŋkɔ ŋɔŋlɔ ɖoa ŋkɔdɔdzikpɔla ƒe nuŋlɔɖiwo ƒe hatsotso aɖe ɖe dzila domenyinyi ƒe DNS dɔdzikpɔlawo me, si fiaa DNS dɔdzikpɔlawo ƒe IP adrɛs siwo ŋu ŋusẽ le na domenyinyia. Esia naa nufiame na biabia tẽ tso domenyiŋusẽfianu ŋuti nyatakakawo ŋu.

Domenyiŋ ƒe ŋkɔ dede agbalẽ me mefia le eɖokui si be woawɔ DNS dɔwɔnawo na domenyiŋusẽfianu si woŋlɔ ŋkɔ na o. Agbalẽŋlɔla akpa gãtɔ naa DNS amedzrowɔwɔ abe subɔsubɔdɔ si woate ŋu awɔ femaxee ene na domenyiŋusẽfianu siwo woŋlɔ ŋkɔ na to wo dzi. Ne wometsɔ DNS dɔwɔnawo na o, alo zãla mamlɛtɔ ɖe asi le eŋu la, zãla mamlɛtɔ ƒe agbanɔamedzie wònye be wòaƒle DNS dɔwɔnawo alo awɔ wo ɖokui. Zi geɖe la, agbalẽŋlɔlawo bia be woagblɔ ŋkɔdzikpɔla eve ya teti ƒe nɔnɔme.

DNSSEC ƒe kpekpeɖeŋu 
Domain Name System Security Extensions (DNSSEC) nye Internet Engineering Task Force (IETF) ƒe nɔnɔmewo ƒe hatsotso aɖe si woatsɔ akpɔ nyatakaka ƒomevi aɖewo siwo Domain Name System na la ta. Esia bia be agbalẽŋlɔla nawɔ dutoƒonyatakaka veviwo ŋudɔ eye wòawɔ DS nuŋlɔɖiwo be woatsɔ akpe ɖe dzilawo ƒe nuto me. Ele be GTLD ƒe ŋkɔ ŋɔŋlɔ yeyewo kple agbalẽŋlɔlawo katã nado alɔ DNSSEC.

Domain ŋkɔ ƒe asitɔtrɔ 
Domain name transfer nye ɖoɖo si wowɔna tsɔ trɔa domain name ƒe agbalẽŋlɔla si woɖo. ICANN ɖe Ðoɖo aɖe si ku ɖe Ŋkɔ ŋɔŋlɔ ƒe asitɔtrɔ le Agbalẽŋlɔlawo dome ŋu.[6 Alesi wowɔna zi geɖe tsɔ tsɔa domenyiŋusẽfianu ƒe ŋkɔwo yinae nye

 Mlɔetɔ zãla la ɖo kpe edzi be whois admin contact info la sɔ, vevietɔ email adrɛs; xɔa kpeɖodzinya (EPP alo UDAI transfer code) tso agbalẽŋlɔla xoxoa gbɔ, eye wòɖea domenyiŋusẽfianu ƒe gaƒoɖokui ɖesiaɖe si woda ɖe ŋkɔ ŋɔŋlɔa dzi la ɖa. Ne whois nyatakakawo do xoxo eye wowɔ yeyee fifia la, ele be nuwuwu zãla nalala gaƒoƒo 12–24 hafi ayi ŋgɔ, be wòana ɣeyiɣi nyatakaka yeyeawo nakaka.
 Mlɔetɔ zãla la doa ka kple agbalẽŋlɔla yeyea kple didi be yeatsɔ domenyiŋusẽfianu ƒe ŋkɔa ayi yewoƒe dɔwɔƒea, eye wòtsɔa kpeɖodzinya la naa.
 Ele be Agbalẽŋlɔla si akpɔ viɖe la naxɔ mɔɖeɖe tẽ tso Ŋkɔtɔ si Ŋkɔ Ŋlɔɖi alo Dɔwɔƒea ƒe Kadododzikpɔla gbɔ. Nenye be Agbalẽŋlɔla si xɔa ga la xɔ asiɖeɖe le dɔa ŋu ƒe kpeɖodzi tso kadodo siawo dometɔ ɖeka gbɔ ko hafi woate ŋu ayi edzi. Ele be woawɔ mɔɖeɖea to Mɔɖeɖe ƒe Agbalẽvi si Woɖo Ðe Ðoɖo Nu si sɔ dzi, si woate ŋu aɖo ɖa e.g. to e-mail dzi yi e-mail adrɛs siwo woŋlɔ ɖe WHOIS me dzi. Ele be Ŋkɔ Si Woŋlɔ Ðo Ðe Ame Si alo Dɔwɔƒea ƒe Kadododzikpɔla naɖo kpe asiɖeɖe le eŋu dzi. Agbalẽŋlɔla yeyea dzea domenyiŋusẽfianu la ƒe asitɔtrɔ gɔme to kɔmpiuta dzi to kpeɖodzinya (auth code) ƒe kpekpeɖeŋu me.
 Agbalẽŋlɔla xoxoa aƒo ka na nuwuwu zãla la atsɔ aɖo kpe biabia sia ƒe nyateƒenyenye dzi. Ðewohĩ ahiã be nuwuwu zãla nawɔ afɔɖeɖe bubuwo kple agbalẽŋlɔla xoxoa, abe tɔtrɔ yi Internet dzi dɔwɔnu siwo kpɔa dɔa dzi ene, be woagagblɔ woƒe didi be yeayi edzi ake, be woatsɔ awɔ dɔa kabakaba.
 Agbalẽŋlɔla xoxoa aɖe asi le ŋusẽ ŋu na agbalẽŋlɔla yeyea.
 Agbalẽŋlɔla yeyea ana ezãla mamlɛtɔ nanya ne wowu dɔa tsɔtsɔ yi teƒe bubu nu. Ðewohĩ agbalẽŋlɔla yeyea kɔpi le eɖokui si to domenyiŋusẽfianu ƒe nyatakakawo dzi, eye nusianu si le nyatakakadzraɖoƒea ayi edzi anɔ dɔ wɔm abe tsã ene. Ne menye nenema o la, ahiã be woawɔ domenyiŋusẽfianu ƒe nyatakakawo yeyee kple agbalẽŋlɔla yeyea.

Le ɖoɖo sia megbe la, agbalẽŋlɔla yeyea nyea domenyiŋusẽfianu ƒe ŋkɔŋlɔla si woɖo. Dɔa wɔwɔ ate ŋu axɔ abe ŋkeke atɔ̃ ene. Le go aɖewo me la, agbalẽŋlɔla xoxoa ate ŋu aɖoe koŋ ahe asitɔtrɔa ɖe megbe zi alesi woɖe mɔ ɖe eŋu. Le etsɔtsɔ yi teƒe bubu megbe la, womate ŋu agbugbɔ domenyiŋusẽfianu la ayi teƒe bubu o hena ŋkeke 60, negbe ɖe wogbugbɔe yi na agbalẽŋlɔla si nɔ anyi va yi ko.

Nunya mele eme be nàdze agbagba atsɔ domenyiŋusẽfianu aɖe ayi teƒe bubu enumake hafi wòawu enu o. Le go aɖewo me la, asitɔtrɔ ate ŋu axɔ ŋkeke 14, si fia be ɖewohĩ womawu dɔa nu hafi ŋkɔ ŋɔŋlɔa nawu enu o. Esia ate ŋu ana be domenyiŋusẽfianu ƒe ŋkɔ ŋɔŋlɔ nabu eye wòado kpo asitɔtrɔ le eŋu. Be woaƒo asa na esia la, ele be nuwuwu zãlawo natsɔe ayi teƒe bubu ɣeyiɣi didi aɖe do ŋgɔ na ŋkeke si dzi wòawu enu, alo woawɔ ŋkɔ ŋɔŋlɔ yeyee hafi ate etsɔtsɔ yi teƒe bubu kpɔ.

Ne domenyiŋusẽfianu ƒe ŋkɔ ŋɔŋlɔ ƒe ɣeyiɣia wu enu, eɖanye susu ka kee ɖale eme o, ate ŋu asesẽ, axɔ asi, alo manya wɔ be aƒetɔ gbãtɔa nagbugbɔe axɔ o. Le ŋkeke si dzi wòwu enu megbe la, zi geɖe la, domenyinyi ƒe nɔnɔme toa dɔdzikpɔkpɔ ƒe akpa vovovowo me, zi geɖe la, ɣleti geɖe; zi geɖe la, menye ɖeko wòzua nusi woate ŋu akpɔ le afisiafi ko o

Ameflunyawo tsɔtsɔ yi teƒe bubu 
Woto ŋkɔ ŋɔŋlɔ ɖekae ƒe ɖoɖo aɖe vɛ na domenyiŋusẽfianu ƒe ŋkɔ ŋɔŋlɔ ƒe gomenɔamesi si nɔ anyi tsã la ʋu ɖi na dɔwɔƒe yeye siwo woyɔna be agbalẽŋlɔlawo, siwo ICANN dze be woawɔ asitsadɔ. Ele be agbalẽŋlɔla geɖe naʋli ho kple wo nɔewo, eye togbɔ be dɔwɔƒe aɖewo naa dɔwɔna siwo ŋu asixɔxɔ le alo zãa asitsatsa to dɔlékuiwo me hã la, bubuwo, abe VeriSign kple Domain Registry of America ene, dze agbagba be yewoable asisiwo be woatrɔ tso woƒe agbalẽŋlɔla si li fifia gbɔ to nuwɔna aɖe si woyɔna be domain slamming zazã me .

Ametafatafa siawo dometɔ geɖe ku ɖe gbeƒãɖeɖe si woɖona ɖe ame to posu, fax, alo e-mail dzi ŋu. Ameflula aɖewo doa ka kple amesiwo zãnɛ mlɔeba to telefon dzi (elabena woate ŋu akpɔ kadodo ŋuti nyatakakawo to WHOIS dzi) be yewoaxɔ nyatakaka bubuwo. Nyatakaka siawo anye nyatakaka siwo woate ŋu akpɔ le dutoƒo tso WHOIS ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒea be woatsɔ akpe ɖe nyateƒetoto ƒe dzedzeme ŋu. Nuŋlɔɖia anye legalese be woatsɔ atɔtɔ nuwuwu zãla be wòasusu be enye dziɖuɖua ƒe gbeƒãɖeɖe si blaa ame. Ameflunyawo ŋlɔlawo yia domenyiŋusẽfianu ƒe ŋkɔ siwo ƒe ɣeyiɣia wu enu kpuie alo esiwo ƒe ɣeyiɣi wu enu nyitsɔ laa yome. Domain name ƒe nuwuwu ŋkekewo li bɔbɔe to WHOIS dzi.

Drop catcher 
Drop catcher nye domenyiŋusẽfianu ƒe ŋkɔ ŋlɔla si naa subɔsubɔdɔ si nye be wòate kpɔ be yeade domenyiŋusẽfianu ŋkɔ si wona la agbalẽ me kaba na asisi aɖe ne ŋkɔ ma va li—si fia be "wòalé" ŋkɔ "si woda"—ne domenyiŋkɔa ƒe ŋkɔ ŋɔŋlɔ wu enu eye emegbe wotutua, le esi ame si ŋlɔ ŋkɔ ɖe eme la gblẽ domenyinu la ɖi alo le esi ame si ŋlɔ ŋkɔ ɖe eme la mewɔ ŋkɔ yeyee hafi wotutui o ta.

Agbalẽŋlɔlawo ƒe ɖoƒewo 
Habɔbɔ geɖe ɖoa domenyiŋusẽfianu ƒe ŋkɔwo ŋlɔlawo ƒe ŋkɔwo kple domenyiŋusẽfianu siwo woŋlɔ ɖe wo dometɔ ɖesiaɖe me ƒe xexlẽme siwo woɖo ɖe asitsaƒewo ƒe ɖoƒe si woɖo ɖe wo nɔewo dzi. Ŋkɔ siwo wota la to vovo le top-level domains (TLDs) siwo wozãna me; le nu yeyewo dodo ɖe ŋgɔ zi gbɔ zi geɖe me; eye le nenye be woƒe nyatakaka veviwo nye xexlẽdzesi blibo siwo agbalẽŋlɔƒewo na, alo gbesiagbe tɔtrɔ siwo wokpɔ tso Zone ƒe faɛlwo me.

Edze abe xexlẽdzesiawo katã zãa generic TLD (gTLD) 16 siwo li le dutoƒo siwo nɔ anyi vaseɖe December 2009 me ya teti, kpakple .us. ICANN ƒe zone file access concept paper aɖe si woŋlɔ le February 2010 me ɖe eme be dukɔa ƒe code TLD (ccTLD) registries akpa gãtɔ dzudzɔ zone files nana le ƒe 2003 me, eye wogblɔ be wozã wo le mɔ gbegblẽ nu.

Ðoƒewo kple nyatakaka siwo wota dometɔ aɖewoe nye:

Ɣleti sia ɣleti (gake eye wòhea megbe abe ɣleti etɔ̃ ene), ICANN ɖoa ŋkɔ ŋɔŋlɔ ŋuti nyatakaka siwo gTLDwo katã ƒe nuŋlɔɖiwo wɔ la ɖe afima.[9] Nyatakaka siawo yɔ domenyinyi siwo woŋlɔ ŋkɔ na le agbalẽŋlɔla ɖesiaɖe si dzi ICANN da asi ɖo la ƒe xexlẽme blibo.

Ƒe sia ƒe (gake ɣeyiɣi si tso ƒe 2002 va ɖo ƒe 2007 me koe wòxɔna), DomainTools.com, si dzi Name Intelligence, Inc., kpɔa edzi la, taa agbalẽŋlɔlawo ƒe akɔntabubuwo. Wo katã ƒe xexlẽme nye .com, .net, .org, .info, .biz kple .us. Eyɔ "gbesiagbe tɔtrɔwo" (si wosusu be wotso gbesiagbe nuto ƒe faɛlwo me) be wonye nusi dzi woanɔ te ɖo awɔ eƒe ƒe sia ƒe ƒe ƒuƒoƒo.

title: Abigail Adams
text:
Abigail Smith Adams (Adeamekpɔxe 11, 1744 — Kele 28, 1818) nye John Adams, si nye United States ƒe Dukplɔla evelia srɔ̃. Emegbe la, amewo te yɔyɔ na dukplɔla la srɔ̃ be Aƒenɔ Gbãtɔ. Eyata, eva zu United States ƒe Aƒenɔ Gbãtɔ evelia. Wodzii le Weymouth, Massachusetts. Massachusetts ƒe ƒome xɔŋkɔ aɖe (Quincy Ƒomea) mee wònɔ.

Le ƒe 1801 me la, atsu kple asi sia xɔ dzudzɔ le dɔme eye wonɔ Quincy. Abigail ku le ƒe 1818 me, esime wòxɔ ƒe 74 le typhoid dɔléle ta.

Agbenɔnɔ le ɖevime 
Abigail Adams ʋli hehe si sɔ le dukɔa ƒe sukuwo me na ŋutsuviwo kple nyɔnuviwo ta. Le eƒe ɖevime la, eƒe lãme mesẽna zi geɖe o. Ezãa eƒe ɣeyiɣi akpa gãtɔ tsɔ xlẽa nu. Tsɔ kpe ɖe eŋu la, eŋlɔa lɛta na eƒe ƒometɔwo kple xɔlɔ̃wo hafi ɖe srɔ̃. 

Adams mede suku aɖeke le suku alo kɔledzi aɖeke me o. Agbalẽdzraɖoƒe gã aɖe nɔ fofoa si, eya ta esrɔ̃ agbalẽ geɖe eye wòva dze aɖaŋu nenema. Eɖe John Adams le ƒe 1764. Le ƒe ewo siwo kplɔe ɖo me la, edzi vi atɔ̃ (wodzi ame adelia si ku). Viawo dometɔ ɖekae nye John Quincy Adams, si nye United States ƒe Dukplɔla adelia.

Dunyahehe me nɔnɔ
Adams nye srɔ̃a John Adams ƒe nya ɣaɣla kple aɖaŋuɖola vevi aɖe. Etsi tre ɖe kluvinyenye ŋu eye wòdo alɔ nyɔnuwo ƒe gomenɔamesiwo. Le ƒe 1776 me la, srɔ̃a kpɔ gome le Anyigbagã dzi Sewɔtakpekpe Gbãtɔ si wowɔ le Philadelphia la me. Afimae Adams ŋlɔ eƒe lɛta xɔŋkɔtɔ kekeake na Fofo Gɔmeɖolawo be "miɖo ŋku nyɔnuawo dzi." 

Le ƒe 1784 me la, Adams va kpe ɖe srɔ̃a ŋu le eƒe dutadɔnunɔlawo ƒe dɔwɔƒe le Paris. Eva tsɔ ɖe le Franseawo ƒe agbenɔnɔ me. Le ƒe 1785 megbe la, ewɔ dɔ sesẽ si nye United States ƒe Dudɔnunɔla Gbãtɔ si nɔ Great Britain la srɔ̃. Ewɔe kple bubu.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

Agbemeŋutinya
Ame siwo wodzi le ƒe 1744 me
Ame siwo ku le ƒe 1818 me

title: John Adams
text:
John Adams, Jr. (Kele 30, 1735 – Siamlɔm 4, 1826) nye United States ƒe dukplɔla evelia (ƒe 1797–1801), eye wònye dukplɔla adelia, John Quincy Adams fofo. Enye United States ƒe dukplɔla ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ gbãtɔ hã (ƒe 1789–1797).

Wodzi Adams le Braintree, Massachusetts. Enye Lt. Col. John Adams, Sr. (ƒe 1691-1761) kple Susanna Boylston (ƒe 1708-1797) ƒe viŋutsu, eye wònye xexemenunyala kple ehati Fofo Gɔmeɖoanyila Samuel Adams ƒe tɔɖiayɔvi. Eyi Harvard Kɔledzi. Eɖe Abigail Adams le ƒe 1764 me.

Tɔtrɔ kpata ƒe ƒewo 
Adams di be Nutome Wuietɔ̃awo navo tso Great Britain si me. Gake Adams wɔ nu dzɔdzɔe eye wòsusu be ele be woawɔ nu ɖe ame sia ame ŋu le dzɔdzɔenyenye me. Togbɔ be medi be Britain-srafowo nanɔ Boston o hã la, eyae nye senyala si ʋli Britain-srafo siwo kpɔ gome le Boston Amewuwua me ta.

Adams nye Massachusetts teƒenɔla le Anyigbagã dzi Sewɔtakpekpe Evelia wɔɣi. Ekpe ɖe Thomas Jefferson ŋu wòŋlɔ United States ƒe Ðokuisinɔamesi Ŋuti Nyatakaka. Le Amerikatɔwo ƒe Tɔtrɔ Kpata ƒe aʋawɔɣi la, Adams kpe asi ɖe ŋutifafa wɔwɔ kple Great Britain ŋu. Ewɔ dɔ le France, Netherlands kple England abe dutadɔnunɔla ene le ƒe 1780 ƒeawo me.

Dukplɔla ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ
Adams ye nye dukplɔla ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ gbãtɔ le George Washington ƒe dziɖuɣi. Esi Washington tiae be yemagaʋli ho ake o la, Adams ɖu dzi le ƒe 1796 ƒe tiatiawɔƒea. Wosusu be Adams ye nye dukplɔla gbãtɔ si nɔ dunyaheha aɖe me, gake abe George Washington ene la, ebu eɖokui be yede ŋgɔ wu dunyaheha aɖe koŋ. Eʋli dukplɔla ƒe ɖoƒe ta le Federalist ƒe tikiti dzi. Eɖu Thomas Jefferson si le Democratic-Republican Party me dzi. Dukplɔla ƒe ametialawo kple dukplɔla ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ ƒe ametialawo meƒu du ɖekae abe alesi wowɔna egbea ene o. Esi wònye be Jefferson ye xɔ ame evelia si da akɔ wu ta la, eva zu dukplɔla ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ.

Dukplɔla
Le eƒe dziɖuɣi la, ekpɔ masɔmasɔ aɖe si do mo ɖa kple France gbɔ le ŋutifafa me. Ewɔ Amedzrowo kple Aglãdzedze ƒe Sewo hã si na wònye sedzidada be woagblɔ nya gbegblẽwo tso dziɖuɖua ŋu. Nuwɔna mawo medzɔ dzi na ame geɖe o elabena wose le wo ɖokui me be exɔ nuƒoƒoblɔɖe le yewo si. Womegatia Adams be wòanye dukplɔla ake o eye wòɖu Thomas Jefferson dzi. Dukɔa ƒe Dunyahehabɔbɔa mexɔ ŋkɔ abe alesi wònɔ esime woti Adams ene o. Nu mamlɛtɔ siwo wòwɔ abe dukplɔla ene dometɔ ɖekae nye be wòna John Marshall zu United States ƒe Ʋɔnudrɔ̃lagã. Esia na be Federalist Party la gakpɔtɔ le vevie kokoko.

Le U.S. dukplɔla atɔ̃ gbãtɔwo dome la, Adams koe nye amesi si kluviwo menɔ o. Eya ɖeka koe tso New England hã.

Eƒe ku
Adams ku le Siamlɔm 4, 1826 dzi le dzidɔ ta. Esia nye gbesigbe Thomas Jefferson ku, eye eganye ƒe 50 pɛpɛpɛ tso esime wode asi Ðokuisinɔamesi ƒe Gbeƒãɖeɖe te le ƒe 1776. Esi John Adams xɔ ƒe 90 la, enye United States dukplɔla si nɔ agbe didi wu vaseɖe esime Ronald Reagan ƒoe ta le Kele 2001. John Adams nye United States ƒe Dukplɔla ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ si nɔ agbe didi wu hã vaseɖe esime Levi P. Morton ƒoe ta le ƒe 1915 me eye emegbe John Nance Garner va ƒoe ta le ƒe 1959 me.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

Agbemeŋutinya
Ame siwo wodzi le ƒe 1735 me
Ame siwo ku le ƒe 1826 me

title: John Quincy Adams
text:
John Quincy Adams (Siamlɔm 11, 1767 – Dzodze 23, 1848) nye United States ƒe dukplɔla adelia. Eyae nye dukplɔla gbãtɔ si nye dukplɔla ƒe viŋutsu. Azɔ hã, Adams ye nye dukplɔla gbãtɔ si woɖe foto, le esi teƒe be woatae.

Adams nye Federalist Party me tɔ eye wònɔ dukplɔla siwo katã do ŋgɔ nɛ ƒe dziɖuɖuwo me. Enye Dukɔa ƒe Agbalẽŋlɔla le James Monroe, si do ŋgɔ nɛ abe dukplɔla ene ƒe kpɔkplɔ te. Edze eƒe subɔsubɔdɔa gɔme esime wòxɔ ƒe 27 pɛ ko le ƒe 1794 me esime Dukplɔla Washington yɔe be United States ƒe Dudɔnunɔla le Netherlands.

Adams xɔ ŋgɔ le aʋa si wowɔ tsɔ tsi tre ɖe kluvinyenye ŋu le Sewɔtakpekpea me. Le ƒe 1838 me, esime wòxɔ ƒe 71 la, eƒo nu ɖe Afrika kluvi siwo nɔ kluviwo ƒe meli si nye Amistad me la nu. Eɖu dzi le nyaa me. Etsɔ nya ɖe Gag Dziɖuɖua ƒe dukplɔse me nɔnɔ hã ŋu le Sewɔtakpekpea me eye wòkpɔe to eɖeɖeɖa me le ƒe 1844 me le ƒe enyi ƒe avuwɔwɔ ɖe eŋu megbe.

Eƒe agbemeŋkeke gbãtɔwo
Wodzii le ƒe 1767 me le Braintree, Massachusetts. Esi wònye ɖevi la, ekpɔa Bunker Hill ƒe aʋawɔwɔ, si nye Amerikatɔwo ƒe Tɔtrɔ Kpata ƒe aʋawɔwɔ, tso eƒe ƒomea ƒe agble dzi. Esi fofoa John Adams zɔ mɔ yi Europa la, John Quincy yi kplii wòzu eƒe agbalẽŋlɔla. Eva bi ɖe gbe bubuwo dodo me. Le Eŋlisigbe ɖeɖeko megbe la, enya Latingbe kple Fransegbe hã nyuie, eye wònya Netherlandsgbe, Germanygbe, Helagbe, Italygbe, Spaingbe, kple Russiagbe ƒe akpa aɖe.

Eƒe Sukudede
Eyi Harvard Kɔledzi eye wòzu senyala. Esi wòxɔ ƒe 26 la, woɖoe Subɔsubɔhakplɔla le Netherlands eye emegbe wòyi Berlin. Le ƒe 1802 me la, wotiam be manye United States Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ. Ƒe ade megbe la, Dukplɔla James Madison tiae be wòanye Dziɖuɖumegã le Russia.

Esi Adams nye Dukɔa ƒe Agbalẽŋlɔla esime James Monroe nye dukplɔla ta la, ewɔ ɖoɖo ɖe Oregon dzi kpɔkpɔ ɖekae ŋu kple United Kingdom eye wòkpe asi ɖe eŋu be woaxɔ Florida tso Spain si. Ekpe asi ɖe Monroe Nufiafia hã wɔwɔ ŋu.

Dukplɔla ƒe ɖoƒe
United States Teƒenɔlawo ƒe Aƒea tia Adams be wòanye dukplɔla le esi United States ƒe dukplɔla ƒe tiatia si wowɔ le ƒe 1824 me mena ame aɖeke mexɔ ame akpa gãtɔ le tiatiawɔblɔɖe me o megbe. Ame siwo di be Andrew Jackson naɖu dzi la gblɔ be nubabla aɖe le Adams kple Aƒea ƒe Dukplɔla Henry Clay dome; Adams tsɔ Clay ɖo eƒe Dukɔa ƒe Agbalẽŋlɔla.

Adams de se na U.S. ƒe ŋgɔyiyiwo abe nusi wòyɔ be "Amerikatɔwo ƒe Nuɖoanyi" ƒe akpa aɖe ene. Esia fia be ewɔ mɔdodowo, tɔdzisasrãwo, eye wòzã adzɔ gãwo, alo adzɔ siwo woxena ɖe nusiwo wotsɔ tso duta vɛ ta. Eƒe aɖaŋuɖoɖowo dometɔ aɖewoe nye be woaɖo dukɔa ƒe yunivɛsiti, ƒudzisrafowo ƒe suku, kple dukɔa ƒe ɣletiviŋutinunya ƒe dɔwɔƒe. Adams wɔ avu kple Sewɔtakpekpea zi gbɔ zi geɖe wu alesi Andrew Jackson ƒe akpadzinɔla geɖe melɔ̃ eƒe kpekpeɖeŋu nana dukɔa ƒe gadzraɖoƒe kple adzɔxexe o.

Adams bu le ƒe 1828 ƒe tiatiawɔɣia ɖe Jackson dzi. Wode dzesi tiatia sia le ame ŋutɔ ƒe amedzidzedze siwo ame siwo di be yewoaxɔ ɖoƒea wɔ ɖe wo nɔewo ŋu ta.

Emegbe ƒe agbenɔnɔ
Adams trɔ yi Massachusetts hena ɣeyiɣi kpui aɖe le eƒe bu megbe. Etrɔ yi Washington D.C. le ƒe 1831 me esi wotiam be manye United States Teƒenɔlawo ƒe Aƒea me tɔ vɔ megbe. Enye amesi tsi tre ɖe kluvinyenye ŋu vevie. Enɔ Sewɔtakpekpea me vaseɖe eƒe kugbe le Dzodze 23, 1848 dzi.

Eƒe ku
Le Dzodze 21, 1848 dzi la, Adams xɔ ʋusɔgbɔdɔ le Aƒea ƒe xɔ me. Emu eye wòku le Aƒea me le ŋkeke eve megbe le Dzodze 23, 1848. Exɔ ƒe blaatɔ̃. Enye United States dukplɔla ƒe ku zi 7 lia.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

Agbemeŋutinya
Ame siwo wodzi le ƒe 1767 me
Ame siwo ku le ƒe 1848 me

title: Patrice Talon
text:
Patrice Guillaume Athanase Talon, si wodzi le Dame 1, 1958 dzi le Ouidah (Dahomey Dukɔa), nye Benintɔ asitsala kple dukplɔla, Dukɔa ƒe Dukplɔla tso Afɔfiɛ 6, 2016 dzi.

Agbemeŋutinya 
Wodzi Patrice Talon na ketekedɔwɔla si tso Ouidah eye dadaa tso Guedegbe ƒomea me le Abomey, eye wòɖe Claudine Gbènagnon, si wodzi le Porto-Novo, amesi dzi vi eve, siwo ŋkɔe nye Lionel kple Karen Heel.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo
