Talon, Patrice
Talon, Patrice
Talon, Patrice

title: James Monroe
text:
James Monroe (Afɔfiɛ 28, 1758 – Siamlɔm 4, 1831) nye United States ƒe dukplɔla atɔ̃lia.  Elɔ̃ ɖe Thomas Jefferson kple James Madison, siwo nye dukplɔla eve siwo do ŋgɔ nɛ ƒe nya dzi zi geɖe. Wotsɔ ŋkɔ na du geɖe be Monroe. Wotsɔ ŋkɔ nɛ hã na Monrovia, si nye Liberia ƒe fiadu.

Eƒe agbemeŋkeke gbãtɔwo
Wodzi Monroe le Virginia.  Esi James xɔ ƒe 16 la, fofoa ku. Esi wòxɔ ƒe 18 la, eva ge ɖe Anyigbagã dzi Asrafoha me. Emegbe esrɔ̃ senyawo le Thomas Jefferson gbɔ.

Eɖe Elizabeth Kotright le ƒe 1789 me.

Eƒe dunyahehe me agbenɔnɔ
Monroe nye amesi tsi tre ɖe dukɔa ƒe dziɖuɖu ŋu; medi be woada asi ɖe United States ƒe Dukplɔsea dzi o. Wotiam be manye United States Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ le ƒe 1790. Ekpe asi ɖe Democratic-Republican Party ɖoɖo ŋu kple Jefferson kple James Madison.

Monroe nye Virginia ƒe Nutomedziɖula tso ƒe 1799 - 1802.

Monroe yi Paris be yeakpe asi ɖe Louisiana ƒe Nuƒle ŋu, eye emegbe eva zu Dutanyanyuigblɔla le Great Britain.

Monroe nye Madison ƒe Dudɔnunɔla kple Aʋawɔnyawo Gbɔkpɔla.

Eƒe agbenɔnɔ abe dukplɔla ene
Monroe nye dukplɔla tso ƒe 1817 va ɖo ƒe 1825.  Monroe kple eƒe Dudɔnunɔla John Quincy Adams na Spain tsɔ Florida na United States. Monroe kple Adams hã to Monroe Nufiafia vɛ, si nye ɖoɖo si gblɔ be United States medi be Europa nakpɔ gome le Ɣetoɖoƒenutowo me azɔ o.

Eƒe agbenɔnɔ le dukplɔlanyenye megbe
Monroe xɔ dzudzɔ le dɔme yi Virginia. Le srɔ̃a ƒe ku megbe la eʋu yi New York afisi wòku le le Siamlɔm 4, 1831 dzi le yɔmekpe ta.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

Agbemeŋutinya
Ame siwo wodzi le ƒe 1758 me
Ame siwo ku le ƒe 1831 me

title: Thomas Jefferson
text:
Thomas Jefferson (April 13, 1743 – July 4, 1826) nye Amerika dukplɔla etɔ̃lia.  Jefferson ye ŋlɔ Ðokuisinɔamesi ƒe Gbeƒãɖeɖe, si eya kple Fofo Gɔmeɖoanyila 55 bubuwo de asi. Eŋlɔ Subɔsubɔhawo ƒe Ablɔɖe Ŋuti Se hã.

Jefferson nye agbledela hã tɔ. Kluvi geɖewo nɔ esi. Ena ablɔɖe ame geɖe le Hemings ƒomea me.

Eƒe agbemeŋkeke gbãtɔwo
Wodzi Jefferson, si nye vi ewo dometɔ etɔ̃lia, le April 13, 1743 dzi le Shadwell, Virginia, le agbledelawo ƒe ƒome aɖe me. Edzilawo nye Peter kple Jane Jefferson. Nɔvinyɔnu ade kple nɔviŋutsu etɔ̃ nɔ esi. Esi Thomas Jefferson xɔ ƒe 9 la, edze Latingbe, Helagbe, kple Fransegbe sɔsrɔ̃ gɔme; esrɔ̃ sɔdodo hã, eye wode bubu gãtɔ kekeake. Eyi edzi va zu senyala.

Le January 1772 me la, Jefferson ɖe Martha Wayles Skelton, amesi dzi vi 6 kplii.

Eƒe dunyahehe me agbenɔnɔ
Jefferson di be Nutome Wuietɔ̃awo navo tso Great Britain si me. Jefferson va xɔ kplɔlanyenye ƒe dziɖuɖu le eƒe dzidzimea me ŋutsu siwo ƒe susu sɔ kple wo nɔewo dome enumake. Enye Anyigbagã dzi Sewɔtakpekpe Evelia me tɔ. Wotiae be wòanɔ amegãwo ƒe ƒuƒoƒo si ŋlɔ Ðokuisinɔamesi ƒe Gbeƒãɖeɖea me eye eyae nye eŋlɔla vevitɔ.

Enye subɔla le France tso ƒe 1785 va ɖo ƒe 1789 me.

George Washington ye tiae be wòanye Dukɔa ƒe Agbalẽŋlɔla gbãtɔ. Jefferson susui be ele be dukɔa ƒe dziɖuɖua nanɔ sue. Eƒe nukpɔsusu to vovo na Ganyawo Gbɔkpɔha ƒe Agbalẽŋlɔla Alexander Hamilton le dukɔa ƒe dziɖuɖua ŋu. Ewɔ ɖeka kple James Madison le ƒe 1792 me ɖo dunyaheha aɖe be woatsɔ atsi tre ɖe Hamilton kple Dukɔa ƒe Dunyahehabɔbɔa ŋu. Akpa siae nye Democratic-Republican Party. Akpahaa ƒe akpa sue ɖeka va zu egbegbe Democratic Party.

Jefferson ʋli dukplɔla ƒe ɖoƒe ta kple John Adams. Exɔ ame evelia si da akɔ wu eye abe alesi se nɔ ɣemaɣi ene la, eva zu dukplɔla ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ.

Eƒe agbenɔnɔ abe dukplɔla ene
Jefferson gaʋli ho ake abe Democratic-Republicantɔwo ƒe ametiakɔdala ene le ƒe 1800 me eye wòɖu dzi. Wogatiae ake le ƒe 1804. Jefferson wɔ Louisiana Ƒle, si na United States ƒe lolome dzi ɖe edzi zi gbɔ zi eve.

Edɔ Lewis kple Clark Mɔzɔha la ɖa be woaɖatsa le anyigba si United States xɔ to Louisiana ƒe Nuƒle me la me. Ele be Jefferson nakpɔ aʋawɔwɔ ƒe ŋɔdzidoname gbɔ le eƒe zimenɔɣi evelia me. Great Britain kple France nɔ aʋa wɔm le eƒe dukplɔla ƒe ɣeyiɣiawo katã kloe me. Akpa ɖesiaɖe wɔ nusiwo ate ŋu ana United States nage ɖe aʋaa me hafi. Jefferson ku kutri vevie be United States nagage ɖe aʋawɔwɔa me o eye yemaganye eƒe akpa aɖeke o.

Eƒe agbenɔnɔ le dukplɔlanyenye megbe
Jefferson ye dze Virginia Yunivɛsiti gɔme.

Le Monticello la, Jefferson dzi vi geɖe na nyɔnu aɖe si wowɔ kluvi si ŋkɔe nye Sally Hemings. Esi wogbe vianyɔnu tsitsitɔ srɔ̃ la, eya kple viawo hã va nɔ Monticello.

Esi Britaintɔwo tɔ dzo Washington D.C. le ƒe 1812 ƒe Aʋawɔɣi la, wotɔ dzo agbalẽ geɖe siwo le Sewɔtakpekpea ƒe Agbalẽdzraɖoƒe. Jefferson dzra eya ŋutɔ ƒe agbalẽdzraɖoƒe be yeatsɔ aɖɔli agbalẽ siwo bu.

Eku le July 4, 1826 dzi le aklãdɔ si uremia sesẽ ta, le Ðokuisinɔamesi ƒe Gbeƒãɖeɖe ƒe ƒe 50 lia dzi. United States ƒe dukplɔla 2 lia, John Adams, ku gbemagbe ke, le gaƒoƒo ʋɛ aɖewo ko megbe.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: James Madison
text:
James Madison Jr. (Tedoxe 16, 1751 – Masa 28, 1836) nye Fofo Gɔmeɖoanyila kple United States ƒe dukplɔla enelia. Enye United States ƒe Dukplɔsea ŋlɔla vevitɔ kekeake hã eye wònye kluvitɔ si si agble gã aɖe le. Madison ye nye dukplɔla kpuitɔ kekeake, eye eƒe kɔkɔme nye meta 1.63.

Eƒe ƒomea
James Madison Jr. nye Asrafomegã James Madison Sr. kple Nellie Conway Madison ƒe viŋutsu tsitsitɔ.

Madison ɖe Dolley Todd (si wodzi Payne) le April 18, 1794 dzi.

Eƒe dunyahehe me agbenɔnɔ
Madison dze eƒe dɔ gɔme le Virginia dukɔa ƒe sewɔtakpekpe me. Madison srɔ̃ nu geɖe tso Thomas Jefferson gbɔ. Madison di be United States ƒe dukɔa ƒe dziɖuɖu si sẽ wu esi Dukɔa ƒe Sewo gblɔ. Enye kpekpe si ɖo United States ƒe Dukplɔse si li fifia la me tɔ. Woyɔ Madison be "Dukplɔsea Fofo" elabena ekpe asi ɖe eƒe akpa gã aɖe ŋɔŋlɔ ŋu eye wòƒoe ɖe amewo nu be enye nyui aɖe.

Wotia Madison be wòanye United States Teƒenɔlawo ƒe Aƒea me tɔ. Madison kpe asi ɖe se gbãtɔwo ŋɔŋlɔ na United States ŋu. Madison ye nye ame vevitɔ si ŋlɔ Gomenɔamesiwo Ŋuti Se, si nye Dukplɔsea ƒe ɖɔɖɔɖo 10 gbãtɔwo hã.

Madison kple Jefferson nye xɔlɔ̃ nyuiwo eye wokpe asi ɖe Democratic-Republican Party si di be dukɔa ƒe dziɖuɖu si gbɔdzɔ la naɖo anyi.

Jefferson tia Madison be wòanye yeƒe Dudɔnunɔla.

Eƒe agbenɔnɔ abe dukplɔla ene
Eƒe dunyaheha tia Madison be wòanye Democratic-Republicantɔwo ƒe dukplɔla ƒe ametiakɔdala le ƒe 1808. Eɖu dzi le tiatia ma kple tiatia si kplɔe ɖo me le ƒe 1812 me.

Ƒe 1812 ƒe Aʋa la dze egɔme esime Madison nye dukplɔla. Madison gakpɔtɔ nɔ mɔkpɔkpɔ me na ŋutifafa, gake Sewɔtakpekpea di be yeawɔ aʋa eyata ena ta eye wòda asi ɖe aʋawɔwɔ ƒe gbeƒãɖeɖe ɖe Britain ŋu le June 18, 1812. Ame siwo gakpɔtɔ di ŋutifafa yɔe be "Aƒetɔ Madison ƒe Aʋa". Wozi Madison kple eƒe ƒomea dzi be woasi le ƒe 1814 me esime Britain-srafowo xɔ Washington D.C eye wotɔ dzo White House, kple xɔ bubu geɖewo wòzu anyigba. Dolley Madison, srɔ̃a, xɔ ŋkɔ be eɖe George Washington ƒe nɔnɔmetata aɖe tso dzoa me.

Aʋa la na Madison di be yeakpɔ dziɖuɖu sesẽ wu tsã. Togbɔ be etsi tre ɖe dukɔa ƒe gadzraɖoƒe aɖe ŋu le gɔmedzedzea me hã la, ekpɔe be ehiã eye wòhiã na gadodo na aʋawɔwɔ. Esi dukɔa ƒe gadzraɖoƒea ƒe agbalẽa wu enu la, Madison gagbugbɔe wɔ yeyee.

Eƒe agbenɔnɔ le dukplɔlanyenye megbe
Madison xɔ dzudzɔ le dɔme yi Virginia le eƒe zimenɔɣi evelia megbe. Madison ku le June 28, 1836 dzi.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

Agbemeŋutinya
Ame siwo wodzi le ƒe 1751 me
Ame siwo ku le ƒe 1836 me

title: George Washington
text:
George Washington (February 22, 1732 – December 14, 1799) nye United States ƒe dukplɔla gbãtɔ tso ƒe 1789 va ɖo ƒe 1797. Hafi wòazu dukplɔla la, enye Anyigbagã dzi Asrafowo ƒe amegã le Amerikatɔwo ƒe Tɔtrɔ Kpata ƒe aʋawɔɣi, eye wònye wo dometɔ ɖeka United States ƒe Fofo Gɔmeɖoanyilawo.

Eƒe agbemeŋkeke gbãtɔwo
Washington dada ŋkɔe nye Mary Washington eye fofoa ŋkɔe nye Augustine Washington. Agble aɖe si me kluviwo le nɔ wo si le Virginia.

Do ŋgɔ na Tɔtrɔ Kpata ƒe Aʋa la
Washington va zu agbledela abe fofoa ene. Woyɔ eƒe agblea be Mount Vernon. Ewɔ dɔ hã abe anyigbadzidzela ene, eye wòdzidzea anyigba. Washington di ɣesiaɣi be yeanye asrafo eye wònɔ vevie dom nu le Virginia ƒe asrafoha si nɔ anyi le dutanyigbawo dzi la me. Wodɔe zi geɖe ɖe "Ohio Tɔsisi ƒe fɔklɔwo", si woyɔna fifia be Pittsburgh. Eƒe dɔe nye be wòaɖe Fransetɔ siwo nɔ agbagba dzem be yewoaxɔ Ohio Tɔsisi ƒe Bali la ɖa.

Edo kpo nu eye wowu eƒe ame geɖewo. Aʋa la ʋu Franseawo kple Indiatɔwo ƒe Aʋa la nu, si na Britain ge ɖe Ƒe Adre ƒe Aʋa la me. Le ƒe 1758 me la, wotiam be manye Virginia sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ.

Le ƒe 1759 me la, Washington ɖe ahosi aɖe si ŋkɔe nye Martha Custis. Srɔ̃ɖeɖea medzi vi aɖeke o.

Eƒe agbenɔnɔ le Aʋa la megbe
Esi Tɔtrɔ Kpata ƒe aʋawɔwɔa wu enu la, wobu Washington be enye dukɔa ƒe kalẽtɔ. Wotsɔ dziɖuɖu ƒe ɖoƒe aɖe si woabu be enye ŋutasẽdziɖuɖu ɖe nuto siwo dzi woɖu dzi hafi la nɛ, gake le afɔɖeɖe wɔnuku aɖe me la, Washington gbe, do le asrafodɔa me, eye wòtrɔ yi Mount Vernon. Edi be dziɖuɖu sesẽ nanɔ dukɔ siwo dzi woɖu la si gake medi be yeanye dziɖuɖu ma ƒe tatɔ o, eye medi hã be ŋutasẽla aɖe nakpɔ dukɔ siwo dzi woɖu la dzi o.

Washington nye ŋutsu siwo gblɔ be dukɔa hiã dukplɔse yeye la dometɔ ɖeka. Dukplɔse ƒe Takpekpea kpe ta le ƒe 1787 me, eye Washington ye nye zimenɔla. Amedɔdɔawo ŋlɔ United States ƒe Dukplɔsea, eye dukɔwo katã da asi ɖe edzi heva ge ɖe dziɖuɖu yeyea me.

Eƒe agbenɔnɔ abe dukplɔla ene
Le ƒe 1789 me la, woti Washington be wòanye dukplɔla hoʋiʋli aɖeke manɔmee, si wɔe be wòzu United States ƒe Dukplɔla gbãtɔ. Togbɔ be Washington menye dunyaheha aɖeke me tɔ o hã la, elɔ̃ ɖe Federalist Party ƒe ɖoɖo aɖewo dzi, abe alesi wòle be asrafoha si le tsitrenu kple dukɔa ƒe gadzraɖoƒe nanɔ dukɔa me ene. Wogatiae ake be wòanye zimenɔɣi evelia. Le eƒe zimenɔɣi evelia megbe la, Washington tso nya me be yemagaʋli ho ake o, togbɔ be amewo ƒe nu lé dzi nɛ gakpɔtɔ le dzidzim ɖe edzi hã. Eƒe nyametsotso, be yeadzudzɔ zimenɔɣi 2, ɖo kpɔɖeŋu si dzi dukplɔla ɖesiaɖe zɔ ɖo vaseɖe esime Franklin D. Roosevelt nava le ƒe 1940 me.

Le Washington ƒe gbedonamenyawo me le ƒe 1796 me la, exlɔ̃ nu dukɔa be woagama ɖe dunyahehawo me o eye be woagaƒo wo ɖokui ɖe aʋawɔwɔ siwo le United States godo me o. Amerikatɔ akpa gãtɔ da asi ɖe Washington ƒe dutanyawo gbɔ kpɔkpɔ ƒe ɖoɖo si me womede nu nyaa me o la dzi ƒe alafa ɖeka kple edzivɔ. Woŋe aɖaba ƒu eƒe aɖaŋuɖoɖo be woaƒo asa na dunyahehawo dzi kura, elabena dunyahehawo nɔ dɔ dzi xoxo. Woŋe aɖaba ƒu eƒe aɖaŋuɖoɖo be woaƒo asa na dunyahehawo dzi kura, elabena dunyahehawo nɔ dɔ dzi xoxo.

Agbe le dukplɔla ƒe ɖoƒe megbe
Washington trɔ yi aƒe le Mount Vernon (Virginia) esi eƒe zimenɔɣi evelia wu enu le ƒe 1797. Eku le ƒe eve megbe, le December 14, 1799 dzi, le Mount Vernon, esime wòxɔ ƒe 67, le epiglottitis, si nye ŋɔti me dɔléle ta.

Eƒe kesinɔnuwo
Tso eƒe srɔ̃ɖeɖe me la, agbledenyigba gã aɖe nɔ George Washington si, afisi wòdea atama, lu, kple amagbewo le. Kluvi siwo wu 100 hã nɔ Washington si, eye woɖe asi le wo ŋu le eƒe ku megbe. Ga geɖe menɔ esi le ga me o eye ele be wòado ga esime wònye dukplɔla. Le eƒe ku me la, Washington ƒe nunɔamesiwo ƒe home wu dɔlar 500,000.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Andrew Jackson
text:
Andrew Jackson si woyɔna gbã be Andrew Jackson, Jr. (March 15, 1767 – June 8, 1845) nye Amerika dunyahela. Enye Aʋafiagã le Aʋa si wowɔ le ƒe 1812. Emegbe eva zu United States ƒe dukplɔla adrelia. Enye Democrat gbãtɔ eye wòle dɔlar blaeve ƒe gagbalẽa dzi. Eƒe megbeŋkɔe nye "Old Hickory". Ezi Amerikatɔ Gbãtɔ geɖe dzi be woadzo le wo denyigba dzi ale be yevuwo nate ŋu anɔ afima, eye wo dometɔ geɖe ku. Woyɔ esia be Aɖatsi ƒe Mɔ.

Eƒe agbemeŋkeke gbãtɔwo
Esi Andrew Jackson nye ŋutsuvi la, enye amedɔdɔ na Anyigbagã dzi Asrafoha. Britaintɔwo lée hewɔ nuvevii.

Eyae nye U.S. dukplɔla gbãtɔ si womedzi ɖe kesinɔtɔwo ƒe ƒome me o. Menye kesinɔtɔe wònye o eye mede kɔledzi hã o. Eʋu yi Tennessee eye wòva zu dunyahela.

Asrafowo ƒe agbenɔnɔ
Le ƒe 1812 ƒe aʋawɔwɔ me la, eva zu aʋafia eye wòɖu dzi le New Orleans ƒe aʋawɔwɔ si na wòxɔ ŋkɔ ŋutɔ. Eva ge ɖe aʋaa me le ɖevimenɔɣi ƒe nuxaxa siwo me wòdo dzi le le Tɔtrɔ Kpata ƒe Aʋa la me ta; dadaa kple nɔviaŋutsu siaa ku le aʋawɔɣia, eye Jackson bu fɔ Britaintɔwo eye wòdi be yeabia hlɔ̃ yeƒe lɔlɔ̃tɔ siwo megali o.

Srɔ̃ɖeɖe
Le ƒe 1791 me la, eƒe nu lé dzi na Rachel Donelson Robards. Woto srɔ̃ɖekɔnu aɖe me. Gake srɔ̃ɖeɖea menɔ se nu o elabena womeɖe mɔ nɛ be wòagbe srɔ̃a gbãtɔ o. Eyata woɖe wo nɔewo le se nu le ƒe etɔ̃ megbe. Vi aɖeke menɔ wo si o, gake woxɔ wo dometɔ geɖe nyi. Eva zu kesinɔtɔ eye agble gã aɖe nɔ esi.

Dunyahehe
Le ƒe 1790-awo me la, Jackson nye United States Teƒenɔlawo ƒe Aƒe, United States Sewɔtakpekpe, kple Tennessee Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe Kɔkɔtɔ me tɔ. Le ƒe 1823 me la, etrɔ yi Sewɔtakpekpea me.

Andrew Jackson gbugbɔ ɖo Demokrasiha la eye wònye eƒe ŋgɔnɔla.

Le ƒe 1828 me la, eɖu John Quincy Adams dzi le Dukplɔla ƒe Tiatia si wowɔ le ƒe 1828 me, eva zu dukplɔla le March 4, 1829 dzi, eye le ƒe ene megbe la, wogatiae ake be wòanye dukplɔla zi evelia. Le Nullification Crisis si dzɔ le ƒe 1832-1833 me la, South Carolina ɖe gbeƒãe be yeaɖe ye ɖokui ɖa tso United States gbɔ. Jackson do ŋɔdzi na aʋawɔwɔ, eye emegbe wòɖe asi le nyaa ŋu.

Le January 1835 me la, wowu Jackson kloe esime nutala aɖe si mekpɔ dɔ awɔ o di be yeada tue gake eƒe tu eveawo siaa xa. Eyae nye dukplɔla gbãtɔ si te amewuwu kpɔ.

Le ƒe 1830 me la, Jackson de asi Indiatɔwo ɖeɖeɖa ƒe Se te si ɖe mɔ na U.S. dziɖuɖua be wòazi Amerikatɔ Gbãtɔwo dzi ŋutasesẽtɔe be woaʋu le woƒe anyigba dzi ayi ɣetoɖoƒe gome. Wowu Amerikatɔ Gbãtɔ geɖe eye woyɔ mɔ si dzi wozɔna yia ɣetoɖoƒe gome la be Aɖatsi ƒe Mɔ.

Andrew Jackson tsi tre ɖe United States dukɔa ƒe gadzraɖoƒe ŋu elabena esusu be gadzraɖoƒewo kple woƒe gagbalẽwo nye kesinɔtɔwo kple ŋusẽtɔwo tɔ eye womewɔa ame tsɛwo ƒe nyonyo ŋudɔ o. Dukɔa ƒe gadzraɖoƒea ƒe ɣeyiɣia wu enu le Jackson ƒe dukplɔɣi. Jackson tiae be yemayi gadzraɖoƒea dzi o.

Le March 4, 1837 dzi la, Andrew Jackson wu eƒe zimenɔɣi evelia nu. Le ema megbe la, woti dukplɔla ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ Martin Van Buren be wòanye dukplɔla eye wòyi nu geɖe siwo Jackson wɔ dzi. Jackson kpɔ ŋusẽ gã aɖe ɖe Demokrasitɔ bubuwo dzi le ƒe 1800-awo me.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Martin Van Buren
text:
Martin Van Buren (Dzome 5, 1782 – Siamlɔm 24, 1862) nye United States ƒe dukplɔla enyilia. Eyae nye dukplɔla gbãtɔ si wodzi le United States ƒe Ðokuisinɔamesi ƒe Gbeƒãɖeɖe megbe, si wɔe be wònye dukplɔla gbãtɔ si wodzi abe U.S. dukɔmevi ene le ƒe 1776 megbe.

Wodzi Van Buren le Kinderhook, New York, le ƒe 1782. Van Buren srɔ̃ senyawo to dɔwɔwɔ na Francis Sylvester me eye emegbe wòva zu senyala le ƒe 1803. Le ƒe 1821 me la, wotiam be manye United States Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ, eye wònɔ New York teƒe. Dukplɔla Andrew Jackson tiae be wòanye Dukɔa ƒe Agbalẽŋlɔla le ƒe 1827. Le ƒe 1832 me la, eva zu United States of America ƒe Dukplɔla ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ na Jackson, eye le ƒe 1836 me la, eva zu United States ƒe dukplɔla 8 lia. Le ɣeyiɣi akpa gãtɔ si me wònye dukplɔla me la, ganyawo nɔ gbegblẽm ŋutɔ, eye wobua fɔe ɖe eta. Eyae nye dukplɔla gbãtɔ si wodzi United States dukɔmevi, elabena wodzi amesiwo katã do ŋgɔ nɛ la nye Britaintɔwo teviwo do ŋgɔ na Amerikatɔwo ƒe Tɔtrɔ Kpata la.

Van Buren bu le dukplɔla ƒe tiatia si kplɔe ɖo me le ƒe 1840 me na William Henry Harrison. Le ƒe 1848 me la, egaʋli ho be yeanye dukplɔla abe Free Soil Party ƒe akpa aɖe ene, gake meɖu dzi o. Van Buren ku le Siamlɔm 24, 1862 dzi, le dzidɔ ta esi asrãdɔ dze edzi, le eƒe Lindenwald-nyigba dzi.

Agbenɔnɔ le ɖevime
Wodzi Martin Van Buren le Dzome 5, 1782 dzi le Kinderhook, New York, le Albany ƒe dzigbe gome. Van Buren nye ame etɔ̃lia si wodzi le vi atɔ̃ dome. Fofoa Abraham Van Buren nye agbledela kple ahadzraƒe aɖe tɔ. Dadaa ŋkɔe nye Maria Hoes Van Buren, si nye Netherlandstɔ aɖe si ʋu va dukɔa me la tɔgbuiyɔvi. Martin Van Buren de suku le Kinderhook Academy le kɔƒe si me wònɔ me. Le Kinderhook Academy la, ebi ɖe Eŋlisigbe kple Latingbe me. Van Buren do le sukua me esime wòxɔ ƒe 14.

Esi wònye senyala ene

Le ƒe 1796 me la, Van Buren dze dɔwɔwɔ gɔme le Francis Sylvester, si nye senyala si wɔa dɔ le Kinderhook, ƒe senyawo gbɔ kpɔƒe. Ena ɔfisa nɔ dzadzɛ, ewɔa nuŋlɔɖiwo ƒe kɔpi eye wòwɔa dɔ bubuwo. Esime wònɔ dɔ wɔm le afima la, esrɔ̃ nu tso senyawo ŋu. Esi wònɔ Sylvester te ƒe ade megbe la, ezã ƒe mamlɛtɔ tsɔ srɔ̃ dɔ le William P. Van Ness ƒe dɔwɔƒe si le New York City. Van Buren to New York Dukɔa ƒe Senyalawo ƒe Dodokpɔ me le ƒe 1803 me, eye wòzu senyala.

Esi Van Buren va zu senyala vɔ la, etrɔ yi Kinderhook be yeawɔ dɔ abe senyala ene kple nɔviaŋutsu James J. Van Alen le ƒe 1803 me.

Ƒe atɔ̃ megbe la, Van Buren va zu Columbia County ƒe ame teƒenɔla (sedzikpɔla). Ɣeyiɣi aɖeke menɔ anyi si woɖo ɖi na dɔa wɔwɔ o. Eyae nye be Van Buren anɔ afima vaseɖe esime tsitretsiɖeŋuha la nate ŋu atia ame bubu ɖe eteƒe. Van Buren nɔ dɔa me abe ƒe atɔ̃ ene vaseɖe esime woɖee le dɔ me le March 19, 1813 dzi.

Dunyahehe me dɔwɔɖui
Van Buren nɔ New York teƒe le United States Sewɔtakpekpe me tso ƒe 1821 va ɖo ƒe 1828. Edo le Sewɔtakpekpea me va zu New York ƒe nutodziɖula le ƒe 1829. Le March 5, 1829 dzi esi wòzu nutodziɖula la, Dukplɔla Andrew Jackson tsɔ Van Buren ɖo Dukɔa ƒe Agbalẽŋlɔla,  eyata ɣleti eve koe Van Buren nye nutodziɖula.

Tso ƒe 1833 va ɖo ƒe 1837 me la, enye Dukplɔla ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ. (Jackson gakpɔtɔ nye Dukplɔla le ɣeyiɣi sia me.) Azɔ hã enye Free Soil Party me tɔ vevitɔ eye wòxɔ akɔdada ƒe kpekpeɖeŋu geɖe tso Free Soil Party gbɔ.

Ɣleti ʋee aɖewo ko le Van Buren ƒe dukplɔla nyenye megbe la, gakuxi aɖe do mo ɖa si woyɔna be Dzidziɖedzi si dzɔ le ƒe 1837. Van Buren xɔ dziɖuɖu si seɖoƒe li na dzi se, eye mewɔ nu ɖe eŋu le mɔ si ame geɖe di nu o. Ame geɖe bu fɔe be ganyawo va le gbegblẽm ɖe edzi, eye esia wɔe be amewo megalɔ̃nɛ o. Exɔ megbeŋkɔ "Akunyawɔla Sue" kple "Akpɔkplɔ Dzĩ" le eƒe dunyahehe ayetɔe ta.

Ame ŋutɔ ƒe agbenɔnɔ
Van Buren ɖe Hannah Hoes, si nye tɔɖiayɔvi, le Dzodze 21, 1807. Wodzi vi atɔ̃ ɖekae: Abraham, John, Martin Jr., Smith, kple Winfield Scott.

Eƒe Ku
Martin Van Buren xɔ aklãdɔ le ƒe 1861 ƒe adame. Le esia ta la, etsi aba dzi. Le Siamlɔm, 1862 me la, asrãdɔ sesẽ aɖe dze Van Buren dzi eye wòte gbɔdzɔgbɔdzɔ. Van Buren ku le Siamlɔm 24, 1862 dzi le eƒe aƒe me le Kinderhook, New York, le dzidɔ ta. Ƒe 79 ye wòxɔ.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

Agbemeŋutinya
Ame siwo wodzi le ƒe 1782 me
Ame siwo ku le ƒe 1862 me

title: William Henry Harrison
text:
William Henry Harrison (Dzodze 9, 1773 – Afɔfiɛ 4, 1841) nye United States ƒe dukplɔla 9 lia. Eƒe megbeŋkɔe nye "Old Tippecanoe" eye wònye aʋawɔla si ŋu wodea bubui ŋutɔ. Harrison ye subɔ ɣeyiɣi kpuitɔ kekeake wu United States dukplɔla ɖesiaɖe. Eƒe dziɖuɣi xɔ ɣleti ɖeka pɛpɛpɛ.

Wotiam dukplɔla le ƒe 1840 me, eye wòka atam le Tedoxe 4, 1841. Eƒe zidziƒonuƒo xɔ gaƒoƒo ɖeka kple aɖabaƒoƒo blaene. William Henry Harrison xɔ aklãdɔ sesẽ aɖe, eye le Afɔfiɛ 4 lia dzi le ƒe ma ke me la, eku. Eyae nye dukplɔla gbãtɔ si ku le eƒe zi dzi. Harrison nye dukplɔla tsitsitɔ kekeake si xɔ ɖoƒea esime wòxɔ ƒe 68, ŋkeke 23, vaseɖe esime Ronald Reagan si xɔ dukplɔla ƒe ɖoƒea esime wòxɔ ƒe 69. Eyae nye dukplɔla mamlɛtɔ si wodzi do ŋgɔ na United States ƒe Ðokuisinɔamesi ƒe Gbeƒãɖeɖe.

Tɔgbuiayɔvi nye United States ƒe dukplɔla 23 lia, Benjamin Harrison.

Agbenɔnɔ le ɖevime
Wodzi Harrison le Dzodze 9, 1773. Enye Benjamin Harrison V kple Elizabeth Bassett ƒe vi adreawo dometɔ suetɔ. Wonɔ Berkeley Agbledeƒe si le Charles City County, Virginia. Eyae nye dukplɔla mamlɛtɔ si wodzi abe Britain dukɔmevi ene do ŋgɔ na Amerikatɔwo ƒe Ðokuisinɔɣi. Fofoa nye agbledela kple amedɔdɔ le Anyigbagã dzi Sewɔtakpekpe (ƒe 1774–1777) si de asi Ðokuisinɔamesi ƒe Gbeƒãɖeɖe te. Enye Virginia ƒe Nutomedziɖula le ƒe 1781 kple 1784 dome. Wotia nɔviaŋutsu tsitsitɔ Carter Bassett Harrison be manye Virginia teƒenɔla le United States Teƒenɔlawo ƒe Aƒea me.

Le ƒe 1787 me la, ede Presbyteriatɔwo ƒe Hampden-Sydney Kɔledzi. Ede sukua vaseɖe ƒe 1790. Harrison nya Latingbe kple Fransegbe nyuie.

Srɔ̃ɖeɖe kple ƒome
Le ƒe 1795 me la, edo go Anna Symmes. Vi 10 ye nɔ wo si.

Eƒe agbenɔnɔ abe dukplɔla ene
Eka atam le Tedoxe 4, 1841 dzi si nye ŋkeke si dzi vuvɔ nɔ wɔwɔm eye tsi nɔ dzadzam. Eƒe zi gbãtɔ ƒe nuƒoa nye esi didi wu ɖesiaɖe le Amerikatɔwo ƒe ŋutinya me.

Harrison ƒe nuƒo si wòƒo zi gbãtɔ nye Whigtɔwo ƒe ɖoɖowɔɖia ƒe nyagbɔgblɔ tsitotsito, vevietɔ esi womegblɔ be eɖi anukware le Jackson kple Van Buren ƒe ɖoɖowo ŋu o.

Harrison do ŋugbe be yeagbugbɔ United States ƒe Gadzraɖoƒegã aɖo anyi eye yeakeke ga home si sɔ gbɔ wu si wòatsɔ ado gae ɖe enu to pepa dzi ga nana me.

Dɔnɔ kple ku
Le Tedoxe 26, 1841 dzi la, Harrison dze dɔ le dzamezã ta. Woxɔe se be yame ƒe nɔnɔme gbegblẽ si nɔ anyi le eteƒenɔɣi gbɔe eƒe dɔlélea tso.

Vuvɔa nu sẽ ɖe edzi, eye wòtrɔ kabakaba zu aklãdɔ kple aklãdɔ. Edze agbagba be yeaɖi ɖe eme le White House, gake mete ŋu kpɔ xɔ si me tomefafa le o le ameha si nɔ ɔfis dim ta. Eƒe hadomeɖoɖowɔɖi si me vovo menɔa ame ŋu kura o na be ɣeyiɣi si wòatsɔ aɖi ɖe eme sesẽna ɖe edzi.

Harrison ƒe ɖɔktawo te atike siwo nye opium, castor oil, leeches, kple Virginia snakeweed zazã kpɔ. Gake ɖeko atikewɔwɔawo na Harrison gagblẽ ɖe edzi, eye wòva nɔ dziɖeleameƒo me.

Harrison ku le eƒe dukplɔla ƒe ŋkeke 32 lia dzi le Afɔfiɛ 4, 1841 dzi le ŋdi ga 12:30 me le aklãdɔ, ʋuʋudedi, kple septicima ta. Ewɔ dɔ le dukplɔla ɖesiaɖe ƒe ɣeyiɣi kpuitɔ kekeake me tso Tedoxe 4, 1841 vaseɖe Afɔfiɛ 4, 1841, ŋkeke 30, gaƒoƒo 12, kple aɖabaƒoƒo 30. Eyae nye United States ƒe dukplɔla gbãtɔ si ku le eƒe zi dzi.

Harrison ƒe kunuwɔwɔ yi edzi le Wesley Sɔlemexɔ me le Cincinnati, Ohio le Afɔfiɛ 7, 1841. Woɖii gbã le Sewɔtakpekpea ƒe Tsiẽƒe le Washington, D.C.. Emegbe woɖii ɖe North Bend, Ohio.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

Agbemeŋutinya
Ame siwo wodzi le ƒe 1773 me
Ame siwo ku le ƒe 1841 me

title: Diedrich Westermann
text:
Diedrich Hermann Westermann (June 24, 1875 – May 31, 1956) nye Germanytɔ mawunyadɔgbedela, Afrikatɔ, kple gbeŋutinunyala. Ekeke Carl Meinhof, eƒe nufiala, ƒe dɔa ɖe enu ŋutɔ hegbugbɔ trɔ asi le eŋu, togbɔ be egbe Meinhof ƒe nufiafia aɖewo le mɔ si me kɔ ko nu hã. Wobu Westermann be enye amesiwo ɖo egbegbe Afrika gbeŋutinunya anyi la dometɔ ɖeka.

Ewɔ gbegbɔgblɔ kple amegbetɔŋutinunya me numekuku geɖe le nuto si tso Senegal yi ɣedzeƒe gome va ɖo Nil Dzigbe gome. Eƒe gbeŋutisegbalẽwo ƒo nu tso Afrikagbe vovovowo ŋu, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye Gbegbewo, Nuer, Kpelle, Shilluk, Hausa, kple Guang.

Westermann ƒe dɔ si wotsɔ sɔ kple wo nɔewo, si wodze egɔme le ƒe 1911 me la, ƒo egbegbe Niger–Congo kple Nilo-Sahara gbegbɔgblɔwo ƒe hatsotso geɖe nu ƒu le gɔmedzedzea me le ŋkɔ Sudangbewo te. Eƒe agbalẽ vevitɔ kekeake si wòta emegbe Die westlichen Sudansprachen 1927a ma esiawo ɖe Ɣedzeƒe kple Ɣetoɖoƒe Sudangbewo me eye wòɖo nusi ava zu Niger–Congo ƒe gɔmeɖoanyi. Le agbalẽ sia kple nyati siwo do ƒome kplii siwo kplɔ wo nɔewo ɖo le ƒe 1925 kple 1928 dome me la, Westermann de dzesi ke gbogbo aɖewo siwo dzi wotu míaƒe gɔmesese le Niger–Congo ŋu ɖo eye wògblɔ kpeɖodzi siwo fia be ƒome siwo le eme dometɔ geɖe wɔ ɖeka. Afrikagbe siwo do ƒome kple Joseph Greenberg ƒe hatsotsowo ƒe akpa gãtɔ tso Westermann ƒe agbalẽa me ŋutɔŋutɔ.

Le ƒe 1927 me la, Westermann ta Practical Orthography of African Languages, si wova yɔ emegbe be Westermann ƒe nuŋɔŋlɔ. Emegbe la, eta Practical Phonetics for Students of African Languages si kpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe amewo dzi eye wogbugbɔ tae zi geɖe le nuwɔwɔ aduadu kple Ida C. Ward (ƒe 1933).

Wodzii le Baden si te ɖe Bremen ŋu eye wòku le afima hã
Germany

title: Michèle Victory
text:
Michèle Victory (wodzi le ƒe 1958 me) nye Franse dunyahela na Sosialist Dunyaheha eye wònye Franse Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ na Ardèche ƒe nuto 2 lia.
Enye ame si woɖo ɖe eteƒe gbã le ƒe 2007 me eye wòva zu sewɔtakpekpea me tɔ le Dzome 2017 me.

Le Tedoxe 9, 2020 dzi, le ƒe 2019–20 ƒe coronavirus dɔvɔ̃a me la, wodoe kpɔ be dɔlékuia le eŋu.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

Agbemeŋutinya
Ame siwo wodzi le ƒe 1958 me

title: Dominique Strauss-Kahn
text:
dominique Strauss-Kahn (wodzi le 25 April 1949) nye Franse dunyahela kple gaŋutinunyala si tso Yudatɔ me. Esrɔ̃ gaŋutinunya eye wònye gaŋutinunyafialagã le yunivɛsiti aɖe le Paris. Ewɔ dɔ vovovowo le France dziɖuɖua me, eye wònye Dukɔwo Dome Ganyawo Gbɔkpɔha ƒe tatɔ tso ƒe 2007 va ɖo ƒe 2011. Le France la, zi geɖe la, woɖea eƒe ŋkɔ kpuie be DSK.

Enye nufialagã blibo le Paris Dunyahenyawo Ŋuti Nusrɔ̃ƒe ("Dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya Po").
Enye Ganyawo ƒe Nufialagã le Paris West Yunivɛsiti Nanterre La Défense kple Dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya Po,
eye wònye Ganyawo kple Ganyawo ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla tso ƒe 1997 va ɖo ƒe 1999, abe eƒe akpa aɖe ene ƒe Lionel Jospin ƒe Agbɔsɔsɔme Miamedziɖuɖua me.
Enye Sosialist Dunyaheha (PS) (si le Franseawo ƒe dunyahehe ƒe titina miame) ƒe ɖusimetɔ.
Wotiae le ƒe 2006 ƒe ŋgɔdonyawo me le eƒe akpaa dzi be wòazu ame si di be yeaxɔ France dukplɔla ƒe tiatia le ƒe 2007.
Ségolène Royal ɖu edzi le tiatia siawo me le November 2006 me.

Le May 14, 2011 dzi la, wolé Strauss-Kahn eye wotsɔ nya ɖe eŋu be edɔ nyɔnu aɖe gbɔ le amedzrodzeƒe aɖe le New York.
Strauss-Kahn gbe nya siwo katã wotsɔ ɖe eŋu la.
Emegbe ʋɔnudrɔ̃la aɖe da asi ɖe edzi be woaɖe asi le eŋu le gaxɔ me.

Le May 18, 2011 dzi la, eɖe asi le eƒe dɔ ŋu le IMF, be wòateŋu atsɔ eƒe susu aɖo eƒe ametakpɔkpɔ ŋu.

Le June 29, 2011 dzi la, woti Franseawo ƒe ganyawo gbɔ kpɔla Christine Lagarde be manye IMF ƒe dɔdzikpɔlagã eye wòxɔ dɔa le July 5, 2011 dzi.

Tso ƒe 1995 vaseɖe ƒe 1997 me la, enye Sarcelles ƒe dudzikpɔla.

Agbe Gbãtɔ
Wodzi Dominique Strauss-Kahn le April 25, 1949 dzi le
Paris ƒe gbɔtodu si me kesinɔnuwo bɔ ɖo si nye Neuilly-sur-Seine, Hauts-de-Seine.
Enye senyala Gilbert Strauss-Kahn ƒe viŋutsu. Wodzi Strauss-Kahn fofo na Alsatiatɔ Yudatɔ kple dadaa Katolikotɔ si tso Lorraine; Strauss-Kahn dada tso Sefardi Yudatɔwo ƒe ƒome aɖe me le Tunisia.

Dunyahehe me Agbenɔnɔ
Strauss-Kahn nye Kɔmiunist Sukuviwo ƒe Habɔbɔ me tɔ gbã, hafi va ge ɖe Centre d’études, de recherches et
d’éducation socialiste (Sosialist Sukudede Ŋuti Nusɔsrɔ̃ Kple Numekuku Dɔwɔƒe, CERES) si Jean-
Pierre Chevènement nɔ ŋgɔ na la me le ƒe 1970-awo me , si ava nye dukplɔla ƒe ametiakɔdala le ƒe 2002 ƒe tiatiawɔƒea. Afimae wòdze xɔlɔ̃ France ƒe Dukplɔlagã si ava nye Lionel Jospin (PS) le afima.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Danièle Hoffman-Rispal
text:
Danièle Hoffman-Rispal (22 June 1951 – c. 16 April 2020) nye Franse dunyahela si tso Yudatɔ me.
Enye France Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ tso ƒe 2002 va ɖo ƒe 2012. Enɔ Paris dugã teƒe. Hoffman-Rispal nye Sosialist Dunyaheha la me tɔ.

Hoffman-Rispal ku le April 15 ƒe nuwuwu alo April 16, 2020 ƒe gɔmedzedze le Paris esime wòxɔ ƒe 68.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Jean-Marc Ayrault
text:
Jean-Marc Ayrault (wodzi le 25 Dzove 1950) nye Franse dunyahela. Enye France ƒe Dukplɔlagã tso May 15, 2012 va ɖo March 31, 2014. Enye Nantes ƒe Dumegã hã tso ƒe 1989. François Hollande ye tiae dukplɔlagã le UMP ƒe dukplɔla ƒe dziɖuɖu kple dziɖuɖu ma ƒe asiɖeɖe le dɔ ŋu megbe.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Michel Bernard Barnier
text:
Michel Bernard Barnier (wodzi le 9 Dzove 1951) nye Franse dunyahela si léa nuteƒewɔwɔ me ɖe asi.
Enye Europa Dɔwɔha ƒe Dɔwɔha si kpɔa Kadodowo kple
United Kingdom gbɔ (UK Task Force/UKTF) ƒe Tatɔ tso November 2019. Enye Dɔwɔha si Kpɔa Dɔwɔha si Kpɔa Dzadzraɖo kple Dɔwɔha si kpɔa Dzadzraɖo kple United Kingdom dzi tso October 2016 va ɖo November Ƒe 2019.

Le France la, enye dutanyawo gbɔkpɔla tso ƒe 2004 va ɖo ƒe 2005, Europa nyawo gbɔ kpɔla tso ƒe 1995 va
ɖo ƒe 1997 eye wònye nutome kple agbenɔnɔ ƒe dziɖuɖumegã tso ƒe 1993 va ɖo ƒe 1995.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Jacques Barrot
text:
Jacques Barrot (February 3, 1937 – December 3, 2014) nye Franse dunyahela. Ewɔ dɔ abe Europa ƒe Dzɔdzɔenyenye ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla le ƒe 2008 kple 2010
dome, le esi wòzã ƒe ene tsɔ subɔ abe Ʋuɖoɖo ƒe
Dɔdzikpɔla (2004–2008) kple Nutome ƒe Ðoɖowo ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla ɣleti enyi (2004).

Enye subɔla hã, kple Yssingeaux ƒe dudzikpɔla.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Bernard Cazeneuve
text:
bernard Cazeneuve (wodzi le 2 June 1963) nye Franse Sosialist dunyahela. Enye France ƒe Dukplɔlagã tso December 2016 va ɖo May 2017. Wodzii le Senlis, Oise.

Dᴐwᴐna
Le ƒe 2012 me la, woɖoe Dukɔa ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla le Europa Nyawo gbɔ eye le ƒe 2013 me la, woɖoe 
Dukɔa ƒe Gazazãwo ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla le Jean-Marc Ayrault dziɖuɖua ƒe zimenɔɣi evelia me.

Le 2 April 2014 dzi la, woɖoe Dukɔmeviwo ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla
42 lia le Manuel Valls Dziɖuɖua me. Le
December 6, 2016 dzi la, woɖo Cazeneuve
Prime Minister esi Valls ɖe asi le dɔ ŋu be yeƒe susu nanɔ dukplɔla ƒe tiatia si gbɔna ŋu.

Ame ŋutɔ ƒe agbenɔnɔ
Srɔ̃, Véronique, kple vi eve le Cazeneuve si. Atsu kple asi sia gbe wo nɔewo eye wogaɖe wo nɔewo ake le August 12, 2015 dzi.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Jean-Jacques Barthe
text:
Jean-Jacques Barthe (27 June 1936 – 10 June 2022) nye Franse PCF dunyahela. Wodzi Barthe le Calais, France. Enye Franseawo ƒe Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ tso ƒe 1973 vaseɖe ƒe 1988.
Barthe nye Calais ƒe Dumegã hã tso ƒe 1971 va ɖo ƒe 2000.
Barthe nye Europa Aɖaŋudeha ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ hã tso ƒe 1981 vaseɖe ƒe 1982.

Barthe ku le 10 June 2022 le Calais esime wòxɔ ƒe 85.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Jean-Pierre Bastia
text:
Jean-Pierre Bastiani (6 June 1950 – 27 Afɔfiɛ 2021) nye Franse dunyahela.
Wodzi Bastiani le Toulouse, France. Bastiani nye Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me
tɔ le ƒe 1993 vaseɖe ƒe 1997. Bastiani nye Auterive ƒe Dumegã le
ƒe 1989 vaseɖe ƒe 2008 dome eye wògaganye tso ƒe 2014 vaseɖe ƒe 2018 dome.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Jean-Pierre Bastiani
text:
Jean-Pierre Bastiani (6 June 1950 – 27 Afɔfiɛ 2021) nye Franse dunyahela.
Wodzi Bastiani le Toulouse, France.
Bastiani nye Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ le ƒe 1993 vaseɖe ƒe 1997.
Bastiani nye Auterive ƒe Dumegã le ƒe 1989 vaseɖe ƒe 2008 dome eye wògaganye tso ƒe
2014 vaseɖe ƒe 2018 dome.
Bastiani ku le 27 August 2021 esime wòxɔ ƒe 71.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Joël Batteux
text:
joël Batteux (16 Dzove 1943 – 10 Dzove 2021) nye Franse dunyahela. Wodzii le Vitré, France.'
Enye Sosialist Dunyaheha kple Dukɔmeviwo Kple
Republicantɔwo ƒe Habɔbɔ me tɔ. Tso ƒe 1983 va ɖo
ƒe 2014 me la, Batteux nye Saint-Nazaire ƒe Dumegã.

Le ƒe 2008 me la, wotsɔ Batteux ɖo Britain Fiaɖuƒea ƒe Habɔbɔ me tɔ.

Batteux ku le 10 January 2021 dzi le kuxi siwo do
ƒome kple amekoko ta.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Dominique Baudis
text:
dominique Baudis (Fransegbe me: [bodi]; 14 Afɔfiɛ 1947 – 10
Afɔfiɛ 2014) nye Franseawo ƒe nyadrɔ̃la,
nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔla kple dunyahela. Enye Toulouse, Haute-
Garonne ƒe Dumegã tso Tedoxe 1983 vaseɖe Dzove
2001. Enye DL hã me tɔ eye emegbe wònye titina
ɖusime Union for a Popular Movement si xɔ ŋgɔ la me
tɔ. Wodzii le Paris.

Baudis ku le kansa ta le Afɔfiɛ 10, 2014 dzi le Paris. Exɔ
ƒe 66.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Laurent Fabius
text:
laurent Fabius (Fransegbe me: [ʁɑ̃ fabjys]; wodzii le 20 August 1946) nye Franse dunyahela si tso Yudatɔ.
Enye Dukplɔse ƒe Aɖaŋudeha ƒe Dukplɔla tso March
8, 2016. Enye Sosialist Dunyaheha me tɔ. Enye France
ƒe Dukplɔlagã tso July 17, 1984 va ɖo March 20, 1986.
Fabius xɔ ƒe 37 esime woɖoe eye vaseɖe fifia la, enye
Fifth Republic ƒe Dukplɔlagã ɖevitɔ kekeake.

Fabius nye Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe ƒe Dukplɔla hã
tso ƒe 1988 va ɖo ƒe 1992 eye wògaganye tso ƒe
1997 va ɖo ƒe 2000. Enye Ganyawo ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla tso
ƒe 2000 va ɖo ƒe 2002 eye wònye Dutanyawo
Gbɔkpɔla tso ƒe 2012 va ɖo ƒe 2016.

Nyatakakadzraɖoƒe bubuwo

title: Sublimation
text:
Dye-sublimation ƒe agbalẽtata 
Dye-Sublimation Printing (alo dye-sub printing) nye kɔmpiuta dzi agbalẽtatamɔnu si wozãna le mɔ̃ dzi si zãa dzoxɔxɔ tsɔ tsɔa amadede yia nusiwo le abe plastik, kaɖi, pepa, alo avɔ ene dzi. Wotsɔ ŋkɔ si nye sublimation gbã elabena wobu amadedea be ewɔa tɔtrɔ le nu sesẽ kple gas ƒe nɔnɔme dome evɔ metoa tsi ƒe nɔnɔme me o. Emegbe wova ɖee fia be gɔmesese sia si le alesi wowɔa dɔae ŋu mesɔ o, elabena amadedea ƒe tsi aɖewo le eme. Tso ɣemaɣi la, wova yɔ ŋkɔ nyuitɔ si wotsɔ na dɔa be amadede-kaka, togbɔ be nya sia si sɔ le mɔ̃ɖaŋununya nu mexɔ ɖe ŋkɔ gbãtɔa teƒe o hã. Wotrɔ asi le nuƒlelawo kple dɔnyala bibiwo ƒe amadede-sublimation-tamɔ̃ geɖe ŋu eye wozãa wo tsɔ taa fotowo, ID-gbalẽviwo, awuwo, kple bubuwo. 

Mele be woatɔtɔ esiawo kple ‘dye sublimation heat transfer imprinting printers’, siwo nye inkjet printers siwo zãa ink tɔxɛwo tsɔ wɔa transfer siwo wowɔ be woata ɖe avɔwo dzi, eye le wo me la, amadedeawo sublimate vavã. Wowɔa esiawo le dzoxɔxɔ si bɔbɔ wu me gake le nyaƒoɖeamenu si lolo wu me, vevietɔ le agbalẽtata ƒe mɔnuwo katã me.

Le ID-gbalẽvi tata gome la, nuŋɔŋlɔ kple bar code hiã, eye wotaa wo to akpa yibɔ bubu si le (YMCKO) ƒe lãgbalẽa dzi dzi. Akpa sia si sɔ gbɔ wu la wɔa dɔ to dzoxɔxɔ ƒe asitɔtrɔ ƒe agbalẽtata me tsɔ wu amadede ƒe kaka: ƒuƒoƒo blibo aɖe, le esi teƒe be amadede si le ƒuƒoƒoa me ƒe ɖe ko la, trɔna tso lãgbalẽa me yia nusi le ete la dzi le piksel siwo dzoxɔxɔ ƒe ta ɖe fia la nu. Emegbe woyɔa nuwɔna bliboa sia ɣeaɖewoɣi be dye diffusion thermal transfer (D2T2).

Agbalẽmenya 
Dye-sub tata nye dijitaal agbalẽtata mɔ̃ɖaŋununya si zãa amadede blibo ƒe nutata siwo wɔa dɔ kple polyester kple polymer-coated substrates. Wogayɔnae be dijitaal sublimation, eye wozãa mɔnu sia zi geɖe tsɔ ɖoa atsyɔ̃ na awuwo, dzesiwo, kple aflagawo, kpakple nu yeyewo abe asitelefon ƒe nutsyɔnu, kpe gbadzɛwo, kɔfi kpluwo, kple nu bubu siwo ƒe akpawo sɔ na sublimation. Dɔwɔwɔa zãa dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya si nye sublimation, si me wotsɔa dzoxɔxɔ kple nyaƒoɖeamenu dea nu sesẽ aɖe dzi, trɔnɛ wòzua ya to endothermic reaction me evɔ wometoa tsi ƒe akpaa me o.

Le sublimation tata me la, wotsɔa sublimation amadede tɔxɛwo dea “transfer” pepa ƒe axawo dzi to tsi gel ink dzi to piezoelectric print head dzi. Wotsɔa nuŋlɔtsi la dana ɖe inkjet-pepa siawo siwo me woɖea nu geɖe le la dzi, eye wozãa wo hena afɔɖeɖe si kplɔe ɖo le sublimation tata ƒe ɖoɖoa me. Ne wota dijitaal nɔnɔmetata la ɖe sublimation transfer sheets dzi vɔ la, wotsɔa wo dana ɖe dzoxɔxɔnamɔ̃ dzi kpe ɖe nusi woatsɔ awɔ sublimation ŋu.

Be woateŋu atsɔ nɔnɔmetata la tso pepa dzi ayi nusi wotsɔ ɖo edzi la, ebia be woawɔ dzoxɔxɔnamɔ̃ ƒe dɔwɔwɔ si nye ɣeyiɣi, dzoxɔxɔ, kple nyaƒoɖeamenu ƒe ƒuƒoƒo - ɖesiaɖe le dzidzenu vovovowo me, le nusi wotsɔ wɔe nu. Dɔwɔwɔ sia atsɔ sublimation amadedeawo le molecule ƒe ɖoɖo nu ayi substrate la me. Amadede siwo wozãna wu hena sublimation wɔa dɔ le 350 degree Fahrenheit / 175 degree Celsius. Gake zi geɖe la, wokafua dzoxɔxɔ si nye Celsius dzidzenu 380 va ɖo 420 / Celsius 195 va ɖo 215 hena amadede nyuitɔ.

Nusi dona tso sublimation ƒe ɖoɖoa me enye agbalẽtata si nɔa anyi ɖaa kloe, si ƒe nɔnɔme deŋgɔ, si me amadede blibo le. Esi wònye be wotsɔa amadedeawo dea nusi wotsɔ wɔe me le molecule ƒe ɖoɖo nu, tsɔ wu be woatsɔ wo asisi ɖe nusi wotsɔ ƒoa nui nu (abe le screen printing kple direct to awu tata me ene) ta la, agbalẽtataawo magbã, mavuvu alo avuvu le nusi wotsɔ wɔe me le nɔnɔme siwo sɔ me o.

Nuwɔna 
Nusi bɔ wue nyea amadede ɖeka ɖekaɖeka, eye wodzraa amadedea ɖo ɖe polyester-lãgbalẽ si ƒe amadede ɖesiaɖe le akpa vovovo dzi. Amadede ƒe akpa ɖesiaɖe ƒe lolome sɔ kple nusi dzi wole nu tam le; le kpɔɖeŋu me, amadede ƒe agbalẽtamɔ̃ si ƒe lolome nye 6" kple 4" la akpɔ 6" kple 4" ƒe akpa ene.

Le agbalẽtata ƒe ɣeyiɣia me la, agbalẽtamɔ̃a ƒe agbalẽ xatsaxatsawo aʋuʋu agbalẽtamɔ̃a kple amadede ƒe akpa ɖeka ɖekae le dzoxɔxɔ ƒe agbalẽtata ƒe ta te, si zi geɖe la, eƒe kekeme sɔ kple agbalẽtamɔ̃a ƒe didime kpuitɔ. Dzoxɔxɔ suesuesue siwo le ta dzi trɔa dzoxɔxɔ kabakaba, eye wotsɔa amadede vovovowo dana ɖe dzoxɔxɔ si wotsɔ de eme nu. Amadedea ƒe ɖewo kaka ɖe agbalẽtamɔ̃a me.

Ne agbalẽtamɔ̃a wu agbalẽtamɔ̃a tata nu le amadede ɖeka me vɔ la, eƒoa lãgbalẽa ɖe amadede ƒe akpa si kplɔe ɖo dzi eye wòɖea mɔ̃a ƒe akpa aɖe doa goe le agbalẽtamɔ̃a me tsɔ dzrana ɖo ɖe tsatsam si kplɔe ɖo ŋu. Wogbugbɔa nu bliboa wɔna zi ene alo zi atɔ̃ le wo katã me: etɔ̃ gbãtɔawo tsɔa amadedeawo dana ɖe nusi wotsɔ wɔa dɔe dzi be woawɔ nɔnɔmetata blibo aɖe; ate ŋu adzɔ be ameyibɔwo ƒe dzoxɔxɔ ƒe asitɔtrɔ ƒe ɖoɖo aɖe nanɔ anyi ɣemaɣi alo manɔ anyi o; esime mamlɛtɔa tsɔa laminate la dana ɖe etame. Akpa sia kpɔa amadedeawo ta tso UV keklẽ kple tsidzadza me.

Ne wotsɔe sɔ kple agbalẽtata si wotsɔa nuŋlɔtsi wɔe 
Tso blema ke la, viɖe si le amadede-sublimation tata ŋue nye nyateƒe si wònye be enye mɔ̃ɖaŋununya si me gbeɖiɖiwo nɔa anyi ɖaa, afisi dometsotso ɖesiaɖe ate ŋu anye amadede ɖesiaɖe le. To vovo na ema la, agbalẽtamɔ̃ siwo wotsɔa nuŋlɔtsi wɔe ate ŋu atrɔ asi le afisi nuŋlɔtsi ƒe tsitetewo le kple woƒe lolome ŋu, si nye nuwɔna si woyɔna be dithering, gake nuŋlɔtsi ɖesiaɖe si wotsɔa nuŋlɔtsi wɔe ƒe amadedewo koe nɔa wo me. Eyata agbalẽtamɔ̃ si wotsɔ amadede wɔe la naa gbeɖiɖi vavã siwo yia edzi ɖaa siwo dzena abe atikewo ƒe foto ene. Ink-jet-tata nyea ink-tsi suesuesue siwo wotsɔ ƒo ƒu ɖe hatsotsowo me eye wokakae be woatsɔ awɔ gbeɖiɖi siwo nɔa anyi ɖaa ƒe kpɔɖeŋu, gake ne wodzi wo ɖe edzi la, woate ŋu akpɔ tsitete ɖekaɖekaawo. Le agbalẽtata si wotsɔa nuŋlɔtsi wɔe ƒe gɔmedzedze la, tsitete gãawo kple esiwo ƒe lolome mede o na be nutata siwo wotsɔa nuŋlɔtsi wɔe la bɔbɔ kura wu amadede si wotsɔa nuŋlɔtsi wɔe, gake egbegbe nuŋlɔtsi aɖewo zãa nu suesuesue siwo wotsɔa nuŋlɔtsi wɔe kple nuŋlɔtsi ƒe amadede kpeɖeŋutɔ tsɔ taa nutata siwo ƒe nyonyome de ŋgɔ ŋutɔ, si wɔnɛ be amadede ƒe nuteƒewɔwɔ de ŋgɔ wu amadede- sublimation (nukpɔkpɔ si le kɔkɔƒe).

Dye sublimation naa viɖe aɖewo wu inkjet tata. Le ɖeka gome la, agbalẽtataawo ƒuna eye ne wonya do le agbalẽtamɔ̃a me ko be woate ŋu awɔ wo ŋudɔ. Esi wònye be mehiã be dzoxɔxɔ ƒe ta la naʋuʋu ayi ŋgɔ kple megbe le agbalẽtamɔ̃a dzi o ta la, akpa siwo le ʋuʋum siwo ate ŋu agbã la mesɔ gbɔ o. Agbalẽtata ƒe tsatsam bliboa le dzadzɛ ŋutɔ elabena nuŋlɔtsi siwo me tsi mele o siwo woatsɔ akɔ wo ŋu o. Nu siawo na be zi geɖe la, amadede-dzidzedze nye mɔ̃ɖaŋununya si ŋu kakaɖedzi le wu agbalẽtata kple nuŋlɔtsi.

Dye-sublimation agbalẽtamɔ̃wo ƒe kuxi aɖewo ne wotsɔe sɔ kple inkjet agbalẽtamɔ̃wo. Ele be lãgbalẽgoloawo ƒe amadede ƒe akpa ɖesiaɖe, kple dzoxɔxɔ ƒe ta ŋutɔ, nasɔ kple nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔ̃ si dzi wota nu ɖo ƒe lolome. Gakpe ɖe eŋu la, pepa si ŋu wofa nu ɖo koŋ alo plastik tɔxɛwo koe ate ŋu axɔ ink si wotsɔ sublimated la. Esia fia be agbalẽtamɔ̃ siwo wotsɔ amadede wɔe mate ŋu asɔ kple alesi inkjet-tamɔ̃wo te ŋu trɔna ɖe nɔnɔmewo ŋu le agbalẽtata me le mɔ̃ vovovowo dzi o.

Amadedeawo kaka vie hafi pepaa xɔa wo. Eyata agbalẽtatawo mekɔna abe lãgbalẽŋudɔwɔnu ene o. Le fotowo gome la, esia naa nɔnɔmetata siwo wota le dzɔdzɔme nu ŋutɔ, gake le zazã bubuwo gome (abe nɔnɔmetatawo ƒe nɔnɔme ene) la, blukɔ vie sia nye nusi gblẽ.

Amadede si wogblẽna le axa ɖeka dzi hã sɔ gbɔ ŋutɔ; amadede si le akpa eneawo me ƒe akpa gãtɔ ate ŋu agblẽ ɖi hena agbalẽtata si bɔ. Ne wonya zã akpa aɖe ko, be woata dometsotso ɖeka ko gɔ̃ hã la, womate ŋu azã amadede si susɔ ɖe akpa ma dzi ake atsɔ ata nu bubu evɔ womagblẽ teƒe ƒuƒlu aɖe ɖi le afisi wozã amadedea le tsã o. Le agbalẽtamɔ̃ akpa gãtɔ ƒe agbalẽ xatsaxatsa ɖeka ta la, ele be woazã amadede ƒe amadede ene na agbalẽtata ɖesiaɖe, eɖanye agbalẽtamɔ̃ aɖe hiã na agbalẽtata alo mehiã o. Agbalẽtata le amadede ɖeka me meɖea naneke ɖa o, eye womate ŋu agbugbɔ amadede etɔ̃ siwo womezã o na axa ma awɔ dɔ na amadede ɖeka tata bubu o. Inkjet-tamɔ̃wo hã ate ŋu akpe fu le ‘amadede ƒe gbegblẽ’ me elabena ink-ta la ƒuna bɔbɔe ne womezã wo boo o (ne womezãe vevie o la, ink ƒuƒu ate ŋu axe cartridge ƒe nugbɔwo). Dye-sublimation media packs, (siwo me ribbon kple pepa siaa le), woɖoa dzeside na tata ƒe xexlẽme tututu si naa ga si woɖo ɖi ɖe tata ɖesiaɖe ta. Esia tsi tre ɖe agbalẽtamɔ̃ siwo wotsɔa nuŋlɔtsi wɔe siwo me woƒlea nuŋlɔtsiwo le le woƒe lolome nu ŋu.

Le nuto siwo me wotaa nuŋlɔɖi ɣaɣlawo alo adzamegbalẽwo gome la, agbalẽtamɔ̃ si wotsɔ amadede wɔe nye dedienɔnɔ ƒe afɔku si ate ŋu adzɔ si ŋu wòle be woakpɔ nyuie. Le agbalẽtata ƒe mɔnu ta la, wowɔa axa si wota ƒe nɔnɔmetata manyomanyo si me amadede vovovowo le deblibo ɖe nuzazãwo ƒe agbalẽ xatsaxatsa ƒe amadede ƒe akpawo dzi, eye woate ŋu aʋu amadede ƒe akpawo ƒe "gbeɖuɖɔ ƒe agbalẽ xatsaxatsa" be woakpɔ nusianu si wota kple agbalẽtamɔ̃a. Le nɔnɔme mawo gome la, ele be woagbã gbeɖuɖɔ babla la alo atɔ dzoe le teƒea tsɔ wu be woatsɔe aƒu gbe ɖe gbeɖuɖɔ me ko. Azɔ hã, le aƒemezãlawo gome la, woate ŋu aɖe gbeɖuɖɔ si woɖe tso fototamɔ̃ me la le gbeɖuɖɔa me nenema ke eye woazãe atsɔ akpɔ nusianu si wota. Esi wònye be agbalẽ xatsaxatsa si wotsɔna naa nu la nye plastik ta la, agbalẽ xatsaxatsa si wozã ƒe agbenɔƒe ate ŋu axɔ ƒe geɖe alo ƒe bla nanewo, si ana nɔnɔmetatawo nagagbugbɔ axɔ ɣeyiɣi didi aɖe le etsɔtsɔ ƒu gbe megbe.

Azɔ hã, pepa siwo me wodea amadedee kple lãgbalẽgolowo sea veve ɖe ŋutigbalẽmiwo nu, si doa kplamatse amadedea ƒe ŋutete be wòakɔ tso lãgbalẽa me ayi pepaa dzi. Ele be ke hã nanɔ wo me, si ate ŋu ana be amadede suesuesuewo nadze le agbalẽ siwo wota la dzi. Dye-sublimation agbalẽtamɔ̃ akpa gãtɔ ƒe filterwo kple/alo cleaning rollers le wo si be woaɖe nusi ate ŋu adzɔ dzi akpɔtɔ, eye ke sue aɖe koe ate ŋu akpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe agbalẽtata ɖeka dzi ne eva lé ɖe agbalẽtata ŋu le agbalẽtata me. Mlɔeba la, amadede-sublimation agbalẽtamɔ̃wo mewɔa dɔ nyuie o ne wole nutata siwo mewɔa akpa aɖeke o kple esiwo ƒe amadede nye yevu kple blɔ siwo ƒe kpekpeme lolo wu eye metamerism alo bronzing aɖeke kura mele wo ŋu o wɔm o.

Dɔbiagbalẽviwo 
Amadede ƒe akpa siwo wozã la léa nuŋlɔɖi si wota ƒe nɔnɔmetata si woate ŋu akpɔ, kple amadede gbegblẽ si womate ŋu azã ake o ƒe kpɔɖeŋu ɖe te.

Tsã la, dɔwɔƒewo alo asitsatsa ƒe agbalẽtata deŋgɔwo koe wozãa dye-sub tata. Wozã fototata si wotsɔ amadede vovovowo wɔe le atikewɔwɔ me nɔnɔmetatawo ɖeɖe, nɔnɔmetatawo ƒe kpeɖodzi, dedienɔnɔ, kple dɔ siwo ku ɖe nyadzɔdzɔwo kaka ŋu me. Gake egbea la, exɔ ŋkɔ ŋutɔ le wɔnawo ƒe fotoɖeɖe kple fotoɖeƒe alo nudzraƒe siwo hiã be woata agbalẽ kabakaba, le woƒe didi nu.

Alps Electric ye wɔ amadede-sub-tamɔ̃ nyui gbãtɔwo na aƒeme nuƒlelawo le asi si nye dɔlar 500–1,000 me, si na amadede-dziyiyi ƒe mɔ̃ɖaŋununya va ɖo ame geɖe gbɔ. Fifia agbalẽtamɔ̃ geɖe siwo wotsɔa amadede wɔe le asi me siwo dzea egɔme tso dɔlar 100 pɛ ko dzi, vevietɔ asitelefon dzi fototamɔ̃ siwo ƒe lolome le abe posugbalẽvi ene.

Ŋutete si le wo si be woate ŋu ata foto enumake tso agbalẽtamɔ̃ sue aɖe me le asi bɔbɔe me na be wozã amadede ƒe kɔkɔme ƒe kuxiwo gbɔ kpɔnu siwo va xɔ ɖe foto siwo woɖena enumake siwo wozãna tsã teƒe le dɔ aɖewo me, abe ID-fotoɖeɖe kple kaɖitamɔ̃ ene.

Dɔwɔƒe geɖe dzraa xɔ siwo ƒe lolome le abe kplɔ̃dzivɔ ene be wonye agbalẽtamɔ̃ siwo le wo ɖokui si eye wodzraa agbalẽtaƒe kple fotoɖeƒe ƒe dɔwɔnuwo. Wotu unit siawo dometɔ aɖewo ɖe agbalẽtamɔ̃ siwo wozãna le mɔ vovovowo nu dzi. Adzɔnuwɔƒe aɖewo, naa kɔmpiutadziɖoɖowo wɔwɔ ƒe dɔwɔnuwo kple woƒe agbalẽtamɔ̃wo, si fia be dɔwɔƒe siawo le mɔ kpɔm be yewoahe kɔmpiutadziɖoɖowo ƒe integrators abe asi si ate ŋu adzɔ ene.

Hadome fotoɖelawo hã le fototamɔ̃ siwo le wo ɖokui si siwo ƒe lolome le abe kplɔ̃dzivɔ ene zãm le wɔnawo ƒe fotoɖeɖe me. Alesi woate ŋu ata fotoɖemɔ̃awo enumake la wɔnɛ be fotoɖelawo te ŋu taa foto siwo le nyonyome le dodokpɔxɔ me hedzrana wo enumake le wɔna si me wole la me, eye wozãa xɔtunu sue aɖe ko.

Woate ŋu azã amadede-sublimation hã abe agbalẽtata ƒe mɔnu si metso tẽ o ene. Standard black and white laser printers te ŋu taa agbalẽ ɖe pepa gbadza dzi to "transfer toner" tɔxɛ aɖe si me sublimation dyes le si woate ŋu atsɔ dzoxɔxɔ ayi T-shirt, kposɔwo, mugs, ga, puzzle, kple anyigba bubuwo dzi tegbee la zazã me.

Avɔlɔ̃nuwo 
Wozãa amadede-sublimation ƒe agbalẽtata ƒe mɔnu tsɔ taa agbalẽ ɖe polyester alo avɔ bubu siwo wotsɔ lãgbalẽ wɔe dzi. Wozãnɛ na dɔ siwo wowɔna abe T-shirt, aflaga, kplɔ̃dzivɔ, id card, kamedefefewu, kple aflaga ene. Agbalẽtamɔ̃ gbãtɔwo nye elektrikŋusẽ ƒe mɔ̃ɖaŋununya si zãa toner gake fifia zi geɖe la, wonyea agbalẽtamɔ̃ gã siwo zãa ink siwo wowɔ etɔxɛe. Amadede ƒe sublimation inks nye amadede si kaka si wotsɔ ƒo ɖe tsi si wotsɔna tsia tsi me, abe tsi ene. Wotaa nɔnɔmetataawo ɖe pepa si wotsɔ tsɔa dzoxɔxɔ si me dzoxɔxɔ mele o si ŋu wofa nu ɖo dzi gbã abe aɖaŋu mamlɛtɔ ƒe nɔnɔmetata si trɔ megbe ene, eye emegbe wotsɔa wo yia polyester avɔ dzi le dzoxɔxɔnamɔ̃ si wɔa dɔ le dzoxɔxɔ si anɔ 180 va ɖo 210 °C (356 va ɖo 410 °F) me. Le dzoxɔxɔ kple nyaƒoɖeamenu sesẽwo me la, amadedea trɔna zua ya eye wògena ɖe avɔa me, eye emegbe wòsẽna zua eƒe kawo. Wode ama avɔa tegbee ale be woate ŋu aklɔe evɔ womagblẽ nu le nɔnɔmetata la ƒe nyonyome ŋu o.

Viɖe siwo le amadede-sublimation ŋu wu avɔtata ƒe mɔnu bubuwo: nɔnɔmetatawo nɔa anyi ɖaa eye womeɖea wo ɖa alo ƒuna o, amadedea meƒoa ƒu ɖe avɔa dzi o.

Amadedewo ate ŋu klẽna etɔxɛe le alesi amadedea bla ɖe avɔ si wotsɔ lãfu wɔe ƒe ka siwo me kɔ ŋu ta, woate ŋu akpɔ gbeɖiɖi siwo yia edzi ŋutɔŋutɔ siwo sɔ kple fotowo, mɔnu tɔxɛwo abe agbalẽtata le afã kple afã ene zazã manɔmee, eye nɔnɔmetata la ate ŋu woata nu bliboa katã, eye masesẽ be woatae vaseɖe eƒe goawo katã dzi o.

Tata ƒe duƒuƒu na amadede sublimation dzoxɔxɔ agbalẽtamɔ̃wo 
Esi dzoxɔxɔ-tamɔ̃ siwo wotsɔna ƒoa amadedee zãa dzoxɔxɔ tsɔ tsɔa amadedea yia agbalẽtamɔ̃a dzi ta la, alesi nusiwo le dzoxɔxɔ ƒe ta dzi ate ŋu atrɔ dzoxɔxɔe lae seɖoƒe li na agbalẽtata ƒe duƒuƒu. Dzoxɔxɔ na nuawo le bɔbɔe, elabena elektrikŋusẽ sesẽ ate ŋu ana nu vevi aɖe ƒe dzoxɔxɔ nakɔ kabakaba ŋutɔ. Gake nusiwo le eme ƒe fafa, ne wole tɔtrɔm tso amadede si do viviti dzi yi esi me kɔ wu dzi la, sesẽna wu eye zi geɖe la, ebia be woatsɔ fesre/dzoxɔxɔmɔ̃ ƒe ƒuƒoƒo aɖe akpe ɖe agbalẽtata ƒe ta ŋu. Ta geɖe zazã hã ate ŋu ana dɔ sia nawɔ kabakaba elabena ta ɖeka ate ŋu afa esime bubu le agbalẽ tam. Togbɔ be agbalẽtata ƒe ɣeyiɣiwo toa vovo le amadede-sublimation agbalẽtamɔ̃ vovovowo dome hã la, amadede-sub agbalẽtamɔ̃ si wozãna le aƒeme si ƒe asi bɔbɔ ate ŋu ata foto si ƒe lolome nye 6" x 4" le sɛkɛnd 45 – 90 me. Agbalẽtamɔ̃ sesẽ geɖe wu ate ŋu ata agbalẽ kabakaba wu sã; le kpɔɖeŋu me, Sinfonia Colorstream S2 dye-sublimation agbalẽtamɔ̃ ate ŋu ata foto si ƒe didime nye 6" x 4" le sɛkɛnd 6.8 pɛ ko me, eye wonya be Mitsubishi CP-D707DW ƒe agbalẽtata kabakaba wu sɛkɛnd 6 teti ne eƒe lolome sɔ. Le goawo katã me la, agbalẽ si wota vɔ la ƒuna keŋkeŋ ne enya do le agbalẽtamɔ̃a me ko.

Ink na piezo agbalẽtamɔ̃wo

Amadede ƒe sublimation cartridge si woɖe ɖa 
Dye sublimation inks ƒomevi eve li na piezo dye sublimation agbalẽtamɔ̃ siwo li le asi me. Wo dometɔ si ame geɖe lɔ̃a zazã wue nye aqueous dye sublimation ink si wozãna le kɔmpiuta dzi kple agbalẽtamɔ̃ gãwo siaa me. Bubue nye solvent dye sublimation ink si woate ŋu azã le XAAR, Spectra, kple Konica printhead-wide format printers aɖewo me.

Le dijitaal avɔtata ƒe ŋgɔyiyi kabakaba ta la, amadede ƒe nuŋlɔtsiwo va le bɔbɔm wu le dijitaal inkjet tata ɖe avɔwo dzi me.

Tata ƒe duƒuƒu na piezo-tamɔ̃ gãwo siwo zãa aqueous dye sublimation ink yi edzi le dzidzim ɖe edzi. Duƒuƒu tso meta 18 sq le gaƒoƒo ɖeka me le agbalẽtamɔ̃ sue si keke 44" me va ɖo meta 3,000 kple edzivɔ le gaƒoƒo ɖeka me le dɔwɔƒewo ƒe avɔtata ƒe agbalẽtamɔ̃ si zɔna kabakaba me.

title: Printerlake
text:
Nukae Nye Agbalẽtamɔ̃ (Kɔmpiuta)? 
Agbalẽtamɔ̃wo nye mɔ̃ siwo wozãna tsɔ wɔa nuŋlɔɖiwo, nɔnɔmetatawo, alo nyatakakadzraɖoƒe bubuwo ƒe kɔpi ŋutɔŋutɔwo. Le kɔmpiuta zazã me la, wozãa agbalẽtamɔ̃wo tsɔ taa nuŋlɔɖiwo tso kɔmpiuta alo mɔ̃ bubu aɖe dzi. Printerlake na kɔmpiuta dzi agbalẽtamɔ̃ vovovowo na aƒeme kple ɔfis siaa zazã.

Nukatae Printerlake Nye Tiatia Nyuitɔ Kekeake Na Kɔmpiutadzitamɔ̃ ƒe Hiahiãwo? 
Le Printerlake la, míetsɔa agbalẽtamɔ̃ vovovowo naa amewo be woazã le aƒeme kple ɔfis siaa. Wotrɔ asi le míaƒe agbalẽtamɔ̃wo ŋu be woakpɔ amesiwo zãnɛ le vome kple amesiwo zãa wo nyuie siaa ƒe nuhiahiãwo gbɔ. Eɖanye agbalẽtamɔ̃ dim nèle na wò aƒeme ɔfis alo ɔfis gã aɖe o, agbalẽtamɔ̃ si sɔ na wò le Printerlake si.

Wotsɔ mɔ̃ɖaŋununya yeyetɔ kekeake wɔ míaƒe agbalẽtamɔ̃wo eye wonaa agbalẽtata siwo ƒe nyonyome de ŋgɔ wu. Míewɔa nu vovovowo hã, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, kple USB kadodo, kpakple asitelefon dzi agbalẽtata ƒe tiatia. Míaƒe agbalẽtamɔ̃wo hã dede kple wo zazã le bɔbɔe, eyata àte ŋu afɔ kaba.

Nukae Nàte Ŋu Awɔ Kple Agbalẽtamɔ̃? 

Woate ŋu azã agbalẽtamɔ̃wo atsɔ awɔ nuŋlɔɖi vovovowo, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye lɛtawo, gaxɔgbalẽviwo, agbalẽ gbadzawo, agbalẽviwo, kple bubuwo. Agbalẽtamɔ̃ aɖewo hã te ŋu taa fotowo kple nutatawo gɔ̃ hã.

Alesi PrinterLake Ate Ŋu Akpe Ðe Ŋuwò Nàdi Agbalẽtamɔ̃ Nyuitɔ 

PrinterLake na agbalẽtata ƒe kuxiwo gbɔ kpɔnu vovovowo be woakpɔ wò nuhiahiãwo gbɔ. Eɖanye agbalẽtamɔ̃ vevi aɖee nèhiã na aƒeme alo ɔfis zazã o, alo agbalẽtamɔ̃ si de ŋgɔ wu na agbalẽtata si ƒe lolome lolo o, agbalẽtamɔ̃ si sɔ na wò le PrinterLake si.

PrinterLake ƒe agbalẽtamɔ̃ tiatia aɖewoe nye inkjet, laser, kple agbalẽtamɔ̃ tɔxɛ siwo tso adzɔha deŋgɔwo me. PrinterLake hã naa nu vovovowo wò agbalẽtamɔ̃a, abe pepa, toner, kple ink cartridges ene.

title: Daniel Gluckstein
text:
Daniel Gluckstein (wodzi le 3 March 1953 le Paris) nye
Franse dunyahela.

Eyae nye ame vevitɔ si di be yeaxɔ Dɔwɔlawo ƒe
Habɔbɔa le ƒe 1994 ƒe Europa Sewɔtakpekpea ƒe
tiatia me; emegbe exɔ 0.43% le akɔdadaa me. Eʋli
dukplɔla ƒe ɖoƒe ta le ƒe 2002 ƒe France dukplɔla ƒe
tiatia me. Exɔ 0.47% le akɔdadaa me, eye ame 132,686
ye da asi ɖe edzi.

Le June 2008 me la, eɖo Dɔwɔlawo ƒe Habɔbɔ si le
Ðokuisi (Parti Ouvrier Indépendant) ɖekae kple Gérard
Schivardi.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Simone Veil, DBE
text:
simone Veil, DBE (Fransegbe me nyayɔyɔ: [simɔn vj] (odio nuƒola iconlisten); 13 Siamlɔm 1927 – 30 Masa 2017)
nye Franse senyala kple dunyahela. Ewɔ dɔ abe
Lãmesẽnyawo Gbɔkpɔha ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla ene le Valéry
Giscard d’Estaing, si nye Europa Sewɔtakpekpea ƒe
Dukplɔla kple France ƒe Dukplɔsedzikpɔha me tɔ ƒe
kpɔkplɔ te.

Wotsɔ Légion D'Honneur ƒe Atitsoga Gã la nɛ le ƒe 2012 me.
Yudatɔ dzɔtsoƒee wònye eye wòtsi agbe le
Ametsɔtsrɔ̃ Gã la me.

Veil ku le Paris le 30 Masa 2017 dzi, esime wòxɔ ƒe 89.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Henri Weber
text:
Henri Weber (23 Masa 1944 – 26 Afɔfiɛ 2020) nye
Franse dunyahela si tso Yudatɔwo-Polandtɔwo dome.
Enye Europa Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ na France ƒe
dzieheɣetoɖoƒe tso ƒe 2004 va ɖo ƒe 2014. Enye
Sosialist Dunyaheha (PS) me tɔ. Tso ƒe 1995 va ɖo ƒe
2004 me la, Weber nye Franseawo ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe
me tɔ. Eƒe toyɔvi nye dunyahela Jean-Claude Servan-Schreiber.
Weber ku le 26 Afɔfiɛ le ƒe 2020 me le Avignon le
COVID-19 ta, exɔ ƒe 75.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

Agbemeŋutinya
Ame siwo wodzi le ƒe 1944 me
Ame siwo ku le ƒe 2020 me

title: Jean-Louis Debré
text:
Jean-Louis Debré (wodzi le 30 Anyɔnyɔ 1944) nye Franse dunyahela. Enye Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe ƒe Dukplɔla tso ƒe 2002 va ɖo ƒe 2007 eye wònye Dukplɔse ƒe Aɖaŋudeha ƒe Dukplɔla tso ƒe 2007 va ɖo ƒe 2016.

Enye Dukplɔlagã Michel Debré ƒe viŋutsu.

Enye Ememenyawo Gbɔkpɔha ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla tso ƒe
1995 vaseɖe ƒe 1997 me le Jacques Chirac ƒe
dukplɔɣi. Tso ƒe 2016 me la, enye Nudzraɖoƒe ƒe
Aɖaŋuɖoha Kɔkɔtɔ ƒe Dukplɔla.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

Agbemeŋutinya
Ame siwo wodzi le ƒe 1944 me

title: Sylvie Charrière
text:
Sylvie Charrière (wodzi le 15 May 1961) nye Franse dunyahela. Enye La République En Marche!, habɔbɔa me tɔ. Tso ƒe 2017 me la, enye Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ na Seine-Saint-Denis ƒe dɔwɔƒea. Wodzii le Montreuil, Seine-Saint-Denis.

Le March 2020 me, le ƒe 2019–20 ƒe coronavirus dɔvɔ̃a me la, wodo Charrière kpɔ be COVID-19 le eŋu.

Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

title: Henri Emmanueli
text:
Henri Emmanueli (31 May 1945 – 21 March 2017) nye Franse sosialist dunyahela.

Emmanueli nye Franseawo ƒe Sosialist Dunyaheha me
tɔ. Enye Landes teƒenɔla tso ƒe 1978 va ɖo ƒe 1981,
tso ƒe 1986 va ɖo ƒe 1997 kple tso ƒe 2000 vaseɖe
eƒe ku le ƒe 2017. Enye Franse Dukɔa ƒe
Sewɔtakpekpe ƒe Dukplɔla tso January 22, 1992
vaseɖe April 1, 1993. Emegbe ezu Agbalẽŋlɔla Gbãtɔ
le... Franseawo ƒe Sosialist Dunyaheha tso June 19,
1994 va se ɖe October 14, 1995 dzi.

Emmanueli nye France dukplɔla François Mitterrand
ƒe akpadzinɔla vevie le eƒe dunyahehe me togbɔ be
enye Sosialisttɔ hã.

Wodzi Emmanuelli le Eaux-Bonnes, Pyrénées-
Atlantiques. Esrɔ̃ nu le Sciences Po le Paris. Ege ɖe
Compagnie Financière Edmond de Rothschild me le
ƒe 1969 me.

Emmanueli ku le March 21, 2017 dzi le atikewɔƒe aɖe
le Bayonne, Pyrénées-Atlantiques le kuxi siwo dona
tso aɖuɖɔtoedɔléle sesẽ me esime wòxɔ ƒe 71.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Edgar Faure
text:
edgar Faure (Fransegbe me: [ɛdɡaʁ foʁ]; 18 August 1908 – 30 March 1988) nye Franse dunyahela,
nuŋɔŋlɔŋlɔla, ŋutinyaŋlɔla, kple ŋkuɖodzinyaŋlɔla.Tso ƒe 1973 va ɖo ƒe 1978 me la, enye France Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe ƒe Dukplɔla. Enye France ƒe
Dukplɔlagã hã le ƒe 1952 me eye wògaganye tso ƒe 1955 va ɖo ƒe 1956 me.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Louis Mermaz
text:
louis Mermaz (wodzi le 20 August 1931) nye Franse dunyahela. Wodzii le Paris.

Mermaz nye Sosialist Dunyaheha la me tɔ. Mermaz
nye Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ tso ƒe 1997 va ɖo
ƒe 2001. Enye Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe ƒe Dukplɔla le
ƒe 1981 va ɖo ƒe 1986 dome.

Enye Agbledede ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla tso ƒe 1990 va ɖo ƒe
1992, eye wònye Kadodowo ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla kple
Sewɔtakpekpe le Bérégovoy dziɖuɖua me tso ƒe 1992
va ɖo ƒe 1993.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Richard Ferrand
text:
richard Ferrand (wodzi le 1 July 1962) nye Franse dunyahela si le  "La République En Marche!" (LREM) ƒe agbalẽa. Enye Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe ƒe
Dukplɔla tso ƒe 2018. Enye Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ na Finistère ƒe nuto 6 lia tso ƒe 2012.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Félix Gouin
text:
félix Gouin (Fransegbe me: [feliks ɡwɛ̃]; 4 October 1884 – 25 October 1977) nye Franse Sosialist
dunyahela si Franseawo ƒe dɔ si le nye dɔwɔɖui tsɔ
dome ɖa (SFIO) me tɔ.

Bubudede ame ŋu kple kafukafuwo
Grand Croix si le Légion ƒe bubu nam
Bubudede Ame Ŋusẽ Atsyɔ̃nye Gãtɔ le Klosalo me
sash hena Subɔsubɔ na Republic of Austria

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Claudie André-Deshays Haigneré
text:
claudie André-Deshays Haigneré (wodzi le May 13, 1957) nye Franse ɖɔkta, dunyahela, kple yamenutomeyimɔ̃dzikpɔla tsã.
Enye Centre National d'Études Spatiales (ƒe 1985–1999) kple Europa Yamenutome Dɔwɔƒe (ƒe 1999–2002) me tɔ.
Wodzii le Le Creusot, France. Enye France Telecom ƒe dɔdzikpɔlagã hã.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Gisèle Halimi
text:
gisèle Halimi (wodzi Zeiza Gisèle Élise Taïeb; 27 July 1927 – 28 July 2020) nye Tunisia-Franse senyala, nyɔnunyagblɔɖila, kple nuŋɔŋlɔŋlɔla.[1] Wodzii le Tunis.
Le ƒe 1971 me la, eɖo nyɔnuwo ƒe ƒuƒoƒo si nye Choisir ("To Choose"),[2] be wòakpɔ nyɔnu siwo de asi Manifesto of the 343 te siwo lɔ̃ ɖe edzi be yewoɖe fu le se nu la ta.[3]
Le ƒe 1981 me la, wotiam be manye Franseawo ƒe Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ eye wònye Isère ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ vaseɖe ƒe 1984. Le ƒe 1985 kple 1987 dome la, enye Franseawo ƒe amedɔdɔ le UNESCO.[4]
Halimi ku esime wòxɔ ƒe 93 le 28 July 2020 le Paris.[5]

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Barkat Gourad Hamadou
text:
barkat Gourad Hamadou (Arabgbe: بركات غوراد حمادو ) (1 Dzove 1930[1][2][3] – 18 Dzove 2018) nye Djibouti dunyahela. Ewɔ dɔ abe Djibouti ƒe Dukplɔlagã tso October 2, 1978 vaseɖe March 7, 2001.
Wodzii le Dikhil Nutome, Franseawo ƒe Somaliland. Eɖe asi le dɔ ŋu le ƒe 2001 me le lãmesẽkuxiwo ta.[4]

Hamadou ku le 18 March 2018 le Paris le kuxi siwo tso dzidɔ gbɔ ta, exɔ ƒe 88.[5][6]

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Francis Hammel
text:
Francis Hammel (11 Dzove 1950 – 6 Dzove 2021) nye Franse dunyahela. Tso ƒe 1997 va ɖo ƒe 2002 me la, enye Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ. Wodzi Hammel l
le Saint-Valery-sur-Somme, France. Enye Sosialist Dunyaheha la me tɔ.
Hammel ku le 6 Dzove 2021 esime wòxɔ ƒe 70.[1]

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Christian Jacob
text:
Christian Jacob (wodzi le 4 December 1959) nye Franse dunyahela. Enye Franseawo ƒe Dudɔnunɔla le Jacques Chirac ƒe zimenɔɣi evelia abe France ƒe Dukplɔla ene.
Hafi woaɖoe ɖe dziɖuɖumegãwo ƒe ɖoƒe le ƒe 2002 me la, enye Seine-et-Marne (Provins) ƒe asrafodɔ 4 lia teƒenɔla.
Enye CNJA (Centre National des Jeunes Agbledelawo) ƒe Dukplɔla tso ƒe 1992 va ɖo ƒe 1994.

Le ƒe 2019 me la, enye The Republicans ƒe Dukplɔla

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Jean-Pierre Bel
text:
jean-Pierre Bel (wodzi le 30 December 1951) nye Franse dunyahela si xɔ dzudzɔ le dɔme. Enye
Sewɔtakpekpea ƒe Dukplɔla tso ƒe 2011 va ɖo ƒe 2014.Bel nye Sosialist Dunyaheha la me tɔ.

Wotiae be wòanye Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ le September
1998 me eye wogatiae ake le September 2008. Bel nye Sosialist Ƒuƒoƒoa ƒe Dukplɔla le Sewɔtakpekpea
me tso ƒe 2004 va ɖo ƒe 2011. gérard Philippe René André Larcher (wodzi le 14 September 1949) nye Franse dunyahela. Enye
Sewɔtakpekpea ƒe Dukplɔla tso ƒe 2014. Enye Sewɔtakpekpea ƒe Dukplɔla hã tso ƒe 2008 va ɖo ƒe
2011. Enye The Republicans me tɔ. Enye Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ na Yvelines dɔwɔƒea tso ƒe 1986 me.

Enye Rambouillet ƒe Dumegã hã tso ƒe 1983 va ɖo ƒe 2004 eye wògaganye tso ƒe 2007 vaseɖe ƒe 2014.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Gérard Philippe René André Larcher
text:
gérard Philippe René André Larcher (wodzi le 14 September 1949) nye Franse dunyahela. Enye
Sewɔtakpekpea ƒe Dukplɔla tso ƒe 2014. Enye
Sewɔtakpekpea ƒe Dukplɔla hã tso ƒe 2008 va ɖo ƒe
2011. Enye The Republicans me tɔ. Enye
Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ na Yvelines dɔwɔƒea tso ƒe 1986 me.

Enye Rambouillet ƒe Dumegã hã tso ƒe 1983 va ɖo ƒe
2004 eye wògaganye tso ƒe 2007 vaseɖe ƒe 2014.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Albert François Lebrun
text:
Albert François Lebrun (Fransegbe me: [albɛʁ ləbʁœ̃]; 29 Afɔfiɛ 1871 – 6 Afɔfiɛ 1950) nye Franse dunyahela.
Enye France ƒe Dukplɔla tso ƒe 1932 va ɖo ƒe 1940.
Enye Dukɔ Etɔ̃lia ƒe dukplɔla mamlɛtɔ.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Christian Poncelet
text:
Christian Poncelet (24 March 1928 – 11 September
2020) nye Franse dunyahela si léa nuteƒewɔwɔ me ɖe
asi. Enye Dukplɔla Nicolas Sarkozy ƒe Habɔbɔ si Kpɔa
Ame Xɔŋkɔwo ƒe Habɔbɔ (UMP) me tɔ. Enye
Sewɔtakpekpea ƒe Dukplɔla tso ƒe 1998 va ɖo ƒe
2008. Enye Remiremont (Vosges) ƒe Dumegã eye
wònye Vosges ƒe Aɖaŋudeha Gã ƒe Dukplɔla kpɔ. Tso
ƒe 1979 va ɖo ƒe 1980 me la, enye Europa
Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ.

Poncelet ku le 11 September 2020 le Remiremont, 
France esime wòxɔ ƒe 92.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Valérie Boyer
text:
Valérie Boyer (wodzi le 11 June 1962) nye Franse
dunyahela. Enye The Republicans habɔbɔa me tɔ. Tso
ƒe 2007 me la, enye Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ na
Bouches-du-Rhône ƒe dɔwɔƒea. Wodzii le Bourges.

Le March 2020 me, le ƒe 2019–20 ƒe coronavirus
dɔvɔ̃a me la, wodo Boyer kpɔ be COVID-19 le eŋu.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Édouard Daladier
text:
Édouard Daladier (18 June 1884 - 10 October 1970) nye dunyahela, amesi nye France ƒe Dukplɔlagã le
Xexemeʋa Evelia ƒe gɔmedzedze. Enye dunyahela
siwo le France siwo dze agbagba be yewoatɔ te aʋaa
eye wode asi Munich Nubabla te le takpekpe aɖe me
le ƒe 1938 me la dometɔ ɖeka, kpakple Britain ƒe
Dukplɔlagã Neville Chamberlain, kpakple Germany
kple Italy ƒe ŋutasẽdziɖulawo: Adolf Hitler kple Benito Mussolini.

Nyatakakadzraɖoƒe bubuwo

title: Charles Pasqua
text:
Charles Pasqua (18 April 1927 – 29 June 2015) nye Fransetɔ asitsala kple Gaullist dunyahela. Enye
Ememenyawo Gbɔkpɔla tso ƒe 1986 va ɖo ƒe 1988, le
Jacques Chirac ƒe dziɖuɖu si me wònɔa anyi ɖekae
me, eye wònye tso ƒe 1993 va ɖo ƒe 1995 hã, le
Édouard Balladur ƒe dziɖuɖu te.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

Agbemeŋutinya

title: Gabriel Tambon
text:
Gabriel Tambon (23 Tedoxe 1930 – 27 Dzome 2015)
nye Franse dunyahela na Union for a Popular Movement (UMP). Ewɔ dɔ abe Le Castellet, Var ƒe Dumegã tso ƒe 1965 vaseɖe eƒe kugbe. Wodzii le Castellet, Vaucluse.

Tambon ku le 27 Dzome 2015 esime wòxɔ ƒe 85.

Agbemeŋutinya
Ame siwo wodzi le ƒe 1930 me
Ame siwo ku le ƒe 1826 me

title: Martine Aubry
text:
martine Aubry (wodzi le 8 August 1950) nye Franse 
dunyahela. Wodzii le Paris eye wònye Jacques Delors 
(wodzii le ƒe 1925 me) ƒe vinyɔnu.

Aubry ɖe Xavier Aubry, eye vinyɔnuvi aɖe le esi tso 
srɔ̃ɖeɖe ma me. Le ƒe 2004 me la, eɖe Jean-Louis Brochen, si nye Franseawo ƒe senyala, gake eɖoe be yealé yeƒe srɔ̃ɖeɖe gbãtɔ ƒe ƒomeŋkɔ ɖe asi. Aubry srɔ̃ gaŋutinunya le Paris. Diplomawo hã le esi le dunyahehe, hadomenunya kple dɔwɔwɔ me. Esrɔ̃ nu  
le École nationale d’administration hã. Eva do vevie nu le Confédération française démocratique du 
travail, si nye dɔwɔlawo ƒe habɔbɔ gãtɔ kekeake le dukɔa me fifia.

Enye Lille ƒe dudzikpɔla tso ƒe 2001 me eye wònye 
Sosialist Dunyaheha ƒe Agbalẽŋlɔla Gbãtɔ tso ƒe 2008 
me.Edi be yeanye Sosialisttɔwo ƒe ametiakɔdala na 
ƒe 2012 ƒe dukplɔla ƒe tiatia gake François Hollande ɖu edzi.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Jean-Pierre Baeumler
text:
jean-Pierre Baeumler (1 Siamlɔm 1948 – 22 Dzove 2021) 
nye Franse dunyahela. Enye Sosialist Dunyaheha me tɔ. Wodzii le Oberbruck, France. Tso ƒe 1989 va ɖo ƒe 
2014 me la, Baeumler nye Dumegã le Thann, Haut-Rhin. Tso ƒe 1988 va ɖo ƒe 1993 kple ƒe 1997 va ɖo 
ƒe 2002 me la, Baemuler nye Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ.

Baeumler ku le 22 Dzove 2021 esime wòxɔ ƒe 71.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Jean-Louis Bernard
text:
Jean-Louis Bernard (Amegbetɔ 31, 1938 – 26 Dzove 
2020) nye Franse dunyahela. Enye France Dukɔa ƒe 
Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ[1] eye ​​wònɔ Loiret dɔwɔƒea teƒe
tso ƒe 1993 va ɖo ƒe 2012. Enye Radical Party me tɔ. 
Enye Orléans ƒe dudzikpɔla tso ƒe 1988 va ɖo ƒe 
1989. Wodzi Bernard le Saulieu, Côte-d’Or.

Bernard ku le 26 March 2020 esime wòxɔ ƒe 81.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Pierre Bernard
text:
pierre Bernard (6 June 1934 – 5 December 2020) nye 
Franse dunyahela. Wodzii le Alban, France. Enye 
Sosialist Dunyaheha me tɔ. Enye Trébas Dumegã tso 
ƒe 1970 va ɖo ƒe 2001. Tso ƒe 1980 va ɖo ƒe 1993 me 
la, enye Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ.

Bernard ku le 5 December 2020 le Trébas esime wòxɔ ƒe 86.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Turku
text:
Turku (sv: Åbo) nye Finland enye. Eƒe dukɔmenɔlawo ƒe xexlẽme ɖo 195,301 lɔƒo (2022).

Nya siawo ƒe tsoƒe 
 Turku

Europa

title: Darmanin
text:
darmanin (wodzi le 11 October 1982) nye Franse dunyahela.
Enye Ememenyawo ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla le Prime Minister Jean Castexƒe dziɖuɖu me tso ƒe 2020. Darmanin nye Tourcoing ƒe
Dumegã tso ƒe 2014 va ɖo ƒe 2017 eye wònye Dukɔa ƒe Dɔwɔwɔ kple Akɔntabubu ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla le Prime Minister Édouard Philippe ƒe dziɖuɖumegã me tso ƒe 2017 vaseɖe ƒe 2020.[1 ][2] .

Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo
daniel Davisse (wodzi Daniel Herz; 7 July 1938 – 29 March2020) nye Franse dunyahela si wodzi le Germany. Wodzii leHamburg, Germany, eye edzilawo nye Franseawo. Tso ƒe 1996 va
ɖo ƒe 2014 me la, enye Dumegã le Choisy-le-Roi, France. Davisse nye Canton of Choisy-le-Roi
ƒe aɖaŋuɖoha Gã me tɔ tso ƒe 2004 va ɖo ƒe 2011. Enye
Agglomeration nuto si nye Seine Amont ƒe Dukplɔla hã tso ƒe 2013 va ɖo ƒe 2014.
Davisse ku le March 29, 2020 dzi le COVID-19 ta, exɔ ƒe 81.[1]

Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

title: Tampere
text:
Tampere (sv: Tammerfors) nye Finland enye. Eƒe dukɔmenɔlawo ƒe xexlẽme ɖo 244,315 lɔƒo (2022).

Nya siawo ƒe tsoƒe 
 Tampere

Europa

title: Alain Bertrand
text:
alain Bertrand (23 February 1951 – 3 March 2020) nye
Franse dunyahela. Wodzii le Saint-Juéry, Tarn. Enye
Sosialist Dunyaheha me tɔ hafi trɔ yi LREM. Le eƒe
Lozère dɔwɔƒea tso ƒe 2012. Enye dudzikpɔla le
Mende, Lozère tso ƒe 2008 va ɖo ƒe 2016. Eganye
zimenɔla ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ na nutome aɖaŋuɖoha si le
Languedoc-Roussillon tso Ƒe 2004 va ɖo ƒe 2011.

Le March 3, 2020 dzi la, Bertrand ku le Mende le
dɔléle aɖe si womenya o ta. Exɔ ƒe 69.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Jean Bonhomme
text:
jean Bonhomme (8 June 1924 – 16 October 2020) nye
Franse dunyahela. Enye Caussade ƒe Dumegã tso ƒe
1959 va ɖo ƒe 1989. Enye France Dukɔa ƒe
Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ tso ƒe 1968 va ɖo ƒe 1981 eye
wògaganye tso ƒe 1986 va ɖo ƒe 1988.
Wodzii le Puylaroque, France.

Bonhomme ku le 16 October 2020 le Caussade esime wòxɔ ƒe 96.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: James Bordas
text:
james Bordas (20 August 1929 – 28 December 2020)
nye Franse dunyahela. Enye Chambray-lès-Tours ƒe
Dumegã tso ƒe 1981 va ɖo ƒe 2011. Tso ƒe 1992 va
ɖo ƒe 2001 me la, Bordas nye Franseawo ƒe
Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ.

Bordas ku le 28 December 2020 esime wòxɔ ƒe 91.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Bernard Bosson
text:
bernard Bosson (25 February 1948 – 16 May 2017)
nye Franse dunyahela kple senyala. Ewɔ dɔ abe
Ʋuɖonyawo Gbɔkpɔla, Tsaɖiɖinyawo Gbɔkpɔha ƒe
Dɔdzikpɔla, kple Dudɔnunɔlawo ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla le
Dukplɔlagã Édouard Balladur ƒe kpɔkplɔ te tso ƒe
1993 va ɖo ƒe 1995. Enye France Dukɔa ƒe
Sewɔtakpekpe 12 lia me tɔ, eye wònɔ Haute-Savoie
teƒe abe Franseawo ƒe Demokrasi Habɔbɔ me tɔ ene. Enye Annecy ƒe dudzikpɔla hã.

Bosson ku le kɔdzi le Lyon, France le 16 May 2017 dzi
le dɔléle aɖe si wòxɔ ɣeyiɣi didi aɖe ta, exɔ ƒe 69.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Jean-Claude Boulard
text:
Jean-Claude Boulard (28 March 1943 – 1 June 2018) nye Franse dunyahela. Enye Le Mans ƒe Dumegã tso
ƒe 2001 vaseɖe eƒe kugbe, Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ tso
ƒe 2014 va ɖo ƒe 2017, kple Teƒenɔla tso ƒe 1988 va
ɖo ƒe 1993 eye wògakpɔtɔ tso ƒe 1997 va ɖo ƒe 2002. Wodzii le Nantes, France.

Boulard ku le Le Mans le June 1, 2018 dzi le dɔléle
aɖe si nɔ eŋu ɣeyiɣi didi aɖe ta, exɔ ƒe 75.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Pierre Bourguignon
text:
Pierre Bourguignon (6 Dzove 1942 – 27 Dzove 2019) nye Franse dunyahela. Ewɔ dɔ abe Dukɔa ƒe
Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ ene hena ɣeyiɣi eve (ƒe 1981–
1993 kple 1997–2012). Enye Sosialist Dunyaheha me
tɔ le ɣeyiɣi si me wònɔ Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpea me.
Enye dudzikpɔla le Sotteville-lès-Rouen, Seine-
Maritime tso ƒe 1989 va ɖo ƒe 2014.

Wodzi Bourguignon le Rouen, Seine-Maritime. Dzidɔ
wui le March 27, 2019 dzi le Saint-Aubin-lès-Elbeuf, Seine-Maritime. Exɔ ƒe 77.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Cyril Bourlon de Rouvre
text:
Cyril Bourlon de Rouvre nye Fransetɔ asitsala kple dunyahela si wodzi le Dzome 19, 1945 dzi le
Boulogne-Billancourt.

Agbemeŋutinya
Esi wòsrɔ̃ nu le kɔledzi si nye Maspero le Paris,
emegbe le kɔledzi Saint-Martin de France le Pontoise, le Nuƒoƒo ƒe Suku le Reading, le Kɔledzi Saint-Jean le Friborg kple le Lycée Janson-de-Sailly megbe la, Cyril Bourlon de Rouvre srɔ̃ elektrikmɔ̃ɖaŋudɔ le Jussieu hafi va zu yamenutomeyimɔ̃ɖaŋudɔwɔla si wu
suku nu le Institut polytechnique des sciences avancées.

Le ƒe 1979 me, esi fofoa ku, si eƒe dɔdzikpɔla wu la,
enyi anyigba gã aɖe si le esi, suklidzraƒe kple dɔwɔƒe
28 ƒe dome. Enye Financière Robur et de Cofragec
(ƒe 1982-1992), Coficine (ƒe 1984-1992), Gestimage (ƒe 1985-1992), Fabriques Sucre dɔwɔƒe (ƒe 1987-1992), Robur DA (ƒe 1988- 1992) ƒe dɔdzikpɔlagã. 1992), si tso SFDIC (ƒe 1990-1992), si nye Éditions Robur (ƒe 1986-1992), si le Elphora (ƒe 1983-1992), si le Société Joyeux (ƒe 1985-1992), si le Vrille (ƒe 1987-1992), si le 3C (ƒe 1992) ƒe dɔdzikpɔlagã 1988-1992) kple le Films de La Tour (ƒe 1989-1992) me.

Le ƒe 1987 me la, edze dɔ yeye gɔme le sinima mama me to nusiwo wòxɔ, tso ewɔla Robert Dorfmann gbɔ, tso eƒe dɔwɔƒe ɖeka, Financière Robur, Cofragec dɔwɔƒe si si eƒe agbalẽdzraɖoƒe si me sinima 650 le siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye La Grande Vadrouille alo La Vache et le Gaxɔmenɔla.

Le ƒe 1989 me la, edze dunyahehedɔ gɔme le Haute- Marne, dɔwɔƒe si tɔgbuia Charles de Rouvre nye
teƒenɔla le Franseawo ƒe Dukɔ Etɔ̃lia dzi. Wotiam be manye Chaumont ƒe dudzikpɔla, dunyaheha aɖeke mele titinasewɔtakpekpe me tɔ kple dudzikpɔla Georges Berchet ŋu o, eye wònye nutome aɖaŋuɖola na nutoa me Champagne-Ardenne (ƒe 1992-1998).

Formula 1 ƒuƒoƒo si nye AGS tɔ tso Tedoxe 1989 va ɖo ƒe 1991 me, emi dɔlar miliɔn 18 eye wòdze eƒe ƒuƒoƒoa ƒe dɔwɔnawo dzadzra gɔme, dɔwɔƒe siwo ade 70: Gbã la, Transair, si nye suklidɔwɔƒea emegbe, 1992 me la, dɔwɔƒea... catalog films, si wodo na UGC le ƒoƒo ɖekae ƒe nɔnɔme me. Le ƒe 1991 me la, etsɔ Italytɔwo Gabriele Rafanelli kple Patrizio Cantu na AGS.

Le ƒe 1992 me la, Cyril de Rouvre ƒle Formula 1 ƒuƒoƒo si nye Guy Ligier ɖe asi si wobu be enye franc miliɔn 200 nu. Esi wònye eƒe aƒetɔ yeyea ta la, ƒuƒoƒoa gadze hoʋiʋli gɔme ake eye ƒe 1993 ƒe ɣeyiɣia nye dzidzedzekpɔkpɔ, eye wòxɔ nɔƒe 5 lia le xɔtulawo ƒe ɖoƒea (nu nyuitɔ kekeake si do tso eme tso ƒe 1986 me). Gake Cyril de Rouvre ƒe gomekpɔkpɔ le eme xɔa ɣeyiɣi ɖeka pɛ ko le senyawo me kuxiwo ta.

Le December 14th, 1993 dzi la, ʋɔnudrɔ̃la Eva Joly[4] dee gaxɔ me le Fleury-Mérogis Gaxɔ me, abe nyatoƒoetoto si UGC ƒe ŋgɔnɔlawo, Guy Verrecchia kple Alain Sussfeld tsɔ ɖe ametafatafa ta ƒe akpa aɖe ene, le dɔwɔƒea xɔxɔ le June 1992 me megbe Cofragec ƒe dɔ. Woɖe adzɔha sia ƒe nunɔamesiwo ɖa, si na be fe si wobu be enye franc miliɔn 172.6 la susɔ. Cyril de Rouvre do ŋugbe be yeaxe ga sia le ƒe 1992 ƒe nuwuwu gake ɣemaɣi la, miliɔn 100 gakpɔtɔ nɔ esi. Le May 5, 1993 dzi la, UGC ƒe ŋgɔnɔlawo tsɔ nya ɖe eŋu. Enɔ gaxɔ me ɣleti eve.

Le ƒe 1994 ƒe gɔmedzedze la, edzra Ligier na Flavio Briatore.

Ebu Chaumont dudzikpɔla le France dudzikpɔƒe ƒe tiatia si wowɔ le ƒe 1995 me.

Le ƒe 1996 me la, woʋu ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe ƒe numekuku aɖe ɖe eŋu le Tribunal de grande instance of Chaumont. Eva du sia ƒe Nuvlowɔlawo ƒe Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe le September 1999 me le esi wòƒo asa na adzɔxexe ta. Esi wonya be setɔwo bia tso esi be woagade gaxɔ me ƒe etɔ̃ kple mɔxexe ɖe dɔwɔƒea dzikpɔkpɔ nu ƒe 20 o ta la, wotso afia nɛ le December 19 lia, 1999, si nye eƒe dzigbezã dzi, be wòanɔ gaxɔ me ɣleti 18 si woadzudzɔ eye woaxe mɔ ɖe dɔwɔƒe aɖe dzi kpɔkpɔ nu ƒe 3 kple adzɔ gã nyui aɖe si woxena.

Agbalẽwo ƒe xexlẽdzesiwo
Amekae Nye Amekae le France, 2002-2003, Levallois- Perret, Jacques Lafitte ƒe Tatawo, 2002, axa 10. Ƒe 1648 me

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Christian Bourquin
text:
christian Bourquin (Fransegbe me: [buʁkɛ̃]; 7 October 1954 – 26 August 2014)[1] nye Franse dunyahela. Enye Sosialist Dunyaheha me tɔ. Enye Languedoc- Roussillon Nutome Aɖaŋudeha ƒe zimenɔla tso ƒe 2010 vaseɖe eƒe ku le ƒe 2014. Ewɔ dɔ abe Millas Dumegã tso ƒe 1995 va ɖo ƒe 2001. Wodzii le Saint- Féliu-d’Amont, Pyrenees-Orientales.

Bourquin ku le Montpellier, Hérault, France, esime wòxɔ ƒe 59.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Maurice Brun
text:
maurice Brun (2 July 1925 – 5 August 2021) nye Franse dunyahela. Enye Montluçon ƒe dudzikpɔla tso ƒe 1972 va ɖo ƒe 1977 eye wònye Teƒenɔla tso ƒe 1973 va ɖo ƒe 1978. Wodzi Brun le Montluçon.

Brun ku le 5 August 2021 le Allier, France, esime wòxɔ ƒe 96.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Robert Batailly
text:
robert Batailly (2 March 1934 – 27 November 2017) nye Franse dunyahela.
Wodzii le Bourg-de-Thizy, Batailly ʋu yi Lyon emegbe. Batailly nyeRadical Party me tɔ, enɔ Europa Sewɔtakpekpe me le ƒe 1989 me.1] Woyɔ Batailly be enye Bubu ƒe Asrafoha ƒe amegã le ƒe 2010 me.[
Batailly ku le 27 November 2017 esime wòxɔ ƒe 83.[3]
Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

title: Jeans François Bazin
text:
jean-François Bazin (26 July 1942 – 17 April 2020) nye Franse
dunyahela, nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔla, kple agbalẽŋlɔla.[1][2] France. Bazin nye Dumegã ƒe Aɖaŋuɖola na Dijon tso ƒe 1971 le Dijon,
France. Bazin nye Dumegã ƒe Aɖaŋuɖola na Dijon tso ƒe 1971
va ɖo ƒe 2008. Nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔlae wònye, ewɔ dɔ na Les EchosMoniteur Universe, Le Nouvel Économiste, kple Le Spectacle du Le
Monde.

Bazin ku le 17 April 2020 le Dijon, xɔ ƒe 77.[3]

title: Jean-François Bazin
text:
jean-François Bazin (26 July 1942 – 17 April 2020) nye Franse
dunyahela, nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔla, kple agbalẽŋlɔla. Wodzii le Dijon,
France. Bazin nye Dumegã ƒe Aɖaŋuɖola na Dijon tso ƒe 1971
va ɖo ƒe 2008. Nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔlae wònye, ewɔ dɔ na Les Echos, Le
