Bazin ku le 17 April 2020 le Dijon, xɔ ƒe 77.

Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

title: Robert Bataillyjacques Brunhes
text:
jacques Brunhes (7 October 1934 – 30 September 2020) nye Franse dunyahela. Enye Franseawo ƒe Kɔmiunist Dunyaheha me tɔ. Wodzi Brunhes le Paris. Kɔmiunist Dunyaheha me tɔ. Wodzi Brunhes le Paris.

Enɔ Hauts-de-Seine teƒe le Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tso ƒe 1978 va ɖo ƒe 2007. Le ƒe 2001 va ɖo ƒe 2002 dome la, enye Tsaɖiɖinyawo Gbɔkpɔla. Do ŋgɔ la, enye Gennevilliers ƒe Dumegã le ƒe 1987 va ɖo ƒe 2001 dome.

Brunhes ku le 30 September 2020 esime wòxɔ ƒe 85.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Ramuntxo Camblong
text:
ramuntxo Camblong (Basquegbe me: Ramuntxo Kanblong; 11 November 1939 – 12 November 2021) nye Franse-Basque dunyahela.Enye Basque Dukɔmeviʋawɔha me tɔ. Enye woƒe ŋgɔnɔla tso ƒe 2004 vaseɖe ƒe 2008. Enye Anglet ƒe Dudzikpɔƒe ƒe Aɖaŋuɖola hã tso ƒe 2004 vaseɖe ƒe 2008. Wodzi Camblong le Macaye, France.

Camblong ku le Bayonne, France le 12 November 2021, ŋkeke ɖeka le eƒe dzigbezã 82 lia megbe.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Michel Berson
text:
michel Berson (21 Afɔfiɛ 1945 – 8 Afɔfiɛ 2021) nye Franse
dunyahela. Enye Dumegã le Crosne, Essonne tso ƒe 1977
vaseɖe ƒe 1998. Enye Teƒenɔla tso ƒe 1981 vaseɖe ƒe 1997.
Berson nye Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ tso ƒe 2011 vaseɖe ƒe 2017.
Berson ku le 8 April 2021, esime wòxɔ ƒe 75.[1]

Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo
louis Jean Joseph Charles Blanc
louis Jean Joseph Charles Blanc (29 October 1811 – 6 December
1882) nye Franse dunyahela kple ŋutinyaŋlɔla.
Exɔ ŋkɔ le alesi wòkpena ɖe
hadomedziɖuɖu ƒe ŋgɔyiyi ŋu le France ta.

title: Alain Cacheux
text:
alain Cacheux (November 15, 1947 – July 26, 2020) nye Franse dunyahela. Enye France Dukɔa ƒe
Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ tso ƒe 1997 va ɖo ƒe 2002 eye wògaganye tso ƒe 2007 va ɖo ƒe 2012. Enɔ Nord
dɔwɔƒea teƒe. Enye Socialist, zazɛ̃nyahelawo, citoyen et divers gauche me tɔ.

Cacheux ku le dzidɔ ta le July 26, 2020 dzi esime wòxɔ ƒe 72.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: El Hadj Omar Bongo Ondimba
text:
el Hadj Omar Bongo Ondimba (wodzi Albert-Bernard Bongo;
30 December 1935 – 8 June 2009) nye Gabon dunyahela si
nye Gabon Dukplɔla ƒe 42, tso ƒe 1967 vaseɖe eƒe ku le ƒe 2009.
Wodoe ɖe ŋgɔ yi ɖoƒe veviwo esime wònye sɔhɛ amegã le
Gabon ƒe Dukplɔla gbãtɔ Léon M'ba ƒe kpɔkplɔ te le ƒe 1960-awo
me, hafi wotiam Dukplɔla ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ le eya ŋutɔ ƒe 1966. Le
ƒe 1967 me la, exɔ ɖe M'ba teƒe va zu Gabon ƒe Dukplɔla evelia, le
mamlɛtɔa ƒe ku megbe.

Bongo ku le kɔdzi le dzidɔ ta le 8
June 2009 le Barcelona, ​​esime wòxɔ ƒe 73.[2]

Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

title: Charles Ceccaldi-Raynaud
text:
charles Ceccaldi-Raynaud (25 June 1925 – 18 July 2019) nye Franse senyala kple dunyahela.
The Republicans me tɔ, enye Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ tso ƒe 1993 va ɖo ƒe 1995,[1] kple Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ tso ƒe 1995 va ɖo ƒe 2004, eye wònɔ Hauts-de-Seine teƒe. Enye Puteaux Dumegã tso ƒe 1969 va ɖo ƒe 2004.

Eyae ŋlɔ agbalẽ aɖe si ƒo nu tso Algeria-ʋaa ŋu.
Wodzii le Bastia, France. Ceccaldi-Raynaud ku le 18 July 2019 esime wòxɔ ƒe 94.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Loïc Bouvard
text:
loïc Bouvard (20 Dzove 1929 – 27 November 2017) nye Franse
dunyahela. Wodzii le Tours, Indre-et-Loire. Bouvard nyeFrance Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ.[1] Enɔ Morbihan dɔwɔƒea
teƒe, eye wònye Union for a Popular Movement me tɔ.[1]
Bouvard ku le 27 November 2017 esime wòxɔ ƒe 88.[1]

Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

title: Jean-François Cesarini
text:
jean-François Cesarini (ƒe 30 Dzove 1970 – 29 Dzove 2020) nye Franse dunyahela. Enye La République En Marche ƒe habɔbɔa me tɔ! (LREM) (LREM) ƒe agbalẽa.
Wotiam be manye Franse Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ le June 18, 2017 dzi, eye wònɔ Vaucluse dɔwɔƒea
teƒe. Wodzi Cesarini le Avignon, France.
Cesarini ku le 29 March 2020 dzi le kansa ta le Paris esime wòxɔ ƒe 49.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Gabriel-Marie-Joseph-Anselme de Broglie-Revel
text:
gabriel-Marie-Joseph-Anselme de Broglie-Revel (wodzi le 21 April
1931) nye Franse ŋutinyaŋlɔla kple dunyahela.
Wotia Broglie-Revel be wòanye Académie française le ƒe 2001.
Exɔ ɖe Alain Peyrefitte teƒe. Enye Knight Aʋafia le Légion
d’honneur. Enye ducs de Broglie ƒe ƒometɔ didi aɖe.[1]
Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

title: Marc Chardonnens
text:
marc Chardonnens (ƒe 1960 – 6 Afɔfiɛ 2020) nye Switzerland dziɖuɖumegã. Ewɔ dɔ le Dukɔa ƒe
Dɔwɔƒe si Kpɔa Nutome Takpɔkpɔ Gbɔ tso ƒe 1987 va ɖo ƒe 2004, emegbe le Dukɔa ƒe Dɔwɔƒe si Kpɔa
Nutome, Avewo Kple Anyigba ƒe Nɔnɔme Gbɔ. Le ƒe 2004 me la, woɖoe Fribourg Canton ƒe
nutomenyawo gbɔ kpɔƒe ƒe tatɔ. Enye zimenɔla na nuɖalawo ƒe takpekpe si nye conférence des services de la protection de l’environnement tso ƒe 2011 va ɖo ƒe 2015.Le January 27, 2016 dzi la, Dukɔa ƒe Aɖaŋudeha tiae be enye Dukɔa ƒe Dɔwɔƒe si Kpɔa Nutomenyawo Gbɔ ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla. Exɔ dɔa le 11 April 2016, eye wòɖe asi le dɔ ŋu le January 2020 ƒe nuwuwu.

Chardonnens ku le 6 Afɔfiɛ 2020.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Jean Anthelme Brillat-Savarin
text:
jean Anthelme Brillat-Savarin (1 April 1755, Belley, Ain – 2 February 1826, Paris) nye Franse senyala kple dunyahela, eye wòxɔ ŋkɔ abe epicure kple gastronome ene: "Grimod kple Brillat-Savarin. Le wo dome la, agbalẽŋlɔla eve ɖo anyi nyuie." nuɖuɖu ŋuti nuŋɔŋlɔ ƒe ƒomevi bliboa.

Agbemeŋutinya
Wodzi Brillat-Savarin le du si nye Belley, Ain, afisi Rhone Tɔsisi ma France kple Savoy dome le. Esrɔ̃ se, atikeŋutinunya kple atikewɔwɔ le Dijon eye wòwɔ
senyawo le wo dedu me. Wodzii be Jean Anthelme Brillat, gake exɔ eƒe ƒomeŋkɔ evelia elabena nyruiyɔvi
aɖe si ŋkɔe nye Savarin gblẽ eƒe kesinɔnu bliboa ɖi nɛ nenye be wòaxɔ eƒe ŋkɔ. Le ƒe 1789 me, le Franseawo
ƒe Tɔtrɔ Kpata ƒe gɔmedzedze la, woɖoe ɖe Estates- General si va zu Dukɔa ƒe Dukplɔsewɔha eteƒe medidi
o la teƒenɔla, wova nyae nyuie le eƒe nuƒo aɖewo ta, vevietɔ esi do alɔ kufiatsotso. Etrɔ yi Belley eye wònye
dudzikpɔla si woti ƒe ɖeka. Le Tɔtrɔ Kpata la ƒe akpa aɖe emegbe la, nu geɖe nɔ eƒe ta dzi, eye wòdi
dunyahehe me sitsoƒe le Switzerland gbã. Emegbe eʋu yi Holland, eye emegbe wòyi United States si
wodzi yeyee, afisi wònɔ ƒe etɔ̃ le Boston, New York, Philadelphia kple Hartford, eye wònɔ ga si wòkpɔ tso
Fransegbe kple violin nusɔsrɔ̃ me la nu. Enye violin ƒoƒo zi gbãtɔ le Park Fefewɔƒe le New York City hena ɣeyiɣi aɖe.

Etrɔ yi France le Agbalẽdzraɖoƒea te le ƒe 1797 me eye wòxɔ ʋɔnudrɔ̃la ƒe ɖoƒe si wòanɔ ɣemaɣi le eƒe
agbemeŋkekewo katã me, abe ʋɔnudrɔ̃la ene le Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe si Kpɔa Nyawo Gbɔ. Eta agbalẽ geɖe siwo
ƒo nu tso senyawo kple dunyahehe me ganyawo ŋu. Ekpɔtɔ nye srɔ̃maɖemaɖe, gake ebu lɔlɔ̃ be enye
sidzenu adelia: eƒe nuŋɔŋlɔ si nye Physiognomie.na eƒe tɔɖiayɔvi dzetugbe Juliette Récamier xlẽ

"Aƒenɔ, xɔ ame tsitsi aɖe ƒe dɔwɔwɔ dɔmenyotɔe eye nàxlẽe vividoɖeameŋutɔe. Enye xɔlɔ̃wɔwɔ si dze egɔme tso wò ɖevime ke ƒe bubudede eŋu, eye, ɖewohĩ, bubudede seselelãme si fa wu ŋu...Aleke mawɔ anya? Le nye ƒexɔxɔ me." ŋutsu megaƒonɛ be yeabia gbe eƒe dzi o."
"La Physiologie du Goût" ("Vivinu ƒe Lãmesẽŋutinunya") si Franseawo ƒe nuɖuɖuŋutinunyala.Jean Anthelme Brillat-Savarin (ƒe 1755-1826) ŋlɔ ƒe tanya si dzi agbalẽŋlɔla la ƒe nɔnɔmetata le.

ƒe 1848 ƒe tata.
Wota eƒe agbalẽ xɔŋkɔ si nye Physiologie du goût (Nuvivinu ƒe Lãmesẽŋutinunya) le December 1825 me, si nye ɣleti eve do ŋgɔ na eƒe ku. Tanya bliboae nye Physiologie du Goût, si nye Nuɖuɖu Ŋuti Nusrɔ̃ƒe; ouvrage théorique, ŋutinya kple à l'ordre du jour, dédié aux Nuɖuɖuŋutinunya parisiens, par un Nufialagã, membre de plusieurs sociétés littéraires kple savantes." Agbalẽa mewu enu tso esime wòdo zi gbãtɔ o, do ŋgɔ teti na Brillat-Savarin ƒe ku.Eƒe Eŋlisigbe me gɔmeɖeɖe si ɖe dzesi wue nye esi nuɖuɖu ŋuti nuŋlɔla kple ɖeklemiɖela M. F. K. Fisher wɔ, amesi de dzesii be "Mebua ɖokuinye be woyrae le gbegɔmeɖelawo dome." Wota eƒe gɔmeɖeɖea zi gbãtɔ le ƒe 1949. Epicurus ƒe xexemenunya le axa ɖesiaɖe ƒe megbe, nuɖuɖu bɔbɔetɔ kekeake naa Brillat-Savarin ƒe dzi dzea eme, zi alesi wotsɔ aɖaŋu wɔe ko:

Ame mawo siwo nuɖuɖu ƒe dɔmawɔmawɔ nyuie le, alo amesiwo mu aha la menya nuɖuɖu kple nunono ƒe gɔmeɖose vavãwo kura o.

Wᴐ dᴐ ɖe nu dzi
Wotsɔ ŋkɔ na Brillat-Savarin cheese, Savarin-mɔ̃, asigɛ-kplu si ƒe nɔnɔme le goglo, kple Gâteau Savarin tsɔ de bubu eŋu.

Eƒe ŋkɔ kaka na television dzi nyasela gbogbo aɖewo to Zimenɔla Kaga si le TV dzi wɔna si nye "Iron Chef" si na ame miliɔn geɖe to nya si wogblɔ be "Gblɔ nusi nèɖuna nam, eye magblɔ nusi nènye na wò."

Wobua Brillat-Savarin zi geɖe be eyae nye nuɖuɖu si me carbohydrate mesɔ gbɔ ɖo o fofo. Ebu sukli kple wɔ ɣi be wonye nusiwo gbɔ lolo akpa eye wòdo susu ɖa be woatsɔ nusiwo me protein sɔ gbɔ ɖo boŋ.

Kakaɖedzitɔe la, lã ɖulawo medaa ami gbeɖe o (bu amegãxiwo, akpɔkplɔwo, xevi siwo ɖua nu, akpɔkplɔwo, kple bubuawo ŋu kpɔ). Lã siwo ɖua gbewo metsina bɔbɔe o, vaseɖe esime ƒexɔxɔ na wozu dɔmawɔmawɔ ƒe nɔnɔme ya teti; gake wodaa ami kabakaba ŋutɔ ne wodze mɔli, nuku, alo wɔ ƒomevi ɖesiaɖe ɖuɖu gɔme ko. ... Nu vevitɔ siwo hea lolo akpa vɛ dometɔ eveliae nye wɔ kple starch-nu siwo amegbetɔ wɔna be woanye nu vevitɔwo le eƒe gbesiagbe nunyiame me. Abe alesi míegblɔe xoxo ene la, lã siwo katã nɔa agbe ɖe nuɖuɖu siwo me ami le dzi la, wodaa ami le woƒe lɔlɔ̃nu faa; eye amegbetɔ hã mele xexeame katã ƒe sea me o. Brillat-Savarin, Jean-Anhelme (ƒe 1970) ƒe agbalẽa me. Vivi ƒe Dzɔdzɔmeŋusẽŋununya. gɔmeɖeɖe. Anne Drayton ƒe agbalẽa. Penguin ƒe Agbalẽwo. axa 208-209. ISBN 978-0-14-044614-2 ƒe xexlẽdzesi.

Eneas Sweetland Dallas ŋlɔ Kettner ƒe Book of the Table, a Manual of Cookery, 1877, si nye nuɖuɖu ŋuti nuŋlɔɖi si wotu ɖe Brillat-Savarin ƒe dɔwɔwɔ dzi. Dallas ta eƒe agbalẽa le ŋkɔ bubu si nye A. Kettner te.

Nyatotowo

Etsɔ nuɖuɖu ƒe vivisese vɔ megbe, si nye nuɖuɖu ƒe ʋeʋẽ lilili alo ʋeʋẽ lilili sɔ kple hadzidzi ƒe ŋusẽdoamenuwo (Meditation ii): "gake le ʋeʋẽ si wosena le nu ƒe megbe gome la, vivisese ƒe seselelãme anye nusi mebɔ o eye mede blibo o."

Brillat-Savarin si lɔ̃a cheese vevie la de dzesii be: “Nuɖuɖu vivi si me cheese mele o le abe nyɔnu dzetugbe si ƒe ŋku ɖeka koe le ene.”

"Nuɖuɖu yeye aɖe si ŋu woke ɖo naa dzidzɔ geɖe ameƒomea, wu ɣletivi yeye aɖe si ŋu woke ɖo."

"Gblɔ nusi nèɖuna nam, eye magblɔ nusi nènye na wò."

"Wotsɔ weintsetse aɖewo na ŋutsu aɖe si lɔ̃a wein le nuɖuɖu vivi aɖe me le fiẽnuɖuɖu vɔ megbe. Egblɔ be: 'Enye agbanɔamedzi gã aɖe,' esi wòtutu agbaa ɖe vovo, 'Menye numame nam be mano nye wein le atikekuiwo me o.'"

"Be nàxɔ amedzrowo la, enye be nàxɔ woƒe dzidzɔkpɔkpɔ le ɣeyiɣi bliboa si me wole wò xɔta te.'"

"Nuɖaɖa nye aɖaŋu xoxotɔwo dometɔ ɖeka eye wònye esi na míewɔ subɔsubɔdɔ vevitɔ kekeake le dukɔmeviwo ƒe agbenɔnɔ me."

"Kplɔ̃a ƒe vivisese nye ƒe ɖesiaɖe tɔ, nɔnɔme ɖesiaɖe tɔ, dukɔwo katã tɔ, kple nuto ɖesiaɖe tɔ; etsaka kple vivisese bubuwo katã, eye wòtsia anyi mlɔeba be wòafa akɔ na mí ɖe woƒe dzodzo ta.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Charles Juste François Victurnien, de Beauvau, Craon Fiavi
text:
charles Juste François Victurnien, de Beauvau, Craon Fiavi (ƒe 1793–1864) nye Franse asrafo charles Juste François Victurnien, de Beauvau, Craon Fiavi (ƒe 1793–1864) nye Franse asrafo Wonyae be Beauvau Fiavi. Le fofoa ƒe ɖoƒe si nye Roma Fiaɖuƒe Kɔkɔe la ƒe Fiavi ta la, exɔ dzesideŋkɔ mawo le fofoa ƒe ku me le ƒe 1849. Eɖe srɔ̃ zi eve. Vi ene nɔ esi si me Beauvau Fiavi si kplɔe ɖo hã nɔ. Le dunyahehe gome la, enye Bonaparte habɔbɔ si di be yeagbugbɔ Bonaparte ƒomea aɖo Franseawo ƒe fiazikpui dzi la me tɔ. Togbɔ be le se nu la, enye "Craon Fiavi" hã la, wonyae kple eƒe dzeside bubu "Beauvau Fiavi".

Wodzi Charles le March 7, 1793 dzi le Sunninghill le Berkshire. Edzilawo, Marc Étienne de Beauvau, Beauvau Fiavi kple Nathalie de Rochechouart, nɔ aboyo me le England tso Franseawo ƒe tɔtrɔ kpata la me.

Ƒomea trɔ yi France. Le ƒe 1810 me la, Charles ge ɖe Franseawo ƒe Asrafoha me le Napoleon ƒe Aʋawɔɣiwo. Eva zu carabiniers ƒe amegã le ƒe eve megbe, le aʋawɔwɔ ɖe
Russia ŋu me. Wotiae be wòanye sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ. Wotiam be manye Meurthe ƒe Aɖaŋuɖotakpekpe me tɔ le ƒe 1854 me.

Srɔ̃ɖeɖewo kple viwo
Le June 9, 1815 dzi la, Charles ɖe Lucie Virginie de Choiseul (ƒe 1794-1834). Vi siwo gbɔna la nɔ wo si:

Marc René Antoine Victurnien (ƒe 1816-1883), si kplɔe ɖo le Beauvau Fiavi me

Étienne Guy Charles Victurnien (ƒe 1818 va ɖo ƒe 1865)
Le April 2, 1839 dzi la, Charles ɖe Eugénie Ludmille Alexandrine Joséphine Komar (ƒe 1820-1881). Vi siwo gbɔna la nɔ wo si:

Marie Delphine Élisabeth Stéphanie(ƒe 1842-1898),ɖe Count Gaston Alexandre de Ludre
 
Béatrix Jeanne Marie Joséphine (ƒe 1844-1895), ɖe Count Horace de Choiseul-Praslin

title: Georges Jacques Danton
text:
georges Jacques Danton (26 October 1759 – 5 April 1794) nye dunyahela le Franseawo ƒe Tɔtrɔ Kpata ƒe ɣeyiɣia me.Enye Paris dudzikpɔha me tɔ, ʋɔnudrɔ̃nyawo gbɔ kpɔla kple Ɣeyiɣi kpui aɖe ƒe Dɔdzikpɔha ƒe tatɔ, Takpekpea me tɔ, me tɔ Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe, eye eyae nye dukɔa ƒe dedienɔnɔ ŋuti kɔmiti ƒe zimenɔla gbãtɔ. Dziŋɔ ƒe Dziɖuɖua nɔ anyi tso ƒe 1793 va ɖo ƒe 1794. Le Vɔvɔ̃ ƒe Dziɖuɖua me la, Danton trɔ eƒe susu: Egblɔ be ŋɔdzinuwɔwɔ ƒe Dziɖuɖua dzi yiyi nye susu gbegblẽ, gake ame bubuwo melɔ̃ ɖe edzi o. Wotso Danton nu be ewɔ aʋatsokaka eye wowui le tudada dzi.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Olivier Dassault
text:
olivier Dassault (1 June 1951 – 7 March 2021) nye Franse dunyahela kple asitsala. Enye Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ tso ƒe 1988 vaseɖe ƒe 1997 kple tso ƒe 2002 vaseɖe eƒe kugbe. Dassault nye The Republicans habɔbɔa me tɔ. Wodzi Dassault le
Boulogne-Billancourt, France.

Dassault ku le helikɔpta ƒe afɔku me le 7 March 2021 le Touques, France gbɔ esime wòxɔ ƒe 69.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Philippe Daverio
text:
philippe Daverio (17 October 1949 – 2 September 2020) nye Francetɔ si wodzi le
Italy ƒe aɖaŋudɔwo ŋuti ɖeklemiɖela, nufiala, agbalẽŋlɔla, agbalẽŋlɔla, dunyahela,
kple television dzi ame ŋkuta. Enye Milan ƒe dekɔnuwo dzikpɔla le se nu le ƒe
1990 ƒeawo me. Wodzii le Mulhouse, France.

Daverio wɔ ɖoɖo ɖe ɖeɖefia geɖe ŋu, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye Andy Warhol ƒe Fiẽnuɖuɖu Mamlɛtɔ le Galleria del Credito Valtellise le Milan. Etrɔ asi le agbalẽ aɖe si ƒo nu tso Giorgio De Chirico ƒe dɔwɔwɔ ŋu le ƒe 1924 kple 1929 dome hã ŋu.

Tso ƒe 2002 va ɖo ƒe 2012 me la, ewɔ Passepartout, si nye aɖaŋudɔwo kple dekɔnuwo ŋuti fefe siwo kplɔ wo nɔewo ɖo le Rai 3 dzi.

Le ƒe 2009 me la, eva zu Milan ƒe dugã me aɖaŋuɖola.

Daverio ku le 2 September 2020 le Milan le ahɔhɔ̃ me dɔdzẽ ta, exɔ ƒe 70.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Jacques-Louis David
text:
jacques-Louis David (30 August 1748 – 29 December 1825) nye dunyahela kple
nutala siaa si nɔ agbe le Franseawo ƒe Tɔtrɔ Kpata la me. Esi wònye dunyahela ta la,
exɔ ŋkɔ wu le esi wònye kplɔla ʋɛ siwo ɖu France dzi le Franseawo ƒe Tɔtrɔ Kpata ƒe
akpa si me ŋutasẽnuwɔwɔ nɔ wu me la dometɔ ɖeka ta. David xɔe se be mele be
fiaɖuƒe nanɔ France o ke boŋ ele be wòanye Dukɔmevi. Eda asi ɖe edzi be woatsɔ
tu si woyɔna be guillotine awu France Fia Louis XVI. Esi Franseawo ƒe Tɔtrɔ Kpata la
te kpododonu la, edzɔ dzi na David be Napoleon Bonaparte va zu France Fiagã.
Esi Jacques-Louis David nye nutala ta la, edi be nutatawo nanye dunyahehe. Zi
geɖe la, etaa kalẽtɔwo tso gliwo alo ŋutinya siwo wòxɔ se be wotsi tre ɖi na
nukpɔsusu nyuiwo abe ŋusẽ, nɔviwɔwɔ, kple nɔnɔme nyui ene me. Eƒe nutatawo
nye nu ŋutɔŋutɔwo ŋutɔ eye zi geɖe la, woɖea kalẽtɔ siwo tso Blema Hela kple
Roma fiana. Woyɔa esia be Neoclassical ƒe nutata ƒe atsyã. David ƒe nutata
xɔŋkɔwo dometɔ ɖekae nye exɔlɔ̃ vevitɔ Jean-Paul Marat si wowu le Franseawo ƒe
Tɔtrɔ Kpata la me. David ƒe nutata kpe ɖe Marat ŋu wòzu kalẽtɔ xɔŋkɔ si wowu xɔsetaku.

Eƒe nutatawo ƒe ɖeɖefiaƒe

title: Hervé de Charette
text:
Hervé de Charette (wodzi le 30 July 1938) nye Franse dunyahela. Wodzii le Paris. Enye Franseawo ƒe Demokrasi Habɔbɔ (UDF) me tɔ.

Wotiam be manye teƒenɔla zi gbãtɔ le ƒe 1986 me abe Maine-et-Loire departement teƒenɔla ene. Enye Dukɔmeviwo ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla, emegbe tso ƒe 1993 va ɖo ƒe 1995 me la, enye Aƒewo ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla Le UDF.

Eda asi ɖe Jacques Chirac ƒe ametiakɔdada si ɖu dzi le ƒe 1995 ƒe dukplɔla ƒe tiatia me dzi ke menye Dukplɔlagã Édouard Balladur tɔ o. Eke ɖe Franseawo ƒe Demokrasi ƒe Habɔbɔ si Xɔ ŋkɔ (PPDF) ŋu eye wòkplɔe.

Enye Dutanyawo Gbɔkpɔha vaseɖe ƒe 1997 ƒe sewɔtakpekpe ƒe tiatia. Le ƒe 2002 me la, ege ɖe Habɔbɔ si Kpɔa Amewo ƒe Habɔbɔ (Union pour un mouvement populaire alo UMP) me. Le December 2009 me la, edzo le kplɔ̃ɖoƒe sia yi Nouveau Centre.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Corinne Erhel
text:
Corinne Erhel (3 February 1967 – 5 May 2017) nye Franse dunyahela. Erhel va ge ɖe Sosialist Dunyaheha la me. Le ƒe 1997 me la, eva zu sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ na Alain Gouriou, si nye Lannion ƒe dudzikpɔla teƒenɔla. Enye Dukɔa ƒe Takpekpe me tɔ tso ƒe 2007 va ɖo ƒe 2017, afisi wònɔ Côtes-d'Armor dɔwɔƒea teƒe le.[1]
ŋutsu alo nyɔnu kple nyɔnu ƒe

title: Georges Gruillot
text:
georges Gruillot (14 Afɔfiɛ 1931 – 7 Afɔfiɛ 2021) nye Franse dunyahela.[1] Gruillot va zu Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ tso Doubs le September 4, 1988 dzi na Dukɔa ƒe
Sewɔtakpekpe. Enye Rally for the Republic me tɔ.[2] Exɔ dzudzɔ le dɔme le ƒe 2008 me.

Gruillot ku le 7 March 2021 esime wòxɔ ƒe 89.[3]

Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

title: Lionel Guérin
text:
lionel Guérin nye Franseawo ƒe dɔdzikpɔlagã kple dunyahela. Ewu École nationale supérieure de mécanique et d'aérotechnique[1] kple École nationale de l'aviation civile nu,[2] enye nutome yameʋudɔwɔƒe si nye Airlinair ƒe Dukplɔla si ɖoe anyi,[3] Transavia France ƒe Dukplɔla kple Fédération nationale de l'yameʋuɖoɖo ƒe asitsahabɔbɔ.[4]

Le September 2011 me la, ezu Air France ƒe zimenɔla kloe.[5][6]

Lionel Guerin nye nutomeŋutinunyala.[7] Elɔ̃a akpɔkplɔwo.[8] Elɔ̃a kpekpeɖeŋu nana yameʋuɖoɖo si li tegbee hã.[1][9][10]

Guérin xɔ Legion of Honor ƒe kafukafu.[11]

Agbalẽwo ƒe xexlẽdzesiwo
Nyatakaka-Pilote xexlẽdzesi 612, Paris, Nyatakaka-Pilote, March 2007

Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

title: Claude Guichard
text:
Claude Guichard (11 November 1928 – 30 August 2021) nye Franse dunyahela kple agbalẽnyala. Wodzii le Sainte-Foy-la-Grande, France. Enye Republicantɔ siwo le wo ɖokui si la me tɔ. Guichard nye Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ tso ƒe 1967 vaseɖe ƒe 1968 kple tso ƒe 1968 vaseɖe ƒe 1973 me.

Guichard ku le August 30, 2021 dzi esime wòxɔ ƒe 92.[1]

Nusiwo woŋlɔ ɖe eme .

title: Paulette Guinchard-Kunstler
text:
paulette Guinchard-Kunstler (3 October 1949 – 4 March 2021) nye Franse dunyahela.[1] Enye Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ si nɔ Doubs ƒe nuto 2 lia teƒe tso ƒe 1997 vaseɖe ƒe 2001 eye wògakpɔtɔ tso ƒe 2002 vaseɖe ƒe 2007. Enye Sosialist Dunyaheha me tɔ. Wodzi Guinchard-Kunstler le Reugney, France.

Guinchard-Kunstler ku le ameɖokuiwuwu ƒe kpekpeɖeŋu ta le Switzerland le March 4, 2021 dzi esime wòxɔ ƒe 71.[2]

Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

title: Marcel Henry
text:
marcel Henry (30 October 1926 – 30 August 2021) nye Franse dunyahela. Wodzii le Mayotte, France. Enye Franseawo ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ tso ƒe 1977 vaseɖe ƒe 2004.[1][2] Enye Mahoré Dukɔmeviwo ƒe Habɔbɔ ɖolawo dometɔ ɖeka.

Henry ku le 30 August 2021 esime wòxɔ ƒe 94.[3]

Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

title: Michel Herbillon
text:
michel Herbillon (wodzi le March 6, 1951) nye Franse dunyahela si nye Republicantɔwo. Enye France Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ, eye wòle Val-de-Marne dɔwɔƒea teƒe.[1]

Le Republicantɔwo ƒe ƒe 2017 ƒe kplɔlawo ƒe tiatia me la, Herbillon da asi ɖe Laurent Wauquiez dzi.[2]

Le March 15, 2020 dzi la, wodo Herbillon kpɔ be COVID-19 le eŋu.[3]

Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

title: Patrick Hoguet
text:
Patrick Hoguet (23 May 1940 – 27 February 2021) nye Franse dunyahela. Wodzii le Montmirail, France. Enye Franseawo ƒe Demokrasi Habɔbɔ me tɔ. Hoguet nye France Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ le ƒe 1993 va ɖo ƒe 1997 dome eye wògaganye tso ƒe 2002 va ɖo ƒe 2003 me.

Hoguet ku le 27 February 2021 esime wòxɔ ƒe 80.[1]

Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

title: Roger Holeindre
text:
roger Holeindre (21 March 1929 – 30 January 2020) nye Franse Asrafomegã, dunyahela kple agbalẽŋlɔla. Enɔ Indochina-ʋa Gbãtɔ kple Algeria-ʋa me, enye Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ tso ƒe 1986 va ɖo ƒe 1988 me.

Holeindre nye Dukɔa ƒe Aʋawɔha (FN) ƒe zimenɔla ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ hã afisi wònɔ "dukɔa-nukpɔsusu" kple Ðoƒe Etɔ̃lia ƒe nukpɔsusuwo teƒe.[1] Holeindre nye Cercle national des combattants ƒe zimenɔla kple France ƒe Dunyaheha ƒe zimenɔla bubutɔe.

Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

title: Pierre Fauchon
text:
Pierre Fauchon (13 July 1929 – 25 July 2016) nye Franse dunyahela. Enye France ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ tso ƒe 1992 va ɖo ƒe 2011. Enɔ Loir-et-Cher dɔwɔƒea teƒe eye wònye Franseawo ƒe Demokrasi Habɔbɔ ƒe Habɔbɔ me tɔ.[1] Wodzii le Avranches, France.

Fauchon ku le 25 July 2016 esime wòxɔ ƒe 87.[2]

Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

title: Jacques Fournier
text:
Jacques Fournier (5 May 1929 – 14 August 2021) was a French Socialist Party politician and businessman.[1][2] He was born in Épinal, France. He was the Secrétaire général du Gouvernement from 1982 until 1986. He was also president of Gaz de France from 1986 until 1988. Fournier was also president of SNCF from 1988 until 1993.

Fournier died on 14 August 2021, aged 92.[3]

References

title: André Lespagnol
text:
André Lespagnol (26 July 1943 – 13 September 2020) nye Franse dunyahela kple nufialagã. Enye nufialagã le Rennes Yunivɛsiti 2, eye eƒe susu nɔ Saint-Malo ƒe ŋutinya ŋu. Enye Rennes Yunivɛsiti ƒe Dukplɔla 2 tso ƒe 1991 va ɖo ƒe 1996. Le ƒe 2004 me la, wotiam be manye Dukplɔla ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ na Brittany Nutome Aɖaŋudeha, eye wònɔ dɔ wɔm vaseɖe ƒe 2010. Wodzii le Crozon, France.

Lespagnol ku le 13 September 2020 esime wòxɔ ƒe 77.[1]

Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

title: Christian Frémon
text:
Christian Frémont (23 April 1942 - 3 August 2014) was the chief of staff of Nicolas Sarkozy.[1] He was the French Representative to Andorra from 24 September 2008 to 15 May 2012.

Frémont died in Paris, France from cancer, aged 72.[2]

References

title: Jean-François
text:
jean-François Hory (15 May 1949 – 28 December 2017) nye Franse dunyahela. Wodzii le Neufchâteau, Vosges. Tso ƒe 1981 va ɖo ƒe 1986 me la, enye Franseawo ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ. Le ƒe 1989 me la, eva zu Europa Sewɔtakpekpe (MEP) me tɔ. Esime wònɔ dɔ wɔm abe MEP ene la, wotiam be manye Miameha si nye Zazɛ̃nyahelawo ƒe Dukplɔla le ƒe 1992 me, eye ɖoƒe sia nɔ esi vaseɖe ƒe 1996. Le February 1995 me la, eɖe gbeƒãe be yeaxɔ France ƒe dukplɔla ƒe tiatia gake emegbe eɖe asi le eŋu.

Hory ku le kansa ta esime wòxɔ ƒe 68 le December 28, 2017 dzi le Burgundy.[1][2]

Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

title: Gérard Istace
text:
gérard Istace (26 July 1935 – 21 March 2022) nye Franse dunyahela. Wodzii le Nouzonville, France. Enye Sosialist Dunyaheha me tɔ. Enɔ Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tso ƒe 1981 va ɖo ƒe 1986 eye wòganɔ Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tso ƒe 1988 va ɖo ƒe 1993.[1]

Istace ku le Revin, France le 21 March 2022 esime wòxɔ ƒe 86.[2]

Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

title: Jacques de Maleville
text:
Jacques de Maleville, born and baptized on June 19, 1741 in Domme, where he
died on November 22, 1824, French jurisconsult and politician, was one of the drafters of the Civil Code.[1][2][3][4]

References

title: Jacques Necker
text:
jacques Necker (IPA: [ʒak nɛkɛʁ]; 30 September 1732 – 9 April 1804) nye gadzraɖoƒedɔwɔla tso Geneva si va zu ganyawo gbɔ kpɔla na Louis XVI. Edze agbagba be yeana France ƒe adzɔxexe ƒe ɖoɖoa nanyo ɖe edzi.

Esi woɖee le dɔme le ƒe 1789 me na Ahom tu le Bastille.

Woate ŋu ana nyati kpui sia si ƒo nu tso ŋutinya ŋu nadidi wu. Àte ŋu akpe ɖe Wikipedia ŋu ne ètsɔe kpe ɖe eŋu.

title: Jean Jaurès
text:
jean Jaurès, alo Jean Léon Jaurès nye Franse dunyahela. Dukɔmevinyenye ƒe zazɛ̃nyahela aɖe si ŋkɔe nye Raoul Villain ye wui. Jaurès nye ŋutifafalɔ̃la le Europa eye wòtsi tre ɖe aʋawɔwɔ ɖesiaɖe ŋu. Enye sosialisttɔ le France.

Woate ŋu ana nyati kpui sia si ku ɖe dunyahehe ŋu nadidi wu. Àte ŋu akpe ɖe Wikipedia ŋu ne ètsɔe kpe ɖe eŋu.

title: Karine Jean-Pierre
text:
karine Jean-Pierre (wodzi le August 13, 1974) nye Amerikatɔ dunyahehe ƒe akɔdada ƒe ɖoɖowɔla, ʋiʋlila, dunyahehe ŋuti numeɖela, kple agbalẽŋlɔla si wodzi le France. Enye White House ƒe Nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔla 35 lia tso May 13, 2022 dzi.[1] Enye White House ƒe Nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔla ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ vevitɔ tso ƒe 2021 vaseɖe ƒe 2022. Enye ameyibɔ gbãtɔ kple ame gbãtɔ si nye LGBTQ gaglãa si nye Nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔla.[2]

Jean-Pierre nye dɔwɔlawo ƒe amegã na Democrattɔwo ƒe dukplɔla ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ si woɖo Kamala Harris le ƒe 2020 United States ƒe dukplɔla ƒe akɔdada me eye wònye nyɔnu Ameyibɔ gbãtɔ, kple nyɔnuvi gbãtɔ si xɔ ɖoƒe ma kpɔ.[3]

Wodzi Jean-Pierre le Martinique, France, eye dzilawo nye Haititɔ siwo ʋu va afima.[4] Queens, New York, ye wonyii le.[5]
Jean-Pierre nye nyɔnuvi si nye nyɔnuvi gaglãa.[2]

Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

title: Sébastien Lecornu
text:
sébastien Lecornu (Fransegbe me nyayɔyɔ: [sebastjɛ̃ ləkɔʁny]; wodzii le 11 June 1986) nye Franse dunyahela. Ele Dukplɔlagã Élisabeth Borne ƒe dziɖuɖu me abe

Asrafowo ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla ene tso ƒe 2022 me.[1]

Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

title: André Benoît François Hyacinthe Le Berthon
text:
andré Benoît François Hyacinthe Le Berthon nye Franse dunyahela. Wodzii le January 7, 1713 dzi le Bordeaux (Gironde) eye wòku le April 17, 1800 dzi le Paris.

Eyae nye Bordeaux Sewɔtakpekpea ƒe zimenɔla gbãtɔ le fofoa ƒe ku me le August 1766 me.

Simon-Antoine Delphin de Lamothe, si woxɔ ɖe Bordeaux Sewɔtakpekpea me esime wòxɔ ƒe 18. Dzidzɔ si wònyena be yeaɖu yeƒe dɔwɔhati siwo tso Fiasãa me la nyɔa tsitretsiɖeŋu sesẽwo be woahe Dukplɔla gbãtɔ André-Benoît-François-Hyacinthe Le Berthon vɛ be wòade nu nyaa me.

Woxɔe le Bordeaux Masonic Lodge La Française le ƒe 1773 me eye wònye eƒe bubutɔ tegbee tso ƒe 1779 me.

Le August 1787 me la, wogaɖe aboyo Bordeaux Sewɔtakpekpea, esi wòxɔ ame siwo ŋu adzɔxexe ƒe agba le la taʋiʋli vɔ la, wogaɖe aboyoe yi Libourne. Fia Louis XVI galɔ̃ be yeatrɔ ayi Sewɔtakpekpea me le August 1788 me esi wònɔ vɔvɔ̃m na ʋunyaʋunyawɔwɔ.

Enye ame ŋkuta siwo nɔ Estates General le ƒe 1789 me la me tɔ, eye wòɖee fia be yeʋu mɔ na ɖɔɖɔɖowo. [1] [2] [3][4] .

Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

title: José Évrard
text:
josé Évrard (17 Dzove 1945 – 7 Dzove 2022) nye Franse
dunyahela. Enye Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ na
Pas-de-Calais ƒe nuto 3 lia tso ƒe 2017 vaseɖe ƒe 2021.[1] Enye
Dukɔa ƒe Habɔbɔ (FN) me tɔ vaseɖe ƒe 2017. Emegbe eva ge
ɖe The Patriots (LP) me, si wòdzo le ƒe 2020 me va zu Debout la
France (DLF) me tɔ. Wodzi Évrard le Cauchy-à-la-Tour, France.
Évrard ku le 7 Dzove 2022 dzi le COVID-19 ta, exɔ ƒe 76.[2]
Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

title: Patrice Gélard
text:
patrice Gélard (3 August 1938 – 25 June 2020) nye Franse
dunyahela. Enye France ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ. Enɔ
Seine-Maritime-ƒua teƒe. Enye Union for a Popular Movement
(UMP) Dunyaheha me tɔ.

Gélard ku le 25 June 2020 esime
wòxɔ ƒe 81.[1]

Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

title: Raphaël Gérard
text:
Raphaël Gérard (wodzi le 17 October 1968) nye Franse dunyahela si le La République En Marche!. Wotiam be manye Franse Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ le June 18, 2017 dzi, eye wònɔ Charente-Maritime dɔwɔƒe teƒe. Gérard nye ŋutsu kple ŋutsu alo nyɔnu kple nyɔnu ƒe Gérard be COVID-19 le eŋu.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Jacques Limouzy
text:
Jacques Limouzy (29 August 1926 – 7 November 2021) nye Franse dunyahela. Wotia Limouzy zi gbãtɔ ɖe Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me le ƒe 1967 me.[1] Limouzy bu le ƒe 1969 ƒe sewɔtakpekpe ƒe tiatiawɔblɔɖe me.[2] Eganye teƒenɔla ake tso ƒe 1975 va ɖo ƒe 1981 me, eye le ƒe 1986 kple 2002 dome.[3]

Limouzy ku le 7 November 2021 dzi, esime wòxɔ ƒe 95.[4]

Nusiwo woŋlɔ ɖe eme .

title: Brigitte Marie-Claude Macron
text:
Brigitte Marie-Claude Macron (Fransegbe me nyayɔyɔ: [bri.ʒit ma.ʁi klodə ma.kʁɔ᷉]; née Trogneux, yɔyɔ [tʁɔ.ɲø], tsã Auzière, Fransegbe me nyayɔyɔ: [o.zjɛːʁ]; wodzii le April 13, 1953 ) nye Emmanuel Macron, si nye France Dukɔa ƒe Dukplɔla srɔ̃ kple sekɛndrisuku nufiala tsã.

Le ƒe 2015 me, be yeakpe asi ɖe srɔ̃a ŋu le eƒe dunyahehedɔa me la, ewu eƒe dɔ nu abe agbalẽfiala ene le lycée Saint-Louis de Gonzague si nye ame ŋkutawo le Paris.

Macron ʋli Truchtersheim ƒe dudzikpɔha si le Bas-Rhin ta le ƒe 1989 me, gake eɖu dzi. Anye ɣeyiɣi ɖeka kolia si wòaʋli ho be yeaxɔ ɖoƒea.

Le ƒe 2017 me la, Brigitte Macron wɔ akpa vevi aɖe le srɔ̃a ƒe dukplɔla ƒe akɔdada me; woyɔ aɖaŋuɖola kɔkɔ aɖe be "eƒe anyinɔnɔ le vevie nɛ". Emmanuel Macron gblɔ be ne yeɖu dzi le France ƒe dukplɔlanyenye me la, ye srɔ̃ "akpɔ akpa si wòwɔna kplim ɣesiaɣi, womaɣlae o".

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Jean-Pierre Michel
text:
Jean-Pierre Michel (5 Afɔfiɛ 1938 – 24 Dzove 2021) nye Franse dunyahela. Enye France ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ, eye wònɔ Haute-Saône dɔwɔƒea teƒe tso ƒe 2004 va ɖo ƒe 2014. Enye Sosialist Dunyaheha me tɔ. Michel nye Dumegã le Héricourt, Haute-Saône, tso ƒe 1983 va ɖo ƒe 2004. Wodzii le Nîmes, France.

Michel ku le 24 Dzove 2021 le Trévenans, France esime wòxɔ ƒe 82.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Étienne Mourrut
text:
Étienne Mourrut (Dɔmegbe 4, 1939 – Dzove 19, 2014) nye Franse dunyahela. Enye Habɔbɔ si Kpɔa Ame Xɔŋkɔwo ƒe Habɔbɔ (UMP) me tɔ. Mourrut nye sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ na Gard ƒe nuto 2 lia.[1] Wodzi Mourrut le Le Grau-du-Roi, Gard, France.

Mourrut ku le Paris, France, esime wòxɔ ƒe 74.[2]

Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

title: Jacques Oudin
text:
jacques Oudin (7 October 1939 – 20 March 2020) nye Franse dunyahela. Enye France ƒe
Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ tso ƒe 1986 va ɖo ƒe 2004, eye wònɔ Vendée dɔwɔƒea teƒe.

Oudin ku le March 20, 2020 dzi le COVID-19 ta.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Louis Pailhas
text:
louis Pailhas (2 March 1926 – 6 February 2021), nye Franse dunyahela kple
yamenutomeyimɔ̃ɖaŋudɔwɔla. Tso December 1967 va ɖo ƒe 1982 me la, enye Franseawo ƒe
Dukɔmeviwo ƒe Yameʋuɖoɖo Yunivɛsiti ƒe tatɔ.

Ewu École Polytechnique (X
46) kple École nationale de l’aviation civile (IAC 49) nu. ewɔ dɔ vovovowo le dukɔmeviwo
ƒe yameʋuɖoɖo me hafi va ge ɖe France Dukɔmeviwo ƒe Yameʋuɖoɖo Yunivɛsiti le
December 1967 me, ame gbãtɔ si xɔ ɖoƒe ma le Toulouse. Eɖe asi
le dɔ ŋu le January 1982 me.

Le ema megbe la, le ƒe 1998 me la, enye Toulouse Dumegã
ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ, eye ​​emegbe wònye Dumegã teƒenɔla le dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya,
yameʋuɖoɖo kple yamenutome dɔwɔnawo me le ƒe 2001 me.

Louis Pailhas nye Académie de
l'air et de l'espace me tɔ.
Yameʋuɖoɖo ƒe Medalẽ

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Mahmoud Refaat
text:
mahmoud Refaat (Arabgbe: محمود رفعت, romangbe me: Mahmood Rifaat; wodzii le April 25, 1978) nye dukɔwo dome senyawo ŋuti nunyala bibi, dutanyawo ŋuti aɖaŋuɖola (Europa Dukɔwo Dome Se kple Dukɔwo Dome Kadodowo Ŋuti Nusrɔ̃ƒe ƒe zimenɔla) kple agbalẽŋlɔla (Britain Nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔlawo ƒe Habɔbɔ – BAJ kple Amerika Dukɔa ƒe Agbalẽŋlɔlawo ƒe Habɔbɔ – NWR le New York me tɔ) kple International Gazette gbesiagbe nyadzɔdzɔgbalẽ si le London, United Kingdom ƒe zimenɔla.

Enye Franse-Belgium dukɔmevi si tso Egipte si le France, Belgium, kple United Kingdom dome.

Mahmoud Refaat xɔ ŋgɔ na Egipte asrafomegã tsãtɔ Lieutenant General Sami Anan tso duta ƒe dukplɔla ƒe akɔdada eye wòwɔ akpa aɖe le dukɔwo dome nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔnuwo ƒe nyadzɔdzɔwo katã gbɔgblɔ tso Aʋafia Sami Anan léle ŋu me, si me wòɖe le television dzi kpekpe geɖe me be yewɔe nenema le vɔvɔ̃ be yeawu Aʋafiagã Sami Anan ta. Emegbe egawɔ akpa aɖe ake to nyabiasewo biabia dukɔwo dome ƒuƒoƒowo le dukplɔla ƒe tiatia si Egypt Dukplɔla Abdel Fattah el-Sisi ɖu dzi le ŋgɔdonya evelia me le March 2018 me, eye wòhe dukɔwo dome ɣlidodo vɛ le ɣleti eve megbe, hetsɔ nya ɖe Egipte dziɖuɖua ŋu be El-Sisi ƒe agbagbadzedze be yeawu Aʋafia Sami Anan le lãmesẽ ƒe gbagbã kpata megbe, si ƒoe le eƒe gaxɔ me le ƒe 2018 ƒe dzomeŋɔli me.

Ŋutifafadɔwo wɔwɔ
Mahmoud Refaat kple Libya Dukplɔlagã tsãtɔ Omar al-Hassi ɖo The International action group for peace in Libya eye ​​wòxɔ ɖoƒe si nye General Coordinator, si wodze egɔme tso... Tunisia ƒe fiadu le nyadzɔdzɔgblɔlawo ƒe kpekpe aɖe me le May 12, 2018 dzi le Europa Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ geɖe ŋkume eye nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔnuwo ƒo nu tso eŋu geɖe.

Ewɔ akpa aɖe hã le Yemen nyawo me le dukɔwo dome be wòaƒoe ɖe dukɔwo dome habɔbɔa nu be woakpɔ egbɔ be wotsɔ nuɖuɖu kple atikewɔwɔ ƒe kpekpeɖeŋuwo yi na dumevi dzrowo, vevietɔ amesiwo xaxa kple amesiwo ŋu Saudi-Emirati bɔmbdadaa gblẽ nu le eye wòɖe gbeƒãe be ele be woatsɔ Dukplɔla Abd Rabbu Mansour Hadi ava Dukɔwo Dome Nuvlowɔlawo ƒe Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe.

Dukɔwo Dome Ŋutifafa Ŋuti Dɔwɔha le Libya
Dukɔwo dome dɔwɔha si kpɔa ŋutifafa le Libya la nye esi Libya ƒe dukplɔlagã tsãtɔ, Aƒetɔ Omar al-Hassi kple Ðɔkta Mahmoud Refaat ɖo le May 2018 me kple dukɔwo dome ame gbogbo aɖewo tso Europa kple dukɔwo dome habɔbɔwo. Aƒetɔ Omar al-Hassi nye dukplɔla eye Mahmoud Refaat nye Dukɔwo Dome Dɔwɔha si wɔa dɔ le ŋutifafa le Libya ƒe ɖoɖowɔlagã.

Dukɔwo Dome Ŋutifafa Dɔwɔha le Libya  nye esi Aƒetɔ Omar al-Hassi kple Mahmoud Refaat ɖo to Titina Ɣedzeƒe kple Mediterranea ŋutifafa Ŋuti Numekuƒe(MEMPRI) dzi kple taɖodzinu be woakpe ɖe dumevi dzrowo ŋu be woaƒo asa na Aʋa si wowɔ le Libya me tsonu eye be... aɖo dze kple Dukɔwo Dome Habɔbɔa be woadi Dukɔmeviʋa si Haftar nɔ ŋgɔ na eye Saudi Arabia kple United Arab Emirates do alɔe la ƒe dodo.

Amegbetɔ ƒe Kpekpeɖeŋunahabɔbɔ na Yemen
Le March 2019 me la, Mahmoud Refaat ɖo The Humanitarian Action Group for Yemen to Europa Dukɔwo Dome Se kple Dukɔwo Dome Kadodowo ƒe Dɔwɔƒe dzi kple susu be yeakpɔ egbɔ be nuɖuɖu kple atikewɔnuwo nasu dumevi dzro siwo le Yemen siwo Saudi Arabia kple United Arab Emirates ƒe habɔbɔ ƒo xlãe la si hã be woawɔ dɔ kplikplikpli kple Dukɔwo Dome Habɔbɔa be woadzudzɔ aʋa si le edzi yim le Yemen eye woatsɔ nya ɖe Yemen-ʋawɔlawo ŋu.

Amegbetɔ ƒe Dɔwɔha si Kpɔa Yemen dzi le dzi dem ƒo na Dukɔwo Dome Nuvlowɔlawo ƒe Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe kple Dukɔwo Dome Habɔbɔ be woadze aʋawɔnuvlowɔlawo yome le Yemen, vevietɔ, le esi nyatakaka geɖe siwo tso Dukɔ Ƒoƒuawo ƒe habɔbɔwo gbɔ gblɔ be Yemen nye xaxa vɔ̃ɖitɔwo kekeake le anyigba dzi le aʋa si womewɔ le se nu o ta si Saudi Arabia kple United Arab Emirates nɔ ŋgɔ na le Yemen ŋu.

Do ŋgɔ le ƒe 2019 me la, Mahmoud Refaat ɖe gbeƒãe be ele be woakplɔ Mohammad bin Salman kple Mohammed bin Zayed Al Nahyan yome abe aʋawɔnuvlowɔlawo ene le woƒe dziɖuɖu le xaxa me le Yemen si na dumevi dzro akpe geɖe zu dɔwuame, kolera dɔvɔ̃ ƒe fukpelawo to vovo na dumevi dzro siwo wowu to bɔmbdada le Saudi -Emiratitɔwo ƒe nubabla.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Romain Lopez
text:
romain Lopez, (wodzi le ƒe 1989 me le Moissac) nye Franse dunyahela.

Agbe gbãtɔ kple hatsotso
Wodzi Romain Lopez le Moissac le ƒe 1989 me eye wòxɔ master ƒe ɖaseɖigbalẽ le dunyahehe me eye bubu le ŋutinya me.[1]

Ege ɖe Front National me le ƒe 2013 ƒe nuwuwu.[2]

Wotia Romain Lopez, si nye Rassemblement National me tɔ be wòanye Moissac ƒe dudzikpɔla le June 28, 2020 dzi.[2][3]

Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

title: Augustin Pascal Pierre Louis Marie de Romanet, Comte de Beaune
text:
augustin Pascal Pierre Louis Marie de Romanet, Comte de Beaune (wodzi le 2 April 1961) nye Franse dunyahehe ƒe aɖaŋuɖola kple asitsadɔdzikpɔla, Groupe ADP ƒe dɔdzikpɔlagã tso November 2012. Enye Caisse des dépôts et consignations ƒe zimenɔla tso ƒe 2007 va ɖo 2012, eye wònɔ dziɖuɖudɔ geɖe me le ƒe 1986 kple 2006 dome.

Le March 2020 me, le ƒe 2019–20 ƒe coronavirus dɔvɔ̃a me la, wodoe kpɔ be dɔlékuia le eŋu.[1]

Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

title: Maina Sage
text:
maina Sage (wodzi le 10 May 1975) nye Franse dunyahela tso Franse Polynesia. Wodzii le Papeete. Enye Tapura Huiraatiri habɔbɔa me tɔ. Tso ƒe 2014 me la, enye Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ na French Polynesia ƒe nuto 1 lia. Tso ƒe 2008 va ɖo ƒe 2017 me la, enye French Polynesia ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ.

Le March 12, 2020 dzi, le ƒe 2019–20 ƒe coronavirus dɔvɔ̃a me la, woɖee fia kɔte be Sage do COVID-19 kpɔ. Exɔ dɔa le esi wòzɔ mɔ yi Paris vɔ megbe.[1]

Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

title: Julien Sanchez
text:
julien Sanchez (wodzi le 19 October 1983) nye Franse dunyahela.

Front National me tɔ tso ƒe 2000 me, enye eƒe nyanuɖela tso ƒe 2017. Enye Beaucaire (Gard) ƒe dudzikpɔla hã eye wònye Rassemblement dukɔa ƒe ƒuƒoƒo ƒe zimenɔla le Occitanie nutome aɖaŋuɖotakpekpe me.

Agbemeŋutinya
Wodzi Sanchez le October 19, 1983 dzi le Argenteuil, Val-d'Oise.[1]

Ege ɖe Dukɔa ƒe Aʋawɔha me le ƒe 2000 me, esime wòxɔ ƒe 16.[2][3]

Le ƒe 2014 ƒe dudzikpɔƒe ƒe tiatia me le Beaucaire la, xexlẽdzesi si wòle ŋgɔ na la xɔ ŋgɔ le ƒoƒo evelia me le dzogoe ene me, kple ame 39.8% ƒe akɔntabubu.[4]

Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

title: Georges Sarre
text:
georges Sarre (26 November 1935 – 31 Dzove 2019) nye Franse dunyahela. Wodzii le Chénérailles, Creuse. Enye Dukɔmeviwo Kple Republicantɔwo ƒe Habɔbɔ ƒe ŋgɔnɔla. Wotiam be manye MEP le ƒe 1979 ƒe Europa tiatiawɔɣi eye wotiam be manye France Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ le Paris le ƒe 1981 me.

Sarre ku le 31 January 2019 le Paris le dzitodzito me dɔléle ta, exɔ ƒe 83.[1]

Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

title: Jacques Senard
text:
jacques Senard (21 November 1919 – 22 September 2020) nye Franse dunyahela. Wodzii le Corgoloin, France. Enye Franseawo ƒe Dudɔnunɔla le Netherlands le ƒe 1972 va ɖo ƒe 1976 dome eye wònye Egipte le ƒe 1976 va ɖo ƒe 1979 dome.

Senard ku le 22 September 2020 le Arles, France esime wòxɔ ƒe 100.[1]

Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

title: Pierre Sidos
text:
pierre Sidos (6 Dzove, 1927 – September 4, 2020) nye Franseawo ƒe ɖusimetɔwo ƒe dukɔmeviʋawɔla, Pétaintɔ yeye, kple Yudatɔwo ƒe tsitretsiɖeŋula. Enye ame vevi siwo nɔ dukɔmevinyenye me le Aʋa Gã II megbe le France la dome. Sidos nye dukɔmeviʋawɔha siwo nye Jeune Nation (ƒe 1949–1958) kple L'Œuvre Française (ƒe 1968–2013) ɖola kple woƒe ŋgɔnɔla.

Sidos ku le Bayeux kɔdzi le 4 September 2020 dzi, esime wòxɔ ƒe 93.[1]

Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

title: Edmond Simeoni
text:
Edmond Simeoni (6 August 1934 – 14 December 2018)[1] nye Franse dunyahela. Wodzii le Corte, Corsica, France.[2] Tso ƒe 1981 va ɖo ƒe 1992 me la, enye Corsica Sewɔtakpekpea me tɔ. Eɖe asi le dɔ ŋu le ƒe 1992 me le alesi wòdo alɔ aʋawɔha si nye National Liberation Front of Corsica si ŋu nyaʋiʋli nɔ ta. Simeoni nye dukɔmevi si wonya nyuie.

Wogatiae be manye sewɔtakpekpea le ƒe 2003. Asubɔ vaseɖe eƒe kugbe le ƒe 2018 me.

Simeoni ku le kɔdzi le Ajaccio, Corsica le dzidɔ ta le December 14, 2018 dzi, esime wòxɔ ƒe 84.

Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

title: Joachim Jean-Marie Forget
text:
Joachim Jean-Marie Forget (wodzi le 15 April 1983),[1] si woyɔna be Joachim Son-Forget (woyɔnae be "son-for-zhay"),[2] nye South Korea vidzidzi, Franse dunyahela. Tso ƒe 2017 va ɖo ƒe 2022 me la, enye Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ.[3]

Le February 2020 me la, Son-Forget ɖe gbeƒã eƒe ametiakɔdada na France ƒe Dukplɔla le ƒe 2022 ƒe tiatiawɔɣi.[4] Gake emegbe edzudzɔ sukudede eye wòdo alɔ Éric Zemmour ƒe aʋawɔwɔ si medze edzi o.[5]

Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

title: Maurice Faure
text:
maurice Faure (2 Dzove 1922 – 6 March 2014) nye Franse dunyahela kple dutadɔnunɔla. Enye Franseawo ƒe Tsitretsiɖeŋuha me tɔ eye wònye subɔla le Franseawo ƒe dziɖuɖu geɖe me. Wodzii le Azerat, Dordogne.

Faure ku le March 6, 2014 dzi le Cahors, Lot. Exɔ ƒe 92.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Nicole Fontaine
text:
nicole Fontaine (16 Dzove 1942 – 17 May 2018) nye Franse dunyahela kple senyala. Wodzii le Grainville-Ymauville, France. Fontaine nye Europa Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ na Île-de-France. Enye Union for a Popular Movement me tɔ. Fontaine nye Europa Sewɔtakpekpea ƒe Dukplɔla tso ƒe 1999 va ɖo ƒe 2002, eye emegbe Pat Cox va xɔ ɖe eteƒe.

Fontaine ku le 17 May 2018 le Paris esime wòxɔ ƒe 76.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Édouard Ferrand
text:
édouard Ferrand (25 Afɔfiɛ 1965 – 1 Dzove 2018) nye Franse dunyahela. Wodzii le Lyon, France. Enye Dukɔa ƒe Aʋawɔha me tɔ. Enye Front National MEP kple nutome aɖaŋuɖola le Burgundy. Wotiae be wòanye Europa Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ le May 2014 me.

Ferrand ku le 1 February 2018 le Paris le kansa ta esime wòxɔ ƒe 52.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Maxette Grisoni-Pirbakas
text:
maxette Grisoni-Pirbakas (wodzi le 14 April 1973) nye Franse dunyahela kple habɔbɔ me tɔ. Eƒe ŋkɔ le ƒe 2019 Europa Sewɔtakpekpe ƒe tiatia si wowɔ le France me le Dukɔa ƒe Takpekpe (RN) me.

Agbemeŋutinya
Dɔwɔlawo ƒe habɔbɔ ƒe ŋgɔnɔla le Fédération nationale des syndicats d'exploitants agricoles le Guadeloupe, wonyae ɖe eƒe avuwɔwɔ le anyigba dzi le Guadeloupe agbledelawo ƒe ta me.

Ele nɔƒe 12 lia le Dukɔa ƒe Takpekpe si woawɔ na ƒe 2019 Europa ƒe tiatiawɔblɔɖe ƒe ŋkɔwo me. Wotiae.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Jules Verne
text:
jules Verne (February 8, 1828 – March 24, 1905) nye Fransetɔ agbalẽŋlɔla. Enye agbalẽŋlɔla gbãtɔ siwo ŋlɔ dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya me nyakpakpawo la dometɔ ɖeka. Eƒe agbalẽ aɖewoe nye Mɔzɔzɔ Yi Anyigba ƒe Titina (ƒe 1864), Tso Anyigba Dzi Yi Ɣletia Dzi (ƒe 1865), Ligi Akpe Blaeve Le Ƒu Te (ƒe 1870), kple Around the World in Eighty Days (ƒe 1873).

Agbe
Wodzii le du si nye Nantes me le France. Fofoa nye senyala, eye le gɔmedzedzea me la, Verne di be yeasrɔ̃ senyawo hã. Esi wòxɔ ƒe wuiade la, edze agbalẽ didiwo ŋɔŋlɔ gɔme, gake fofoa di be yeakpɔ ga abe senyala ene, ke menye abe agbalẽŋlɔla ene o. Le ƒe 1847 me la, fofoa ɖoe ɖe Paris be wòadze senyawo sɔsrɔ̃ gɔme.

Le ƒe 1848 me la, Jules Verne, si yi aƒeme la, eƒe lɔlɔ̃ nu sẽ, gake nyɔnuvia dzilawo medi be wòaɖee o. Verne lé blanui esi wòse be nyɔnuvia ɖe ame bubu - kesinɔtɔ, ŋutsu tsitsi aɖe. Le Jules Verne ƒe ŋutinyawo me la, eŋlɔa nu tso nyɔnu siwo ɖe ame siwo womelɔ̃ o ŋu zi geɖe.

Etrɔ yi Paris be yeakpɔe be ele tɔtrɔ kpata ƒe agbo nu: Franseawo ƒe Tɔtrɔ Kpata si wowɔ le ƒe 1848 me ɖe fia la le zi dzi, eye woti Louis-Napoléon Bonaparte be wòanye France Dukɔa ƒe dukplɔla gbãtɔ. (Republic nye dukɔ si me fia alo fianyɔnu mele o, ke boŋ dukplɔla le esi ɖe eteƒe.)

Verne yi edzi srɔ̃ senyawo vaseɖe ƒe 1851 me, gake le ɣeyiɣi ma katã me la, enɔa nu ŋlɔm henɔa go dom kple agbalẽŋlɔla kple nutala bubuwo.

Mlɔeba le ƒe 1852 me la, eɖoe be yeaɖe asi le senyala nyenye ŋu, eye yeazu ɣeyiɣiawo katã ƒe agbalẽŋlɔla bibi boŋ. Nyametsotso sia medzɔ dzi na fofoa kura o, gake Verne nye dzimesesẽtɔ kple susu sẽŋu, eyata eyi eƒe ɖoɖowo dzi. Verne yi Paris be yeadze agbagba akpɔ dzidzedze. Gbã la, mekpɔ ŋkɔ aɖeke o. Le ɣeyiɣi aɖe megbe la, eva zu dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya ƒe alɔdzedɔwɔla, evɔ wova nyae nyuie ɖe eƒe nuŋɔŋlɔ ta. Eƒe lɔlɔ̃ na dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya kple nuŋɔŋlɔ na wòŋlɔ ŋutinyawo kple agbalẽ siwo woyɔna fifia be "dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya me nyakpakpa". Ame geɖe gblɔna be Jules Verne ye to dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya me nyakpakpa ƒomevi sia vɛ.

Verne nɔ agbe be yeaŋlɔ nu. Eŋlɔ ŋutinya geɖewo. Esiawo dometɔ aɖewoe nye nyakpakpagbalẽwo, fefewɔƒewo, kple agbalẽ bubuwo. Le ƒe 1886 me la, tɔɖiayɔvi ɖekakpui, Gaston, si ŋu paranoia nɔ la da tu Verne ƒe afɔ. Le ema megbe la, Verne ƒe afɔ vuvu tegbee. Ðewohĩ esia na eƒe nuŋɔŋlɔ ƒe atsyãwo do viviti wu le ɣeyiɣi ma me.

Verne ɖe Aimée du Fraysse de Viane le January 1857 me kple fofoa ƒe yayra. Le August 1861 me la, wodzi wo viŋutsua. Eyi edzi nɔ agbalẽ ŋlɔm vaseɖe eƒe kugbe. Le March 24th, 1905 dzi la, Verne, si dze dɔ kple suklidɔ la ku le eƒe aƒeme le Amiens, France.

Jules Verne kple nutovɛwo
Jules Verne ŋlɔ nu tso nu geɖe siwo menɔ anyi esime wònɔ agbe o ŋu. Nu siawo dometɔ aɖewo va zu nu ŋutɔŋutɔwo emegbe. Verne menye dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunyala kura o, gake eƒe didi vevie ɖe mɔ̃ɖaŋununya ŋu kple ŋgɔyiyi si wowɔ ɣemaɣi na wòto nutovɛ geɖe siwo gbɔna vɛ eye le ɣeyiɣi aɖe megbe la, wova zu míaƒe gbesiagbegbenɔnɔ ƒe akpa dzrowo mlɔeba .[1] .

Elektrik-ƒugɔmeʋawɔʋu
Le Twenty Thousand Leagues Under the Sea me la, Kapitan Nemo kple eƒe elektrik-ƒugɔmeʋawɔʋua nye egbegbe nukunu aɖe. Elektrikŋusẽ nye nu yeye ŋutɔ ɣemaɣi, eye womezãe tsɔ na ŋusẽ meli si le tsi te kpɔ o.

Nyadzɔdzɔwo le radio kple television dzi
Le ƒe 1889 me nyati aɖe si nye "Le Ƒe 2889 Me" me la, Jules Verne ƒo nu tso mɔnu bubu si woate ŋu azã ɖe nyadzɔdzɔgbalẽwo teƒe ŋu be:

"Le esi teƒe be woata Anyigba Ŋutinya la, ŋdi sia ŋdi la, woƒoa nu na amesiwo ŋlɔ ŋkɔ ɖe eme, amesiwo, tso dzeɖoɖo dodzidzɔname siwo wowɔ kple nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔlawo, dukplɔlawo kple dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunyalawo me la, wosrɔ̃a ŋkekea ƒe nyadzɔdzɔwo."

Associated Press gblɔ be nyadzɔdzɔ gbãtɔa medzɔ o vaseɖe ƒe 1920 me—ƒe 30 kloe le Verne ƒe susu me yiyi megbe.

Ɣleti ƒe modules
Jules Verne ŋlɔ nu tso "projectiles" ŋu le Tso Anyigba dzi yi Ɣletia dzi me. Tu siawo akplɔ amewo ayi dzinua dzi. Verne kpɔ tu gã aɖe si azi module la dzi wòaɖo dzinua dzi le susu me. Egbea la, woɖoa yamenutomeyimɔ̃wo ɖe yamenutome le tukpewo tame, si zia mɔ̃a dzi wògbɔa nuheŋusẽ ƒe ŋutete ŋu.

Haƒomɔ̃wo kple holographwo
Le The Carpathian Castle me la, kɔƒea me tɔ aɖewo vɔ̃na na fiasã aɖe, si me woate ŋu ase gbewo le ahakpɔ nɔnɔmewo tsoe. Amedzro aɖe si tsɔ ɖe le eme la ɖoe be yeakpɔ nusi le dzɔdzɔm, eye wòkpɔe be gbeɖiɖi siwo wolé ɖe mɔ̃ dzi kple holographic nɔnɔmetatawo koe wonɔ sesem.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Joseph Vidal
text:
oseph Vidal (5 March 1933 – 9 July 2020) nye Franse dunyahela. Le ƒe 2002 me la, eva zu Knight of the Legion of Honour. Tso ƒe 1978 va ɖo ƒe 1993 me la, enye Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ. Wodzi Vidal le Lavalette, Aude.

Vidal ku le 9 July 2020 esime wòxɔ ƒe 87.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Guillaume Vuilletet
text:
guillaume Vuilletet (wodzi le 20 July 1967) nye Franse dunyahela. Enye La République En Marche ƒe habɔbɔa me tɔ! Wotiam be manye Franse Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ le June 18, 2017 dzi, eye wònɔ Val-d'Oise dɔwɔƒe teƒe.

Le March 9, 2020 dzi, le ƒe 2019–20 ƒe coronavirus dɔvɔ̃a me la, egblɔ le Twitter nyatakaka aɖe me be yekpɔ dɔlékuia le ye ŋu.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Jean-François Voguet
text:
jean-François Voguet (8 Afɔfiɛ 1949 – 2 Dzove 2021) nye Franse dunyahela. Enye France ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ, eye wònɔ Val-de-Marne dɔwɔƒea teƒe. Enye Kɔmiunisttɔwo, Republicantɔwo, kple Dukɔmeviwo ƒe Ƒuƒoƒoa me tɔ.

Voguet ku le COVID-19 ta le COVID-19 dɔvɔ̃a me le France le 2 February 2021, esime wòxɔ ƒe 71.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Nicolas Alfons
text:
nicolas Alfonsi (13 April 1936 – March 16, 2020) nye Franse dunyahela kple senyala. Wodzii le Cargèse, Corsica.

Alfonsi nye France ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ, eye wònɔ Corse-du-Sud ƒe dɔwɔƒea teƒe. Enye Miametɔwo ƒe Habɔbɔ si nye Zazɛ̃nyahelawo ƒe Habɔbɔ me tɔ. Enye Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ tso ƒe 1973 va ɖo ƒe 1988 eye wògakpɔtɔ tso ƒe 2001 va ɖo ƒe 2014. Tso ƒe 1981 va ɖo ƒe 1984 me la, Alfonsi nye Europa Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ.

Alfonsi ku le March 16, 2020 dzi le COVID-19 ta esime wòxɔ ƒe 83.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Marielle de Sarnez
text:
marielle de Sarnez (Fransegbe me: [ma.ʁjɛl də saʁ.nɛz] ; 27 Dzove 1951 – 13 Dzove 2021) nye Franse dunyahela. Enye Demokrasihabɔbɔa me tɔ. Le ƒe 2017 me la, woti De Sarnez be wòanye Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ.

De Sarnez nye Europa Nyawo Gbɔkpɔha ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla le Édouard Philippe ƒe dziɖuɖumegãwo ƒe ha me tso May vaseɖe June 2017. Tso ƒe 1999 va ɖo ƒe 2017 me la, enye Europa Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ.

Wodzi De Sarnez le Paris. Philippe Augier ye ɖee. De Sarnez ku le ʋumenugbagbeviɣidɔ le Pairs me le 13 Dzove 2021, esime wòxɔ ƒe 69.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Marie-José Denys
text:
marie-José Denys (15 March 1950 – 12 Dzove 2022) nye Franse dunyahela. Enye Sosialist Dunyaheha me tɔ. Enye Europa Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ tso ƒe 1989 va ɖo ƒe 1994. eye agate ŋu adzɔ tso ƒe 1997 va ɖo ƒe 1999. Wodzi Denys le La Rochelle, France.

Denys ku le 12 Dzove 2022, esime wòxɔ ƒe 71.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Jacques Lucien Jean Delors
text:
jacques Lucien Jean Delors (wodzi le 20 July 1925) nye Franse dunyahela. Ewɔ dɔ abe Europa Dɔwɔha ƒe Dukplɔla 8 lia tso ƒe 1985 va ɖo ƒe 1995. Enye Ganyawo ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla tso ƒe 1981 va ɖo ƒe 1984. Enye Europa Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ tso ƒe 1979 va ɖo ƒe 1981.

Le ƒe 2015 me la, Donald Tusk ɖe gbeƒãe be Delors ava zu ame etɔ̃lia si xɔ Europa Dukɔmevi Bubutɔ le "eƒe akpa ɖedzesi si wòwɔ le Europa dɔa ƒe ŋgɔyiyi ta".

Wodzi Delors le Paris. Esrɔ̃ nu le Paris Yunivɛsiti. Le ƒe 1941 me la, eɖe srɔ̃a Marie Lephaille. Wo ame evea siaa dzi vinyɔnuvi ɖeka: Martine Aubry (wodzi le ƒe 1950 me), amesi nye Lille ƒe dudzikpɔla kple Sosialist Dunyaheha ƒe Agbalẽŋlɔla Gbãtɔ.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Florence Parly
text:
florence Parly (wodzi le 8 May 1963) nye Franse dunyahela.
Enye Asrafowo ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla tso ƒe 2017 va ɖo ƒe 2022 le Dukplɔla
Emmanuel Macron ƒe kpɔkplɔ te..[1] Enye Dukɔa ƒe Agbalẽŋlɔla na
Gazazãwo tso ƒe 2000 va ɖo ƒe 2002 le Dukplɔla Jacques Chirac
ƒe kpɔkplɔ te.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Alexandre Parodi
text:
alexandre Parodi (1 June 1901 – 15 March 1979) nye Franse
dutadɔnunɔla. Eyae nye France ƒe amedɔdɔ gbãtɔ le Dukɔ Ƒoƒuawo
me.

Parodi nye Dukɔa ƒe Aɖaŋudeha
me tɔ.

Tso ƒe 1944 va ɖo ƒe 1945 me
la, Parodi nye Dɔwɔnyawo Kple Hadomegbenɔnɔ Ŋuti Dedienɔnɔ
la, Parodi nye Dɔwɔnyawo Kple Hadomegbenɔnɔ Ŋuti Dedienɔnɔ
Ŋuti Dɔdzikpɔla. Tso ƒe 1945 va ɖo ƒe 1960 me la, Parodiabe Franseawo ƒe dutadɔnunɔla ene.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Lucien Degauchy
text:
lucien Degauchy (11 June 1937 – 11 February 2022) nye Franse dunyahela. Enye France Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ tso ƒe 1993 va ɖo ƒe 2017. Enɔ Oise dɔwɔƒea
teƒe. Enye Union for a Popular Movement me tɔ.

Degauchy ku le 11 February 2022, esime wòxɔ ƒe 84.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Albin Chalandon
text:
albin Chalandon (11 June 1920 le Reyrieux, Ain – 29 July 2020) nye Franse dunyahela kple subɔla tsã. Tso ƒe 1968 kple 1972 me la, enye Dudɔnunɔla. Eye tso ƒe 1986 va ɖo ƒe 1988 me la, enye Ʋɔnudrɔ̃nyawo Gbɔkpɔha.

Eku le 29 July 2020 dzi

title: Jean-Baptiste Colbert
text:
jean-Baptiste Colbert nye Franseawo ƒe dukplɔla si nye Dukɔa ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla tso ƒe 1661 vaseɖe eƒe kugbe le ƒe 1683 me.

Nyatakakadzraɖoƒe bubuwo

title: Jean-Yves Le Drian
text:
jean-Yves Le Drian (Fransegbe me nyayɔyɔ: [ʒã.iv lə.dʁi.jã]); wodzii le June 30, 1947) nye Franse dunyahela. Enye Franseawo ƒe Sosialist Dunyaheha me tɔ. Ewɔ dɔ abe Takpɔkpɔ kple Veviedonulawo ƒe Nyawo Gbɔkpɔla ene le Dukplɔla François Hollande ƒe kpɔkplɔ te eye Emmanuel Macron tiae be wòanye Dutanyawo Gbɔkpɔla le Philippe dziɖuɖumegãwo ƒe ha me.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Philippe Mestre
text:
Philippe Mestre (23 August 1927 – 25 April 2017) nye Franse dziɖuɖudɔwɔla si le ɖoƒe kɔkɔ, nyadzɔdzɔgblɔlawo ƒe dɔdzikpɔla kple dunyahela. Wodzii le Talmont-Saint-Hilaire, Vendée.

Mestre nye Gers, Basse-Normandie, Calvados, Pays de la Loire kple Loire-Atlantique ƒe nutodziɖula. Enye Presse-Océan ƒe dɔdzikpɔlagã tso ƒe 1981 va ɖo ƒe 1993.

Mestre nye Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ tso ƒe 1981 va ɖo ƒe 1993, eye wònɔ Vendée teƒe. Enye Asrafomegãwo ƒe Nyawo kple Aʋawɔla siwo ŋu wowɔ aʋa le ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla tso ƒe 1993 va ɖo ƒe 1995. Enye Bubu ƒe Asrafoha ƒe amegã eye wònye Dukɔa ƒe Dzɔdzɔmenuwo ƒe Habɔbɔ ƒe amegã.

Mestre ku le 25 Afɔfiɛ 2017 le Talmont-Saint-Hilaire, esime wòxɔ ƒe 89.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Maurice Papon
text:
maurice Papon (September 3, 1910 – February 17, 2007) nye Franse dziɖuɖudɔwɔla. Exɔ ŋgɔ na kpovitɔwo le nuto gãwo me kple le Paris le Nazitɔwo ƒe France dzi ɖuɖu me va ɖo ƒe 1960-awo me. Le ƒe 1998 me la, wobu fɔe ɖe nuvlowɔwɔ ɖe ameƒomea ŋu ta. Esia le alea elabena ekpe asi ɖe Yudatɔ siwo wu 1600 ŋu woʋu yi fuwɔamegaxɔwo me le Xexemeʋa II me. Dzi ƒe dɔmawɔmawɔ nyuie wui.

 Woate ŋu ana nyati kpui sia si ku ɖe ame alo amewo ƒe ƒuƒoƒo aɖe ŋu nadidi wu. Àte ŋu akpe ɖe Wikipedia ŋu ne ètsɔe kpe ɖe eŋu.

title: Philippe Pétain
text:
philippe Pétain (ƒe 1856-1951) nye Franseawo ƒe Aʋafiagã si nye Vichy France ƒe ŋgɔnɔla le ƒe 1940 kple 1944 dome.

Le Xexemeʋa I me la, Pétain nye kalẽtɔ le Verdun-ʋaa me eye wòxɔ ŋgɔ na Franseawo ƒe Asrafowo vaseɖe esime aʋaa wu enu le ƒe 1918 me.
Le ƒe 1940 me le France-ʋaa wɔɣi la, Franse dziɖuɖua bia tso esi be wòaɖu dukɔa dzi. Etsɔ eɖokui na Germanytɔwo. Tso ƒe 1940 va ɖo ƒe 1942 ƒe nuwuwu la, Vichy France nye dukɔ si Nazi Germany ƒe asisiwo nɔ. Le November 1942 me la, Pétain va zu Nazi Germany ƒe fefewɔvi esime woxɔ Vichy France bliboe heɖe aʋawɔnuwo ɖa.

Le aʋaa megbe la, wodrɔ̃ ʋɔnu Pétain eye wobu fɔe be ewɔ aʋatsokaka. Wotso kufia nɛ gbã, gake le ƒe si wòxɔ kple Xexemeʋa I ƒe dɔwɔwɔ ta la, woɖe eƒe tohehea dzi kpɔtɔ wòzu eƒe agbemeŋkekewo katã ƒe gaxɔmenɔnɔ. Eku le ƒe 1951 me.

title: Edgard Pisani
text:
edgard Pisani (Fransegbe: [pizani]; 9 October 1918 – 20 June 2016) nye Franse dukplɔla, xexemenunyala, kple agbalẽŋlɔla.

Exɔ ɖoƒewo le dziɖuɖu vovovowo me le France: Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ (ƒe 1954–1961; 1974–1981), Agbledede ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla (ƒe 1961–1966), Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ (ƒe 1967–1968), Europa ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla (ƒe 1981–1985), New Caledonia ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla (ƒe 1985 ), Arab Xexeame ƒe Nusrɔ̃ƒe ƒe Dukplɔla (ƒe 1988–1995). Le ƒe 1992 me, kple Bertrand Hervieu, woɖo Groupe de Seillac eye ​​Groupe de Bruges kplɔe ɖo le ƒe 1995 me, eye wo ame evea siaa nye susuŋutinunyalawo ƒe habɔbɔwo.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Raymond Poincaré
text:
raymond Poincaré (20 August 1860 - 15 October 1934) nye Franse dunyahela le Dukɔ Etɔ̃lia me. Enye akɔntanyala Henri Poincaré ƒe tɔɖiayɔvi. Enye France ƒe dukplɔla tso ƒe 1913 va ɖo ƒe 1920, eye wònye Dutanyawo gbɔkpɔla zi geɖe. Esrɔ̃ senyawo le Sorbonne eye wona hehee be wòanye senyala. Eƒe nukpɔsusu mede akpa aɖeke dzi le Dreyfus Nya la me le gɔmedzedzea me, gake emegbe eda asi ɖe Dreyfus dzi.

 Woate ŋu ana nyati kpui sia si ku ɖe ame alo amewo ƒe ƒuƒoƒo aɖe ŋu nadidi wu. Àte ŋu akpe ɖe Wikipedia ŋu ne ètsɔe kpe ɖe eŋu.

title: Jack Ralite
text:
jack Ralite (14 May 1928 – 12 November 2017) nye Franse dunyahela. Wotiae le ƒe 1973 me be wòanye Seine-Saint-Denis nutoa me tɔ na Franseawo ƒe Kɔmiunist Dunyaheha la. Le ƒe 1981 me la, eva zu Lãmesẽnyawo Gbɔkpɔha ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla kple Dɔwɔnyawo Gbɔkpɔla tso ƒe 1981 va ɖo ƒe 1984. Le ƒe 1984 me la, eva zu Aubervilliers ƒe Dumegã, eye wòlé dɔ sia me vaseɖe ƒe 2003. Wodzii le Châlons-en-Champagne, France.

Ralite ku le Aubervilliers, France le gbɔgbɔtsixetsixe ta esime wòxɔ ƒe 89.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Franck Riester
text:
franck Riester (wodzi le 3 Dzove 1974) nye Franse dunyahela. Eyae nye Franseawo ƒe Dekɔnuwo ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla fifia. Enye France Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ tso ƒe 2007 va ɖo ƒe 2018. Enɔ Seine-et-Marne dɔwɔƒea teƒe, eye ​​wònye The Republicans, si woyɔna tsã be Union for a Popular Movement me tɔ tsã.

Eɖo Agir habɔbɔa eye wòle ŋgɔ yim fifia.

Le March 2020 me le coronavirus ƒe kakaɣi la, wodo Riester kpɔ be COVID-19 le eŋu.

Enye ŋutsu kple ŋutsu alo nyɔnu kple nyɔnu ƒe gbɔdɔdɔ.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Marcel Rigout
text:
marcel Rigout (10 May 1928 – 23 August 2014) nye Franse dunyahela. Ewɔ dɔ abe Dɔwɔnyawo ƒe Hehenadɔdzikpɔla ene tso ƒe 1981 va ɖo ƒe 1984, le Dukplɔla tsãtɔ François Mitterrand ƒe kpɔkplɔ te. Enye Franseawo ƒe Kɔmiunist Dunyaheha (PCF; Fransegbe me tɔ: Parti communiste français) me tɔ.

Wodzi Rigout le Verneuil-sur-Vienne. Eŋlɔ agbalẽ si nye L’autre chance le ƒe 1983 me.

Rigout ku le 23 August 2014 le Limoges, esime wòxɔ ƒe 86.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Marie-Ségolène Royal
text:
marie-Ségolène Royal (wodzi le September 22, 1953 le Dakar, Franseawo ƒe Ɣetoɖoƒe Afrika, si nye Senegal fifia) nye Franse dunyahela. Enye Poitou-Charentes nutoa ƒe zimenɔla, Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ eye wònye Sosialist Dunyaheha me tɔ xɔŋkɔ aɖe le France. Enye Sosialist Dunyaheha la ƒe ametiakɔdala na France dukplɔla ƒe tiatia le ƒe 2007 me gake eɖu dzi le Nicolas Sarkozy si. Enye France Dukplɔla tsãtɔ François Hollande ƒe zɔhɛ tso ƒe 1978 vaseɖe ƒe 2007 me.

Wonyae be ekpɔa dzidzɔ ɖe "Mɔ Etɔ̃lia" ƒe ɖoɖo aɖewo ŋu, le eƒe tete ɖe se kple ɖoɖo ƒe nyawo ŋu si ŋu nyaʋiʋliwo nɔ ta eye wòdoa alɔ dziɖuɖu ƒe ɖoɖowo kple gomekpɔkpɔ le demokrasi me.

Agbalẽwo ƒe xexlẽdzesiwo
Royal ye nye agbalẽa ŋlɔla negbe ɖe wogblɔe bubui hafi.

Le Printemps ƒe tɔgbuiwo kple mamawo dome : la nouvelle ƒe nubabla si le anyigba dzi (Paris : Cogite-R. Laffont, 1987) ISBN 2-221-05314-1, (Paris : France Loisirs, 1988) ISBN 2-7242-3948-2, ( Paris : Nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒewo ƒe kotoku, 1989) ISBN 2-266-02730-1.
Le Ras-le-bol des bébés zappeurs (Paris : R. Laffont, 1989) ISBN 2-221-05826-7, ƒe akpa dzi "Télé-amewuwu, l'overdose?", nyatiwo: Télévision et enfants, Ŋutasẽnuwɔwɔ—A la télévision .
Fetu, fetu, fetu (Paris : R. Laffont, 1993) ISBN 2-221-07046-1, nyati(wo): Nutome—Takpɔkpɔ—France ; Dunyahehe si ku ɖe nutome ŋu—France ; Développement kɔƒenutowo me—France.
France. Ministère de l’environnement (ƒe 1991-1997) Ségolène Royal, une année d’actions pour la planète : avril 1992 - mars 1993 (Paris : Nutomedzikpɔƒe, ca 1993), nyati(wo): Politique de l’environnement —France.
France. Assemblée nationale (ƒe 1958-) Dɔdzikpɔha si kpɔa nyawo gbɔ Étrangères Nyatakakawo ƒe Nyatakaka tso xɔ suewo me le Takpekpe si le Rio / présenté par M. Roland Nungesser kple Mme Ségolène Fiaɖuƒe (Paris : Assemblée nationale, 1994) ISBN 2-11-087788-X, nyati(wo): Développement si nɔa anyi didina ; Dukɔwo ƒe Habɔbɔwo ƒe Takpekpe sur l'environnement et le développement.
La vérité d’une femme (Paris : Stock, 1996) ISBN 2-234-04648-3, nyati(wo): Dunyahehe ƒe nuwɔna—France—ƒe 1970-.
Laguerre, Christian École, nyatakaka kple nouveaux ƒe hatsotsowo préf. de Ségolène Fiaɖuƒe (Paris ; Montréal (Québec) : Éd. l’Harmattan, 1999) ISBN 2-7384-7453-5, nyati(wo): Nyatakakawo—Hadomegbenɔnɔ ƒe akpa aɖe ; Sukudede kple nyatakakawo ŋuti nunya ; Ðoɖowɔlawo kple enfants.

Sassier, Monique Construire la médiation familie : nyaʋiʋliwo kple nyagbɔgblɔwo ŋgɔdonya si Ségolène Royal ŋlɔ (Paris : Dunod, 2001) ISBN 2-10-005993-9.
Amar, Cécile kple Hassoux, Didier Ségolène kple François ([Paris] : Privé, impr. 2005) ISBN 2-35076-002-2, nyati(wo): Royal, Ségolène (1953-) -- Agbemeŋutinya ; Hollande, François (ƒe 1954-) -- ==Agbemeŋutinyawo==
Bernard, Daniel Madame Fiaɖuƒe ([Paris] : Jacob-Duvernet, impr. 2005) ISBN 2-84724-091-8, nyati(wo): Royal, Ségolène (ƒe 1953-) -- Agbemeŋutinya ; France—Dunyahehe kple dziɖuɖu—ƒe 1958-.
Désir d’avenir ([Paris] : Flammarion, [si gbɔna, March 2006]) ISBN 2-08-068805-7.
Malouines-Me La Madone kple Culbuto - Ou l'Inlassable Ambition de Ségolène Fia kple François Hollande ([Paris] : Fayard, [si gbɔna, April 5 2006]), nusiwo kplɔ wo nɔewo ɖo: LITT.GENE, ISBN 2-213-62354-6.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Alexis Charles-Henri-Maurice Clérel, Viscount de Tocqueville
text:
alexis Charles-Henri-Maurice Clérel, Viscount de Tocqueville (/ˈtoʊkvɪl, ˈtɒk-/;[4] Fransegbe me: [ alayi də blavil]; 29 July 1805 – 16 April 1859) nye Franse dutadɔnunɔla, dunyaheŋutinunyala kple ŋutinyaŋlɔla. Wonyae nyuie wu ɖe eƒe agbalẽ siwo nye Democracy in America (si dze le babla eve me, ƒe 1835 kple 1840) kple The Old Regime and the Revolution (ƒe 1856) ta.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Manuel Carlos Valls
text:
manuel Carlos Valls (Fransegbe me: [ma.ny.ɛl vals], wodzi le 13 August 1962) nye Franse dunyahela si wodzi le Spain. Ezu France ƒe Dukplɔlagã le March 31, 2014 dzi.

Wodzi Valls le Barcelona na dadaa si nye Switzerlandtɔ kple Spaintɔ nutala Xavier Valls.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Dominique Marie François René Galouzeau de Villepin
text:
dominique Marie François René Galouzeau de Villepin (wodzi le November 14, 1953), si woyɔna ko be Dominique de Villepin, nye France ƒe Dukplɔlagã (alo Dukplɔlagã) tso May 31, 2005 va ɖo May 17, 2007. Jacques Chirac ye ɖoe Dukplɔlagã ƒe ɖoƒea esi France Dukplɔla ɖe Jean-Pierre Raffarin le dukplɔla ƒe ɖoƒea me vɔ megbe. Raffarin mete ŋu kpɔ Franseawo ƒe kpekpeɖeŋu na Europa Dukplɔsea o.

Dominique de Villepin gblɔ be yeƒe dziɖuɖua ƒe dɔ vevitɔe nye be yeawɔ dɔ. Enya be
Franseawo tsi dzi ɖe alesi Franseawo ƒe ganyawo le ŋu. Esia nye susu siwo ta woda asi ɖe Europa Dukplɔsea dzi le amewo ƒe nyametsotso si wowɔ le May 29, 2005 dzi la dometɔ ɖeka.

Le May 15, 2007, si nye Dukplɔla Jacques Chirac ƒe dziɖuɣi ƒe ŋkeke blibo mamlɛtɔ dzi la, Villepin tsɔ eƒe asiɖeɖe le Prime Minister ƒe dɔ ŋu eye Dukplɔla la da asi ɖe edzi. François Fillon va xɔ ɖe eteƒe le ŋkeke eve megbe.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Roland Chassain
text:
roland Chassain (5 Dzove 1947 – 9 Dzove 2021) nye Franse dunyahela. Wodzii le Aurillac, France. Chassain nye Rally for the Republic me tɔ. Tso ƒe 2002 va ɖo ƒe 2007 me la, enye Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ. Tso ƒe 1995 vaseɖe eƒe kugbe la, enye Saintes-Maries-de-la-Mer ƒe Dumegã.

Chassain ku le 9 February 2021, esime wòxɔ ƒe 74.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: William Chervy
text:
william Chervy (3 June 1937 – 12 February 2021) nye Franse dunyahela. Enye Sosialist Dunyaheha me tɔ. Enye Saint-Vaury ƒe Dumegã tso ƒe 1971 va ɖo ƒe 2001. Enye Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ tso Creuse tso ƒe 1981 va ɖo ƒe 1998.

Chervy ku le 12 February 2021, esime wòxɔ ƒe 83.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Jean-Pierre Chevènement
text:
jean-Pierre Chevènement (Fransegbe me: [ʒɑ̃ pjɛʁ ʃəvenmɑ̃]; wodzii le 9 March 1939[1]) nye Franse dunyahela. Enye subɔla le ƒe 1980 kple 1990 ƒeawo me. Wonyae nyuie wu ɖe eƒe ametiakɔdada le ƒe 2002 ƒe France dukplɔla ƒe tiatia me ta.

Enye Belfort ƒe dudzikpɔla. Wotiam be manye Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ na Territoire de Belfort le ƒe 2008. Enye PS ƒe gɔmeɖoanyila ɖeka eye wònye Republican kple Dukɔmeviwo ƒe Habɔbɔ (MRC) ɖola.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Daniel Colin
text:
Daniel Colin (30 September 1933 – 15 June 2019) nye Franseawo ƒe dunyahela. Wodzii le Paris. Ewɔ dɔ abe Var ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ ene tso ƒe 1986 va ɖo ƒe 1997. Enye Toulon ƒe dudzikpɔla ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ hã tso ƒe 1977 va ɖo ƒe 1986, Europa Aɖaŋudeha me tɔ tso ƒe 1979 va ɖo ƒe 1994 me, eye wònye nutome aɖaŋuɖola le Provence-Alpes-Côte . ƒe 1981 va ɖo ƒe 1998 me.

Colin ku le June 15, 2019 dzi, esime wòxɔ ƒe 85.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Daniel Colliard
text:
daniel Colliard (14 Afɔfiɛ 1930 – 3 Dzove 2022) nye Franse dunyahela. Enye Franseawo ƒe Kɔmiunist Dunyaheha (PCF) me tɔ. Wodzii le Dieppe, France. Enye Le Havre ƒe Dumegã tso ƒe 1994 vaseɖe ƒe 1995. Enye France Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ le ƒe 1993 va ɖo ƒe 1997 dome.

Colliard ku le 3 Dzove 2022 le Le Havre, esime wòxɔ ƒe 91.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Bernard Debré
text:
bernard Debré (30 September 1944 – 13 September 2020) nye Franseawo ƒe tsinyegoeŋutinunyala kple dunyahela. Enye France Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ (député) tso ƒe 2012 va ɖo ƒe 2017. Enye Paris dugã teƒenɔlawo dometɔ ɖeka. Enye Union for a Popular Movement me tɔ. Tso ƒe 1992 va ɖo ƒe 2001 me la, enye Amboise Dumegã.

Wodzi Debré le Toulouse, France. Enye Dukplɔlagã Michel Debré ƒe viŋutsu eye wònye Jean-Louis Debré nɔviŋutsu vevi.

Debré ku le 13 September 2020 dzi le kansa ta esime wòxɔ ƒe 75. Nɔviaŋutsu François Debré ku le ŋufɔke.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Jean-Pierre Defontaine
text:
jean-Pierre Defontaine (4 Dzove 1937 – 1 Dzove 2022) nye Franse dunyahela. Enye Miametɔwo ƒe Habɔbɔ si nye Zazɛ̃nyahelawo ƒe Habɔbɔ me tɔ. Enye Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ tso ƒe 1978 va ɖo ƒe 2007. Enye Dukplɔla na habɔbɔ si nye RC Lens tso ƒe 1976 va ɖo ƒe 1979. Wodzii le Mametz, France. Enye Hénin-sur-Cojeul ƒe Dumegã le ƒe 1983 va ɖo ƒe 1996 dome.

Defontaine ku le Hénin-sur-Cojeul le Dzove 1, 2022 dzi, esime wòxɔ ƒe 82.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Michel Delebarre
text:
michel Delebarre (27 Afɔfiɛ 1946 – 9 Afɔfiɛ 2022) nye Franse dunyahela. Enye France ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ tso ƒe 2011 va ɖo ƒe 2017. Enɔ Nord dɔwɔƒea teƒe. Enye Socialist, zazɛ̃nyahelawo, citoyen et divers gauche me tɔ. Enye Dunkirk ƒe dudzikpɔla hã tso ƒe 1989 vaseɖe ƒe 2014. Wodzi Delebarre le Bailleul, France.

Delebarre ku le 9 April 2022 le Lille, France le kuxi siwo suklidɔ hena vɛ ta esime wòxɔ ƒe 75.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Patrick Devedjian
text:
patrick Devedjian (Armeniagbe me: Պատրիկ Դևեջյան; 26 Afɔfiɛ 1944 – 29 Dzove 2020) nye Franse dunyahela. Enye Union for a Popular Movement (UMP) ƒe habɔbɔ me tɔ. Enye Nicolas Sarkozy ƒe aɖaŋuɖola kplikplikpli, tso ƒe 1990-awo me.

Tso ƒe 1983 va ɖo ƒe 2002 me la, enye Antony ƒe Dumegã. Enye Dziɖuɖumegã le Dukplɔlagã te si kpɔa Gbugbɔgadzɔ ƒe Ðoɖoa dzi wɔwɔ dzi tso December 2008. Le ƒe 2007 me la, Devedjian va zu Hauts-de-Seine ƒe Aɖaŋudeha Gã la ƒe Dukplɔla.

Wodzi Devedjian le Fontainebleau, Seine-et-Marne. Eku le March 29, 2020 dzi le COVID-19 ta le Antony, exɔ ƒe 75.

Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

title: Christian Estrosi
text:
christian Estrosi (wodzi le 1 July 1955) nye Franse dunyahela kple dzokekedola tsã. Enye Nice ƒe dudzikpɔla tso ƒe 2017 me, eye wòwɔ dɔ sia hã tso ƒe 2008 va ɖo ƒe 2016. Enye Provence-Alpes-Côte d’Azur ƒe Nutome Aɖaŋudeha ƒe zimenɔla tso ƒe 2015 va ɖo ƒe 2017. Ewɔ dɔ hã abe Ðoɖowɔwɔ ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ ene ƒe Anyigbamama (ƒe 2005–07), Dutanyigbawo dzi France ƒe Dziɖuɖumegã ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ (ƒe 2007–08) kple Dɔwɔƒewo ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ (ƒe 2009–10).

Estrosi nye dzokekedola bibi aɖe eye wòʋli ho le xexeame katã ƒe ʋiʋli ƒe ɖoƒe le Grand Prix dzokeke duɖimekeke me. Nu nyuitɔ kekeake siwo do tso emee nye be exɔ nɔƒe enelia le ƒe 1978 Franseawo ƒe Hoʋiʋli Gã kple Spaintɔwo ƒe Hoʋiʋli Gã me le ƒe 1979 me.

Wodzi Estrosi le Nice. Eɖe Dominique Estrosi Sassone tso ƒe 1995 va ɖo ƒe 2016. Vi etɔ̃ le esi. Le March 2020 me, le ƒe 2019–20 ƒe coronavirus dɔvɔ̃a me la, wodo Estrosi kpɔ be COVID-19 le eŋu.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Alain Fauré
text:
alain Fauré (1 October 1962 – 12 July 2018) nye Franse dunyahela. Wodzii le Pamiers, France.

Ewɔ dɔ abe Teƒenɔla ene tso ƒe 2012 va ɖo ƒe 2017 eye wònye Les Pujols Dumegã tso ƒe 2001 va ɖo ƒe 2014.

Le 12 July 2018 dzi la, Fauré ku le eƒe aƒeme le Les Pujols, France, esime wòxɔ ƒe 55.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Georges Fontès
text:
georges Fontès (5 September 1924 – 3 March 2020) nye Franse dunyahela. Gbã la, enye Social Democratic Party (PSD) me tɔ, emegbe enye Rally for the Republic (RPR), eye mlɔeba Union for a Popular Movement (UMP) me tɔ. Wodzii le Béziers, France. Enye Béziers ƒe Dumegã tso ƒe 1983 va ɖo ƒe 1989 eye wònye Hérault ƒe Aɖaŋuɖola Gãtɔ tso ƒe 1982 va ɖo ƒe 2015.

Fontès ku le 3 March 2020 esime wòxɔ ƒe 96.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: René Fontès
text:
rené Fontès (11 June 1941 – 17 March 2019) nye Franse kamedefefewɔla kple dunyahela. Enye Top 14 rugby union team Clermont Auvergne ƒe club zimenɔla tso ƒe 2004 va ɖo ƒe 2013. Enye Eygalières commune si le Bouches-du-Rhône ƒe dudzikpɔla hã tso ƒe 2008 vaseɖe eƒe ku le ƒe 2019. Wowɔe Chevalier (Knight) of the Legion ƒe Bubu le ƒe 2011. Wodzii le Saint-Martin-de-Crau, Bouches-du-Rhône.

Fontès ku le dzidɔ ta le March 17, 2019 dzi le Eygalières. Exɔ ƒe 77.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Jean-Claude Fruteau
text:
jean-Claude Fruteau (6 June 1947 – 28 Afɔfiɛ 2022) nye Franse dunyahela. Enye Europa Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ na France ƒe "outre mer" tso ƒe 1999 va ɖo ƒe 2007. Enye Sosialist Dunyaheha me tɔ, si nye Europa Sosialisttɔwo ƒe Habɔbɔ me tɔ. Fruteau nye Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ tso ƒe 2007 vaseɖe ƒe 2017. Enye Saint-Benoît, Réunion ƒe Dumegã hã tso ƒe 2008 vaseɖe eƒe kugbe.

Fruteau ku le 28 April 2022 esime wòxɔ ƒe 74.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Marcel Garrouste
text:
marcel Garrouste (22 Afɔfiɛ 1921 – 5 Afɔfiɛ 2021) nye Franse dunyahela. Enye Sosialist Dunyaheha (PS) me tɔ. Enye Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ tso ƒe 1978 va ɖo ƒe 1986 eye wògaganye tso ƒe 1988 va ɖo ƒe 1993. Enye Penne-d'Agenais ƒe Dumegã hã tso ƒe 1971 va ɖo ƒe 1983. Wodzi Garroust le Trémons, France.

Garroust xɔ ƒe 100 le April 2021 me eye wòku le ɣleti atɔ̃ megbe le 5 September 2021.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: François Geindre
text:
françois Geindre (5 February 1946 – 2 January 2023) nye Franse dunyahela na Sosialist Dunyaheha. Ewɔ dɔ abe Hérouville-Saint-Clair ƒe dudzikpɔla tso ƒe 1971 va ɖo ƒe 2001. Wodzii le Meurthe-et-Moselle.

Geindre ku le 2 Dzove 2023 dzi le Caen. Exɔ ƒe 76.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Hubert Germain
text:
hubert Germain (6 Afɔfiɛ 1920 – 12 Dzove 2021) nye Franse dunyahela. Enye Franseawo ƒe Tsitretsiɖeŋuha me tɔ le Xexemeʋa II me. Eyae nye Ablɔɖehabɔbɔa ƒe zɔhɛ mamlɛtɔ si nɔ agbe. Enye Saint-Chéron ƒe dudzikpɔla le ƒe 1953 kple 1965 dome. Enye Paris ƒe nuto 14 lia teƒenɔla tso ƒe 1962 va ɖo ƒe 1967, tso ƒe 1968 va ɖo ƒe 1972, kple le ƒe 1973 me.

Germain ku le Paris le 12 October 2021 esime wòxɔ ƒe 101.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Jean Germain
text:
jean Germain (11 September 1947 - 7 April 2015) nye Franse sosialist dunyahela. Germain nye l'Université de Tours ƒe zimenɔla tso ƒe 1988 va ɖo ƒe 1993. Le ƒe 1995 me la, woti Germain be manye Tours ƒe dudzikpɔla tso ƒe 1995 me, eye wònye Tours ƒe agglomeration habɔbɔ si nye Tour Plus ƒe zimenɔla.

Germanin wu eɖokui esi wòda tu eɖokui le ta le Tours, France, esime wòxɔ ƒe 67.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Jean-Marie Girault
text:
jean-Marie Girault (9 Dzove 1926 – 1 May 2016) nye Franse dunyahela. Ewɔ dɔ abe Caen ƒe dudzikpɔla tso ƒe 1970 va ɖo ƒe 2001. Enye Franseawo ƒe Demokrasi Habɔbɔ me tɔ. Wodzi Girault le Pont-l’Évêque, France.

Girault ku le Caen, France le May 1, 2016 dzi, esime wòxɔ ƒe 90.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Olivier Giscard d'Estaing
text:
Olivier Giscard d'Estaing (Dzoveve 30, 1927 – Dzove 13, 2021) nye Franse dunyahela. Enye
Xexeame ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe ƒe Kɔmiti ƒe zimenɔla.[1] Enye France Dukplɔla Valéry Giscard d’Estaing nɔviŋutsu.

Giscard d'Estaing ku le Vierzon, France le 13 September 2021, esime wòxɔ ƒe 93.[2]

Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

title: Jean Jacques
text:
Jean-Jacques Annaud (wodzi le 1 October 1943) nye Franse sinima dzikpɔla, sinimawɔla kple sinimawɔla. Wonyae nyuie wu ɖe Quest for Fire (ƒe 1981), The Name of the Rose (ƒe 1986), The Lover (ƒe 1991), kple Seven Years in Tibet (ƒe 1997) dzi kpɔkpɔ ta.

Annaud xɔ kafukafu geɖe ɖe eƒe dɔwɔwɔ ta, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye César Kafukafu ene, David di Donatello ƒe Kafukafu ɖeka, kple Dukɔa ƒe Sinema Suku ƒe Kafukafu ɖeka.[1] Annaud ƒe sinima gbãtɔ, Black and White in Color (ƒe 1976), xɔ Academy Award na Dutagbe me Sinima Nyuitɔ.[2]

Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

title: Anyikpe
text:
Anyikpe alo mud-brick nye brik si wotsɔa ya ƒua gbe, si wotsɔa aŋɔ, anyigbaʋuʋu, ke kple tsi tsakatsaka kple nusi blaa nu abe bli ƒe aŋgba alo gbe ene wɔ. Wonya anyikpewo tso ƒe 9000 D.M.Ŋ., togbɔ be tso ƒe 4000 D.M.Ŋ.

Le nuto siwo me dzoxɔxɔ le si me ati ʋɛ aɖewo koe li woatsɔ ado dzo na dzodoƒe la, zi geɖe la, wotsɔa ŋdɔ ƒua anyikpewo. Le go aɖewo me la, anyikpewɔlawo na anyikpe siwo wotsɔ anyikpe wɔe ƒe agbenɔƒe didi to anyikpe siwo wotɔ dzoe dede wo dzi alo wotsɔ aŋɔ tsyɔ wo dzi me.

Woate ŋu atso anyikpe wɔwɔ kple xɔtutu ƒe ŋutinya le Levant ƒe dzigbe gome tso Do Ŋgɔ na Zemelawo ƒe Kpe Gbadzaɣi A (e.g., PPNA Jericho).Wotsɔ ke, anyi, tsi kple temper enuenu (e.g. gbe kple gbe ƒe alɔ siwo wotso) tsakae, si woyɔna hã be adobe alo mudbrick ko, eye wonye mɔnu/nu si wozãna wu tsɔ tua anyixɔwo le ƒe bliboa me blema Ɣedzeƒe Ʋĩ ƒe akpe geɖe. Wogawɔa anyikpe si me dzo mele o le xexeame katã egbea, eye wozãa egbegbe mɔnuwo kple blema mɔnuwo siaa.

Wotsɔ anyikpewo, wotsɔ anyikpe tu Yerixo ƒe aƒewo le ƒe 9000 D.M.Ŋ. Wogblɔ be ƒe 5200 D.M.Ŋ. Kpeɖodziwo ɖee fia be anyikpe ƒe wɔwɔme si le Tel Tsaf la li ke ƒe 500 ya teti, le Chalcolithic ƒe titinaɣeyiɣia katã me.

Anyiehe Asiatɔ siwo nɔ Mehrgarh tu xɔ siwo wotsɔ anyikpe tu henɔ wo me le ƒe 7000–3300 D.M.Ŋ. Wozã anyikpe siwo wotsɔ anyikpe wɔe le teƒe siwo wu 15 siwo ŋu woka nya ta le be ƒe akpe 3 lia D.M.Ŋ. Le Harappan Tsitsi ƒe ɣeyiɣia me la, wozãa anyikpe siwo wotsɔ dzo wɔe.

Mesopotamiatɔwo zãa anyikpe siwo ŋdɔ ƒuna le woƒe du tutu me;  zi geɖe la, anyikpe siawo nɔa gbadzaa le ete eye woƒoa xlã wo le etame, si woyɔna be plano-convex mud bricks. Wotsɔa aŋe si le dzogoe ene me wɔa ɖewo eye wowɔa wo goglo ale be titina nalo wu nugbɔwo. Wotsɔa anyikpe siwo wotɔ dzoe ƒe mɔ ʋɛ aɖewo tso gli aɖewo ŋu tso woƒe gɔme va ɖo tsidzadza ƒe ka dzi be xɔa ƒe agbenɔƒe nadidi ɖe edzi.

Le Minoa Crete, le Knossos teƒea la, blematomenukulawo ƒe kpeɖodziwo li be wozãa anyikpe siwo wotsɔ ŋdɔ ƒu wɔe le Kpe Gbadzaɣi (do ŋgɔ na ƒe 3400 D.M.Ŋ.).

Anyigbaʋuʋu si wotsɔ ŋdɔ ƒu gbee nye xɔtunu si wozãna wu le blema Egipte le Faraon ƒe ɣeyiɣiwo me eye wowɔa wo le mɔ ma ke nu kloe ƒe akpe geɖe. Anyigbaʋuʋu si tso teƒe aɖewo hiã be woatsɔ ke, gbe si wofli alo nu bubu siwo blaa nu abe lãwo ƒe aɖu ene atsaka kple anyigbaʋuʋua be wòanɔ anyi eteƒe nadidi eye wòazu plastic. Dɔwɔlawo ƒo anyikpe nu ƒu tso Nil-tɔsisia me hekɔe ɖe do aɖe me. Emegbe dɔwɔlawo tu afɔ anyigba esime wole gbe dem eme be aŋɔa nasẽ.[citation needed] Anyigbaʋuʋuawo sɔ le atikewo nu abe ami ene, si na wotsrɔ̃ blema Egiptetɔwo ƒe glikpo geɖe, abe le Edfu ene. Teƒe si wokpɔ ta na nyuie enye Amarna. Anyigbaʋuʋu zazã dzi ɖe edzi le Romatɔwo ƒe ŋusẽkpɔɖeamedziɣi.

Le Blema Helatɔwo ƒe xexeame la, wozãa anyikpe zi geɖe tsɔ tu gliwo, mɔ̃ sesẽwo kple mɔ̃ sesẽwo, abe Troy Mɔ̃ sesẽ (Troy II) ƒe gliwo ene. Zi geɖe la, wotsɔa gbe alo amagbe ƒuƒu wɔa anyikpe siawo.

Djenné ƒe Mosque Gã si le Mali titina lae nye anyikpexɔ gãtɔ kekeake le xexeame. Wotsɔ anyikpe si woyɔna be Banco, tue, abe Saheltɔwo ƒe xɔtuɖaŋu geɖe ene, si nye anyikpe kple nuku ƒe aŋgbawo ƒe nuɖaɖa, wotsɔa ʋuʋudedi, eye wowɔa wo wòzua anyikpe alo wotsɔa wo ƒoa anyigba abe aŋɔ ene abe aŋɔ ene le ʋuʋudedi gbadzawo me. Ele be woagatsɔ aŋɔ sia asisi ɖe eŋu ƒe sia ƒe.
Edzipti

title: Franck Allisio
text:
franck Allisio (wodzi le 4 August 1980) nye Franse dunyahela.

Agbemeŋutinya
Wodzi Allisio le 4 August 1980 le Marseille.
Ewɔ ɖeka kple Roger Karoutchi ƒe dɔwɔƒea be wòakpɔ nyadzɔdzɔgblɔlawo dome
kadodowo dzi. Le ƒe 2012 ƒe dziɖuɖu megbe la, eva ge ɖe Paris Pierre Lellouche
teƒenɔla ƒe ƒuƒoƒoa me.

Dukɔa ƒe Dukplɔla na "Jeunes actifs" le The Republicans, eɖe gbeƒã le September
13, 2015 le Marseille be yeawɔ ɖeka kple Front national.

Woɖoe Marion Maréchal-Le Pen ƒe nutomedɔdzikpɔha ƒe nyanuɖela le Provence-
Alpes-Côte d'Azur.

Le ƒe 2017 me la, Franck Allisio xɔ 19.89% le sewɔtakpekpe ƒe tiatia gbãtɔ me le
Bouches-du-Rhône ƒe nuto 1 lia me, le Marseille

Agbalẽtata
L'Union Européenne ƒe ŋgɔdonya si nye Vive l'Europe ! ISBN 9782841913688 ƒe
xexlẽdzesi

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Boni Yayi
text:
Thomas Boni Yayi, si wodzi le July 1, 1952 le Tchaourou (Benin), nye Benin dunyahela, dukɔa ƒe dukplɔla tso April 6, 2006 vaseɖe April 6, 2016.

Agbemeŋutinya 
Wodzi Thomas Boni Yayi le July 1, 1952 dzi le Moslemtɔwo ƒe ƒome aɖe me le Tchaourou, le dukɔa ƒe dziehe gome. Etso to etɔ̃ me le Benin: Nagot (si tso Yoruba ƒomea me) si fofoa, Peul kple Bariba si le dadaa ƒe akpa dzi.  

Boni Yayi xɔ gaŋutinunya ƒe ɖaseɖigbalẽ le Benin Dukɔa ƒe Yunivɛsiti, exɔ gadzraɖoƒeŋutinunya ƒe ɖaseɖigbalẽ (D.E.S.B) kple ɖaseɖigbalẽ le nusɔsrɔ̃ siwo wozãna me (DEA, ganyawo ƒe tiatia) tso Cheikh Yunivɛsiti -Anta-Diop tso Dakar le Senegal. Exɔ ɖɔkta ƒe ɖaseɖigbalẽ le Orléans Yunivɛsiti le France (ƒe 1986) eye wòxɔ ɖɔkta ƒe dzeside le gaŋutinunya me le Paris IV Dauphine Yunivɛsiti (ƒe 1991). Le ƒe 2009 me la, eva zu ame gbãtɔ si xɔ bubu ƒe ɖɔkta ƒe ɖaseɖigbalẽ le Gaston-Berger Yunivɛsiti si le Saint-Louis le Senegal  . Le ƒe 2013 me la, Paris-Dauphine Yunivɛsiti si le France tsɔ eƒe Sika Medalẽ nɛ tsɔ de bubu eƒe sukudede, dɔwɔwɔ kple dunyahehedɔa ŋu.

Edze eƒe dɔ gɔme le ƒe 1975 me le Benin ƒe Asitsagadzraɖoƒe hafi yi edzi le ƒe 1977 me le Ɣetoɖoƒe Afrika Dukɔwo ƒe Gadzraɖoƒegã ƒe dɔwɔƒegã si me wònɔ ɖoƒe vovovowo le Senegal .

Le ƒe 1994 me la, woɖoe Ɣetoɖoƒe Afrika Ŋgɔyidɔwo ƒe Gadzraɖoƒe (BOAD), si nye nutome gadzikpɔƒe aɖe si le Lomé, Togo, ƒe Dukplɔla. Enɔ ɖoƒe sia vaseɖe ƒe 2006. Le eƒe zimenɔɣi eve siwo wònɔ BOAD ƒe tatɔ me la, Yayi kpɔ dzidzedze le Gadzraɖoƒea ƒe dɔdzikpɔkpɔ ƒe ɖoɖo yeye wɔwɔ me eye wòhe gomenɔla yeyewo vɛ le xexeame katã (India, China, kple bubuawo), si na be ŋgɔyiyidɔwo va le dzidzim ɖe edzi le dukɔ 8 siwo nye Benin, Burkina Faso, Côte d’Ivoire, Guinea Bissau, Mali, Niger, Senegal kple Togo.

alẽkplɔlawo ƒe subɔsubɔdɔ 
Ezu Pentekostetɔ le ƒe 1994 me, emegbe enye sɔlemehakplɔla le Assemblies of God sɔlemeha aɖe me le Gbèdjromédé le Cotonou  ,  .

Dukɔa ƒe Dukplɔlanyenye 
Thomas Boni Yayi nye ame si di be yeaxɔ Benin ƒe dukplɔla ƒe tiatia le ƒe 2006 me, eye habɔbɔwo kple dunyaheha suewo ƒe habɔbɔ aɖe do alɔe. Eƒe catchphrase enye "Ateŋu atrɔ!" Atrɔ ! Ele be wòatrɔ! "." Ɣetoɖoƒe Afrika Ŋgɔyidɔwo ƒe Gadzraɖoƒe (BOAD) ƒe zimenɔla fifia, Boni Yayi ɖe eɖokui fia be yenye Forces Cauris habɔbɔ ƒe ŋgɔnɔla na Benin (FCBE) si le dodom. Enye ame 26 siwo di be yewoaxɔ Dukplɔla ƒe ɖoƒea dometɔ ɖeka .

Le March 5, 2006 dzi la, eɖu dzi le ŋgɔdonya gbãtɔ me kple ame 35.6% ƒe akɔdada. Le March 19 lia dzi, le ŋgɔdonya evelia me la, eɖu dzi le tiatiawɔƒea kple 74.5% ɖe Adrien Houngbédji ŋu  .

Boni Yayi ƒe zimenɔɣi gbãtɔ abe Benine ƒe dukplɔla ƒe tatɔ ene vevietɔe nye ga sue siwo wona nyɔnuwo, vidzidɔ femaxee, nyɔnuviwo ƒe sukudede femaxee, xexeame katã ƒe lãmesẽnyawo ŋuti nugblẽfexeɖoɖo (RAMU) kple mɔdodowo ƒe xɔtuɖoɖowo ƒe nyonyo .

Boni Yayi nye Sahel-Sahara Dukɔwo ƒe Habɔbɔ (CEN-SAD) ƒe zimenɔla tso June 2008 va ɖo June 2009.

Le April 2011 me la, wogatia Boni Yayi be wòanye Benin ƒe tatɔ kple 53.14% ƒe akɔdada le ŋgɔdonya gbãtɔ me tsɔ tsi tre ɖe Adrien Houngbédji, si nye Union fait la Nation ƒe habɔbɔ ƒe ametiakɔdala ŋu.

Le dukplɔla ƒe ɖoƒea megbe 
Le ƒe 2016 me la, woɖo Yayi ɖe UNESCO ƒe Agbeme Nusɔsrɔ̃ Dɔwɔƒe ƒe Dziɖuha me. ECOWAS kple Afrika Dukɔwo ƒe Habɔbɔ bia eƒe demokrasi nuteƒekpɔkpɔ zi geɖe tso ƒe 2016. Enye Afrika Dukɔwo ƒe Habɔbɔ ƒe tiatiawɔnyawo dzikpɔha ƒe tatɔ le Equatorial Guinea le April 2016 me eye le Mali le July 2018 me, eye wònye ECOWAS ƒe ŋkuléleɖenuŋudɔdzikpɔha ƒe Tatɔ le dukplɔla ƒe tiatiawɔɣi le Cape Verde le October 2016 me kple le Senegal le March 2019 me.

Ele nubabla si nye Forces Cauris for an Emerging Benin (FCBE) hã ƒe tatɔ, si wòɖo.  Le June 23, 2019 dzi, esi wòkpɔ kpovitɔwo ɖe to ɖe eƒe nɔƒe ɣleti eve sɔŋ, eye wòva zu tsitretsiɖeŋula na Patrice Talon si va xɔ ɖe eteƒe la, edzo le dukɔa me, le ŋutasẽdziɖuɖu ƒe ʋuʋu kple tsitretsiɖeŋula bubuwo ƒe aboyomenɔnɔ ƒe nɔnɔme me.  .

Le July 2022 me la, woɖo Thomas Boni Yayi ECOWAS ƒe domenɔla le Guinea.

Ame ŋutɔ ƒe agbenɔnɔ 
Eɖe Chantal de Souza eye wòdzi vi atɔ̃

Nukpɔƒe

Nyati siwo do ƒome kplii 
 Nyatakakadzraɖoƒe si dziɖuɖua da asi ɖo

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo
