title: Abdoulatifou Aly
text:
abdoulatifou Aly(12 April 1960 – 26 June 2020) nye Franse dunyahela si wodzi le Malagasy. Enye France Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ tso ƒe 2007 vaseɖe esime wòbu le eƒe tiatia ake me le ƒe 2012. Enye Mayotte ƒe Ŋgɔyiyi Habɔbɔ me tɔ. Wodzi Aly le Antsiranana, Madagascar.

Aly ku le kɔdzi le 26 June 2020 le Mamoudzou, Mayotte esime wòxɔ ƒe 60.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Michel Aurillac
text:
michel Aurillac (11 July 1928 – 6 July 2017) nye Franse senyala, dunyahela kple agbalẽŋlɔla. Ewɔ dɔ abe Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ na Indre tso ƒe 1978 va ɖo ƒe 1981, eye le ƒe 1986. Enye Nuwɔwɔ aduadu ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla tso ƒe 1986 va ɖo ƒe 1988. Eɖu dzi le ƒe 1987 ƒe Prix Narcisse Michaut me tso Académie française.

Aurillac ku le 6 July 2017 le Indre, France esime wòxɔ ƒe 88.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Audrey Azoulay
text:
audrey Azoulay (Fransegbe me nyayɔyɔ: [o.dʁɛ a.zu.lɛ]; wodzii le 4 August 1972) nye Franse dunyahela. Enye France ƒe Dekɔnuwo ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla tso ƒe 2016 va ɖo ƒe 2017.

Wotiae le October 13, 2017 dzi eye le November 10, 2017 dzi la, woɖoe Dukɔ Ƒoƒuawo ƒe Sukudede, Dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya kple Dekɔnuwo Habɔbɔ (UNESCO) ƒe Dɔdzikpɔlagã, eye wòzu nyɔnu evelia si nye habɔbɔa ƒe ŋgɔnɔla.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Claude Goasguen
text:
Claude Goasguen (12 March 1945 – 28 May 2020) nye Franse dunyahela. Enye Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ na Paris tso ƒe 1993 va ɖo ƒe 1995 me eye wòganye tso ƒe 1997 me vaseɖe eƒe ku le ƒe 2020. Enye Republicantɔwo me tɔ.

Le ɣeyiɣi kpui aɖe me la, enye dukɔa ƒe ɖɔɖɔɖo, dziɖuɖu ƒe ɖoɖo ɖe amewo ƒe ɖoƒewo kple dumevinyenye ƒe dziɖuɖumegã le ƒe 1995 me le Dukplɔlagã Alain Juppé ƒe kpɔkplɔ te.

Goasguen ku le May 28, 2020 dzi le Issy-les-Moulineaux, France tso Covid-19, si xɔ ƒe 75.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Patrick Strzoda
text:
patrick Strzoda (Fransegbe me: [patʁik stʁɔda]; wodzii le January 5, 1952) nye dɔwɔlawo ƒe amegã si le Emmanuel Macron ƒe Élysée Fiasã me fifia. Strzoda nye Franseawo ƒe Ha-fiavi si le Andorra teƒenɔla fifia.

Woate ŋu ana nyati kpui sia si ku ɖe ame alo amewo ƒe ƒuƒoƒo aɖe ŋu nadidi wu. Àte ŋu akpe ɖe Wikipedia ŋu ne ètsɔe kpe ɖe eŋu.

title: Jean-Claude Paye
text:
jean-Claude Paye (wodzi le 26 August 1934) nye Franse dunyahela. Enye Ganyawo ƒe Nuwɔwɔ aduadu kple Ŋgɔyiyi Habɔbɔ (OECD) ƒe Agbalẽŋlɔlagã tso ƒe 1984 va ɖo ƒe 1996.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Jean Peyrelevade
text:
jean Peyrelevade (wodzi le 24 October 1939 le Marseille), nye Franse dziɖuɖudɔwɔla, dunyahela kple asitsalagã.

Agbemeŋutinya
Eɖea eɖokui fiana ɣesiaɣi be yenye titina miame ŋutsu.

Woɖoe le ƒe 1981 me be wòanye Pierre Mauroy ƒe dɔwɔlawo ƒe amegã teƒenɔla kple Dukplɔlagã ƒe ganyawo ŋuti aɖaŋuɖola, eye wòkpɔa dukɔmevinyenye dzi, evɔ wògblɔna be yeke ɖi le woƒe ɖetsɔleme ŋu.

Ganyawo ŋuti nufiala ɣeyiɣi didi aɖe le École Polytechnique, eye wòŋlɔ agbalẽ siwo ƒo nu tso egbegbe kapitalist-dziɖuɖu ƒe tɔtrɔ ŋu, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye Le capitalism total si wota to susuŋutinunyalawo ƒe habɔbɔ si nye La République des idées dzi le ƒe 2005. Esi wòƒo nu tsi tre ɖe kapitalist-dziɖuɖu ƒomevi aɖe si gbɔ eme ŋu le agbalẽ sia me la, edo susua ɖa be xe mɔ ɖe gaxɔmenu siwo woate ŋu aƒle nu abe dɔdzikpɔlawo ƒe fexexe ƒe akpa aɖe ene be woaƒo asa na viɖewo ƒe masɔmasɔ eye woana ga si nyo wu gomenɔla siwo li fifia be woatsɔ aɖo seɖoƒe na ga si woakpɔ tso ga si wosusuna le ɣeyiɣi vovovowo me.

Eʋlia nya be Francois Bayrou le France dukplɔla ƒe tiatia me le ƒe 2007 me, eye wòva ge ɖe eƒe akɔdadaha me, vevietɔ be yeakpɔ ganyawo ƒe ɖoɖoa gbɔ.[1] Le ƒe 2008 me, le dudzikpɔƒe ƒe tiatiawɔɣi la, exɔ ŋgɔ na MoDem ƒe ŋkɔwo le Paris ƒe nuto 16 lia me, si ƒoa ame 8.64% nu ƒu le ŋgɔdonya gbãtɔ me, eye wòxɔ nɔƒe enelia.[2] Ðeko wotiae le eƒe ŋkɔwo me, eye wònye nuto me aɖaŋuɖola. June 13, 2008 dzi la, woɖoe MoDem ƒe zimenɔla ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ si kpɔa ganyawo gbɔ. Eɖe asi le dɔ ŋu le Paris ƒe nuto 16 lia ƒe dɔdzikpɔha me le January 6, 2009 dzi eye wòɖe asi le eƒe dɔwo katã ŋu le MoDem me le ɣeyiɣi ma ke me. Kadodo aɖeke megale eŋu le akpaɖekedzimademade me o ke boŋ enye Terra Nova (nuŋububu ƒe habɔbɔ), si nye miametɔwo ƒe susuŋutinunyalawo ƒe habɔbɔ me tɔ veviedonula.

Le nukpɔsusu aɖe si wota ɖe Le Figaro me la,[3] eʋli vovototodedeameme le gadzraɖoƒe ƒe gadede kple gadodo ƒe gadzraɖoƒe dome be woawɔ ɖoɖo ɖe ganyawo ŋu be woaxe mɔ ɖe gakuxi bubu nu. Egblɔ be gadzraɖoƒea nye dukɔa ƒe dɔwɔƒe ŋutɔŋutɔ, si dzi wòle be woakpɔ nenema.

Le 7 September 2011 dzi la, egblɔ be yeado alɔ François Hollande ƒe ametiakɔdada na France Socialist Party ƒe dukplɔla ƒe ŋgɔdonya, 2011. Le MoDem ƒe dzomeŋɔli sukuwo me le September 17th 2011 dzi kple le radio dzi gbebiamewo me la, Jean Peyrelevade gblɔ be yeada akɔ na Manuel Valls le gbãtɔ me ƒoƒo kple - ɖewohĩ - na Francois Hollande le ƒoƒo evelia me.[4] Jean Peyrelevade de dzesii na Manuel Valls be dunyahehe me mesɔ o ƒe nɔnɔme ne eƒo nu tso "gaƒoƒo 35" ŋu be enye vodada gã aɖe si dzi wòle be míatrɔ ɖo.[5] Le January 5, 2012 dzi la, egblɔ be yetrɔ yeƒe susu "Bayrou ƒe nuƒoƒo sɔ wu, eme kɔ wu".[6] Enye François Bayrou ƒe akɔdada ƒe aɖaŋu me tɔ eye wògblɔ be míehiã na fetu si sɔ ƒe ɣeyiɣi aɖe be míagbugbɔ Franseawo ƒe hoʋiʋli ƒe ŋutete aɖo anyi.[7]

Hehe
École ƒe Mɔ̃ɖaŋununya (ƒe 1958) .
École nationale de l’aviation civile (ƒe 1961) Ƒe 1961 ƒe ɣleti gbãtɔ me.
Paris-Sorbonne Yunivɛsiti (ƒe 1963)
Dunyahehewo ƒe Dɔwɔƒe si le Paris (ƒe 1963) .
Agbalẽwo ƒe xexlẽdzesiwo
Klɔ un capitalisme nunya, ed. Grasset, ƒe 1993 me
La république silencieuse, (kple Denis Jeambar), si wota. Plon, ƒe 2002
Le kapitalisme bliboa, ed. Seuil, ƒe 2005, ISBN 978-2020829328
Seul ŋkume à la dzɔdzɔenyenye américaine, ed. Plon, ƒe 2007
Sarkozy : l’erreur ŋutinyagbalẽ, ed. Plon, ƒe 2008
France, etat ɖeklemiɖeɖe, ed. Plon, ƒe 2011
Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

title: Brune Poirson
text:
brune Poirson (wodzi le 1 September 1982) nye Franse dunyahela si wodzi le Amerika. Enye Dukɔa ƒe Agbalẽŋlɔla na Dziɖuɖumegã si kpɔa Nu gbagbewo ƒe Agbenɔnɔ Kple Amewo Katã ƒe Tɔtrɔ gbɔ tso ƒe 2017 me.

Le March 14, 2020 dzi la, Poirson nye France dziɖuɖumegã evelia si wodo kpɔ be COVID-19 le eŋu.[1]

Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

title: Bernard Pons
text:
Bernard Pons (18 July 1926 – 27 April 2022) nye Franse dunyahela kple atikewɔla. Enye Demokrasitɔwo ƒe Dukɔwo ƒe Habɔbɔ me tɔ tso ƒe 1971 va ɖo ƒe 1976 me eye wònye Dukɔa ƒe Akpahaa me tɔ le emegbe. Enye Ʋuɖonyawo Gbɔkpɔla tso ƒe 1995 vaseɖe ƒe 1997. Enye aɖaŋuɖola na Union na amehawo ƒe habɔbɔ aɖe vaseɖe ƒe 2008 me le eƒe dzudzɔxɔxɔ le dunyahehe me le ƒe 2002 me megbe. Pons hã nye Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ tso ƒe 1997 vaseɖe ƒe 2002. Wodzi Pons le Béziers, France.

Pons ku le April 27, 2022 dzi le Aigues-Mortes, France esime wòxɔ ƒe 95.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Jean-Luc Préel
text:
Jean-Luc Préel (30 October 1940 – 3 September 2015) nye Franse dunyahela. Enye Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ tso ƒe 1988 vaseɖe ƒe 2012. Enɔ Vendée dɔwɔƒea teƒe, eye wònye Titina Yeyea me tɔ. Wodzii le Caen.

Préel ku le 3 September 2015 le La Roche-sur-Yon, esime wòxɔ ƒe 74.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Adrien Quatennens
text:
Adrien Quatennens (wodzi le 23 May 1990 le Lille, France) nye Franse dunyahela. Enye Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe teƒenɔla tso ƒe 2017. Enye miameha si nye La France Insoumise ƒe ɖoɖowɔla hã tso ƒe 2019. Zi geɖe la, ewɔa dɔ kple akpaa ƒe ŋgɔnɔla Jean-Luc Mélenchon.

Agbe kple dɔwɔɖui

Agbenɔnɔ le ɖevime
Wodzi Adrien Quatennens le ƒe 1990. Fofoa nye dɔwɔƒe aɖe ƒe amegã le ŋusẽdɔwɔƒe. Dadaa nye nudzrala.

Quatennens va tsɔ ɖe le dunyahehe me esime wòxɔ ƒe 15 le ƒe 2006 me, esime wowɔ ʋunyaʋunyawɔwɔ gãwo tsɔ tsi tre ɖe dɔwɔse yeye aɖe ŋu le France. Ege ɖe dɔmenyohabɔbɔwo me be yeakpe ɖe aƒemanɔsitɔwo ŋu eye ​​wòva zu Attac habɔbɔa me tɔ. Le ƒe 2006 me la, exɔ suku kɔkɔ ƒe ɖaseɖigbalẽ le Katolikotɔwo ƒe suku kɔkɔ aɖe me le Bondues, Nord. Edze gaŋutinunya sɔsrɔ̃ gɔme le Lille Yunivɛsiti gake edo kpo dodokpɔwo le ƒe evelia me. Emegbe exɔ mɔ̃ɖaŋu ŋuti ɖaseɖigbalẽ eye ​​wòwɔ dɔ abe asisiwo ƒe aɖaŋuɖola ene na ŋusẽdɔwɔƒe si nye EDF.

Dɔwɔɖui le dunyahehe me
Quatennens do alɔ Jean-Luc Mélenchon le ƒe 2008 me. Ege ɖe eƒe dunyaheha si nye Miameha me le ƒe 2013 me.[9] Eva zu akpahaa ƒe dukɔa ƒe habɔbɔ me tɔ le ƒe 2015 me. Wo kple Ugo Bernalicis nye Miameha ƒe nutoa me agbalẽŋlɔla le Nord dɔwɔƒea. Edo alɔ Mélenchon le ƒe 2012 kple 2017 ƒe dukplɔla ƒe tiatia me.

Enye ame si di be yeaxɔ ɖoƒe le ƒe 2014 ƒe dudzikpɔƒe ƒe tiatia me le Lille hena Miametɔwo ƒe ŋkɔwo. Wometiae o. Ege ɖe habɔbɔ yeye si nye La France Insoumise me le February 2016 me.

Le ƒe 2017 me la, wotiam be manye teƒenɔla (Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ) na Nord ƒe nuto 1 lia. Exɔ ame 50.11 le alafa me le tiatia la ƒe akpa evelia me. Eva zu Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe ƒe Hadomegbenɔnɔ Ŋuti Kɔmiti me tɔ. Eda asi ɖe Franseawo ƒe dɔwɔsewo ƒe ɖɔɖɔɖo si wowɔ le ƒe 2017 me dzi. Edi be dzobibi nazu dɔmedɔléle le se nu. Quatennens nye Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpea ƒe France–Greece kple France–Denmark xɔlɔ̃wɔwɔhawo ƒe zimenɔla teƒenɔla hã.

Le June 22, 2019 dzi la, Quatennens va zu La France Insoumise ƒe ɖoɖowɔla.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: El-Hadj Bonfoh Abass
text:
el-Hadj Bonfoh Abass (/boʊnˈfoʊ ɑːbˈæs/ (odio nuƒola ƒe nɔnɔmetatawo se); 23 November 1948[1] – 29/30 June 2021) nye Togo dunyahela. Enye Togo ƒe Dukplɔla hena ɣeyiɣi aɖe tso February 25, 2005 vaseɖe May 4, 2005. Enye Togo Dukɔa ƒe
Sewɔtakpekpe ƒe Dukplɔla tso February 2005 va ɖo July 2013.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Emmanuel Bodjollé
text:
emmanuel Bodjollé (wodzi le ƒe 1928 me) nye Togo dunyahela. Enye Aglãdzeha si
me ame enyi le si mu Togo Dukplɔla Sylvanus Olympio ƒe dziɖuɖua le January 13,
1963 dzi la ƒe Zimenɔla.[1] Enye Togo ƒe Dukplɔla hena ɣeyiɣi aɖe le January 1963 me ŋkeke eve.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Yawovi Madji Agboyibo
text:
yawovi Madji Agboyibo (31 December 1943[1] – 30 May 2020) nye Togo dunyahela.
Enye Togo ƒe Dukplɔlagã tso September 2006 va ɖo December 2007. Enye Dukɔa
ƒe Dukplɔla le Action Committee for Renewal (CAR), si nye tsitretsiɖeŋu dunyaheha
aɖe, tso ƒe 1991 va ɖo ƒe 2008.

Eku le Paris le 30 May 2020 le ɣeyiɣi kpui aɖe ƒe dɔléle megbe, esime wòxɔ ƒe 76.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Victoire Sidémého
text:
victoire Sidémého Dzidudu Dogbé Tomegah (wodzi le 23 December 1959) nye
Togo dunyahela si nye Togo ƒe Dukplɔlagã tso 28 September 2020. Eyae nye nyɔnu
gbãtɔ si xɔ dɔa.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Marilyn Priscilla Johnson
text:
marilyn Priscilla Johnson (wodzi le June 19, 1922) nye Amerika dunyahela. Enye
United States ƒe Dudɔnunɔla le Togo tso ƒe 1978 vaseɖe ƒe 1981.  Dukplɔla Jimmy Carter ye tiae.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Fambaré Ouattara Natchab
text:
Fambaré Ouattara Natchaba (17 Afɔfiɛ 1945[1] – 15 Afɔfiɛ 2020) nye Togo dunyahela. Enye Togo Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe ƒe Dukplɔla tso September 2000 va ɖo February 2005. Enye Togo Dukɔa ƒe Takpekpe (RPT) me tɔ. Tso ƒe 1994 va ɖo la, enye Dutanyawo Gbɔkpɔha ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla.
Natchaba ku le 15 October 2020 esime wòxɔ ƒe 75.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Patricia McMahon Hawkins
text:
patricia McMahon Hawkins (ƒe 1949 – October 6, 2021) nye Amerika
dunyahela. Ewɔ dɔ le United States Dukɔa ƒe Dɔwɔƒe. Enye United States ƒe
Dudɔnunɔla le Togo tso ƒe 2008 va ɖo ƒe 2011 me le George W. Bush kple Barack Obama ƒe dukplɔɣi.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Gérard Latortue
text:
gérard Latortue (wodzi le 19 June 1934) nye Haiti dunyahela kple dutadɔnunɔla.
Enye Haiti ƒe dukplɔlagã tso March 12, 2004 va ɖo June 9, 2006.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Hershel Wayne Gober
text:
Hershel Wayne Gober (wodzi le December 21, 1936 nye dziɖuɖumegã tsã eye wònye Vietnam-ʋawɔla veviedonula. Ewɔ dɔ abe United States ƒe Asrafomegãwo
ƒe Nyawo Gbɔkpɔla ƒe ɖoƒenɔla (VA) zi eve le Clinton ƒe dziɖuɣi. Zi gbãtɔ tso July 1, 1997 vaseɖe January 2, 1998 dzi le Agbalẽŋlɔla Jesse Brown ƒe asiɖeɖe le dɔ ŋu kple Togo D. West, Jr. ɖoɖo be wòanye Agbalẽŋlɔla ƒe ɖoƒenɔla dome. Zi evelia va le July 25, 2000 dzi eye wònɔ anyi vaseɖe January 20, 2001 dzi le Agbalẽŋlɔla West ƒe asiɖeɖe le dɔ ŋu megbe; fifia ya Gober subɔ le ɖoƒea vaseɖe Clinton ƒe dukplɔlanyenye ƒe nuwuwu.

Edze dɔ gɔme le VA abe Agbalẽŋlɔla ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ ene, eye wòwɔ dɔ tso February
4, 1993 vaseɖe August 10, 2000. Gober nye Agbalẽŋlɔla si woɖo hã, esime
Clinton yɔe le July 31, 1997 dzi be wòaxɔ ɖe Jesse Brown teƒe. Gake woɖe asi le
ameɖoɖoa ŋu hafi Sewɔtakpekpea dze afɔɖeɖe gɔme. Ema dzɔ le October 27 lia dzi le ƒe ma ke me.

Le eƒe Agbalẽŋlɔla ƒe ɣeyiɣi me la, Gober nɔ ŋgɔ na amedɔdɔ aɖe si zɔ mɔ yi
Vietnam be yewoadze agbagba adi nyatakaka tso aʋawɔla veviedola siwo bu le
afima ŋu. Ewɔ dɔ hã be yeana lãmesẽnyawo nanyo ɖe edzi eye yeawɔ atikewɔƒe geɖe na aʋawɔla veviedola.

Hafi Gober nasubɔ le VA la, enye Arkansas Asrafomegãwo ƒe Nyawo Gbɔkpɔƒe ƒe
Dɔdzikpɔla tso January 4, 1988 vaseɖe February 4, 1993 le Dukplɔla Clinton ƒe ɣeyiɣi si nye Dudzikpɔla.

Le Vietnam la
Gober subɔ tsaɖiɖi eve le Vietnam. Ewɔ dɔ kple Amerikatɔwo/Vietnamtɔwo ƒe
ƒuƒoƒo aɖe si wɔa Vietnamtɔwo ƒe hawo hã. Emegbe le ƒe 1969 me la, ewɔ nuvevii esime wònɔ dɔ wɔm abe dɔwɔƒea ƒe amegã ene.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Albert Edward Baharagate
text:
albert Edward Baharagate (wodzi le 25 February 1930), nye Uganda Roma Katoliko nunɔla si subɔ abe Bisiɔp le Roma Katoliko Nutoa me le Hoima. Woɖoe bisiɔp le Hoima le 7 July 1969 dzi eye wòɖe asi le dɔ ŋu le 9 March 1991.

Nusiwo dzɔ va yi kple nunɔlanyenye
Wodzi Baharagate le February 25, 1930 dzi, le Nyamigisa Kɔƒe me, le egbegbe Masindi Nutome, le Bunyoro nuto sue me, le Uganda ƒe Ɣetoɖoƒenutome. Woɖoe nunɔla le December 7, 1958 dzi.

Abe bisiɔp ene
Woɖoe Hoima ƒe Bisiɔp le July 7, 1969 dzi eye Papa Paul VI† tsɔe ɖo bisiɔp le Hoima le August 1, 1969 dzi, eye Bisiɔpgã Sergio Pignedolit, Titular Archbishop of Iconium kple Bisiɔpgã Emmanuel Kiwanuka Nsubuga†, Kampala ƒe Saɖaganutomegã ƒe Bisiɔpgã kpe ɖe eŋu. ƒe xexlẽme.

Le March 9, 1991 dzi la, Baharagate ɖe asi le Hoima ƒe Bisiɔp nyenye ŋu. Tso July 2019 me la, egale agbe abe Bisiɔp Emeritus le Hoima ene.

Tabla si kplɔ wo nɔewo ɖo
Do ŋgɔ na
Cipriano Biyehima Kihangire (ƒe 1965 - ƒe 1968)
Hoima ƒe Bisiɔp
1969 - 1991 Exɔ ɖe eteƒe le
Deogratias Muganwa Byabazaire (ƒe 1991 - Ƒe 2014) Ƒe 1991 - Ƒe 2014

Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

title: Islam Behery
text:
islam Behery (Arabgbe me: إسلام بحيري), si wodzi le ƒe 1974 me le Siflaq, Sohag Nutome, nye Egiptetɔ agbalẽŋlɔla eye wònye With Islam on Al-Kahera Wel Nas ƒe wɔnawo dzikpɔla. Le November 5, 2018 dzi la, edze ɖoɖo yeye aɖe gɔme, "Islam Hurr" le Alhurra.

Le April 2015 me la, Al-Behairy zã eƒe ɖoɖoa tsɔ bia be woawɔ ɖɔɖɔɖo le Islam me to vlododo Islam ƒe agbalẽnyala xɔŋkɔwo me eye wògblɔ be fatwa geɖewo mesɔ o eye mele be amewo naxɔ fatwa tso agbalẽnyalagãwo gbɔ o eye ele be woayi Qur’an dzi tẽ gɔ̃ hã manɔmee esi wòle be woasrɔ̃ sidzedze si hiã la, gbedasi aɖe si Al-Azhar Yunivɛsiti bu fɔe be enye vlododo Islam. Al Kahera tɔ te eƒe ɖoɖoa tegbee. Wolée, wotsɔ nya ɖe eŋu be edo vlo Islam, wobu fɔe, eye wotso afia nɛ be wòanɔ gaxɔ me ƒe atɔ̃. Al-Behairy tsɔ nya ɖe tohehea ŋu gake ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe aɖe gbe nyagbugbɔgadrɔ̃a le October me. Gake le December me la, ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe aɖe ɖe eƒe tohehea dzi kpɔtɔ va ɖo ƒe ɖeka ƒe gaxɔmenɔnɔ, eye ​​emegbe Egipte ƒe Dukplɔla, Abdel Fattah el-Sisi, tsɔe ke.

Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo
 "Wodzudzɔ Islam al-Behairy ƒe ɖoɖo si ŋu nyaʋiʋliwo nɔ". Al Masry Al Youm to Egipte Independent dzi. Afɔfiɛ 23, 2015.
 "Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒea gbe nyagbugbɔgadrɔ̃ si Islam Al-Behairy tsɔ ɖe ƒe 5 ƒe tohehe le busunyagbɔgblɔ ta". El Balad ƒe agbalẽ. October 10, 2015. Woɖee tso gbãtɔa me le April 13, 2016. Woɖee tso December 30, 2015.
 "Egypt de Moslem agbalẽnyala gaxɔ me le esi wòdo vlo Islam ta". AFP to The Express Tribune dzi. Dzove 29, 2015. Eƒe dukɔ nye […]
 "Egypt de Moslem agbalẽnyala gaxɔ me le esi wòdo vlo Islam ta". Yahoo.com ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒea. December 29, 2015. Woxɔe le April 1, 2016.
 "Egypt ƒe osɔfowo le tsitre tsim ɖe dukplɔla ƒe yɔyɔ be woawɔ Islam yeyee ŋu". Ganyawo Ŋuti Nunyala. Dzove 16, 2017. Woxɔe le February 18, 2017.

title: Atanasio Amisse Canira
text:
atanasio Amisse Canira (wodzi le May 2, 1962 le Mossoril, Nampula Nutome) nye Mozambique nunɔla, Lichinga ƒe Bisiɔp. Woɖoe le December 12, 1993 dzi be wòanye Ðoɖo Kɔkɔewo ƒe sakrament na Nacala saɖaganutoa. Le February 8, 2015

dzi la, Papa Francis ɖoe Lichinga ƒe Bisiɔp, eye Nacala ƒe Bisiɔp, Germano Grachane, Xai-Xai ƒe Bisiɔp, Lucio Andrice Muandula, kple Lichinga ƒe Bisiɔp si woɖo ɖi, Elio Giovanni, ɖoe bisiɔp Greselin le March 22 lia dzi.

Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

title: Carion Egiptetɔ
text:
carion Egiptetɔ la nye Egiptetɔ Kristotɔ saɖagaxɔmenɔla si nɔ Scetis, Lower Egypt le ƒe alafa 4 lia me. Enye Dzogbe Fofowo dometɔ ɖeka.

Carion gblẽ srɔ̃a kple via eve ɖi be yeava zu saɖagaxɔmenɔla le Scetis. Viaŋutsue nye Zacharias the Recluse (si wogayɔna be Zacharias of Scetis), amesi wodɔ ɖe Scetis be wòava zu saɖagaxɔmenɔla kple fofoa le dɔwuame aɖe me.

Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

title: Chaeremon
text:
Chaeremon alo Cherimon nye Egiptetɔ Kristotɔ saɖagaxɔmenɔla aɖe si nɔ anyi le ƒe alafa 4 lia kple 5 lia lɔƒo le Nitria Dzogbe si le Lower Egypt. Enye Dzogbe Fofowo dometɔ ɖeka.

Chaeremon nye asrafo si nɔ agado aɖe me. Eƒe gaxɔa didi tso sɔlemexɔ gã si le Nitria gbɔ kilometa 40 eye wòdidi tso tsidzɔƒe gã la gbɔ kilometa 12.

Wobunɛ ame kɔkɔe le Ɣedzeƒe Orthodɔkstɔwo ƒe kɔnyinyi me.

Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

title: Georges Chihane
text:
Georges Chihane (wodzi le May 31, 1953 le Haret Sakhr, Lebanon) nye Maronite Katolikotɔwo ƒe Ha si le Cairo ƒe bisiɔp fifia.

Agbe
Georges Chihane srɔ̃ nu le Gbɔgbɔ Kɔkɔe Yunivɛsiti si le Kaslik eye ​​wòxɔ eƒe nunɔla ƒe ɖoɖo le August 12, 1979 dzi.

Papa Benedict XVI ɖo kpe edzi be woɖoe Cairo ƒe Bisiɔp le June 16, 2012. Maronitetɔwo ƒe Blemafofo si le Antioxia, Bechara Boutros al-Rahi, OMM, tsɔ bisiɔp ƒe ɖoɖoa nae le July 28 lia dzi le ƒe ma ke me; eƒe kpeɖeŋutɔwoe nye Samir Mazloum, Curia Bisiɔp si xɔ dzudzɔ le dɔme le Antioxia, Guy-Paul Noujaim, Curia Bisiɔp si woɖo le Joubbé, Sarba kple Jounieh, Paul Youssef Matar, Beirut ƒe Bisiɔpgã, Francis Némé Baïssari, Kpekpeɖeŋu Bisiɔp si woɖo le Joubbé, Sarba kple Jounieh , Paul Nabil El-Sayah, Antioxia ƒe Bisiɔp Curial, Joseph Mohsen Béchara, Antelias ƒe Bisiɔpgã si woɖo, Simon Atallah, OAM, Baalbek-Deir El-Ahmar ƒe Bisiɔp, François Eid, OMM, Maronitɔwo ƒe Blemafofo si le Fiaɖuƒe Kɔkɔe la ƒe Senyala, Edgard Madi, si nye Nossa Senhora do Líbano em São Paulo ƒe Bisiɔp, kple Michel Aoun, si nye Byblos ƒe Bisiɔp.

Le January 13, 2014 dzi la, Papa Francis Apostolotɔ Amedzro tia Chihane na Maronite nuteƒewɔlawo le Dziehe Afrika dukɔ siwo mele eƒe dziɖuɖu nuto me o me.

Dzɔtsoƒewo
Woɖoe apostolo ƒe amedzro le Fiazikpui Kɔkɔe ƒe Nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe, Gbesiagbe Nyatakakadzraɖoƒe, January 13, 2013

Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

title: Cronius of Nitria
text:
cronius of Nitria (ƒe 285 lɔƒo – ƒe 386 lɔƒo) nye Egiptetɔ Kristotɔ saɖagaxɔmenɔla si nɔ Nitria, Lower Egypt. Enye Dzogbe Fofowo dometɔ ɖeka.

Agbemeŋutinya
Wodzi Cronius le ƒe 285 A.D. lɔƒo. Enɔ saɖagaxɔ aɖe me zi gbãtɔ. Emegbe la, edzo le saɖagaxɔa me va subɔ abe Helagbe me gbegɔmeɖela ene na Anthony Gãtɔ. Emegbe la, Cronius va zu sekewɔla kple nunɔla le Nitria. Eƒe nusrɔ̃lawo dometɔ aɖewoe nye Isak si tso Lãmenugbagbeviwo me. Eku le ƒe 386 A.D lɔƒo.

Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

title: Matthew Hassan Kukah
text:
matthew Hassan Kukah' (wodzi le 31 Dasiamime 1952) nye bisiɔp fifia le Roma Katoliko Saɖaganutome le Sokoto.

Le Dzome 2020 me la, Papa Francis ɖoe be wòanye Dicastery on Integral Human Development me tɔ.

Ðevimenɔɣi kple sukudede
Wodzi Bisiɔp Kukah le efdom dzi le Zangon Kataf nutodziɖuɖu nuto me le Kaduna State. Kukah xɔ eƒe gɔmedzesuku le St. Fidelis Gɔmedzesuku, Zagom, emegbe St. Joseph Sue Seminary, Zaria, hafi yi St. Augustine Major Seminary Jos, Plateau State, afisi wòsrɔ̃ Xexemenunya kple Mawunya le. Woɖo Kukah Katoliko Nunɔla le December 19, 1976. Kukah de Ibadan Yunivɛsiti hã, afisi wòxɔ Subɔsubɔhawo Ŋuti Nusɔsrɔ̃ ƒe ɖaseɖigbalẽ le. Kukah xɔ Mawunyenye ƒe Dzeside hã le Pontifical Urban University, Rome le ƒe 1976 me, eye emegbe wòxɔ master ƒe ɖaseɖigbalẽ le Ŋutifafa Nusɔsrɔ̃ me, le Bradford Yunivɛsiti, United Kingdom le ƒe 1980. Kukah ƒe sukudede wu enu kple PhD le London Yunivɛsiti ƒe School of Ɣedzeƒe kple Afrika Nusɔsrɔ̃ (SOAS) le ƒe 1990 me. Le ɣeyiɣi aɖe si womegblɔ o me la, esrɔ̃ nu le Oxford Yunivɛsiti, le Oxford, le Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, eye wòsrɔ̃ nu le Harvard Yunivɛsiti hã, le Cambridge, Massachusetts, le Greater Boston, le United States.

Le ƒe 1999 kple 2001 dome la, enye Nigeria ƒe Amegbetɔ ƒe Gomenɔamesiwo Dzidada Ŋuti Numekuku Dɔwɔha me tɔ. Tsɔ kpe ɖe dɔ si wòwɔ abe saɖaganunɔla ene le Saint Andrews ƒe saɖagaƒe si le Kakuri, Kaduna tso ƒe 2004 vaseɖe esime woɖoe be wòanye bisiɔp la, enye agbalẽŋlɔla na Dukɔa ƒe Dunyahehe me Ðɔɖɔɖo Takpekpe (ƒe 2005) eye tso ƒe 2005 me la, enye zimenɔla na... Ogoni-Shell ƒe Dzadzraɖo. Gakpe ɖe eŋu la, le ƒe 2007 kple 2009 dome la, ewɔ dɔ le kɔmiti si Nigeria dziɖuɖua ɖo be woawɔ ɖɔɖɔɖo le tiatiawɔblɔɖe me hã me.

This Day News ka nya ta tso Mama Janet Hauwa Kukah, bisiɔp la dada, si wodzi le June, 1934 me si woɖi ɖe Anchuna, Zangon Kataf Nutome Dziɖuɖu Nutoa me, eye ame ŋkuta geɖewo va eye ame bubuwo hã ɖo woƒe babadonamenyawo ɖa.

Previous post(s) Kristo ƒe Sɔlemexɔgã ƒe Sɔlemeha, Lagos ƒe Canon
Alma mater ƒe ŋkɔ
Ijebu Ode Gbeŋutise Suku
Fourah Bay Kɔledzi
London Yunivɛsiti
Seth Irunsewe Kale MBE, OON, CFR (June 6, 1904 – November 19, 1994) nye Nigeria Anglikan bisiɔp si subɔ abe CMS Gbeŋutise Suku, Lagos ƒe Tatɔ tso ƒe 1944 va ɖo ƒe 1950 eye wònye Lagos Bisiɔp tso ƒe 1963 va ɖo ƒe 1974.

Wokɔe bisiɔp le Andrew Kɔkɔe ƒe Ŋkeke dzi (30 November) 1963, to Cecil Patterson, Ɣetoɖoƒe Afrika ƒe Bisiɔpgã gbɔ.[3] Exɔ bubu si nye Afrikatɔ gbãtɔ si ɖe gbeƒã le St Paul ƒe Sɔlemexɔ xɔŋkɔ si le London me.

Agbenɔnɔ le ɖevime
Wodzi Kale be enye ƒome si me ame adre le la ƒe viŋutsu tsitsitɔ le June 6, 1904 dzi le Ipata, Mobalufon, le Odogbolu Nutomedziɖuɖu me le Ogun Nutome. Wogblɔ be edzilawo Pa Jacob & Mama Victoria Kale ye nye Kristotɔ gbãtɔ siwo trɔ dzime le kɔƒea me. Esi wodzii la, wona Yorubagbe me ŋkɔ Irunsewe si gɔmee nye “mí” (esia) “se” (edzɔna); “irun” (naneke kura o). Le June 25, 1904 dzi la, exɔ nyɔnyrɔ kple ŋkɔ Seth.

Susᴐsrɔ̃
Edze eƒe sukudede gɔme le Christ Church Gɔmedzesuku, Porogun, Ijebu-Ode le ƒe 1912 me eye emegbe wòde Ijebu Ode Gbeŋutise Suku. Le ƒe 1931 me kple kpekpeɖeŋu tso Ijebu Ode Gbeŋutise Suku ƒe tatɔ ɣemaɣi, Rev. I.O Ransome-Kuti gbɔ la, Kale va zu ame gbãtɔ si xɔ Mojola Agbebi ƒe ɖaseɖigbalẽ xɔŋkɔa eye woxɔe ɖe Fourah Bay College, Sierra Leone afisi wòxɔ Bachelor ƒe ɖaseɖigbalẽ blibo le ƒe Aɖaŋudɔwo. Le ema megbe la, eyi edzi wɔ ƒe ɖeka bubu si kplɔe ɖo xɔ Mawunyaŋutinunya ƒe Diploma le ƒe 1935. Le ƒe si kplɔe ɖo me la, woxɔe ɖe dɔ me abe nufiala ene le CMS Gbeŋutise Suku, Lagos. Le ƒe 1939 me la, exɔ Sukudede ƒe ɖaseɖigbalẽ le London Yunivɛsiti.

Seth Kale abe amesi xɔ Agbebi ƒe Nusrɔ̃gbalẽ gbãtɔ ene
Dᴐwᴐna
Kale trɔ gbɔ tso London eye woɖoe enumake CMS Gbeŋutisesuku, Lagos, ƒe tatɔ teƒenɔla, ƒe etɔ̃ koe wòxɔ hafi wòva zu Nigeriatɔ gbãtɔ si woɖo sukua ƒe tatɔ le ƒe alafa blaevelia me. Le ƒe 1921 me la, Enye Dukɔa ƒe Nufialawo ƒe Habɔbɔ ɖolawo dometɔ ɖeka, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye Sukudzikpɔla ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ, Jonathan Lucas kple Rev. I.O Ransome-Kuti.[4] Egakpɔtɔ nye sukutatɔ le CMS Gbeŋutise Suku, Lagos esime wòzu saɖaganunɔla le Kristo ƒe Sɔlemeha, Lagos le ƒe 1942 me, woɖoe nunɔla le eƒe saɖaganunɔla ƒe ƒezã dzi le ƒe 1943. Eva zu Nigeriatɔ gbãtɔ si nye sukutatɔ le ɣeyiɣi didi sia me ɖo St. Andrew ƒe Nufialawo ƒe Hehenasuku, Oyo, le ƒe 1951 me.[5] Wogblɔ be ena se kple ɖoɖo gbugbɔ ɖo kɔledzi la me le ƒe geɖe ƒe nazãbubu, vovototodedeameme, kple hadome vovototodedeameme, si ɖe fu na kɔledzi la megbe . Le ƒe 1963 me, le Sɔlemeha ƒe Nunɔlawo ƒe Takpekpe si wowɔ le Toronto me la, woti Bubutɔ Kale be manye Lagos ƒe Bisiɔp eye woɖoe kɔkɔe le November 30, 1963 dzi.

Ame ŋutɔ ƒe agbenɔnɔ
Kale xɔ ƒe blaeve vɔ atɔ̃ esime wòɖe Juliana Oladunni Odukoya, si nye Oluwa Idele si tso Ijebu-Ode ƒe tɔgbuiyɔvi. Wowɔ ɖeka kple srɔ̃tɔawo le srɔ̃ɖeɖe kɔkɔe me le January 6, 1930 dzi le St. Savior’s Church, Italupe, Ijebu-Ode

Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

title: Most Rev. Daniel C. Okoh
text:
most Rev. Daniel C. Okoh nye Kristo Holy Church International, si woyɔna be Dukɔ Tulawo ƒe Dzikpɔlagã, enye Nigeria Kristotɔwo ƒe Habɔbɔ ƒe Dukplɔla ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ tsã, kple Afrika Sɔlemeha Siwo Woɖo Ðe Habɔbɔ ƒe Dukplɔla. Woti Daniel Okoh be wòanye Nigeria Kristotɔwo ƒe Habɔbɔ(CAN) ƒe Dukplɔla le July 2022. CAN nye Kristotɔwo katã ƒe habɔbɔ si le dukɔa me ƒe tatɔ, si me ƒuƒoƒo atɔ̃ le. Eva zu ame gbãtɔ tso OAIC habɔbɔ si le Kristotɔwo ƒe Habɔbɔ si le Nigeria me si xɔ ɖoƒea.

Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

title: Martin Dada Abejide Olorunmolu
text:
martin Dada Abejide Olorunmolu (wodzi le August 30, 1948 le Ogiri-Kabba) nye Nigeria nunɔla kple bisiɔp na Roma Katolikotɔwo ƒe Nutoa me le Lokoja. Woɖoe bisiɔp le ƒe 2005 me.

Kpɔe hã
Katoliko-ha si le Nigeria

Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

title: Emmanuel Nwafor Otteh
text:
emmanuel Nwafor Otteh (1 November 1927 – 27 July 2012) nye Nigeria Roma Katolikotɔwo ƒe sɔlemehakplɔla.

Wodzi Otteh le Nigeria eye woɖoe nunɔlae le ƒe 1961. Ewɔ dɔ abe bisiɔp ƒe ŋkɔ le Cova eye wònye bisiɔp kpeɖeŋutɔ le Roma Katoliko Saɖaganutome si le Onitsha, Nigeria, tso ƒe 1990 va ɖo ƒe 1997 me eye wònye bisiɔp le Roma Katoliko Nutoa me le Issele -Uku, Nigeria, tso ƒe 1997 vaseɖe esime wòxɔ dzudzɔ le dɔme le ƒe 2003 me.

De dzesii

title: Anthony Saliu Sanusi
text:
anthony Saliu Sanusi (2 Dzove 1911 – 8 Dzove 2009) nye Nigeria Bisiɔp le Roma Katoliko Sɔlemeha me.

Wodzi Anthony Sanusi le Iperu, Nigeria le ƒe 1911 me.

Woɖoe nunɔla le December 17, 1944 dzi le Lagos, Nigeria. Woɖoe bisiɔp le Ijebu-Ode saɖaganutome yeye si wowɔ me le May 29, 1969 dzi eye wòxɔ eƒe bisiɔp ƒe adzɔgbeɖeɖe le August 1, 1969. Ekpɔtɔ nye bisiɔp le Ijebu-Ode saɖaganutome vaseɖe esime wòxɔ dzudzɔ le dɔme le ƒe 1990 me.

Kpɔe hã

title: Johnson Suleman
text:
johnson Suleman (wodzi le March 24, 1971) nye Nigeriatɔ nyanyuigblɔla le television dzi eye wònye Omega Fire Ministries International, sɔlemeha si ƒe dɔwɔƒegã le Auchi, Edo State ƒe sɔlemehakplɔla gãtɔ kple dzikpɔlagã. Esi wòwɔ dɔ abe pastɔ ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ ene le Armour of God Sɔlemeha si le Lagos tso ƒe 1998 me vɔ la, edze Omega Dzotsidɔwɔƒe gɔme le ƒe 2004 me.

Egblɔ be ehati Nigeriatɔ sɔlemehakplɔla Enoch Adeboye ye nye yeƒe ‘gbɔgbɔmefofo’.[7]

Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

title: Coray Abbott
text:
ira Woyɔ Coray Abbott be Michigan Afɔzɔlawo ƒe Asrafoha 1 lia ƒe amegã le May 1, 1861 dzi. Eɖe asi le subɔsubɔdɔ si me dzo nɔ ŋu le eɖokui si le August 7, 1861 dzi, gake egage ɖe dɔa me ake le September 12, 1861. Wodoe ɖe ŋgɔ wòzu Asrafomegã le April 28, 1862. Wodoe ɖe ŋgɔ wòzu Asrafomegã le August 30, 1862. Abbott ye nye asrafoha la ƒe amegã le Aʋa la me ƒe Fredericksburg le December 1862 me afisi wòxɔ abi le. Wodoe ɖe ŋgɔ wòzu asrafomegã le March 18, 1863. Le Gettysburg-ʋaa me la, wotsɔ asrafoha la kpe ɖe Aʋafiagã William S. Tilton ƒe asrafoha ŋu; si dze ŋgɔ Dukɔ Ƒoƒuawo ƒe amedzidzedze le Stony Sill nutoa me le July 2, 1863. Le March 13, 1865 dzi la, wodo Abbott ɖe ŋgɔ wòzu brigadier general le "kalẽwɔwɔ kple subɔsubɔdɔ si dze le aʋawɔɣia" ta

Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

title: Joseph "Jo" Abbott
text:
joseph "Jo" Abbott (Dzove 15, 1840 – February 11, 1908) nye Dukɔwo ƒe Habɔbɔ ƒe Asrafowo me tɔ eye wònye United States Teƒenɔlawo ƒe Aƒe me tɔ tso Texas.

Agbemeŋutinya
Wodzi Abbott le January 15, 1840 dzi le Morgan County, Alabama, si te ɖe Decatur ŋu, eye wòde dukɔa ƒe sukuwo. Eʋu kple edzilawo yi Freestone County, Texas, le ƒe 1853 me.

Le Amerika Dukɔmeviʋaa me la, enye asrafomegã gbãtɔ le Texas Sɔdolawo ƒe Asrafoha Wuievelia me. Aʋaa wu enu, egadze eƒe senyawo sɔsrɔ̃ gɔme ake, eye esi wona
mɔɖegbalẽe le October, 1866 me ta la, edze eƒe senyawo gbɔ kpɔkpɔ gɔme le Springfield, Limestone County, Texas.Emegbe eʋu yi Hillsboro, Texas, afisi wòyi eƒe senyawo gbɔ kpɔkpɔ dzi le.

Enye Texas Teƒenɔlawo ƒe Aƒe me tɔ le ƒe 1870 kple 1871 me.[2] Dudzikpɔla Oran M. Roberts tiae nutomeʋɔnudrɔ̃la le ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe ƒe nuto Blaeve vɔ enyilia me. Le ƒe 1880 me la, wotiae be wòaxɔ ƒe ene blibo ɖe ɖoƒe ma ta. Le ƒe 1886 me la, wotiam be wòanye Democrattɔ le United States Teƒenɔlawo ƒe Aƒe me, eye wòsubɔ le ɖoƒe ma vaseɖe Sewɔtakpekpe Blaatɔ̃ vɔ Enelia ƒe nuwuwu le ƒe 1897 me.[3] Esi wòdo le Sewɔtakpekpea me la, egadze eƒe senyawo gbɔ kpɔkpɔ gɔme le Hillsboro, Texas, afisi wòku le le February 11, 1908 dzi.

Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

title: Charles Powell Adams
text:
charles Powell Adams (March 3, 1831 – November 2, 1893 nye Aʋafiagã le Union Army, atikewɔla kple dunyahela.

Charles Powell Adams nye ɖɔkta esime wotiam ɖe Minnesota ƒe anyigbamama ƒe xɔ me le October 14, 1856. Esi dukɔmeviʋaa dze egɔme la, ege ɖe Union asrafoha me abe Kapitan le Minnesota Lɔlɔ̃nu Faa Afɔzɔlawo ƒe Asrafoha 1 lia me. Wodoe ɖe ŋgɔ wòzu major le October 22, 1861 dzi eye wodoe ɖe ŋgɔ wòzu Lieutenant Colonel le ɣleti 11 megbe. Le Gettysburg-ʋaa me la, ekpɔ gome le Minnesota Lɔlɔ̃nu Faa Afɔzɔlawo ƒe Asrafoha 1 lia ƒe amedzidzedzewo me eye tu etɔ̃ de abi eŋu le Aʋafiagã Colvill xa. Esi wòƒo ƒu le May 4, 1864 dzi vɔ la, egaŋlɔ ŋkɔ ɖe Hatch ƒe Asrafoha, Minnesota Lɔlɔ̃nu Faa Sɔdolawo me kple ɖoƒe si nye Asrafomegã. Ewɔ dɔ ɖe Dzieheɣetoɖoƒe Indiatɔwo ŋu. Wotsɔ brevet nɛ be brigadier general le Sept. 5, 1864 dzi eye wòdo le subɔsubɔdɔa me vevie le June 22, 1866 dzi.

Aʋafiagã Adams ku le November 2, 1893 dzi le Vermillion, Minnesota eye woɖii ɖe Hastings.

Kadodo siwo tso egodo

title: Michael Aheam
text:
michael Aheam (alo Ahern) nye Amerikatɔ ƒudzidela si wodzi le Cork County, Ireland le ƒe 1834 lɔƒo si xɔ Bubu ƒe Medalẽ ɖe kalẽwɔwɔ si wòwɔ le Amerika Dukɔmeviʋaa me ta.

Woxɔ Aheam le Queenstown, Ireland le se nu le November 1863 me kpe ɖe ame bubu geɖewo ŋu, eye wòŋlɔ ŋkɔ ɖe United States Ƒudzisrafowo me le se nu tso France. Ewɔ dɔ abe Fetudzikpɔla ƒe Dɔwɔla ene le USS Kearsarge me le eƒe aʋawɔwɔ kple asitsaha si nye CSS Alabama le June 19, 1864 dzi, le Cherbourg, France, ƒuta. Eƒe Bubu ƒe Medalẽ ƒe nyayɔyɔ (si woŋlɔ le December 31, 1864) de dzesii be eƒe aʋalɔgodzikpɔla "kafui vevie" le "ewɔ eƒe dɔwo dzinɔameƒotɔe" eye wòɖe "kalẽwɔwɔ le futɔwo ƒe dzo te" fia kple "fafa kple agbenɔnɔ nyui si dze ƒã" vɔ megbe. Enye Kearsarge ƒudzidela wuiadre siwo xɔ kalẽwɔwɔ ƒe medalẽ le aʋa sia me la dometɔ ɖeka.

Bubu ƒe Medalẽ ƒe nyayɔyɔ
Ðoƒe kple ɖoɖo: Fetudzikpɔla, U.S. Ƒudzisrafowo. Woŋlɔ ŋkɔ ɖe asrafodɔ me le: France. G.O. No.: 45, December 31, 1864, ƒe 1864.

Nyayɔyɔ:

Subɔ le U.S.S. Kearsarge esime wòtsrɔ̃ Alabama-tɔsisia le Cherbourg, France, le June 19, 1864. Esi wònɔ eƒe dɔwo wɔm dzinɔameƒotɔe la, PmS. Aheam ɖe fafa kple agbenɔnɔ nyui si ɖe dzesi fia eye eƒe asrafomegã kafui vevie ɖe kalẽwɔwɔ le futɔwo ƒe tu te ta.

Kpɔe hã
Amerika Dukɔmeviʋa ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe
Agbemeŋutinya ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe
Amerika Dukɔmeviʋa ƒe Bubu ƒe Medalẽ xɔlawo ƒe ŋkɔwo: A–F

Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

title: Christian Albert
text:
christian Albert (June 13, 1842– April 16, 1922) nye Amerika asrafo si xɔ Bubu ƒe Medalẽ ɖe kalẽwɔwɔ ta le Amerika Dukɔmeviʋawɔɣi.

Agbemeŋutinya
Wodzi Christian Albert le Cincinnati, Ohio le ƒe 1842. Esime wònye Ohio Afɔzɔlawo ƒe Asrafoha 47 lia ƒe Aʋawɔha G me la, eɖe dzesi le Vicksburg-ʋa si wowɔ le May 22, 1863 dzi.

Woɖii ɖe Woodlawn Tsiẽƒe le Toledo, Ohio.

Bubu ƒe Medalẽ ƒe nyayɔyɔ
Ðoƒe kple habɔbɔ: Ame ŋutɔ tɔ, Company G, 47th Ohio Infantry. Teƒe kple ŋkeke: Le Vicksburg, Miss., May 22, 1863. Eƒe dukɔ nye […] Dzidzime: Cincinnati, Ohio. Ɣletiŋkeke si dzi woɖee ɖe go: August 10, 1895.

Nyayɔyɔ:

Kalẽwɔwɔ le "lɔlɔ̃nu faa dɔwɔlawo ƒe ahomya ƒe ƒuƒoƒoa" ƒe nyadɔdrɔ̃ me.

Kpɔe hã
Amesiwo xɔ Bubu ƒe Medalẽ ƒe ŋkɔwo
Amerika Dukɔmeviʋa ƒe Bubu ƒe Medalẽ xɔlawo ƒe ŋkɔwo: A–F
Vicksburg ƒe aʋawɔwɔ
Ohio Afɔzɔlawo ƒe Asrafoha 47 lia
De dzesii
 "Dukɔmeviʋa (A-L), Albert, Kristotɔwo ƒe gege ɖe eme". Bubu ƒe Medalẽ xɔxɔlawo. United States Asrafowo ƒe Asrafowo ƒe Ŋutinya Dɔwɔƒe. August 6, 2009. Woxɔe le July 13, 2010. Eƒe dukɔ nye [United States of America].

Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

title: Armstead Milton Alexander
text:
armstead Milton Alexander (May 26, 1834 – November 7, 1892) nye kluvi tɔ[1] kple senyala si subɔ abe United States Teƒenɔlawo ƒe Aƒe me tɔ ene tso Missouri.

Wodzii le Winchester, Kentucky, eye emegbe wòwu Bethany Kɔledzi nu. Le ƒe 1848 lɔƒo la, eʋu yi Paris, Missouri, nutoa me be yeava zu gaŋudɔwɔla. Le ƒe 1849 me la, eva ge ɖe California ƒe sika didi me, eye wòtrɔ yi Paris, Missouri, emegbe be yeaƒo ye ɖokui ɖe asitsatsa me. Le Amerika Dukɔmeviʋaa me la, enɔ Dukɔwo ƒe Ðekawɔha la ƒe akpa dzi, eye wòsubɔ le Dukɔwo ƒe Ðekawɔha ƒe Asrafoha me.

Le ƒe 1870 me la, woxɔe ɖe Missouri ƒe senyalawo ƒe dɔwɔƒe, eye wòdze dɔwɔwɔ gɔme le Paris nutoa me, togbɔ be mede asi nuŋlɔɖia te le afima o vaseɖe ƒe 1881. Le ɣeyiɣi sia me la, ewɔ dɔ abe senyala si tsɔ nya ɖe ame ŋu le Monroe County tso ƒe 1872 va ɖo ƒe 1876 me, eye wònye amedɔdɔ aɖe si va Missouri Dukplɔse Takpekpea me le ƒe 1875 me.

Wotiae be wòanye United States Teƒenɔlawo ƒe Aƒea me tɔ le ƒe 1883 me, eye wòsubɔ le afima vaseɖe ƒe 1885. Etrɔ yi Paris, Missouri, eye wòku le afima le ƒe 1892 me.

Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

title: George Alexander
text:
george Alexander (September 21, 1839 – August 2, 1923) nye dunyahela si tso ƒe 1909 va ɖo ƒe 1913 me la, enye Los Angeles, California ƒe dudzikpɔla 28 lia.

Wodzii le Glasgow, Scotland, eye woʋu kple edzilawo yi United States esime wòxɔ ƒe 11. Le ƒe 1862 me, le Dukɔmeviʋaa ƒe ƒe evelia me la, eɖe Annie Yeiser le Iowa eye wòkpɔ gome le aʋawɔwɔ me esi wòŋlɔ ŋkɔ ɖe Iowa lɔlɔ̃nu faa dɔwɔlawo dome vɔ megbe. Le aʋaa megbe la, eva nɔ Iowa du sue si nye Belle Plaine me, eye le ƒe 1870 me la, edze eya ŋutɔ ƒe nuku kple nuɖuɖudɔwɔƒe gɔme.[citation needed]

Le ƒe 1887 me, esime Alexander xɔ ƒe 48 la, eʋu yi ɣetoɖoƒe gome yi Los Angeles eye wòkeke eƒe nukuwo ƒe asitsatsa ɖe enu. Kaka ƒe 1892 naɖo la, edze eƒe dziɖuɖudɔ gɔme le County Recorder ƒe dɔwɔƒe. Le ƒe 1901 me la, wotiam be manye Los Angeles Nutome Dɔwɔha si Kpɔa Dɔwɔnyawo Gbɔ eye wònɔ dɔ wɔm vaseɖe ƒe 1909 me. Le ƒe 1909 me la, eʋli dudzikpɔla ƒe ɖoƒe ta le tiatia aɖe si wowɔ kple aɖaŋuɖoha me tɔ Fred C. Wheeler eye ​​wòzu Los Angeles dudzikpɔla le March 26, 1909. Ewɔ dɔ vaseɖe July 1, 1913. ƒe xexlẽme.

George Alexander ku le Los Angeles kwasiɖa adre do ŋgɔ na eƒe dzigbezã 84 lia eye woɖii ɖe afima le Angelus-Rosedale Tsiẽƒe.

Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

title: Jacques Golliet
text:
jacques Golliet (14 Dzome 1931 – 31 Kele 2020) nye Franse dunyahela.
Enye Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ tso Haute-Savoie tso 28 Anyɔnyɔ 1986 va ɖo 1 Kele 1995. Enye Thônes ƒe Dumegã hã tso ƒe 1974 va ɖo ƒe 1983. Golliet nye Franseawo ƒe Demokrasi Habɔbɔ kple Social Democrats ƒe Habɔbɔ me tɔ.

Golliet ku le 31 Kele 2020, esime wòxɔ ƒe 88.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Adrien Gouteyron
text:
adrien Gouteyron (13 Dame 1933 – 26 Afɔfiɛ 2020) nye Franse dunyahela. Enye
France ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ le ƒe 1978 va ɖo ƒe 2011. Enɔ Haute-Loire dɔwɔƒea
teƒe. Enye Union for a Popular Movement Party me tɔ. Wodzi Gouteyron le Rosières, France.

Gouteyron ku le 26 August 2020 esime wòxɔ ƒe 87.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Jean Grenet
text:
jean Grenet (12 Siamlɔm 1939 – 23 Dzodze 2021) nye Franse dunyahela. Enye France
Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ tso ƒe 1993 va ɖo ƒe 1997 eye wògakpɔtɔ tso ƒe
1992 va ɖo ƒe 2012. Enɔ Pyrénées-Atlantiques dɔwɔƒea teƒe. Grenet nye Radical
Party me tɔ. Tso ƒe 1995 va ɖo ƒe 2014 me la, enye Dumegã le Bayonne, Pyrénées-
Atlantiques. Wodzii le Bayonne.

Grenet ku le 23 Dzodze 2021 le Bayonne, esime wòxɔ ƒe 81.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Samuel Adebayo Abe
text:
samuel Adebayo Abe nye Anglikan Bisiɔp le Ekiti le ƒe 2007 me, le Ondo Nutome le Nigeria Sɔlemeha la me.

Abe xɔ dzudzɔ le dɔme le ƒe 2012 me abe Ekiti ƒe Bisiɔp kple Ondo Nutome ƒe
Bisiɔpgã ene; Chris Omotunde va xɔ ɖe eteƒe wònye Ekiti ƒe Bisiɔp, eye George
Olatunji Lasebikan va xɔ ɖe eteƒe wònye Ondo ƒe Bisiɔpgã.

Woɖoe Ekiti ƒe Bisiɔp le ƒe 1998 me, le Samuel Akinbola ƒe dzudzɔxɔxɔledɔme
megbe. Wogatiae zi evelia be wòanye Ondo ƒe Bisiɔpgã le ƒe 2007 me.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Olajide Adebayo
text:
olajide Adebayo nye Anglikan bisiɔp le Nigeria; enye Igbomina-West ƒe Bisiɔp,
enye ame enyi siwo le Anglikan Nutome Kwara dometɔ ɖeka, eya ŋutɔ hã nye ame
14 siwo le Nigeria Sɔlemeha la me la dometɔ ɖeka. Eɖea [["Kafukafuhawo" le
Kwasiɖagbe zã ga 8 le Radio Nigeria Metro 97.7 FM, Lagos; zã ga 7 le Royal Fm 95.5
Tanke dzi le Ilorin, Kwara State; 7.30pm Radio Nigeria,Harmony 103.5 FM. Idofian
Kwara Dukɔa; Eye fiẽ ga 5 Ekiti 91.5 FM, Ado Ekiti, Nigeria https://guardian.ng/sunday-magazine/gbɔgbɔ-kɔkɔe-na-xɔsetɔwo-te ŋu-wɔ-dɔwɔwɔ-na-kristo-adebayo/%7CHymns of Praise Kwasiɖagbe zã ga 8 le Metro FM, Lagos] ƒe agbalẽa me].

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Peter Awelewa Adebiyi
text:
peter Awelewa Adebiyi (27 Afɔfiɛ 1943 – 10 Dzove 2022) nye Nigeria Anglikan
bisiɔp. Ewɔ dɔ abe Lagos Ɣetoɖoƒe ƒe Bisiɔp ene le Nigeria Sɔlemeha ƒe Lagos Nutome.

Agbemeŋutinya
Wodzi Adebiyi le Osi-Ekiti, Nigeria, le Afɔfiɛ 27, 1943, afisi wòde suku le vaseɖe ƒe
1960. Ewu Emmanuel College of Theology, Ibadan, nu le ƒe 1970 me, eye wòxɔ B.A.
(ƒe 1975), M.A. (ƒe 1981) kple PhD (ƒe 1987) tso Ife Yunivɛsiti, Osun State.

Enye nufiala le Lagos Dukɔa ƒe Yunivɛsiti, Ojo, Lagos le ƒe 1987 kple 1990 dome.

Adebiyi va zu Saɖaganunɔlagã le ƒe 1990 me, eye woɖoe be wòanye Owo ƒe Bisiɔp
le May 26, 1993 dzi, hafi woɖe egɔme ɖe Lagos Ɣetoɖoƒe ƒe Bisiɔp le Adeamekpɔxe

20, 1999. Exɔ dzudzɔ le dɔme le ƒe 2013 me esi wòxɔ ƒe 70, eye ​​James Odedeji va xɔ ɖe eteƒe.

Woɖoe Lagos West ƒe Bisiɔp le ƒe 1999 me esi wònye Owo ƒe Bisiɔp tso ƒe 1993 va ɖo ƒe 1999.

Adebiyi ku le 10 February 2022, esime wòxɔ ƒe 78.

Dɔwɔwɔwo
Eƒe agbalẽ siwo wòta dometɔ aɖewoe nye:

Nyɔnuwo ƒe Dɔwɔƒe si le Ekitiland.
Kristotɔnyenye ƒe ŋutinya le Ekitiland (ƒe 1893-1973).
Kristotɔnyenye Dodo Ðe Ekitiland: Akpa Si Kluvi Tsãwo Wɔ. 
Eŋlɔ agbalẽ eve kple ehati bisiɔp Akin Omoyajowo: ƒe 150 ƒe Kristotɔnyenye le Nigeria kple  Sɔlemeha Fofowo.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Foluke Adenike Adeboye
text:
foluke Adenike Adeboye (wodzi Adeyokunnu; wodzii le 13 Siamlɔm 1948) si wogayɔna be Mummy G.O. nye sɔlemehakplɔla, television dzi nyanyuigblɔla, takpekpe me nuƒola, agbalẽŋlɔla kple Enoch Adeboye, si nye Redeemed Christian Church of God ƒe dzikpɔlagã srɔ̃.

Agbenɔnɔ le ɖevime
Wodzi Foluke Adeboye Foluke Adenike Adeyokunnu le 13 Siamlɔm 1948 dzi le Jacob Adelusi Adeyokunnu, si nye fiavi si le Owa Obokun Oji fiaƒomea me le Ijeshaland, Osun State, Nigeria ƒe ƒomea me. Menye ɖeko fofoa nye fiaƒome me tɔ ko o, ke
enye nufiala le Methodisttɔwo ƒe mawunyadɔgbededɔa me eye wònye katekisist hã. Enye nyɔnuvi ade kple ŋutsuvi ene siwo wodzi le ƒome ma me la ƒe tsitsitɔ.

Nusᴐsrɔ̃
Ede Methodist Gɔmedzesuku-Oke Eshe- Ilesha kple Methodist Nyɔnuviwo ƒe Suku-Agurodo-Ilesha hafi xɔ klass II nufiala ƒe ɖaseɖigbalẽ tso United Missionary College, Ibadan, kple ɖaseɖigbalẽ le sukudede (dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya kple akɔntabubu) me le College of Education, University of Lagos. Ƒe 1999 me.

Le 17 Siamlɔm 2022 dzi la, exɔ ɖɔkta ƒe ɖaseɖigbalẽ le Sukudede me tso Benson Idahosa Yunivɛsiti, Benin, Edo State.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Samuel Adedayo Abe
text:
samuel Adebayo Abe nye Anglikan Bisiɔp le Ekiti le ƒe 2007 me, le Ondo Nutome le Nigeria Sɔlemeha la me.

Abe xɔ dzudzɔ le dɔme le ƒe 2012 me abe Ekiti ƒe Bisiɔp kple Ondo Nutome ƒe Bisiɔpgã ene; Chris Omotunde va xɔ ɖe eteƒe wònye Ekiti ƒe Bisiɔp, eye George Olatunji Lasebikan va xɔ ɖe eteƒe wònye Ondo ƒe Bisiɔpgã.

Woɖoe Ekiti ƒe Bisiɔp le ƒe 1998 me, le Samuel Akinbola ƒe dzudzɔxɔxɔledɔme megbe. Wogatiae zi evelia be wòanye Ondo ƒe Bisiɔpgã le ƒe 2007 me.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Paul Adeolu Adefarasin
text:
paul Adeolu Adefarasin (wodzi le 25 Dzove 1963) nye Nigeriatɔ sɔlemehakplɔla kple television dzi nyanyuigblɔla. Enye Prelate kple Metropolitan Senior Pastor na House on the Rock sɔlemeha si ƒe dɔwɔƒegã le Lagos (Nigeria) eye eƒe alɔdzedɔwɔƒewo le du geɖe me le Nigeria godoo siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye Port-harcourt kple Abuja, kpakple Johannesburg, South Africa kple London, UK. Enye The Experience (nyanyuiƒoƒo ƒe kɔnsɛt) ƒe Takpekpewɔla/Amegã hã.

Agbenɔnɔ le ɖevime
Nigeria kple United States ye wonyii le.

Dᴐwᴐna
Adefarasin de St Saviour ƒe suku le Ikoyi, kple Igbobi Kɔledzi le Yaba. Eƒe sekɛndrisuku dede le Haileybury Kɔledzi le England.[10] Eyi edzi srɔ̃ nu le Miami Yunivɛsiti, eye wòwu sukua nu kple Xɔtuɖaŋu ƒe Dzeside. Ewɔ dɔ le Florida hafi trɔ yi Nigeria.

Esrɔ̃ nu le Dukɔwo Dome Biblia Nusrɔ̃ƒe si le London afisi wòxɔ Kristotɔwo ƒe Subɔsubɔdɔ ƒe Diploma le.

Agbalẽwo tata
Adefarasin ŋlɔ Kristotɔwo ƒe agbalẽ sue siwo wu 20 siwo ʋãa ame kple nyatakakamɔnu vovovowo, eye wòta wo ɖokui. Eƒe agbalẽ etɔ̃ nye esiwo Kristotɔ agbalẽtalawo kple emamalawo ta.

Ame ŋutɔ ƒe agbenɔnɔ
Le June 1995 me la, Adefarasin ɖe Ifeanyi Adefarasin (wodzi le September 16th 1972), si nye tugbedzedze fianyɔnu tsã eye fifia enye subɔla kple takpekpe me nuƒola si ŋu wodea bubui si wonya nyuie ɖe eƒe mɔkpɔkpɔ kple ŋusẽdodo ƒe gbedasi si me kɔ eye wòwɔa dɔ ta. Wo katã wodzi vi etɔ̃.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Emmanuel Adeoye Adekola
text:
emmanuel Adeoye Adekola nye Anglikan bisiɔp le Nigeria: enye Igbomina ƒe Bisiɔp fifia le Anglikan Nutome Kwara.
Wokɔe be wòanye Igbomina ƒe Bisiɔp le Yakobo Gãtɔ ƒe Sɔlemexɔgã me, Oke-Bola, Ibadan, le July 30, 2017 dzi.

De dzesii

title: Most Rev Julius Babatunde Adelakun
text:
most Rev Julius Babatunde Adelakun (wodzi le November 1, 1934) nye Bisiɔp si woɖo le Roma Katolikotɔwo ƒe Nutoa me le Oyo.Exɔ dzudzɔ le subɔsubɔdɔ vevie me le ƒe 2009 me eye Emmanuel Adetoyese Badejo si nye Oyo ƒe Bisiɔp fifia va xɔ ɖe eteƒe.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Tunde Adeleye
text:
tunde Adeleye, si nye Calabar ƒe Saɖaganutome Bisiɔp, nye Anglikan Nutome si le Niger Delta ƒe Bisiɔpgã, eye wònye ame 14 siwo le Nigeria Sɔlemeha la me la dometɔ ɖeka.

Eƒe nya siwo wòŋlɔ va yi dometɔ aɖewoe nye:

Dukplɔla, Kristotɔwo ƒe Habɔbɔ, Mid-Western Polytechnic
Dukplɔla, Kristotɔwo ƒe Habɔbɔ ƒe Yunivɛsiti si le Calabar
Dukɔa ƒe ɖoɖowɔla, Nigeria Kristotɔwo ƒe Sukunuwulawo ƒe Habɔbɔ
Zimenɔla, Xagai ƒe Kplɔlanyenye ƒe Hehenaƒe Deŋgɔ
Nigeria ƒe Kristotɔwo ƒe Aɖaŋuɖoha ƒe zimenɔla
Sɔlemehakplɔla, Ame Kɔkɔewo Katã ƒe Sɔlemexɔ, Benin Yunivɛsiti
Zimenɔla, Mawu ƒe Dukɔwo Dome Takpekpe  .

De dzesii

title: Rufus Ajileye Adepoju
text:
Rufus Ajileye Adepoju nye Anglikan bisiɔp le Nigeria: enye Ekiti Ɣetoɖoƒe ƒe Bisiɔp. Ewɔ dɔ abe nunɔla ene le Ekiti saɖaganutome hafi woƒe susu katã nɔ bisiɔp ŋu.

De dzesii

title: Oluwaseun A. Aderogba
text:
oluwaseun A. Aderogba nye Anglikan Bisiɔp le Jebba le Kwara Nutome le Nigeria Sɔlemeha la me.

Wotiam be manye Jebba ƒe Bisiɔp le January 2019 me, eye ​​wotsɔe kɔkɔe le April 2019 me le St David ƒe Anglikan Sɔlemexɔgã me le St David ƒe Anglikan Sɔlemexɔ me, Ijomu, Akure, to Primate of All Nigeria, Nicholas Okoh gbɔ. Tsã la, enye saɖaganunɔlagã.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Timothy G Adewole
text:
timothy G Adewole nye Anglikantɔwo ƒe bisiɔp le Nigeria. Enye Kwara ƒe Bisiɔp elabena enye Jebba ƒe Bisiɔp tsã, wo ame evea siaa le Anglikan Nutome Kwara, eya ŋutɔ hã nye ame 14 siwo le Nigeria Sɔlemeha la me la dometɔ ɖeka.

De dzesii

title: Babatunde Joseph Adeyemi
text:
babatunde Joseph Adeyemi nye Anglikan bisiɔp le Nigeria: enye Badagry ƒe Bisiɔp fifia.

Wodzi Adeyemi le January 14, 1957 dzi le Ojo, Lagos State. Ede suku le Dziɖuɖua ƒe Nufialawo ƒe Hehenasuku, Badagry; Immanuel Mawunyaŋutinunya ƒe Kɔledzi, Ibadan; kple Lagos Dukɔa ƒe Yunivɛsiti. Le ƒe etɔ̃ abe nufiala ene megbe la, woɖoe saɖaganunɔla le ƒe 1984 me eye woɖoe nunɔla le ƒe 1986. Le curacy le Ebute Metta megbe la, exɔ dɔ le Awodi-Ora, Idumu kple Festac Town. Ezu Canon le ƒe 1999 me eye wòzu Archdeacon le Festac le ƒe 2000 me.

Wokɔe be wòanye Badagry ƒe Bisiɔp mɔɖela le March 13, 2005 dzi. Enye Lagos Ŋɔŋlɔawo ƒe Habɔbɔ ƒe tatɔ tso ƒe 2010 me.

De dzesii

title: Olusegun Adeyemi
text:
olusegun Adeyemi nye Anglikantɔwo ƒe bisiɔpgã le Nigeria enye Kwara ƒe Bisiɔp, enye ame adre siwo le Anglikan Nutome Kwara dometɔ ɖeka, enye bisiɔpgã 14 siwo le Nigeria Sɔlemeha la me la dometɔ ɖeka. Woti Adeyemi be manye Anglikan Nutome Kwara ƒe Bisiɔpgã le ƒe 2017 me.

Exɔ dzudzɔ le dɔme le ƒe 2019 me.

De dzesii

title: Philip Adeyemo
text:
philip Adeyemo (wodzi le 19 May 1949) nye Anglikan bisiɔp le Nigeria: enye Omu-Aran saɖaganutome ƒe Bisiɔp, enye ame adre siwo le Anglikan Nutome Kwara dometɔ ɖeka, eya ŋutɔ hã nye ame 14 siwo le Nigeria Sɔlemeha la me la dometɔ ɖeka .

Wodzi Adeyemo le May 19, 1949 dzi le Oyun, Kwara State. Ede suku le Ilorin Yunivɛsiti kple Imanuel Mawunyasrɔ̃suku, Ibadan. Ewɔ dɔ kple gateway Insurance Co hafi xɔ hehe abe nunɔla ene. Exɔ dɔ le Osere hafi va zu Saɖaganunɔlagã.

Exɔ dzudzɔ le dɔme le ƒe 2019 me, esi wòxɔ ƒe 70 si wòle be wòaxɔ dzudzɔ le dɔme.

De dzesii

title: Albert Aduloju Agbaje
text:
albert Aduloju Agbaje (12 June 1937 – 31 January 2005) nye Anglikan Bisiɔp gbãtɔ le Sabongidda-Ora le Bendel Nutome le Nigeria Sɔlemeha me.

Wodzi Agbaje le June 12, 1937 dzi le Ikare. Eyi Victory College, Ikare, eye wòwu Immanuel College of Theology, Kudeti-Ibadan nu le ƒe 1963 me.

Ewɔ dɔ geɖe le Sukudede Dɔwɔƒe, eye wòdo va zu Lagos Sukudede Dukɔa ƒe Provost, Ijanikin, Lagos le ƒe 1982. Tso ƒe 1984 me la, edze ɣeyiɣiawo katã ƒe sɔleme subɔsubɔdɔ gɔme eye wotiam be manye Sabongidda-Ora ƒe Bisiɔp gbãtɔ le ƒe 1993. Le 2003 wogbugbɔ trɔ asi le Nigeria Sɔlemeha la ŋu, eye Agbaje va zu bisiɔpgã gbãtɔ le Sɔlemeha ƒe Nutome yeye si le Bendel me, ɖoƒe si wònɔ vaseɖe eƒe kugbe le January 31, 2005 dzi.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Mojola Agbebi
text:
mojola Agbebi (ƒe 1860–1917) nye Nigeria Yoruba Baptist subɔla. Wotsɔ ŋkɔ nɛ tsã be David Brown Vincent, gake le Afrikatɔwo ƒe dukɔmevinyenye ƒe ƒutsotsoe si nɔ anyi le ƒe 1880 ƒeawo ƒe nuwuwu me la, etrɔ ŋkɔ. Agbebi nye amesi ʋlia anyigbadzitɔwo ƒe kplɔlanyenye ta vevie na Afrika sɔlemehawo. Edze nyanyuigbɔgblɔdɔ gɔme le Yorubaland kple Niger Delta.

Agbebi nye Yoruba Anglikan katekistɔ aɖe ƒe viŋutsu, eye wodzii le fofoa "Saro" ƒe tɔtrɔ tso Sierra Leone yi wo de kple nyanyui la megbe kpuie. Edo le CMS (Sɔlemeha la ƒe Dutanyanyuigblɔlawo ƒe Habɔbɔ) me le ƒe 1880 me eye wòzu Baptisttɔ le ƒe 1883 lɔƒo le Ɣetoɖoƒe Afrika.

Agbebi nye Ebenezer Baptist Sɔlemeha, Lagos, si woɖo le nyaʋiʋli aɖe si nɔ Baptist Sɔlemeha Gbãtɔ me ta esime Amerikatɔ mawunyadɔgbedela Bubutɔ W. J. David ɖe Osɔfo Moses Ladejo Stone, si nye afimatɔwo ƒe sɔlemehakplɔla, le dɔ me la ƒe akpa aɖe. David gbe numeɖeɖe si amedɔdɔ aɖe kple sɔlemeha la ƒe asitsakpekpea bia, eye wògblɔ be ŋusẽ le ye si be yeaɖe Stone le dɔ me.

Agbebi nye xexeame katã ƒe dziɖuɖu ƒe apostolo. Le ƒe 1898 me la, eɖo Afrika Baptist Habɔbɔ si le Ɣetoɖoƒe Afrika, eye le ƒe 1914 me la, eɖo Yoruba Baptist Habɔbɔ. Edo alɔ srɔ̃a ƒe agbagbadzedzewo hã le dukɔa me katã ƒe Baptist Nyɔnuwo ƒe Habɔbɔ ɖoɖo me le ƒe 1919. Ewɔa dunyahehe hã vevie, eye wòɖe agbalẽ aɖe ɖe go le ƒe 1911 ƒe Xexeame Katã ƒe Duɖimekekewo ƒe Takpekpe Gbãtɔ me le London.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Aloysius Agbo
text:
Aloysius Agbo nye Anglikantɔwo ƒe bisiɔp le Nigeria: enye Nsukka ƒe Bisiɔp fifia.

Wodzi Agbo le 15 September 1967 dzi le Akpani, Enugu State. Ede suku le Trinity Theological College, Umuahia kple Nigeria Yunivɛsiti. Woɖoe saɖaganunɔla le ƒe 2000 me, eye wònye nunɔla le ƒe 2001. Enye Enugu-Ezike ƒe Saɖaganunɔlagã vaseɖe esime wotiae be wòanye bisiɔp le ƒe 2008. Enye Enugu Dukɔa ƒe Ŋutifafa ƒe Ʋɔnudrɔ̃la hã.

De dzesii

title: Felix Femi Ajakaye
text:
felix Femi Ajakaye  (wodzi le 25 May 1962) nye Nigeria Katoliko nunɔla.

Agbe
Wodzi Ajakaye le May 25, 1962 dzi le Ibadan. Woɖoe nunɔlae le Ekiti Saɖaganutome le 12 July 2008 dzi eye wònye saɖaganutome bisiɔp le 17 April 2010. Eɖe Kristotɔwo tso wo wuwu me le Barkin Ladi .

Dɔwɔwɔwo
Susuwo Gbɔ (Y Books, Ibadan; 2016),[5]

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Samuel Ajani
text:
samuel Ajani (22 April 1940 – 29 January 2020) nye Anglikan Bisiɔp le Egba Ɣetoɖoƒe le Lagos Nutome le Nigeria Sɔlemeha me.

Ajani ku le 29 Dzove 2020 dzi.

Ede CMS Grammar School, Lagos kple Holloway College, London, eye wòwu enu le ƒe 1969. Ege ɖe Nigeria Television Service me abe Engineer ene, eye wòʋu yi Federal Radio Corporation of Nigeria le ƒe 1978. Le ƒe 1979 me la, wode dɔ asi nɛ le "Abuja Project" me to ƒe Dɔdzikpɔlagã George Bako. Ewɔ dɔ abe Mɔ̃ɖaŋudɔwɔƒewo ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla le FRCN. Woɖoe Ibadan Dukɔa ƒe Dɔwɔƒea ƒe dɔdzikpɔlagã le ƒe 1992 me, eye wònɔ dɔ sia wɔm vaseɖe ƒe 1999 me.

Enye Egba West ƒe Bisiɔp mɔɖela, si woɖo le ƒe 2007 me; etsɔe de asi na Samuel Oludele Ogundeji le eƒe dzudzɔxɔxɔledɔme le ƒe 2010 me.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Daniel Ajayi-Adeniran
text:
daniel Ajayi-Adeniran nye Pentekostetɔwo ƒe sɔlemehakplɔla tso Nigeria. Tso ƒe 2011 me la, exɔ ŋgɔ na Redeemed Christian Church of God si le Afrika ƒe kekeɖenudɔ le Dziehe Amerika.

Ajayi-Adeniran nye ŋutsu agbalẽnyala si wɔa dɔ abe dziɖuɖudɔwɔla ene le Nigeria, eye wòto ahanono ƒe kuxiwo me, eye le ƒe 1989 me la, eyi Mawu ƒe Kristotɔwo ƒe Sɔlemeha si Woɖe na la me le mɔa ƒe go kemɛ dzi le eƒe aƒe si te ɖe Ibadan ŋu. Le ƒe 1990 me la, etrɔ ɖe Kristotɔwo ƒe Sɔlemeha si Woɖe na ƒe nufiafiawo ŋu eye woɖoe to subɔsubɔha ma me le ƒe 1994. Eʋu yi United States le ƒe 1995 me le dunyahehe ƒe nɔnɔme siwo nɔ dzizizidziɖula Sani Abacha te le Nigeria ta. Esi Ajayi-Adeniran va ɖo U.S. la, eva zu Redeemed Christian Church of God si le Dziehe Amerika si le Roosevelt Ƒukpo dzi ƒe sɔlemeha gbãtɔ me tɔ. Ema megbe kpuie la, eva zu sɔlemeha la ƒe alɔdze yeye aɖe si woɖo la ƒe nunɔla, eye wòkpena le Bronx ƒe fiase aɖe me.

Ajayi-Adeniran gblɔ be yeƒe taɖodzinue nye be yeana ame bubuwo nanya nu tso Kristotɔ si woɖe la ƒe dɔdasi ŋu ale be le aƒe ɖesiaɖe me le xexeame la, Mawu ƒe Kristotɔ Xɔnametɔ ƒe Habɔbɔ me tɔ ɖeka ya teti nanɔ anyi.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Olumuyiwa Ajay
text:
olumuyiwa Ajayi nye Anglikan bisiɔp le Nigeria: enye Pankshin ƒe Bisiɔp fifia,[3] saɖaganuto ewo dometɔ ɖeka le Anglikan Nutome Jos me, eya ŋutɔ hã nye nuto 14 siwo le Nigeria Sɔlemeha la me dometɔ ɖeka. Eƒe Nutomedziɖuɖu ƒe nuto etɔ̃, Pankshin, Kanke kple Kanam.

Olumuyiwa Odejide Ajayi wodzi le Ake, Abeokuta le 2 November 1961, Igan Alade dukɔmevi le Yewa Dziehe Nutome Dziɖuɖu nuto me le Ogun State Nigeria. Enye mɔɖela Bisiɔp le Diocese of Pankshin Anglican Communion (Nigeria Sɔlemeha), vi atɔ̃ le esi. Eɖe Dorkas (si tsi megbe fifia) gake fifia egaɖe Magdala eye wo ame evea wodzi Vi Wuiɖekɛ fifia. Exɔ HND (Asitsatsa) Ogun Dukɔa ƒe Polytechnic Abeokuta, (Fifia Moshood Abiola Polytechnic Abeokuta). Exɔ Yesu Kristo (Wogbugbɔ dzi) le Kwasiɖagbe 24 July 1979. Woyɔe va Nyanyui la ƒe subɔsubɔdɔa me le eƒe Dukɔa ƒe Sɔhɛwo ƒe Subɔsubɔha (NYSC) me le ƒe 1985. Exɔ Bachelor of Divinity (BD) Theological College of Northern Nigeria (TCNN) . Bukuru, Aɖaŋudɔ ƒe Aƒetɔ (M.A) Agbenɔnɔŋutinunya/Xexemenunya, Jos Yunivɛsiti kple Xexemenunya ƒe Ðɔkta (Ph.D.), Agbenɔnɔŋutinunya/Xexemenunya, Jos Yunivɛsiti, January 2013. Enye Pastor kple Nyanyuigblɔla le yɔyɔ me.

Woɖoe Diacon le June 30, 1991 dzi, woɖoe Nunɔla le July 19, 1992 dzi, le Anglikantɔwo ƒe Saɖaganutome le Osun. Pankshin ƒe Bisiɔp Kɔkɔe, Anglikantɔwo ƒe Nuɖuɖu Kɔkɔe (Nigeria Sɔlemeha) 4thApril 2007. Fifia ele Pankshin Anglikan Bisiɔp ƒe ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe.

Diocese ƒe Nutowo; Pankshin, Kanke kple Kanam Nutome Dziɖuɖu Nuto si le Plateau State Nigeria.

Agbalẽ siwo Olumuyiwa Odejide Ajayi ŋlɔ eye woŋlɔ wo ɖekae;

1. Gbɔgbɔ Kɔkɔe ƒe Nunanawo Gɔmesese

2. Ɣeyiɣi Yeyea me Subɔsubɔhawo ƒe Kuxi Siwo Tsi Tre Ðe Orthodɔks Kristotɔnyenye Ŋu Dzi ɖuɖu

3. Sɔlemeha la Dzikpɔkpɔ nyuie

4. Agakpe Gbadza Na Gbesiagbe Aʋadziɖuɖu

5. Nuɖuɖu Kɔkɔe la Gɔmesese

6. Kristotɔ Kpɔ Kufiatsotso ƒe Agbenɔnɔ Ŋuti Nusɔsrɔ̃

7. Sɔlemeha si Le Dzidzɔm

8. Akpa Si Pastor Srɔ̃ Wɔna

9. Subɔsubɔdɔ Nyuitɔ Ƒe Tsitrenu Etɔ̃lia

10. Akpɔkplɔ Sue Siwo menya kpɔna dzea sii bɔbɔe o

11. Amegbetɔ ƒe Nyonyo Le Mose V, ƒe Agbalẽa Me

12. Kristotɔwo ƒe Nukpɔsusu le Kufiatsotso ƒe Agbenyuinɔnɔ Ŋu[6]

De dzesii

title: Andrew Olusola Ajayi
text:
andrew Olusola Ajayi nye Anglikan bisiɔp le Nigeria: wodzii le July 2, 1959 dzi, enye Ekiti Saɖaganutome ƒe Bisiɔp fifia. Eɖe egɔme tso Ekiti Kwara ƒe Dutanyanyuigblɔlawo ƒe Saɖaganutome, afisi wònye mɔɖela Bisiɔp tso May 26, 2008. Wotiae eye woɖe egɔme le July 2, 2022, le eƒe dzigbezã 63 lia dzi. Woɖoe fiazikpui 6 lia le Ekiti Nutoa me, Anglikantɔwo ƒe Nuɖuɖu Kɔkɔe le Memleɖa August 13, 2022 dzi le Emmanuel ƒe Sɔlemexɔgã me. Okesha, Ado Ekiti, kple ame bubuwo. Rt. Rev. Andrew Olusola Ajayi Diploma le Mawunyaŋutinunya me le Emmanuel Mawunyasrɔ̃suku, Ibadan, Nigeria. Diploma le Subɔsubɔhawo Ŋuti Nusɔsrɔ̃ me le Ibadan Yunivɛsiti, Nigeria. B. A. (Hons) Obafemi Awolowo Yunivɛsiti Ife, Mawunyaŋutinunya ƒe Aɖaŋudɔsrɔ̃ƒe (Nubabla Yeye), Mawunyaŋutinunya ƒe Aƒetɔ (STM) le Union Mawunyasrɔ̃suku, New York City, U.S.A. Eɖe srɔ̃a lɔlɔ̃tɔ, Aƒenɔ Abimbola Ajayi le dzidzɔ me eye woyra srɔ̃ɖeɖea kple vi nyuiwo.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Jacob Ademola Ajetunmobi
text:
jacob Ademola Ajetunmobi (June 1948 – 14 December 2020) nye Nigeria Anglikan bisiɔp. Enye bisiɔp gbãtɔ le Ibadan South ƒe Nutoa me tso ƒe 1999 va ɖo ƒe 2018.

Wodzi Ajetunmobi le ƒe 1948 me le Ogbagi-Akoko le Ɣetoɖoƒe Nigeria na amegã aɖe si nye srɔ̃ geɖe ɖeɖe kple fiavinyɔnu aɖe si tso to aɖe si te ɖe wo ŋu me. Le eƒe sukudede megbe la, edze agbledede sɔsrɔ̃ gɔme le Agbledede Suku le Akure, gake esi wòzu Kristotɔ le Ŋɔŋlɔawo ƒe Habɔbɔ ƒe asaɖa aɖe me le ƒe 1966 me ta la, eɖe asi le agbledede sɔsrɔ̃ ŋu eye wòŋlɔ ŋkɔ ɖe Igbaja Seminary, si Sudan Interior Mission kpɔna la me.  . Esi wòwu Igbaja nu la, esrɔ̃ nu le London Biblia Kɔledzi. Esi wòtrɔ yi Nigeria la, emegbe efiaa nu le sukuwo kple kɔledziwo me eye wòwɔ dɔ na Ŋɔŋlɔawo ƒe Habɔbɔ.

Woɖoe saɖaganunɔla kple nunɔla siaa le ƒe 1983. Le gɔmedzedzea me la, enye Bisiɔp G.I.O. Olajide, si nye Ilesa ƒe Bisiɔp. Le ƒe 1988 me la, egaʋu yi London, abe Nigeria Sɔlemeha ƒe Sɔlemehakplɔla ene.

Woɖoe Bisiɔp le Christ Church, Uwari, Enugu, le 11 July 1999 dzi to Abiodun Adetiloye, Primate of the Church of Nigeria, si nye bisiɔp gbãtɔ le Diocese of Ibadan South, ɖoƒe si wònɔ vaseɖe esime wòxɔ dzudzɔ le dɔme le ƒe 2018 me.  .

Eku le ƒe 2020 me, esime wòxɔ ƒe 72.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Abel Oluyemi Ajibodu
text:
abel Oluyemi Ajibodu nye Anglikan bisiɔp le Nigeria: enye Ile-Oluji ƒe Bisiɔp fifia.

Ewɔ dɔ abe Saɖaganunɔlagã kple Dean ene va yi.

Wokɔe be wòanye Ile-Oluji ƒe Bisiɔp le July 2017 me le Archbishop Vining Memorial Church Cathedral le Ikeja.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Emmanuel Bayode Ajulo
text:
Emmanuel Bayode Ajulo (wodzi 26 September 1947) nye Anglikan bisiɔp gbãtɔ le Okene le Lokoja Nutome le Nigeria Sɔlemeha me tso ƒe 2008 me vaseɖe esime wòxɔ dzudzɔ le dɔme le ƒe 2017 me.[Citation Ehiã].

Wodzii le Lampese (si nye Edo State fifia), eye wòde Anglikan gbeŋutisesuku Igarra tso ƒe 1962 vaseɖe ƒe 1966 me.

Exɔ BA le Eŋlisigbe me (ƒe 1973) kple MA (Eŋlisigbe me nusɔsrɔ̃) le ƒe 1978 me le IFE Yunivɛsiti kple PhD (Eŋlisigbe me gbe) tso Sheffield Yunivɛsiti, England (1980). Ajulo wɔ dɔ le yunivɛsiti siwo gbɔna me: Ambrose Alli, Ahmadu Bello, kple Jos Yunivɛsiti (afisi wòzu nufialagã le le ƒe 1995 me).

Wowɔe Mɔɖela Bishop, Anglikan Diocese of Okene le ƒe 2008 me eye Emmanuel Onsachi va xɔ ɖe eteƒe le eƒe dzudzɔxɔxɔledɔme le ƒe 2017 me.

Eŋlɔ ameɖokuiŋutinya aɖe: eƒe nublanuikpɔkpɔ ƒe vi.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Solomon Olusola Akanbi
text:
solomon Olusola Akanbi nye Anglikantɔwo ƒe bisiɔp le Nigeria: enye Offa saɖaganutome ƒe Bisiɔp tso ƒe 2018 me.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Edmund Akanya
text:
Edmund Akanya nye Anglikan bisiɔp le Nigeria: enye Kaduna ƒe Bisiɔpgã tsã, enye Kebbi ƒe Bisiɔp fifia.

Wotiam be manye Kaduna Nutome ƒe Bisiɔpgã hena zimenɔɣi evelia le 19 Dzove 2013 dzi.

Nyatakaka siawo tsoƒewo

title: Johnson Akin Atere
text:
johnson Akin Atere nye Anglikan bisiɔple Nigeria: enye Awori ƒe Bisiɔp fifia.

Wodzi Akin Atere le ƒe 1956 me le Akoko South-West, Ondo State. Exɔ hehe emegbe ewɔ dɔ abe nufiala ene hafi ge ɖe Immanuel College of Theology, Ibadan le ƒe 1985. Woɖoe le
ƒe 1988. Esubɔ le Lagos, Ilasamaja kple Sango-Ota kple Surulere. Wolɔ̃e wu be wòanye Canon le ƒe 1999 me, eye Archdeacon le ƒe 2002. Enye Nufialagã le Nubabla Xoxoa
Nusɔsrɔ̃ me le Archbishop Vining College of Theology vaseɖe esime wotsɔe ɖo adzɔgbe le January 12, 2009. Exɔ Ph.D le Lagos Dukɔa ƒe Yunivɛsiti.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Gabriel Akinbolarin Akinbiyi
text:
gabriel Akinbolarin Akinbiyi (wodzi le 5 December 1949) nye Akoko ƒe Bisiɔp le Anglikan Nutome Ondo le Nigeria Sɔlemeha me vaseɖe ƒe 2019.

Ewu Immanuel College of Theology, Ibadan le ƒe 1981 me, Oak Hill College le London le ƒe 1990 me, eye wòwu King's College London le ƒe 1991 me kple Masters le Mawunya me.

Wowɔe Sɔlemehakplɔla le ƒe 1993 me eye wowɔe Saɖaganunɔlagã le ƒe 1994. Le ƒe 1998 me la, eva zu Offa ƒe Bisiɔp; le July 2008 me la, woɖe egɔme na Akoko ƒe Bisiɔp.

Le ƒe 2018 me la, wotiam be manye Ondo ƒe Bisiɔpgã.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Felix Akinbuluma
text:
Felix Akinbuluma nye Anglikan bisiɔp le Nigeria: enye Irele-Eseodo ƒe Bisiɔp vaseɖe esime wòku esime wòxɔ ƒe 59 le ƒe 2018 me.

Wokɔe ŋu le ƒe 2009 me abe Irele-Eseodo ƒe Bisiɔp si ɖoe anyi le Anglikan Nutome Ondo.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Adebayo Akinde
text:
Adebayo Akinde nye agbalẽnyala kple bisiɔp le Nigeria.

Wodzii le Kaduna le 25 August 1946. Ede suku le Obafemi Awolowo Yunivɛsiti; Yunivɛsiti Kɔledzi, London; kple Sussex Yunivɛsiti. Enɔ Obafemi Awolowo Yunivɛsiti ƒe dɔwɔlawo dome tso ƒe 1973 va ɖo ƒe 2002, eye wòbi ɖe elektrɔnikmɔ̃ɖaŋudɔwɔwɔ kple kɔmpiuta zazã me. Woɖo Akinde saɖaganunɔla le ƒe 1979 me eye woɖo nunɔla le ƒe 1981. Le ƒe 1992 me la, eva zu Sɔlemehakplɔla eye le ƒe si kplɔe ɖo me la, ezu Saɖaganunɔlagã. Enye Peter Kɔkɔe ƒe Sɔlemexɔgã, Abeokuta ƒe Provost tso ƒe 2000 vaseɖe ƒe 2006.[3] Enye Lagos Mainland ƒe Bisiɔp kple Lagos ƒe Bisiɔpgã, eye wòxɔ dzudzɔ le dɔme le ƒe 2016 me.

Ezu Lagos Nutome ƒe Bisiɔpgã le Dzove 19, 2013 dzi.

Wotiam be manye mɔɖela Bisiɔp le Lagos Mainland le Episcopal Synod me le 28 June 2006, le All Saints Church, Wuse, Abuja.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Joseph Olatunji Akinfenwa
text:
joseph Olatunji Akinfenwa (wodzi le May 24, 1956) nye Anglikan bisiɔp le Nigeria: enye Ibadan Bisiɔp, enye ame wuiade siwo le Anglikan Nutome Ibadan dometɔ ɖeka, eya ŋutɔ hã nye ame 14 siwo le Nigeria Sɔlemeha la me la dometɔ ɖeka.

Wodzi Akinfenwa le Zaria le 24 May 1956. Enye Ahmadu Bello Yunivɛsiti nuwula, exɔ Diploma le Mawunya me le St Francis Assisi Mawunya Kɔledzi, Wusasa, Zaria eye wòxɔ Masters kple PhD ɖaseɖigbalẽ le Ilorin Yunivɛsiti.

Woɖoe le ƒe 1986 me le St Michael ƒe Sɔlemexɔgã me, Kaduna, si me wòzu Saɖaganunɔlagã le ƒe 1994. Le January 6, 1998 dzi la, woɖoe Sokoto ƒe Bisiɔp hafi woɖe egɔme ɖe Ibadan ƒe Bisiɔp le April 2000 me.

Akinfenwa va zu Ibadan ƒe Bisiɔpgã gbãtɔ le January 2003 me, ɖoƒe si wònɔ zi eve, vaseɖe ƒe 2013.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Abraham Akinlalu
text:
abraham Akinlalu nye Anglikan bisiɔp tsã le Nigeria. Enye Bisiɔp Emeritus le Anglikan Diocese of Oke-Osun; exɔ dzudzɔ le dɔme le ƒe 2019 me.

Wotiam be manye Oke-Osun ƒe Bisiɔp le ƒe 2010 me le Bisiɔp Fasogbon ƒe dzudzɔxɔxɔledɔme ta.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: James Olaoti Akinola
text:
james Olaoti Akinola nye Anglikantɔwo ƒe bisiɔp le Nigeria. Enye Igbomina-West ƒe Bisiɔp mɔɖela, enye ame enyi siwo le Anglikan Nutome Kwara la dometɔ ɖeka, eya ŋutɔ hã nye ame 14 siwo le Nigeria Sɔlemeha la me la dometɔ ɖeka.

Wotiam be manye Igbomina-West ƒe Bisiɔp le October 29, 2009 dzi le Nigeria Sɔlemeha ƒe Anglikantɔwo ƒe Nuɖuɖu Kɔkɔe ƒe Episcopal synod si wowɔ le Basilica of Grace Apo le Gudu nuto me le Anglikan Diocese of Abuja.

Exɔ dzudzɔ le dɔme le ƒe 2016 me.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Michael Akinyemi
text:
michael Akinyemi (wodzi le 17 October 1947) nye Anglikan bisiɔp le Nigeria: enye mɔɖela Bisiɔp le Igbomina, ame adre dometɔ ɖeka le Anglikan Nutome Kwara, eya ŋutɔ hã nye 14 dometɔ ɖeka le Nigeria Sɔlemeha la me. Akinyemi nye Anglikan Nutome Kwara ƒe Bisiɔpgã hã vaseɖe esime wòxɔ dzudzɔ le dɔme le ƒe 2017 me

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Steven Akobe
text:
Steven Kadoye Akobe nye Anglikan bisiɔp le Nigeria: enye Kabba ƒe Bisiɔp fifia, saɖaganuto 11 siwo le Anglikan Nutome Lokoja me la dometɔ ɖeka, eya ŋutɔ hã nye nuto 14 siwo le Nigeria Sɔlemeha la me la dometɔ ɖeka.  Eƒe dzigbezãe nye February 16.

Woɖoe bisiɔp le 12 September 2010 dzi le St Peter ƒe Sɔlemexɔgã me, Asaba.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Williams Oluwarotimi Aladekugbe
text:
Williams Oluwarotimi Aladekugbe nye Anglikantɔwo ƒe bisiɔp le Nigeria: enye Oyo ƒe Bisiɔp fifia.

Aladekugbe nye Ezekiel College of Theology ƒe Tatɔ Ujoelen Ekpoma, Edo nutome hafi wotiae be wòaxɔ ɖe Jacob Ola Fasipe teƒe abe Oyo ƒe Bisiɔp ene le Nigeria Sɔlemeha ƒe Takpekpe Gã 11 lia me, si wowɔ le Alẽkplɔla Nyui ƒe Sɔlemexɔgã me, Enugu, le ƒe Dzove 2014.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Prosper Afam Amah
text:
Prosper Afam Amah (wodzi le 15 September 1973) nye Anglikan bisiɔp le Nigeria: enye Ogbara ƒe Bisiɔp fifia, enyi dometɔ ɖeka le Anglikan Nutome si le Niger me, eya ŋutɔ nye nuto 14 siwo le Sɔlemeha la me dometɔ ɖeka Nigeria.

Wodzi Amah le September 15, 1973 dzi le Uruagu. Enye Paul Yunivɛsiti kple Nigeria Yunivɛsiti nuwula. Eɖo Saɖaganunɔlagã ƒe ɖoƒea hafi wotsɔe ɖo adzɔgbee, eye wòva zu Ogbara ƒe Bisiɔp le ƒe 2018 me.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Funkuro Godrules Amgbare
text:
Funkuro Godrules Amgbare nye Anglikan bisiɔp le Nigeria: enye Dziehe Izon ƒe Bisiɔp fifia ame enyi siwo le Anglikan Nutome le Niger Delta dometɔ ɖeka, eya ŋutɔ hã nye ame 14 siwo le Nigeria Sɔlemeha la me la dometɔ ɖeka.

Wotiam be manye Bisiɔp le ƒe 2018 me.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Israel Amoo
text:
Israel Amoo nye Anglikan bisiɔp le Nigeria: enye Bisiɔp le New Bussa saɖaganuto me, enye ame adre siwo le Anglikan Nutome Kwara dometɔ ɖeka, eya ŋutɔ hã nye ame 14 siwo le Nigeria Sɔlemeha la me la dometɔ ɖeka.

Enye Anglikan Nutome Kwara ƒe Bisiɔpgã fifia.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Maxwell Anikwenwa
text:
Maxwell Anikwenwa nye Anglikan bisiɔp le Nigeria.

Wodzi Anikwenwa le Oyi le ƒe 1940 me; eye wòde suku le Trinity Theological College, Umuahia. Woɖoe Deacon le ƒe 1964 me eye woɖoe Nunɔla le December 1966. Esubɔ le Onitsha kple Freetown. Woɖoe Awka ƒe Bisiɔp gbãtɔ le ƒe 1987 me; kple Niger ƒe Bisiɔpgã le ƒe 2000 me.

Enye Nigeria Sɔlemeha ƒe Tatɔ hã.

Exɔ dzudzɔ le dɔme abe Awka ƒe Bisiɔp, Niger ƒe Bisiɔpgã kple Sɔlemeha la ƒe Tatɔ le 22 November 2010.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Fiaviŋutsu Asukwo Antai
text:
Fiaviŋutsu Asukwo Antai, si nye Abak ƒe Saɖaganunɔlagã tsã, nye Anglikan bisiɔp le Nigeria: enye Uyo ƒe Bisiɔp fifia enyi dometɔ ɖeka le Anglikan Nutome le Niger Delta, eya ŋutɔ hã nye Bisiɔp ƒe 14 le Nigeria Sɔlemeha la me.

Wotiam be manye Uyo ƒe Bisiɔp le Nigeria Sɔlemeha ƒe Takpekpe Gã 11 lia me, si wowɔ le Alẽkplɔla Nyui ƒe Sɔlemexɔgã me, Enugu, le September 2014 me.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: John Usiwoma Aruakpor
text:
John Usiwoma Aruakpor (wodzi le 10 February 1960 nye Nigeria bisiɔp le Anglikan Diocese of Oleh le Nigeria Sɔlemeha me.

Wotia Aruakpor be manye bisiɔp na Oleh ƒe Nutoa me le March 2012 me. Wokɔe ŋu eye woɖoe fiazikpui dzi le July 2012 me.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Joseph Oluwafemi Arulefela
text:
Joseph Oluwafemi Arulefela  nye Anglikan Bisiɔp le Ikale-Ilaje le Nigeria Sɔlemeha ƒe Nutome Gbãtɔ me le ƒe 2000. Wokɔ Arulefela ŋu be wòanye Ikale-Ilaje Bisiɔp le January 25, 1999.

Agbalẽwo
Arulefela, J. O. (ƒe 1990) ƒe agbalẽa. Nyɔnyrɔxɔxɔ: Biblia gɔmeɖeɖe. Ibadan: Ŋusẽkpɔɖeamedzi Gbeƒãɖelawo Nigeria.

Arulefela, J. O. (ƒe 1977). Nubabla si le Nubabla Xoxoa kple Yorubatɔwo ƒe dekɔnuwo me.

Arulefela, J. O. (ƒe 1988) Ƒe 1988. Nubabla le Nubabla Xoxoa me kple le Yorubalandgbe me. Ibadan: Daystar ƒe Nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe.

Arulefela, J. O. (ƒe 1980) Ƒe 1980. Biblia kple Yorubatɔwo ƒe nubabla ŋuti nukpɔsusuwo me dzodzro: Kple gɔmesese si le eŋu na Yoruba Kristotɔwo ƒe Kristotɔwo ƒe hehenana.

Arulefela, J. O. (ƒe 1990) ƒe agbalẽa. Sɔlemeha ƒe awuwo. Ilorin [Nigeria: Dziɖuɖua ƒe Nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe.

Arulefela, J. O. (ƒe 1993) ƒe agbalẽa. Pastor la srɔ̃. Ibadan, Oyo State, Nigeria: Gird ƒe Agbalẽwo.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: William Avenya
text:
William Amove Avenya (wodzi le 21 June 1955) tso Konshisha Nutome Dziɖuɖu Nutome le Benue State nye Roma Katoliko Nutome Gboko ƒe bisiɔp le sɔlemeha ƒe nuto si nye Abuja me le Nigeria. Avenya nye bisiɔp gbãtɔ le saɖaganutoa me tso esime woɖoe le December 29, 2012 dzi. Eganye Katoliko Bisiɔpwo ƒe Takpekpe si le Nigeria (CBCN) ƒe agbalẽŋlɔla.

Subɔsubɔhawo ƒe agbenɔnɔ
Woɖoe nunɔla le 30 May 1981. Woɖoe kpeɖeŋutɔ bisiɔp le Makurdi, Nigeria, le 28 November 2008. Woɖoe titular bishop of Thucca le Mauretania le 28 November 2008 eye woɖoe bisiɔp le 24 January 2009. Woɖoe bisiɔp le Gboko, Nigeria, le 29 Dec 2012 dzi eye woɖoe le 24 February 2013 dzi.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Ezekiel Ayo Awosoga
text:
Ezekiel Ayo Awosoga (ƒe 195-2020) Anglikan vi si le Nigeria ye wo nye.

Ede suku le Immanuel College, Ibadan eye woɖoe le ƒe 1994. Le eya ŋutɔ ƒe nya nu la "Mewɔ nusiwo katã wode asi nam abe sɔlemehawo ƒe nunɔla, sɔhɛwo ƒe sɔlemehakplɔla kple Nyanyuigblɔlawo ƒe Habɔbɔ ƒe zimenɔla ene".

Hafi woatiae be nanye bisi la nufiala, si le Ijebu-Ode ƒe Nufiala.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Fan Bingbing
text:
Fan Bingbing (Chinagbe: 范冰冰, wodzi le 16 September 1981) nye Chinatɔ fefewɔla. Tso ƒe 2013 va ɖo ƒe 2017 me la, wotsɔe de ame xɔŋkɔ si xɔa fetu gãtɔ kekeake le Forbes China ƒe ame 100 ƒe ŋkɔwo me le esi wònɔa ame 10 gbãtɔwo dome ƒe sia ƒe tso ƒe 2006. Edze le Time magazine ƒe ame 100 siwo kpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe amewo dzi wu ƒe ŋkɔwo me le ƒe 2017 me.

Fan ƒe dɔ gbãtɔ nye Ɣedzeƒe Asia sinima kple television, vevietɔ edze le drama siwo kplɔ wo nɔewo ɖo siwo nye My Fair Princess (ƒe 1998–1999) me. Eƒe ŋgɔyiyi va le sinima si nye Cell Phone (2003) si nye China ƒe sinima si xɔ ga geɖe wu le ƒea me. Eyi edzi wɔ Chinatɔwo ƒe sinima geɖewo, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye Lost in Beijing (ƒe 2007), Buddha Mountain (ƒe 2011) kple Double Xposure (ƒe 2012). Le sinima si nye I Am Not Madame Bovary (ƒe 2016) ƒe tanya ta la, Fan xɔ kafukafu tso Sika Sɔ Sinimawɔƒe, Tokyo Dukɔwo Dome Sinimawɔƒe, San Sebastián Dukɔwo Dome Sinimawɔƒe kple Sikakoklozi ƒe Kafukafuhawo gbɔ. Eƒe duta sinima me akpawo dometɔ aɖewoe nye Franseawo ƒe sinima si nye Stretch (ƒe 2011); Koreatɔwo ƒe sinima si nye My Way (ƒe 2011); Amerikatɔwo ƒe kalẽtɔ gãwo ƒe sinima si nye X-Men: Days of Future Past (ƒe 2014) kple Hong Kong-China-Amerikatɔwo ƒe sinima si nye Skiptrace (ƒe 2015).

title: James Tanimola Ayorinde
text:
james Tanimola Ayorinde, si wonya nyuie wu be J.T. Wodzi Ayorinde le ƒe 1907 me eye wòku le ƒe 1970-awo me. Enye Nigeriatɔwo ƒe Agbalẽŋlɔla Gãtɔ (kple dɔdzikpɔlagã) gbãtɔ le Nigeria Baptisttɔwo ƒe Takpekpea me, le ƒe 1960-awo me.
Ayorinde nye Agbalẽŋlɔla Gãtɔ tso ƒe 1962 vaseɖe esime wòxɔ dzudzɔ le dɔme le ƒe 1970-awo me.

Wonɔ te ɖe Yorubatɔwo ƒe kɔnuwo dzi gblɔ be, "woɖee fia Ifa nunɔla si wɔa afakaka le ŋkɔyɔyɔ ƒe wɔnaa me be anye Ifa nunɔla." Eƒe ŋkɔ, Tanimola, gɔmee nye, "Amekae nya bubu?" 

Bubutɔ Ðɔkta Ayorinde ɖe Mobola Ayorinde, amesi nye Nigeria Baptisttɔwo ƒe Takpekpea ƒe Nyɔnuwo ƒe Dutanyanyuigblɔlawo ƒe Habɔbɔ ƒe Dukplɔla.

Ayorinde nye Nigeria dukɔa ƒe amedɔdɔ, kpakple ehati Baptist-nunɔla, Solomon Adeniyi Babalola, yi Dukɔwo Dome Xexeame Katã ƒe Nyanyuigbɔgblɔ Ŋuti Takpekpe si wowɔ le ƒe 1974 Dukɔwo Dome Takpekpe si Ku Ðe Xexeame Katã ƒe Nyanyuigbɔgblɔ Ŋu me, Lausanne, Switzerland.

title: Dandeson Coates Crowther
text:
dandeson Coates Crowther  
OBE  (24 September 1844 –1938) nye The Niger ƒe Saɖaganunɔlagã tso ƒe 1876 vaseɖe ƒe 1926.

Ajayi Crowther ƒe viŋutsu, Bisiɔp le Niger, kple Afrika Anglikan bisiɔp gbãtɔ le Nigeria exɔ hehe le CMS Kɔledzi, Islington. Enɔ gɔmeɖoanyi ƒe klass me le CMS Gbeŋutise Suku, Lagos le ƒe 1860 me. Woɖoe saɖaganunɔla le St Mary's Church, Islington le 10 June 1870;[14] kple nunɔla le 12 March 1871. Enɔ Bonny[16] vaseɖe esime woɖoe Saɖaganunɔlagã.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Mɔ̃ɖaŋununya ƒe Nɔnɔmetata
text: Mɔ̃ɖaŋununya ƒe Nɔnɔmetata - Nuŋlɔɖi si me nɔnɔmetata si me nɔnɔmetata le le eye wowɔe, abe se ene, to dɔwɔnuwo ƒe kpekpeɖeŋu me, eye wometsɔa asi ƒoa nu zi geɖe o. Nutata la, tsɔ kpe ɖe mɔ̃ɖaŋununya ƒe nɔnɔme aɖe ŋu, nye mɔ̃ɖaŋununya ƒe nɔnɔmetata ƒomeviwo dometɔ ɖeka, do ƒome kple xɔtuɖaŋu ƒe nɔnɔmetata [. Nutata, woate ŋu azã nɔnɔmetata la na nɔnɔmetatawo ƒe nyatakakawo ɖeɖefia, si me mɔ̃ ƒe nɔnɔmetatawo zazã hã le. Woɖe nyatakaka siwo ku ɖe nukpɔkpɔ kple nukpɔkpɔ kabakaba ŋu fia le nɔnɔmetata ƒe nɔnɔme me: nɔnɔmetatawo, nɔnɔmetatawo, fli, alo woƒe ƒuƒoƒo. Wozãa xɔ siwo zãa nutata dɔwɔnuwo hena nɔnɔmetata me kuxiwo gbɔ kpɔnu na geometric kuxiwo.

title: Simon Bala
text:
simon Bala (ku le ƒe 2008 me) nye Anglikan Bisiɔp le Kubwa le Abuja Nutome le Nigeria Sɔlemeha la me.
Wokɔe be wòanye Kubwa ƒe Bisiɔp mɔɖela le March 13, 2005 dzi; enye Gusau ƒe Bisiɔp tsã.
Eku le ƒe 2008 me,eye ​​Fiavi Akamisoko va xɔ ɖe eteƒe abe bisiɔp ene.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Cornelius S S Bello
text:
cornelius S S Bello nye Anglikan bisiɔp le Nigeria: enye Zaria Bisiɔp, saɖaganuto ewo dometɔ ɖeka le Anglikan Nutome Kaduna me, eya ŋutɔ hã nye nuto 14 siwo le Nigeria Sɔlemeha la me dometɔ ɖeka.

Enye Zaria ƒe Bisiɔp vaseɖe ƒe 2017 me esime wòxɔ dzudzɔ le dɔme eye Abiodun Ogunyemi va xɔ ɖe eteƒe.

Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Jules Jean Baptiste Anglès
text:
jules Jean Baptiste Anglès (28 July 1778 – 16 January 1828) nye Franse dunyahela si nye Kpovitɔwo ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla hena ɣeyiɣi kpui aɖe le ƒe 1814 me.

Ƒe gbãtɔwo
Wodzi Jules Jean Baptiste Anglès le Grenoble, Isère, le July 28, 1778. Fofoa nye Jean-
François Anglès (ƒe 1736-1828), si nye senyala kple aɖaŋuɖola na Grenoble
Sewɔtakpekpe ƒe Xɔ Gã la, amesi wolé le Franseawo ƒe Tɔtrɔ Kpata la me eye wònɔ gaxɔ
me ɣleti 18 hafi woɖe asi le eŋu le 9 Thermidor (27 July 1794). Jules Jean Baptiste Anglès
va ge ɖe École Polytechnique me le December 1799 me.

Fiaɖuƒe Gbãtɔ
Anglès va zu Akɔntabubudzikpɔla le Dukɔa ƒe Aɖaŋudeha ƒe ƒudzisrafowo ƒe akpa dzi
le February 11, 1806. Woɖoe Dɔdzikpɔla le Silesia tso December 1806, emegbe le Salzburg le April 1809 me, eye emegbe woɖoe dɔdzikpɔla le Vienna le July 27, 1809.
Wowɔe dɔdzikpɔla des requêtes (france) le 15 November 1809. Gbemagbe ke wowɔe Fiaɖuƒea ƒe Baron eye wotsɔe de kpovitɔwo ƒe dɔ bliboa dzi le Paris ƒe nuto 3 lia me. Enye Kpovitɔwo ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla le ɣeyiɣi kpui aɖe ƒe dziɖuɖu me le ƒe 1814 me.

Bourbon Gbugbɔgaɖɔɖo
Esi woɖe Kpovitɔwo ƒe Dɔwɔƒegã ƒe Dɔwɔƒea ɖa le May 1814 me to [[Bourbon
Gbugbɔgaɖɔɖo gbãtɔ]] me la, wode Anglès dɔ asi na Dukɔa ƒe Aɖaŋudeha. Wowɔe Dukɔa ƒe Aɖaŋuɖola le March 17, 1815. Le March 20, 1815 dzi la, edze France Fia Louis XVIII
yome yi Ghent, afisi wòtrɔ asi le Moniteur Royaliste ŋu le. Le gbugbɔgaɖoanyi evelia megbe la, le August 22, 1815 dzi la, wotiam be manye Hautes-Alpes teƒenɔla. Woɖoe Dukɔa ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla le Privy Council me le September 19, 1815. Tso September 29, 1815 va ɖo December 19, 1821 dzi la, enye Kpovitɔwo ƒe Dukplɔla. Exɔ ɖe [[Élie, duc
Decazes]], teƒe le kpovitɔwo ƒe nuto me eye Guy Delavau va xɔ ɖe eteƒe.

Anglès ku le eƒe Chateau de Cornillon, Mably, Loire, le January 16, 1828 dzi, esime wòxɔ ƒe 49.
