Nyatakakatsoƒewo

title: Maribor
text:
Maribor nye du gãtɔ evelia le Slovenia eye wònye du gãtɔ kekeake le Lower Styria nuto si me wowɔa kɔnu le la me. Enye Maribor Dua ƒe Dudzikpɔƒe hã ƒe nɔƒe. Maribor nye Slovenia ƒe ɣedzeƒe gome ƒe ganyawo, dɔdzikpɔkpɔ, sukudede kple dekɔnuwo hã ƒe teƒe.

Abe Sloveniatɔwo ƒe to vovovo me tɔwo ƒe anyigbamama akpa gãtɔ ene la, Maribor nɔ Habsburgtɔwo ƒe dziɖuɖu te vaseɖe ƒe 1918 me, esime Rudolf Master kple eƒe amewo kpɔ dua ta na Slovenia, Croatia kple Serbia Dukɔa, si va kpe ɖe Serbia Fiaɖuƒea ŋu emegbe tsɔ wɔ Yugoslavia Fiaɖuƒea. Le ƒe 1991 me la, Maribor va zu Slovenia si nɔ eɖokui si la ƒe akpa aɖe.

Wotia Maribor, kpakple Portugaltɔwo ƒe du si nye Guimarães, be wòanye Europa ƒe Dekɔnuwo ƒe Fiadu le ƒe 2012 me.

title: Ljubljana
text:
Ljubljana (si wogayɔna kple ŋutinya me ŋkɔ bubuwo) nye Slovenia ƒe fiadu kple du gãtɔ kekeake. Enye dukɔa ƒe dekɔnu, sukudede, ganyawo, dunyahehe kple dziɖuɖudɔwɔƒe.

Le blema la, Romatɔwo ƒe du aɖe si woyɔna be Emona tsi tre ɖe nutoa me. Woƒo nu tso Ljubljana ŋutɔ ŋu zi gbãtɔ le ƒe alafa 12 lia ƒe afã gbãtɔ me. Esi wòle asitsamɔ aɖe si le Adriatic-ƒua ƒe dziehe kple Danube nutoa dome titina ta la, enye Carniola ƒe ŋutinya me fiadu, si nye Habsburg-fiaɖuƒea ƒe akpa siwo Sloveniatɔwo nɔ la dometɔ ɖeka. Enɔ Habsburg ƒe dziɖuɖu te tso Titinaɣeyiɣiwo me vaseɖe esime wogbã Austria-Hungary Fiaɖuƒea le ƒe 1918. Le Xexemeʋa II megbe la, Ljubljana va zu Socialist Republic of Slovenia, si nye Socialist Federal Republic of Yugoslavia ƒe akpa aɖe ƒe fiadu. Dua lé ɖoƒe sia me ɖe asi vaseɖe esime Slovenia va xɔ ɖokuisinɔnɔ le ƒe 1991 me eye Ljubljana va zu dukɔ yeye si woɖo la ƒe fiadu.

title: Lubumbashi
text: Lubumbashi (ŋkɔwo tsã: Élisabethville (Fransegbe); Elisabethstad (help·info) (Netherlandsgbe)) nye du gãtɔ evelia le Democratic Republic of the Congo, si le dukɔa ƒe dzigbeɣedzeƒekpa dzi, le liƒo si le Zambia dome. Haut-Katanga Nutome ƒe fiadu kple du vevitɔ, Lubumbashi nye tomenukuƒewo ƒe titina le nutoa me, eye wòwɔa dɔ abe dukɔa ƒe tomenukuƒe gãtɔ geɖewo ƒe taɖoƒe ene.[3] Womenya amewo ƒe xexlẽme si ŋu kakaɖedzi le o, gake wobu akɔnta be dua ƒe dugã me nɔlawo ade 2,584,000 le ƒe 2021 me.

title: Kananga
text:
Kananga, si woyɔna tsã be Luluabourg alo Luluaburg, nye Kasai-Central Nutome ƒe fiadu le Democratic Republic of the Congo eye wònye Kasaï-Occidental Nutome tsã ƒe fiadu. Enye dugã enelia si me amewo sɔ gbɔ ɖo wu le dukɔa me, eye wobu akɔnta be ame 1,524,000 ye le eme le ƒe 2021 me.[3]

Dua te ɖe Lulua Tɔsisi, si nye Kasai Tɔsisi kple Ilebo-Lubumbashi ketekemɔ ƒe alɔdze aɖe ŋu. Asitsaƒe kple dɔdzikpɔƒe vevi aɖee wònye, blemanudzraɖoƒe kple Kananga Yameʋudzeƒe le afima.

title: Bukavu
text:
Bukavu nye du aɖe si le Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC) ƒe ɣedzeƒe gome, si le Kivu-ta la ƒe dzigbeɣetoɖoƒe gome ʋĩ, le Cyangugu ƒe ɣetoɖoƒe gome le Rwanda, eye Ruzizi Tɔsisi ƒe doƒea ma tso egbɔ. Enye South Kivu nutoa ƒe fiadu eye le ƒe 2012 me la, eƒe amewo ƒe xexlẽme nye 806,940.

Le ƒe 2021 me la, wobu akɔnta be dugã me nɔlawo ƒe xexlẽme nye 1,133,000.

title: Mbuji-Mayi
text: Mbuji-Mayi alo Mbujimayi (si woyɔna tsã be Bakwanga) nye du kple Kasai-Ɣedzeƒe Nutome ƒe fiadu le Democratic Republic of Congo ƒe dzigbe titina. Enye du gãtɔ evelia le dukɔa me, kplɔ fiadu Kinshasa ɖo gake edo ŋgɔ na Lubumbashi, Kisangani kple Kananga, togbɔ be womenya amewo ƒe xexlẽme tututu o hã. Akɔntabubuwo tso ƒe 2010 ƒe CIA World Factbook si bu be amewo ƒe xexlẽme nye 1,480,000[3] va ɖo amesiwo ade 3,500,000 si Dukɔ Ƒoƒuawo bu akɔnta le ƒe 2008 me.

title: West Virginia
text:
West Virginia nye dukɔ aɖe le United States. Eƒe dukɔmenɔlawo ƒe xexlẽme ɖo 1.793.716 (2020) lɔƒo.

United States

title: North Carolina
text:
North Carolina nye dukɔ aɖe le United States. Eƒe dukɔmenɔlawo ƒe xexlẽme ɖo 10.698.973 (2022) lɔƒo.

United States

title: Balgis Osman-Elasha
text: Balgis Osman-Elasha nye Sudantɔ yame ƒe tiatia nunyala sia nu tso yame ƒe tiatiawɔblɔɖe le Afrika ŋu eye wòdoa ɖa le Afrika ŋu ŋkume si li tegbee kple ŋutasẽnuwɔla. Enye IPCC ƒe Dzesidede Enelia si na Dziɖuɖuwo Dome Elawo ƒe ɣeyiɣi su

title: Hanshin Akpɔkplɔwo
text:
Hanshin Tigers nye Japantɔwo ƒe baseball-ha aɖe.

ƒe ŋgɔdonya
　
Hanshin Tigers nye Japan ƒe baseball-ha si ame geɖe lɔ̃na wu eye ame gbogbo aɖewo kplɔa wo ɖo.

si fia mɔe

Ame aɖe si ŋkɔe nye Shofu Okada ye nye dɔdzikpɔla eye amewo lɔ̃nɛ wu fefewɔlawo.

title: Edgar de Wahl
text: Edgar de Wahl (23-Agudzɔwo 1867 - 9-Masa 1948) la dzi Baltic Germanwo meɖeaɖea, mathematicianwo lɔ̃xɔ̃wo, akɔ̃wo nu tsofɛ a, ame a kple Interlingue, eƒe ɖo yi a lɔ̃xɔ̃wo na Occidental, kple eye ŋuɖɔ wó.

title: Einosuke Akiya
text:
Einosuke Akiya wodzii le July 15, 1930, enye Japantɔwo ƒe Buddhatɔwo ƒe ŋgɔnɔla, esubɔ abe Soka Gakkai ƒe Zimenɔla atɔ̃lia tso July 18, 1981, vaseɖe November 9, 2006. Esi wòɖe asi le ɖoƒe ma ŋu vɔ la, eva zu Soka Gakkai ƒe Kplɔla Kɔkɔtɔ ƒe Kpekpe ƒe Zimenɔla le November 2006 me.Ewɔ dɔ hã abe Soka Gakkai ƒe Ŋutsuwo ƒe Dɔwɔƒe ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla, Sɔhɛwo ƒe Dɔwɔƒe, Titina Kpekpea ƒe Zimenɔla kple Soka Gakkai ƒe Kofu Shimbun Kpekpe, Sōka Yunivɛsiti ƒe Aɖaŋuɖola Gãtɔ, Tokyo Fuji ƒe Aɖaŋudɔwo ƒe Blemanudzraɖoƒe ƒe Bubutɔ Dɔdzikpɔla, Min -On Concert Association, Toda ƒe Xexeame Katã ƒe Ŋutifafa kple Ðoɖowo Ŋuti Numekuku Dɔwɔƒe ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla kple Soka Gakkai International (SGI) ƒe Dukplɔla ƒe ɖoƒenɔla.

Agbenɔnɔ le ɖevime
Wodzi Akiya le Tokyo. Ede Tokyo Dugã me Bunkyo Sekɛndrisuku. Esi wòxɔ Fransegbe me agbalẽsɔsrɔ̃ ƒe ɖaseɖigbalẽ le Waseda Yunivɛsiti vɔ la, eyi ɖawɔ dɔ le Seikyo Shimbun Dɔwɔƒe, si nye Japan ƒe gbesiagbe nyadzɔdzɔgbalẽwo dometɔ ɖeka. Ewɔ dɔ hã abe kɔpiwo ŋuti nuŋlɔla ene.

Soka Gakkai ƒe zimenɔlanyenye
Eva xɔ ɖe Hiroshi Hōjō si Do ŋgɔ nɛ teƒe abe
Soka Gakkai ƒe Zimenɔla 5 lia tso
Dzove 18, 1981 vaseɖe November 9, 2006 ,eye Minoru Harada va xɔ ɖe eteƒe.

Nusiwo ŋu woƒo nu tsoe

title: Ariyavangsagatayana (Chuan Utthayi
text:
Ariyavangsagatayana, si wogayɔna be Ariyavangsagatayana VI, nye Somdet Phra Sangharaja 16 lia 1965–1971 (Thailandtɔwo ƒe ɣletigbalẽ 2508–2514). Wodzii le ƒe 1897 me be Juan Srisom le Ratchaburi Nutome. Ewɔ dɔ hã abe Wat Makit ƒe saɖaganunɔla ene vaseɖe esime wòku le ƒe 1971 me.
Amesi do ŋgɔ nɛ enye Ariyavangsagatayana (Yoo Ñāṇodayo) eye amesi va xɔ ɖe eteƒe enye Ariyavangsagatayana (Pun Puṇṇasiri).

gotagome kadodowo

Blemafofoa ƒe foto Do ŋgɔ na Ariyavangsagatayana (Yoo Ñaṇodayo) . Thailand ƒe Blemafofo Kɔkɔtɔ Ƒe 1965-1971 va xɔ ɖe eteƒe Ariyavangsagatayana (Pun Puṇṇasiri) ƒe ŋkɔ . Ŋusẽdzikpɔkpɔ Trɔ asi le esia ŋu le Wikidata Afɔkpodzi ƒe dzesi Thailandtɔ mawusubɔla aɖe ƒe agbemeŋutinya sia nye stub. Àte ŋu akpe ɖe Wikipedia ŋu ne èkekee ɖe enu. Afɔkpodzi ƒe dzesi Nyati sia si ku ɖe Buddhatɔwo ƒe osɔfo aɖe ŋu la nye nyati aɖe. Àte ŋu akpe ɖe Wikipedia ŋu ne èkekee ɖe enu. title: Ngawang Lobsang Thupten Gyatso Jigdral Chokley Namgyal,
text:
mtsho; 12 February 1876 – 17 December 1933) nye Dalai Lama 13 lia le Tibet,[2] woɖoe fiazikpui dzi le zitɔtɔ ƒe ɣeyiɣi aɖe kple Qing Fiaɖuƒea ƒe mumu me. Woyɔe be "Wietɔ̃lia Gãtɔ", wonyae hã be egaɖe gbeƒã Tibet ƒe dukɔa ƒe ɖokuisinɔnɔ, eye ɖe eƒe ɖɔɖɔɖo kple egbegbe tɔtrɔ ƒe ɖoɖowo ta.Le ƒe 1878 me la, woda asi ɖe edzi be enye Dalai Lama ƒe gbugbɔgadzɔ. Wokplɔe yi Lhasa eye Panchen Lama, Tenpai Wangchuk, tsɔ eƒe adzɔgbeɖeɖe do ŋgɔ na eƒe gɔmedzela, eye wona ŋkɔe be "Ngawang Lobsang Thupten Gyatso Jigdral Chokley Namgyal".[1] Le ƒe 1879 me la, woɖoe fiazikpui dzi le Potala Fiasã me, gake mexɔ dunyahehe ƒe ŋusẽ o vaseɖe ƒe 1895 me,[3] esi wòɖo eƒe tsitsimeThubten Gyatso nye nunyala ɖɔɖɔɖowɔla kple dunyahela bibi aɖe. Eƒe dɔe nye be wòatsi tre ɖe Britaintɔwo ƒe mɔzɔzɔ yi Tibet ŋu, agbugbɔ amehehe aɖo saɖagaxɔmenɔlawo ƒe agbenɔnɔ me, eye wòadzi hamemegãwo ƒe xexlẽme ɖe edzi be woagatsɔ ŋusẽ si gbɔ eme ade saɖagaxɔmenɔlawo si me o.

Agbenɔnɔ le ɖevime
Wodzi Dalai Lama 13 lia le kɔƒe si nye Thakpo Langdun me, gbeɖeka woɖo ʋu, le dzigbeɣedzeƒe gome tso Lhasa,[4] eye ​​wòte ɖe Sam-ye Saɖagaxɔ ŋu, le Tak-po nuto me, le June 1876[5] me na dzilawo Kunga Rinchen kple Lobsang Dolma, agbledela atsu kple asi.[1] Laird gblɔ eƒe dzigbezã be enye 27 May 1876,[4] eye ​​Mullin gblɔ be ŋdi kanya le Dzo Mouse ƒe ƒe (1876) ƒe ɣleti 5 lia dzi.[6]Kadodo kple Agvan Dorzhiev

Dalai Lama 13 lia ƒe saɖeagaxɔ, Nechung, Tibet
Wodzi Agvan Dorzhiev (ƒe 1854–1938), Khori-Buryat Mongoltɔ, kple Russiatɔ tevi, le kɔƒe si nye Khara-Shibir, si medidi tso Ulan Ude gbɔ o, le Baikal Ta la ƒe ɣedzeƒe gome.[7] Edzo le aƒeme le ƒe 1873 me esime wòxɔ ƒe 19 be yeasrɔ̃ nu le Gelugpa saɖagaxɔ, Drepung, si te ɖe Lhasa ŋu, si nye saɖagaxɔ gãtɔ kekeake le Tibet. Esi wòwu mawusubɔsubɔ ŋuti nusɔsrɔ̃ si wowɔna tso blema ke nu dzidzedzetɔe la, edze Buddhatɔwo ƒe sukudede ƒe ɖaseɖigbalẽ si nye Geshey Lharampa (si nye ‘Buddhatɔwo ƒe Xexemenunya ƒe Ðɔkta’ ƒe ɖoƒe kɔkɔtɔ) gɔme.[8] Eyi eƒe nusɔsrɔ̃ dzi va zu Tsanid-Hambo, alo "Buddhatɔwo ƒe Xexemenunya ƒe Aƒetɔ".[9] Eva zu hehenala kple "nyaʋiʋlihati" na ƒewuivi Dalai Lama, amesi va zu xɔlɔ̃ kplii ŋutɔ eye emegbe wòzãe abe amedɔdɔ ene le Russia kple dukɔ bubuwo me.[10]Esi Dalai Lama si la, Qing fiaƒomea ɖe gbeƒãe enumake be woɖee le zi dzi eye wogagblɔ be yewokpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe Tibet dzi ake, eye woxɔ Nepal kple Bhutan hã.[12] Wode asi Lhasa ƒe Nubabla te le Potala le Great Britain kple Tibet dome le Amban kple Nepal kple Bhutan teƒenɔlawo ŋkume le September 7, 1904 dzi.[13] Woɖo kpe ƒe 1904 ƒe nubabla ƒe ɖoɖowo dzi le ƒe 1906 ƒe nubabla[14] si wode asi le Great Britain kple China dome me. Britaintɔwo, le ga si woxe tso Qing ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒea gbɔ ta, hã lɔ̃ be yewomaxɔ Tibet ƒe anyigba alo yewomade nu Tibet ƒe dziɖuɖu me o, esime China lɔ̃ be yemaɖe mɔ na dutadukɔ bubu aɖeke be wòade nu Tibet ƒe anyigba alo ememe dziɖuɖu me o.[14 ][15] .

Ðewohĩ numekuku gbãtɔwo le akpa sia me. Taflatse nawɔe wòanyo ɖe edzi to nya siwo wogblɔ la me toto kple nyayɔyɔ siwo le fli me tsɔtsɔ kpee me. Ele be woaɖe nya siwo me numekuku gbãtɔwo ɖeɖeko le ɖa. (February 2021) (Srɔ̃ alesi nàɖe template gbedasi sia ɖa kple ɣeyiɣi si nàɖe ɖa)
Wosusu be Dalai Lama kpɔ gome le Tibettɔwo ƒe Aglãdzedze si tsi tre ɖe dutatɔwo ŋu le ƒe 1905 me la me. Britaintɔwo ƒe Lhasa dzi dzedze le ƒe 1904 me gblẽ nu le Tibet Buddhatɔwo ƒe xexeame ŋu,[16][tsoƒe si ŋu kakaɖedzi mele o?] si na Tibet Buddhatɔwo ƒe seselelãme si gbɔ eme tsi tre ɖe ɣetoɖoƒetɔwo kple Kristotɔwo ŋu. Britaintɔwo ƒe amedzidzedzea hã he Qingtɔwo ƒe nudede Tibettɔwo ƒe nutoawo me vevie eye wòdzɔ kpata, be woawɔ nutoawo ɖe ŋgɔ, axɔ wo ɖe wo nɔewo ŋu, eye woana woahe Qingtɔwo ƒe titinadziɖuɖu sesẽ te.[17] Tibettɔwo ƒe Lama siwo nɔ Batang yi aglãdzedze dzi le ƒe 1905 me, eye wowu Chinatɔwo ƒe dziɖuɖumegãwo, Franse mawunyadɔgbedelawo, kple Kristotɔ Katolikotɔ siwo trɔ dzime. Tibettɔwo ƒe saɖagaxɔmenɔlawo tsi tre ɖe Katolikotɔwo ŋu, wogbã Katoliko mawunyadɔgbedelawo ƒe Sɔlemeha la, eye wowu Katoliko mawunyadɔgbedelawo kple Qingtɔwo ƒe amegãwo katã.[18][19][edo kpo kpeɖodzinana] Manchu Qingtɔwo ƒe amegã Fengquan la, Tibettɔwo ƒe Batang Lamas, kpakple Manchutɔwo ƒe amegã bubuwo wu Han China Qing dziɖuɖumegãwo kple Franse Katoliko nunɔlawo, amesiwo katã wowu esime aglãdzedzea dze egɔme le March 1905. Tibettɔ Gelugpa saɖagaxɔmenɔla siwo le Nyarong, Chamdo, kple Litang hã dze aglã hedze mawunyadɔgbedelawo kple sɔlemexɔwo dzi eye wowu ɣetoɖoƒetɔwo.[20] Britaintɔwo ƒe Lhasa dzi dzedze, mawunyadɔgbedelawo, kple Qingtɔwo do ƒome le Tibettɔwo ŋkume, abe amedzro futɔ siwo dzi woadze ene.[21] Zhongtian (Chungtien) nye afisi Batang saɖagaxɔ nɔ.[22] Tibettɔwo wu dzimetrɔlawo, tɔ dzo mawunyadɔgbedelawo ƒe xɔ le Batang le woƒe amedzrowo ƒe fuléle ta.[23][non-primary source needed] Aƒetɔ Francis Edward Younghusband ŋlɔ bena Le ɣeyiɣi ma ke me la, le Tibet ƒe akpa si tsi tre ɖe eŋu la, wogakpɔtɔ sɔ gbɔ wu adãwɔwɔ vevie, wonya Roma Katolikomawunyadɔgbedelawo le woƒe aƒe siwo woɖo ɣeyiɣi didi aɖee nye sia le Batang, wowu woƒe dzimetrɔla geɖe, eye wotɔ dzo mawunyadɔgbedeƒea.[24][non-primary source needed] Seselelãme si tsi tre ɖe Kristotɔwo ŋu kple amedzrowo ƒe fuléle nɔ dzidzim ɖe edzi le Tibet.[25]

No. 10. Dɔdasi tso Aɖaŋuɖotakpekpemegã Wilkinson gbɔ yi na Aƒetɔ E. Satow, si woŋlɔ le Yünnan-fu, 28th April, 1905. (Woxɔe le London 14th June, 1905.) Pere Maire, si nye Roma Katoliko Dutanyanyuigblɔlawo ƒe Provicaire le afisia, yɔ esia ŋdi be yeatsɔ telegram aɖe si wòxɔ tso eƒe Mission le Tali ƒe nunɔla aɖe si nye afimatɔ gbɔ teti koe nye ema la lam. Telegram la, si le Latingbe me la, woŋlɔ ŋkeke si nye Tali, April 24 lia, eye wògblɔ be Batang ƒe lamawo wu PP. Woxɔe se be Musset kple Soulie, kpakple dzimetrɔla 200. Wotɔ dzo sɔlemexɔ si le Atense, eye lamawo lé mɔ si yi Tachien-lu la ɖe asi. Pere Bourdonnec (Franseawo ƒe Tibet Dutanyanyuigblɔlawo ƒe Habɔbɔ me tɔ bubu) ɖe kuku be Pere Maire nawɔ afɔɖeɖe aɖe. Le esia ta Pere Maire ŋlɔ agbalẽ na M. Leduc, si nye nye dɔwɔhati Fransetɔ, amesi ɖikeke mele eme o be aɖo dze kple Dudzikpɔlagã la. Provicaire la ƒe susue nye be Dalai Lama tsãtɔ ƒe sededewoe dze mawunyadɔgbedelawo dzi, be wonye Europatɔ siwo te ɖe wo ŋu wu siwo dzi wòate ŋu abia hlɔ̃ le eƒe ŋukpe ta. Enyo ale gbegbe be wòagblɔ be yeana nyatakaka bubu ɖesiaɖe si yeate ŋu axɔ la lam. Mele amewuwua ŋuti nyatakakawo ɖom ɖe mi to telegraph dzi.

— Mekpɔ, &c., (Wode asi ete) W. H. WILKINSON. East India (Tibet): Agbalẽ Siwo Ku Ðe Tibet Ŋu [kple Agbalẽ Bubuwo ...], Tata 2–4, Great Britain. Dutanyawo Gbɔkpɔƒe, axa 10. 12., [26][27] Ƒe 1999 me.
Le October 1906 me la, John Weston Brooke nye Eŋlisitɔ gbãtɔ si xɔ nyaselawo kple Dalai Lama, eye emegbe wona mɔe be wòaxɔ ŋgɔ na mɔzɔzɔ eve ayi Tibet.[28] Azɔ hã le ƒe 1906 me la, wokpe Aƒetɔ Charles Alfred Bell, be wòava srã Thubten Chökyi Nyima, Panchen Lama 9 lia kpɔ le Tashilhunpo, afisi wowɔ numedzodzro xɔlɔ̃wɔwɔtɔe tso dunyahehe ƒe nɔnɔmea ŋu le.[29]

Emegbe Dalai Lama va nɔ Kumbum Saɖagaxɔ gã si te ɖe Xining ŋu me eye emegbe wòzɔ mɔ yi ɣedzeƒe gome yi Buddhatɔwo ƒe to ene siwo le kɔkɔe wu le China, Wutai Shan si didi tso Beijing gbɔ kilometa 300 la dzi. Tso afisia la, Dalai Lama xɔ amedɔdɔwo ƒe atsyã aɖe: William Woodville Rockhill, Amerikatɔwo ƒe Subɔsubɔhakplɔla le Peking; Gustaf Mannerheim, si nye Russia Fiaɖuƒea ƒe asrafomegã, si va zu Finland ƒe Aʋafiagã kple Finland ƒe Dukplɔla 6 lia emegbe; Germanytɔ ɖɔkta aɖe si tso Peking Dudɔnunɔlawo ƒe Dɔwɔƒe; Eŋlisi anyigbayeyedila aɖe si ŋkɔe nye Christopher Irving; R.F. Johnson, si nye Britaintɔwo ƒe dutadɔnunɔla si tso Nutomedziɖuɖudɔwɔƒe; kple Henri D'Ollone, Franseawo ƒe asrafomegã kple asrafomegã.[30] Dalai Lama nɔ aʋawɔwɔ aɖe wɔm be yeado ŋusẽ yeƒe dukɔwo dome kadodowo eye yeaɖe yeƒe fiaɖuƒea tso Chinatɔwo ƒe dziɖuɖu te.

Le June 1908 me la, C.G.E. Mannerheim do go Thubten Gyatso le Wutai Shan le eƒe mɔzɔzɔ tso Turkestan yi Peking me. Mannerheim ŋlɔ eƒe ŋkekenyuigbalẽ kple nuŋlɔɖiwo ɖe Swedengbe me be yeatsɔ aɣla nyateƒe si wònye be yeƒe ameƒomevinyenye kple dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya ƒe habɔb…hã nye nyatakakawo nuƒoƒoƒu ƒe dɔdasi si me wowɔa nu geɖe le na Russia Fiaɖuƒea ƒe asrafowo. Dalai Lama 13 lia yra seda ɣi aɖe na Russiatɔwo ƒe Czar. Esi Mannerheim tsi dzi ɖe eƒe dedienɔnɔ ŋu ta la, ena Browning tu Tibet ƒe gbɔgbɔ me papa eye wòfia alesi wòagbugbɔ aʋawɔnua ade emee.[31][32]

"Edze ƒã be," Dalai Lama 14 lia gblɔ be, "Di vevie nɔ Dalai Lama 13 lia me be yeaɖo ƒomedodo kple Russia, eye mesusu hã be eke ɖi vie ɖe England ŋu le gɔmedzedzea me. Emegbe Dorjiev hã nɔ anyi. Le Eŋlisiawo gome la, enye a ŋkutsala, gake le nyateƒe me la, enye agbalẽnyala nyui aɖe kple Buddhatɔwo ƒe saɖagaxɔmenɔla anukwaretɔ si tsɔ eɖokui na Dalai Lama 13 lia ŋutɔ."[33]

Le September 1908 me la, wona Dalai Lama be wòakpɔ nyaselawo le Guangxu Fiagã kple Fianyɔnu Ahosi Cixi gbɔ. Fiagã la dze agbagba be yeate gbe ɖe Tibet ƒe akpa si wòwɔ le ɖokuibɔbɔ me dzi, togbɔ be Dalai Lama gbe be yemabɔbɔ ɖe anyi nɛ o hã.[34] Enɔ Beijing vaseɖe ƒe 1908 ƒe nuwuwu.[12]

Esi wòtrɔ yi Tibet le December 1908 me la, edze dziɖuɖua gbugbɔgaɖoɖo gɔme, gake Qingtɔwo dɔ eya ŋutɔ ƒe asrafoha aɖe ɖe Tibet le ƒe 1910 me eye wòva hiã be wòasi ayi India.[35][36]

Le ƒe 1911 me la, woɖe Qing fiaƒomea ɖa le Xinhai Tɔtrɔ Kpata me eye kaka ƒe 1912 nawu enu la, wokplɔ Qing-srafo mamlɛawo do goe le Tibet.[citation needed]

Dunyahehe me ŋusẽ xɔxɔ

Dalai Lama 13 lia si tso Tibet, Britain Dunyahenyawo Gbɔkpɔla Charles Bell (wo ame evea siaa bɔbɔ nɔ anyi), kple Sidkeong Tulku Namgyal si tso Sikkim le ƒe 1910 me.
Le ƒe 1895 me la, Thubten Gyatso xɔ dziɖuɖu ƒe ŋusẽ tso saɖagaxɔ siwo kpɔ ŋusẽ gã aɖe tsã to Regent dzi la gbɔ. Le eƒe aboyomenɔnɔ ƒe ɣeyiɣi eve le ƒe 1904–1909 me, be yeasi le Britaintɔwo ƒe amedzidzedze le ƒe 1904 nu, eye tso ƒe 1910 va ɖo ƒe 1913 me be yeasi le Chinatɔwo ƒe amedzidzedze nu ta la, eva nya nu tso dukɔwo dome dunyahehe ƒe kuxi sesẽwo ŋu nyuie eye wònye Dalai Lama gbãtɔ si nya nu tso eŋu ƒe vevienyenye si le duta kadodowo ŋu. Dalai Lama, "si subɔsubɔhakplɔla ade kple kplɔla sue aɖe kpe ɖe eŋu" si me eƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ kplikplikpli, dutadɔnunɔla kple asrafomegã Tsarong Dzasa nɔ la, si to Jelep La[37] yi Sikkim kple Darjeeling, afisi wonɔ ƒe eve kloe. Le ɣeyiɣi sia me la, Fiagã ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ, Lord Minto, kpee va Calcutta, si kpe asi ɖe ƒomedodo gbugbɔgaɖo kple Britaintɔwo ŋu.[38][axa hiã]

Thubten Gyatso trɔ yi Lhasa le January 1913 me kple Tsarong Dzasa tso Darjeeling, afisi wònɔ aboyo me le tsã. China dziɖuɖu yeyea ɖe kuku ɖe Qing fiaƒome si nɔ anyi va yi ƒe nuwɔnawo ta eye wògblɔ be yeagbugbɔ Dalai Lama aɖo nɔƒe si wònɔ tsã. Eɖo eŋu be yemetsɔ ɖeke le Chinatɔwo ƒe ɖoƒewo me o eye wòle gbɔgbɔme kple dunyahehe me kplɔlanyenye xɔm le Tibet.[39]

Esi Thubten Gyatso trɔ gbɔ tso aboyo me le India le ƒe 1913 me la, exɔ duta kadodowo dzi kpɔkpɔ eye wòwɔ nu kple Maharaja kple Britain Dunyaheha ƒe amegã si le Sikkim kpakple Nepal fia tẽ tsɔ wu be wòana Kashag alo sewɔtakpekpea nawɔe.[40]

Nuŋlɔɖi siwo tso Russia Dutanyawo Gbɔkpɔha ƒe nudzraɖoƒewo me nyaʋiʋli tsitotsito le Dalai Lama 13 lia ŋu be Tibet menye China ƒe akpa aɖeke kpɔ o.[41] Thubten Gyatso ɖe gbeƒã ɖokuisinɔnɔ tso China gbɔ le ƒe 1913 ƒe gɔmedzedze (February 13), esi wòtrɔ gbɔ tso India le ƒe etɔ̃ ƒe aboyomenɔnɔ megbe. Emegbe eɖo Tibettɔwo ƒe aflaga ɖe ɖoɖo nu le eƒe nɔnɔme si li fifia nu.[42] Le ƒe 1912 ƒe nuwuwu la, woɖe Tibet ƒe posu ƒe gagbalẽ gbãtɔwo kple gadzraɖoƒegbalẽvi gbãtɔwo ɖe go.[citation needed]

Thubten Gyatso tu atikewɔlawo ƒe kɔledzi yeye (Mentsikang) le ƒe 1913 me le afisi wotu kɔdzi si wotu le tɔtrɔ kpata megbe si te ɖe Jokhang ŋu le.[43]

Wode se be woatsɔ atsi nufitifitiwɔwɔ nu le dziɖuɖumegãwo dome, woɖo dukɔa ƒe adzɔxexe ƒe ɖoɖo aɖe anyi hewɔ ɖe edzi, eye woɖo kpovitɔwo ƒe ha aɖe. Wotrɔ asi le tohehe ƒe ɖoɖoa ŋu eye wowɔ ɖeka le dukɔa me godoo. "Woɖe kufiatsotso ɖa keŋkeŋ eye woɖe ŋutilãmehehe dzi kpɔtɔ. Wona agbenɔnɔ le gaxɔwo me hã nyo ɖe edzi, eye woɖo dziɖuɖumegãwo be woakpɔ egbɔ be wolé nɔnɔme kple se siawo me ɖe asi."[44][45]

Woto xexemenunyafiafia ƒe ɖoɖo aɖe vɛ tsɔ kpe ɖe mawusubɔsubɔ ƒe hehenana ƒe ɖoɖoa ŋu. Thubten Gyatso dɔ sukuvi ene siwo ŋugbe wodo ɖe England be woava srɔ̃ nu, eye wòxɔ amedzrowo, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye Japantɔwo, Britaintɔwo kple Amerikatɔwo.[44]

Le eƒe mɔzɔzɔwo kple kadodo kple dutadukɔwo kple wo teƒenɔlawo (e.g., Pyotr Kozlov, Charles Alfred Bell kple Gustaf Mannerheim) ta la, Dalai Lama ɖe ɖetsɔleme fia ɖe xexeame ƒe nyawo ŋu eye wòto elektrikŋusẽ, telefon kple ʋu gbãtɔwo vɛ[citation hiã] yi Tibet. Ke hã, le eƒe agbe ƒe nuwuwu le ƒe 1933 me la, ekpɔe be Tibet le hehem ɖe megbe tso gotagome ŋusẽkpɔɖeamedziwo gbɔ.

Le eƒe agbe ƒe ewo mamlɛawo me la, Dalai Lama ŋutɔ ƒe subɔla, Thubten Kunphela, va xɔ dziɖuɖua eye wòxɔ ŋgɔ le dɔ vevi geɖewo wɔwɔ me hena egbegbe tɔtrɔ le Tibet. Le ƒe 1931 me la, woɖo dɔwɔƒe yeye aɖe si me gakuƒewo kple tuwɔƒewo le ɖe Trapchi, eye ŋusẽ si tso tsiŋusẽdɔwɔƒe gbãtɔ si le Tibet la tsɔa eƒe mɔ̃wo ʋunae. Woɖo egbegbe asrafowo ƒe hatsotso aɖe le ƒe ma ke me, esi aʋawɔwɔa dzɔ le Ɣedzeƒe Tibet vɔ megbe.[46]

Dalai Lama 13 lia le ƒe 1932 me, si nye ƒe si do ŋgɔ na eƒe ku
Le ƒe 1930 me la, Tibet-srafowo dze Xikang kple Qinghai dzi le China kple Tibet-ʋaa me. Le ƒe 1932 me la, Moslemtɔwo ƒe Qinghai kple Han-China Sichuan aʋakɔ siwo le Dukɔa ƒe Tɔtrɔ Kpata ƒe Asrafoha si China Moslemtɔwo ƒe Aʋafia Ma Bufang kple Han Aʋafia Liu Wenhui nɔ ŋgɔ na la ɖu Tibettɔwo ƒe asrafowo dzi le Qinghai–Tibet-ʋa si kplɔe ɖo me. Ma Bufang ɖu Tibet-srafowo dzi eye wògaxɔ nuto geɖe le Xikang nutoa me. Woxɔ Shiqu, Dengke, kple nuto bubuwo le Tibettɔwo si.[47][48][49] Wotutu Tibettɔwo ɖe megbe yi Jinsha tɔsisi la ƒe go kemɛ dzi.[50][51] Ma kple Liu xlɔ̃ nu Tibet dziɖuɖumegãwo be woagatsɔ dzideƒo atso Jinsha-tɔsisia ake o.[52] Ma Bufang ɖu Tibettɔwo dzi le Dan Chokorgon. Tibettɔwo ƒe aʋafia geɖewo tsɔ wo ɖokui na, eye Dalai Lama ɖe wo ɖe anyi.[53] Kaka August naɖo la, Tibettɔwo bu anyigba geɖe na Liu Wenhui kple Ma Bufang ƒe asrafowo ale gbegbe be Dalai Lama ɖo telefon dzi na Britain dziɖuɖu si le India be woakpe ɖe yewo ŋu. Britaintɔwo ƒe dunyahehe ƒe nyaƒoɖeamenu na Nanjing ɖe gbeƒãe be yeadzudzɔ aʋawɔwɔ.[54] Ma kple Liu de asi aʋawɔwɔ ƒe ɖoɖo vovovowo te kple Tibettɔwo le ƒe 1933 me, si na aʋawɔwɔa wu enu.[55][56][57]

Nyagblɔɖiwo kple ku
Dalai Lama 13 lia gblɔe ɖi hafi ku be:

Eteƒe madidi kura le anyigba sia dzi (si me mawusubɔsubɔ kple dunyahehe tsaka le ɖekawɔwɔ me) be ameflunuwɔnawo ate ŋu adzɔ tso egodo kple ememe. Ɣemaɣi la, ne míetsɔ dzideƒo kpɔ míaƒe anyigbamama ta o la, woate ŋu atsrɔ̃ míaƒe gbɔgbɔme amenyenye siwo dome Fofo kple Vi Aʋadziɖula (Dalai Lama kple Panchen Lama) hã le, míaƒe Lakangtɔwo (lama siwo wogbugbɔ dzi ƒe nɔƒewo) ƒe nunɔamesiwo kple ŋusẽwo kple woate ŋu akplɔ saɖagaxɔmenɔlawo adzoe. Gawu la, míaƒe dunyahehe ƒe ɖoɖo, si Dharma Fia Gã Etɔ̃awo (Tri Songtsen Gampo, Tri Songdetsen kple Tri Ralpachen) to vɛ la nu ayi evɔ naneke masusɔ o. Woaxɔ amewo katã ƒe nunɔamesiwo, ame kɔkɔwo kple ame tsɛwo, eye woazi ameawo dzi be woazu kluviwo. Ele be nu gbagbewo katã nado dzi le fukpekpe ŋkeke siwo nuwuwu meli na o me eye vɔvɔ̃ aƒo wo. Ɣeyiɣi sia tɔgbe ava.[58]

Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo

title: Edward Loure
text:
edward Loure est un kplɔla tanzanien du peuple maasaï kple un aʋawɔla des droits humains.

Emeŋutinya
1 Agbemeŋutinya
2 Nuwɔwɔ ɖe ame ŋu le hadome kple écologiste kple ŋkuléle ɖe nu ŋu
3 La dépossession des peuples ƒe ame ŋutɔ ƒe gbeɖiɖiwo
4 Notes et références
5 Voir ƒe aussi
5.1 Agbalẽwo ƒe xexlẽdzesiwo
5.2 Nyatiwo ƒe kadodowo
5.3 Nusiwo woxɔna le ame si le gota
Agbemeŋutinya
Edward Loure est né dans une tribu du peuple maasaï, dans le gbadzaƒe Simanjiro. Sa famille menait une vie nudzodzoetsitsi ƒe akpa aɖe, kple un élevage de bétail. En 1970, sa famille kple bien d'autres nɔlawo de cette nuto furent nyanyã ŋutasẽnuwɔwɔ par le dziɖuɖu tanzanien1,2. Celui-ci a côturé une kplɔ̃ɖoƒe de terres des kɔƒewo maasaï afin de créer le Parc

title: John Njue
text:
John Njue wodzii le ƒe 1944 me le Kiriari Kɔƒe me le Kenya, eye wònye kardinal Kenyatɔ,
Nairobi ƒe Bisiɔpgã tso ƒe 2007 va ɖo ƒe 2021 me.

Agbemeŋutinya
Ðevimenɔɣi kple nusɔsrɔ̃wo

Esi John Njue xɔ ƒe wuiatɔ̃ la, ege ɖe Nkubu ƒe mawusubɔsubɔ ƒe suku hafi yi eƒe nusɔsrɔ̃ dzi le Rome afisi wòxɔ ɖɔkta ƒe dzeside le xexemenunya me le ƒe 1966 me le Pontifical Urbaniana Yunivɛsiti emegbe, le ƒe 1974 me la, exɔ ɖɔkta ƒe dzeside le mawunyaŋununya me le Pontifical Lateran Yunivɛsiti.Nusɔsrɔ̃ siawo wɔɣie Papa Paul VI ŋutɔ ɖoe nunɔlae.

Nunɔla
Le ƒe 1974 me la, etrɔ yi Kenya afisi wòɖɔli sɔlemeha ƒe subɔsubɔdɔwo le Kariakomu emegbe le Chuka saɖagaƒe tso ƒe 1982 va ɖo ƒe 1984 kple nufiafia kple mɔfiame na mawusubɔsubɔ ƒe dɔwo le Mabanga tso ƒe 1978 va ɖo ƒe 1982, emegbe le Nairobi tso ƒe 1985 va ɖo ƒe 1986.

Bisiɔp kple Kardinal

Le ƒe 1986 me la, eva zu bisiɔp gbãtɔ le Embu saɖaganuto yeye si nye eƒe dukɔ me.
Emegbe woɖoe Nyeri ƒe bisiɔpgã kpeɖeŋutɔ le June 23, 2002 dzi, hafi va zu Nairobi ƒe bisiɔpgã le October 6, 2007 dzi, ɣeyiɣi kpui aɖe hafi wodoe ɖe dzi wòxɔ kardinal ƒe bubu le November 24, 2007 ƒe consistory me kple kardinal-nunɔla ƒe dzeside le Preziosissimo Sangue di Nostro Signore Gesù Cristo, tsã ɖe sɔlemexɔ si wotsɔ ŋkɔ ma ke na ŋu.
Le ƒe siwo me wòwɔ dɔ abe bisiɔp ene la, enɔ zi me na bisiɔpwo ƒe dɔdasi vovovowo. Fifia enye Kenya ƒe Bisiɔpwo ƒe Takpekpea ƒe zimenɔla.Le June 12, 2008 dzi la, woyɔe be wòanye Nunɔlawo ƒe Hamea me tɔ. Ekpɔ gome le ƒe 2013 ƒe takpekpe si me wotia Papa Francis la me
Le ƒe 2014 ƒe nuwuwu lɔƒo la, ebia tso Kenya nyɔnuwo si be woagado atike (asi abɔta) na wo le tetanus dɔléle si le edzi yim le dukɔa me ta o, eye wògblɔ be enye agbagba dzedze be woatsɔ akpɔ ŋuse ɖe vidzidzi dzi, si na nyaʋiʋli aɖe do mo ɖa le atikewɔmɔnu si nye abɔtasisi ŋu.Etu eƒe nukpɔsusua ɖe nya si Katoliko Ðɔktawo ƒe Habɔbɔ si le Kenya gblɔ be yewoke ɖe antigen,si nye human chorionic gonadotropic hormone, si hea fu ƒe gbegble vɛ, ŋu le tetanus ƒe atike si wodo ɖe lãme na amewo le abɔtasisiɖoɖo si  kenya dziɖuɖua do alɔ me.
Le January 4, 2021 dzi la, Papa Francis lɔ̃ ɖe , eƒe asiɖeɖe le dɔ ŋu le ƒexɔxɔ ta,dzi.

 ==Dzesidede kple nusiwo ŋu woƒo nu tsoe==

title: Acentus Ogwella Akuku
text:
acentus Ogwella Akuku, né en 1918 kple mort le 3 octobre 2010 est le srɔ̃ geɖe ƒoƒo, connu, le plus célèbre au monde. Il épousa 130 femmes, eut 300 enfants kple kpe ɖe de 3 000 petits-enfants.
Il était kpe ɖe connu sous le surnom de Akuku Afɔku ʋu, selon lui « Je fais peur aux hommes. Aucune femme ne peut me nye ame si tsɔa nya ɖe ŋunye. J'ai toujours été beau garçon, su m'habiller kple amedɔdɔ aux dames. Je suis magnétique ƒe nuwɔna ! »1.

De dzesiwo kple nya siwo woŋlɔ ɖe eme

title: Zam Zam Abdullahi Abdi
text:
Zam Zam Abdullahi Abdi nye Somalia nyakakadɔwɔla kple amegbetɔ ƒe gomenɔamesi taʋlila le Somalia.
Eƒo nu tso nyɔnuwo ƒe gomenɔamesiwo kple ɖeviwo ƒe gomenɔamesiwo ŋu vevietɔ. Somalia kple Kenya siaa ƒe dukɔmevinyenye ƒe gomenɔamesi le esi.

Eƒe ʋiʋlia ŋu nyawo
Enye Ŋutete Tutuɖo ƒe Dɔwɔla na Nyɔnuwo ƒe Habɔbɔ, kple Afrikatɔwo ƒe Habɔbɔ si Kpɔa Mɔxexe Ðe Ŋutasẽnuwɔwɔ ɖe ɖeviwo ŋuti Kple Ðekematsɔleme Gbɔ ƒe alɔdze si le Somalia ,ƒe Zimenɔla.
Zam Zam Abdullahi Abdi bia be woana sukudede nanɔ bɔbɔe na Somalia nyɔnuwo. Edina be yeafia nu wo ahafia woƒe gomenɔamesiwo kple dɔdasiwo wo.

Ameléle sesẽe
Le ƒe 2004 me la, esime wònɔ nyatakakawo dzi kpɔm na Somalia Nyɔnu Nyakakadɔwɔlawo ƒe Habɔbɔ la, ame aɖewo siwo tsɔ tu lé Zam Zam Abdullahi Abdi eye wosikɛe ɖi tso October 24 va ɖo 25 le Mogadishu,si nye Somalia ƒe fiadu.
Exɔe se be wolé ye sesẽe le yeƒe dɔ siwo yéwɔ tsɔ ʋli ɖeviwo ta.

Ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃
Le October 2016 me la, Kenya ƒe Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe Kɔkɔtɔ drɔ̃ ʋɔnu Zam Zam Abdullahi Abdi kpe ɖe ehati ʋiʋlila etɔ̃ bubuwo ŋu. Wotso wo nu be woda bɔmb ɖe kpovitɔwo ƒe dɔwɔƒe aɖe le Mombasa.
Habɔbɔ si nye Cage Africa ye bu fɔ nya sia. Nyateƒee, womeɖe mɔ na nyɔnu ene siwo ŋu nya ku ɖo ƒe senyalawo be woatsɔ kpeɖodziwo ana woatsɔ aʋli nya siwo wotsɔ ɖe wo ŋu la ŋu o.Gawu la, woɖe ama nyɔnu gomenɔamesi ta ʋlila siawo esime wonɔ wo ŋu tsam,esia nye afɔɖoɖo bubu si wodze na la dzi.

Dzesidede kple nusiwo ŋu woƒo nu tsoe

title: Philo Ikonya
text:
Philo Ikonya, si wodzi le Kenya le ƒe 1959 me, nye agbalẽŋlɔla, nyakakadɔwɔla kple amegbetɔ ƒe gomenɔamesi taʋlila. Eyi aboyo me le Oslo tso ƒe 2009 me

Agbemeŋutinya
Philo Ikonya xɔ agbalẽsɔsrɔ̃ kple gbeŋutinunya ƒe ɖaseɖigbalẽ le Nairobi Yunivɛsiti eye wòxɔ xexemenunya ƒe ɖaseɖigbalẽ si wòxɔ le Spain kple Italy.
Le eƒe nusɔsrɔ̃ megbe la, Ikonya fiaa dzesiŋutinunya le Tangaza Kɔledzi si le Katoliko Yunivɛsiti si le Ɣedzeƒe Afrika eye wòfiaa Spaingbe le USIU - Dukɔwo Dome Yunivɛsiti si le United States-Afrika.Emegbe ewɔ dɔ abe numeɖela ene le Kenya radio kple television dzi eye wòŋlɔ nyadzɔdzɔgbalɛwo ƒe nyati gbogbo aɖewo hã tsɔ ƒo nu tso hadome kple dunyahehe ƒe nɔnɔme si le eƒe dukɔa me ŋu.Enye dukɔwo dome habɔbɔ si nye PEN le Kenya ƒe zimenɔla. Wolé Ikonya ɖe eƒe dunyahehe to ŋutifafa ƒe gbɔlɔlɔ geɖewo dzi ta, eye Kenya dziɖuɖumegãwo do ŋɔdzi nɛ. Le ƒe 2009 me, le esi wolée ŋutasesẽtɔe zi etɔ̃lia megbe la, wozi edzi wòdzo le eƒe dukɔa me eye wòyi ɖabe ɖe Norway. Tso ɣemaɣi la, enɔ Oslo abe agbalẽŋlɔlawo ƒe habɔbɔ si nye International Cities of Refuge Network me tɔ ene.Enye agbalẽ kple hakpanya gbogbo aɖewo ŋlɔla. Wota eƒe agbalẽwo katã ɖe Eŋlisigbe me eye woɖe eƒe agbalẽ eve siwo wòƒo ƒu (Eine nächtliche Führung kple Aus dem Gefängnis) gɔme ɖe Germanygbe me. Ikonya doa Swahili, Gikuyu, Eŋlisigbe, Spaingbe kple Norskgbe vi aɖe, Italygbe kple Fransegbe.

Agbalẽ siwo wòŋlɔ
- "Lɔlɔ̃ha siwo tso gaxɔ me = Aus dem Gefängnis" , Vienna, Löcker, 2010 (ISBN 978-3-85409-565-1).

- "Kplɔla le Zã la me", Nairobi, Twaweza Kadodowo, 2010 (ISBN 978-9966-15-100-1)

- "Ŋutifafa ƒe Abolo sia" , Belfast, Lapwing, 2010 (ISBN 978-1-907276-52-1).

- "Kenya, Ðe Nàɖem?"  Bamenda (Cameroon), Langaa Numekuku & Agbalẽtata, 2011 (ISBN 978-9956-579-79-2).

- "Gadzi ha na Zãxe" , Bamenda (Cameroon), Langaa Numekuku & Agbalẽtata, 2013 (ISBN 978-9956-790-93-7).

- "Ðoɖoezizi si le mamam" , Bamenda (Cameroon), Langaa Numekuku & Agbalẽtata, 2014 (ISBN 978-9956-792-24-5).

- "Nubia si dzi womate ŋu aɖu o – do gbe na Lampedusa!" Vienna, Löcker, 2015 (ISBN 978-3-85409-746-4) Ƒe 2015 ƒe ɣleti gbãtɔ me.

De dzesii kple nusiwo ŋu woƒo nu tsoe

title: Gitobu Imanyara
text:
Gitobu Imanyara nye senyala kple nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔla le Kenya.Enye kplɔla le demokrasi kple bubudede Kenya dukplɔsea ŋu ʋiʋli me tso esime woɖe dunyaheha geɖe ƒe dunyahehe ɖa le ƒe 1982 me.

Agbemeŋutinya
Wogblɔna ɣeaɖewoɣi be enye amegbetɔ ƒe gomenɔamesiwo ŋuti senyala, si ɖea fu na MOI habɔbɔ si le dzi ɖum zi geɖe, eye woana wònɔ gaxɔ me ƒe eve kple edzivɔ le gaxɔ si ŋu woléa ŋku tɔxɛ ɖo me (tso ƒe 1987 va ɖo ƒe 1989).
Esi woɖe asi le eŋu la, eɖo Nairobi Law Monthly nyadzɔdzɔgbalẽ, "ƒe alafa blaevelia ƒe nuwuwu ƒe nyadzɔdzɔgbalẽ siwo ɖe dzinɔameƒo fia wu dometɔ ɖeka" le Democracy Reader ƒe nya nu.Esi ɖe dzesi ŋutɔe nye nyati si nye “Ŋutinya me Nyaʋiʋli: Se, Demokrasi, Kple Dunyahehe si me Dunyaheha Geɖewo Le le Kenya. " le ƒe 1990 me.Le nyati sia ɖeɖe ɖe go megbe la, wolée zi eve eye wotsɔe de ameɖekɛgaxɔ me le tagbɔdɔlélawo ƒe dɔwɔƒe.Le ŋusedodo vovovowo me la, exɔ Xexeame ƒe Nyadzɔdzɔgbalẽwo ƒe Habɔbɔ (WAN) ƒe megbenɔnɔ, si tsɔ Ablɔɖe ƒe Sikafu la nɛ le ƒe 1991 me, eye wogblɔ tso eŋu be enye "ame ʋɛ siwo ƒe didi vevie ɖe ablɔɖe ŋu wu vɔvɔ̃ be woalé ye,  woade ye gaxɔ me alo woawɔ funyafunya ye eye wòzi ɖoɖoe zi geɖe le dunyahehe me ŋutasẽdziɖuɖuwo ŋkume".Fifia enye Kenya Demokrasi Gbugbɔgaɖoanyi Takpekpea ƒe Agbalẽŋlɔla Gãtɔ.

Eƒe nyatoto
 << Ate ŋu adzɔ be woagbã amegbetɔ ƒe ŋutilã, elabena egbɔdzɔ eye seɖoƒe li nɛ... Gake ame aɖeke, aleke kee ŋusẽ le eŋu o, mate ŋu agbã nukpɔsusu aɖe o.>>

title: Alpha Blondy
text:
Seydou Koné, si wonya nyuie wu kple eƒe hadzidzi ŋkɔ Alpha Blondy, nye Ivorytɔwo ƒe reggae hadzila eye wònye xexeame katã ƒe haƒoƒo ƒe nutala bibi aɖe. Wodzii le Dimbokro le January 1, 1953. Zi geɖe la, dunyahehe kple hadomenyawo nɔa eƒe hadzidziwo me, eye wòdzia wo zi geɖe le wo degbe Dyula, Fransegbe, kple Eŋlisigbe me, gake ezãa gbe bubuwo abe Arabgbe alo Hebrigbe ene hã ɣeaɖewoɣi.

Ƒe gbãtɔwome

Ɖevime 
Seydou Koné, si nye ƒome aɖe si si vi enyi le ƒe viŋutsu gbãtɔ la, tɔgbuia nyi le nɔnɔme si me wòde dzesii be ele "hamemetsitsiwo dome" me. Ele be nɔnɔme sia nakpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe eƒe dɔwɔwɔ dzi vevie. Alpha Blondy ʋu yi Odienné kple fofoa le ƒe 1962. Le ɣeyiɣi sia me la, enye sukuvi le Sainte Elisabeth Sekɛndrisuku eye wònɔ vevie dom nu le Ivory Coast sukuviwo ƒe habɔbɔa me. Le sekɛndrisuku la, enye haƒoha aɖe me tɔ, gake le tɔtɔ si wòhe va eƒe sukudede me ta la, wonyae le suku mlɔeba. Le ƒe 1973 me la, edzilawo wɔ ɖoɖo nɛ be wòade Eŋlisigbe ƒe suku aɖe le Monrovia, si nye Liberia ƒe fiadu. Esi wònɔ afima ɣleti wuietɔ̃ katã vɔ la, etso nya me mlɔeba be yeaʋu ayi United States be yeƒe Eŋlisigbe nanyo ɖe edzi.

Kɔledzi si le United States 
Le ƒe 1974 me la, Seydou ʋu yi United States of America , afisi wòde Hunter College kple Columbia Yunivɛsiti ƒe Amerikatɔwo ƒe Gbegbɔgblɔ Ŋuti Ðoɖowɔɖi le be yeaxɔ Eŋlisigbe me ɖaseɖigbalẽ kple susu be yeawɔ dɔ le sukudede me. Esime wònɔ New York la, Rastafaritɔwo ƒe subɔsubɔha la do goe eye wòyi ɖakpɔ Jamaicatɔ fefewɔlawo abe Burning Spear ene ƒe fefewo. Esi Seydou trɔ yi Ivory Coast hafi wòte ŋu ɖɔ eƒe ŋutsuvi zɔhɛ Fulgence Kassi, si tsi va zu television dzi wɔnawo wɔla kpɔdzidzedze la ɖo. Do ŋgɔ na ema la, Seydou ƒo eɖokui ɖe nyaʋiʋli geɖe me hafi trɔ yi dukɔa me. Eƒe hadzila ƒe dɔwɔwɔ dze egɔme nyuie le ɣeyiɣi sia me, eye wòtia fefewɔƒe ŋkɔ "Alpha Blondy" na eɖokui.

Hadzidzidɔ 
Blondy ƒe solo album gbãtɔ si nye Jah Glory do le ƒe 1982 me esi wònɔ TV dzi wɔna geɖe me na Kassi vɔ megbe. Le hadzidzi si nye "Brigadier Sabari," si gblɔ eƒe nuteƒekpɔkpɔ le esi wolée de gaxɔ me le Abidjan le ƒe 1980-awo me kple alesi kpovitɔwo wɔ nuvevii si kplɔe ɖo ta la, ele be haƒogbalẽ sia naxɔ ŋkɔ ŋutɔ eye mlɔeba la, ava zu tsitretsiɖeŋu ƒe dzesi. Le eƒe Afrika-trɔtrɔ tɔxɛ ɖe Reggae ŋu ta la, Alpha Blondy da tu xɔ ŋkɔ le Abidjan, eye wòxɔ megbeŋkɔ "Afrika ƒe Bob Marley" tso eƒe alɔdzedɔwɔƒea ƒe amedzro siwo dea ta agu nɛ gbɔ. Abe Bob Marley, amesi hã nye gbɔgbɔmeme, dunyahehe me veviedonula, kple mɔkpɔkpɔbuɖeame, eye eƒe hadzidzi "Aʋa" si Alpha Blondy ƒo nu tsoe ene la, enye ame si hã nye ame si ƒe susu le nu nyuiwo ŋu, si bua dunyahehe ŋu, eye wòƒo eɖokui ɖe dunyahehe me. Edzi ha le Eŋlisigbe, Fransegbe, Baoulé, kple wo degbe Dioula me ale be ame geɖe nase eƒe gbedasia. Emegbe la, etsɔ haƒonu yeyewo abe violin kple cello ene de eya ŋutɔ ƒe reggae-haƒoƒo ƒe atsyã me.

Eteƒe medidi o Europa va nya alesi Alpha Blondy xɔ ŋkɔe. Esi EP aɖe si ƒe tanyae nye Rasta Poué ɖu dzi vɔ la, ezɔ mɔ yi Paris le ƒe 1984 me be yealé Cocody Rock ɖe mɔ̃ dzi kple haƒoha si nye Pathe Marconi. Wolé albɔm sia ƒe tanya hakpakpa ɖe Jamaica ƒukpo dzi to "Bob Marley of Africa" dzi kple Marley ƒe haƒoha si kpe ɖe eŋu, The Wailers.

Le ƒe 1985 me la, Blondy trɔ gbɔ va aƒeme eye wòge ɖe haƒoƒea be yeawɔ haƒogbalẽ aɖe si ƒe tanyae nye Apartheid Is Nazism. E kple Aston "Ƒome Ŋutsu" Barrett xɔŋkɔ si le The Wailers me la, egalé "Yerusalem" ɖe mɔ̃ dzi le Jamaica ƒe Tuff Gong dɔwɔƒewo le ƒe 1986. Blondie ʋli nugɔmesese kple bubudede wo nɔewo ŋu le Abraham ƒe xɔse siwo nye Yuda-subɔsubɔ, Kristotɔnyenye, kple Islam me. Biblia, Quran, kple Torah sɔsrɔ̃ na wòkpɔ nu geɖe siwo me wòate ŋu akpɔ eƒe nyaʋiʋliwo kple nukpɔsusuwo tsoe. Le ƒe ma ke me la, ewɔ fefe aɖe le Morocco afisi wòdzi ha le Hebrigbe me. Le fifia nu la, enɔ mɔa dzi madzudzɔmadzudzɔe. Eƒe haƒogbalẽ mamlɛtɔ si nye Revolution ƒe gbeɖiɖi fa wu eye wòɖe dzi ɖi wu. Wozã cello le albɔmɔ̃a ƒe haƒoƒo me, eye Ivorytɔwo ƒe haƒola bibi Aicha Kone nye amedzro. Ivory Coast ƒe dukplɔla Félix Houphouët-Boigny ƒo nuƒo didi aɖe le nuŋlɔɖi si ƒe tanyae nye "Jah Houphout parle," si ƒe megbedede si mebɔ o koe nɔ esi.

Le ƒe 1987–1989 me la, Blondy nɔ Abidjan, afisi wòwɔa kɔnsɛtwo le eye wòléa SOS Guerre Tribale ɖe mɔ̃ dzi. Blondy ŋutɔe ƒoe ɖe esia nu, togbɔ be enɔ agbagba dzem be yeaɖe ye ɖokui ɖa tso Pathe Marconi gbɔ ɣemaɣi hã. Blondy meɖe mɔ esia xe mɔ nɛ o, eye le ƒe 1991 me la, eyi Europa hena kɔnsɛt tsaɖiɖi eye wòlé eƒe haƒogbalẽ si nye Masada si ŋu nya wogblɔna le xotutuwo me la ɖe mɔ̃ dzi kple haƒoƒo ŋuti nunyala bibiwo abe Bocana Maiga kple UK reggae haƒoƒowɔla Dennis Bovell ƒe kpekpeɖeŋu. Menye be esia nanye nusi axɔ ŋkɔ gã aɖeke o, gake mexe mɔ na Blondy hã o. Album sia si me hadzidzi si kpɔ dzidzedze "Rendez Vous" hã nɔ la nye nusi xɔ ŋkɔ ŋutɔ, eye Blondy yi edzi ƒo eƒe Gold Disc gbãtɔ nu ƒu le Paris emegbe.

Tso ƒe 1993 me la, blanuiléle nɔ Blondy ŋu le ɖeɖiteameŋu ta le xexeame katã ƒe tsaɖiɖi aɖe megbe eye woxɔe ɖe dɔwɔƒe aɖe be woakpɔ tagbɔdɔlélawo gbɔ. Ke hã esi eƒe lãmesẽ nyo ɖe edzi la, eɖe haƒogbalẽ si nye Dieu ("Mawu") ɖe go, si me wòdze gbɔgbɔmeme kple mawuvɔ̃la wu eye wòƒo nu tso eƒe dɔléle kple hayahaya ŋu le hadzidziwo abe "Heal Me" ene me.

Gake le Dzome 10, 1994 dzi la, Blondy trɔ gbɔ kple azãɖuɖua tsɔ de bubu Dukplɔla Houphouet ŋu.Emegbe ewɔ eƒe Europa-trɔgbɔ va aƒeme kple fefe aɖe si me gbeɖiɖi sesẽ aɖe le le Paris ƒe Le Zenith.  Esi Blondy ɖe eƒe ha gãtɔwo ƒe ƒuƒoƒo ɖe go le ƒe 1996 me vɔ la, etrɔ yi studio la be yeawɔ yeƒe ha adelia si nye Grand Bassam Zion, eye wòdzi ha le Malike, Arabgbe, Fransegbe, Eŋlisigbe, Ashanti, kple Wolof me.

Blondy trɔ yi eya ŋutɔ ƒe dukɔ me le ƒe 1998 me kple haƒogbalẽ yeye aɖe si nye The Prophet, esi wògazã ƒe eve bubu le Paris vɔ megbe. Etiae be yeaɖo ye ŋutɔ yeƒe dɔwɔƒe elabena exɔe se be yeƒe ŋkɔa ƒe susu nɔa dutanyigbawo dzi akpa. Tso ɣemaɣi la, eɖe haƒogbalẽwo kple hadzidziwo ɖe go, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye "Yitzhak Rabin" (si wotsɔ ɖe adzɔgbe na Israel ƒe kplɔlagã si wowu le ƒe 1995 me) kple hadzidzi "Journaliste en Danger" tso eƒe ƒe 2000 ƒe haƒogbalẽ Elohim me.

Esi woɖe CD MERCI ɖe go le ƒe 2002 me, si me Ophelie Winter kple Saian Supa Crew nɔ eye wòde dzesi Alpha Blondy ƒe ƒe 20 lia abe haƒoƒo ƒe nutala ene la, woɖoe be wòaxɔ Grammy Award na "Best Reggae Album" le ƒe 2003. Mete ŋu de ŋutilã me o kafukafuwɔƒe le New York City, ke hã, le dunyahehe ƒe nɔnɔme si le Ivory Coast ta. Grammy-nunana la na gomenɔamesi si mebɔ o be wòadɔ eteƒenɔla aɖe atsɔ ade bubu eŋu. Wota Akwaba le ƒe 2005. Le Siamlɔm 2007 me la, wowɔ eƒe CD Jah Victory. Tyrone Downie, si nye Bob Marley kple Wailers habɔbɔa me tɔ tsã, kpakple Sly Dunbar kple Robbie Shakespeare hã le eme. Hadzidzi "Aʋadziɖuɖu" nye ŋutifafa nubabla si wowɔ eye wodze dɔwɔwɔ gɔme le Ivory Coast le Tedoxe 2007 me.

"Sébé Allah Y'é" nye Blondy ƒe ha siwo wonya nyuie wu eye wokpɔ dzidzedze wu la dometɔ ɖeka.

Le Siamlɔm 19, 2009 dzi la, Blondy do hadzidzi modzaka na nutoa me Afrikatɔwo, Jamaicatɔwo, kple Amerikatɔwo ƒe ƒuƒoƒo gã aɖe le Central Park le New York. 

Le Masa 13, 2010 dzi la, woɖe mɔ na nukpɔla gbogbo aɖewo be woage ɖe Blondy ƒe konsata aɖe me le Ivory Coast atsɔ aɖo ŋku dukɔa ƒe tomefafa kple ɖekawɔwɔ dzi. Amewo ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ fũ le kɔnsɛt la me na ame blaeve ya teti xɔ abi, eye ame eve ku hã.

Le Masa 27, 2010 dzi la, Alpha Blondy wu Parkpop ƒe  hadzidzi modzaka si wowɔ le The Hague, Netherlands, nu. Exɔ ɖe Snoop Dogg kple Beenie Man teƒe.

Tsɔ kpe ɖe eŋu la, Blondy kpe ɖe Ismael Isaac kple Afrikatɔwo ƒe reggae hadzila bubuwo ŋu vevie.

Le Adamekpɔxe 2014 me la, hadzila kple hadziŋlɔla Jonathan Wilson ɖe EP Slide By ɖe go, si dzi hadzidzi "Alpha Blondy Was King" dze le.

Roots Reggae Agbalẽdzraɖoƒe, si wo ɖe go le Dzove 2015 me la, tsɔ tata aɖe si ku ɖe Alpha Blondy ŋu si me woɖe hadzidziwo gɔmeɖeɖe kple wo gɔmeɖeɖe le gbegbɔgblɔ vovovowo me, siwo dome Dioula hã le, de eme.

Xᴐse 
Moslemtɔ fofo kple dada Kristotɔ dzi Alpha Blondy, eye mamaa fiae be wòade bubu amesiame ŋu. Woateŋu ase Blondy ƒe bubudede subɔsubɔhawo katã ŋu kple gbɔgbɔmemenyenye si wòkpɔna tso wo me le ƒe 1986 ƒe hadzidzi siwo nye "Mawu nye Ðeka" kple "Yerusalem" afisi wòdzi ha le hena mawusubɔsubɔ ƒe ɖekawɔwɔ.

Amegbetɔ ƒe kpekpeɖeŋunana 
 
Woɖo Alpha Blondy Côte d’Ivoire ƒe Dukɔ Ƒoƒuawo ƒe Ŋutifafa Dutanyanyuigblɔla le ƒe 2005. Ewɔ dɔ geɖe be yeadi ŋutifafamɔ aɖe si dzi yeato atsi dunyahehe kple ŋutilã me dzrehehe si do tso amedzidzedze ƒe agbagbadzedze si do kpo nu le yeƒe dukɔa me le ƒe 2001. Ŋutifafanubabla aɖee nye ɖo eye wòdze dɔwɔwɔ gɔme tso Tedoxe 2007 me le ame gbogbo aɖewo, vevietɔ Alpha Blondy, ƒe dɔ sesẽ wɔwɔ ta. Esi Alpha Blondy Jah Glory Foundation si woɖo nyitsɔ laa, si ƒe taɖodzinue nye be yeawɔ avu kple hadome madzɔmadzɔnyenye kple dzidzimewo ƒe ahedada to aɖaŋu siwo amewo hiã be woatsɔ anyo ɖe edzi me la, Alpha keke eƒe asiɖoɖoanyi ɖe enu yi ŋgɔ wu fifia. Eɖoe kplikpaa be mele be woawɔ nuvevi ɖeviwo o eye woakpe ɖe hiãtɔwo ŋu (Jah Glory). Tafari-Genesis Retreat Camp na Ðeviwo (Ivory Coast kple Burkina Faso) nye gɔmeɖoanyia ƒe dɔ siwo li tegbee dometɔ ɖeka. Gɔmeɖoanyia wɔa dɔ be yeato gbe me ɖoɖowo vɛ ahawɔ wo ŋudɔ le kɔƒea me, abe Nyɔnuwo ƒe Ðokuidziɖuɖu ƒe Gadodo Suesuewo ƒe Ðoɖo ene, be woafia nyɔnu siwo le tsyɔ̃evi geɖewo dzi kpɔm la alesi woadze woawo ŋutɔ ƒe dɔwɔƒe gɔme ahakpɔ edzii, be woakpɔ woƒe ƒomewo dzi nyuie wu. Ðevi siwo dukɔmeviʋawo ɖe fu na, ɖevi siwo nye asrafo tsã, kple amesiwo ŋu dɔléle siwo nɔa anyi didi, siwo ate ŋu ade woƒe agbe afɔku me abe ʋusɔgbɔdɔ, asrã, asrã, kple bubuawo ene le amesiwo woɖo koŋ be wòana dzidzɔ kple mɔkpɔkpɔ nasu wo si la dome.

To eƒe hadzidziwo dzi la, Alpha Blondy gakpɔtɔ le xexeame katã ƒe ŋutifafa kple ɖekawɔwɔ dom ɖe ŋgɔ. Eƒe hadzidzi "Who Are You" kple Ophélie Winter, si wotu ɖe tomebɔmb siwo tsia tre ɖe amewo ŋu ŋu la nye kpɔɖeŋu si li fifia. Tsɔ kpe ɖe eŋu la, ekpɔ gome le amegbetɔ ƒe kpekpeɖeŋunana kple dɔmenyonunana ƒe kɔnsɛt geɖe me, abe esi wowɔ le Senegal le March 2006 me be woatsɔ akpɔ ga atsɔ atsi asrãdɔ nu le Afrika (si me wòɖe eɖokui fia kple ame xɔŋkɔ bubu geɖe le). Le eƒe ƒe sia ƒe "festa" fefe, si nye wɔna si wowɔna femaxee le Bassam Ƒuta me la, eyia agbagbadzedze sia dzi le afima hã.

Le ƒe 2014 me la, edzi On n'oublie pas (si Serge Bilé ŋlɔ)  kple dutoƒonuwɔla bubu geɖewo, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye Admiral T, Harry Roselmack, kple Jocelyne Béroard. Ha sia nye bubudede  ame 152 siwo ku tso Martinique le afɔku si dzɔ le Dasiamime 16, 2005 dzi la ŋu, be woatsɔ aɖo ŋku nudzɔdzɔ sia dzi eye woakpe ɖe AVCA, si nye amesiwo ŋu yameʋufɔkua gblẽ nu le ƒe habɔbɔ ŋu, be woaƒo ƒu ga.

Ha siwo wonya nyuie wu 
Eƒe hadzidzi gbãtɔ  ƒe kutsetsewo dometoɖeka nye: Brigadier Sabari.

 "Sebe Allah Y'e."
 "Jah Glory "– si me wòdzia ha tsia tre ɖe ahedada ŋu le.
 "Apartheid is Nazism"
 "Brigadier Sabari" – fewuɖunya siwo ku ɖe kpovitɔwo ƒe ŋutasẽnuwɔna ŋu
 "Cocody Rock" – va zu Alpha Blondy ƒe hadzidzi
 "Guerre Civile" – ku ɖe dukɔmeviʋa ŋu
 "Jerusalem"– ŋutifafa ƒe yɔyɔ. Gbedodoɖa le Hebrigbe me dze egɔme kple hadzidzia me nyawo.
 "Journalistes en danger" – ku ɖe Norbert Zongo wuwu ŋu
 " Politiqui " – ku ɖe dumevi dzrowo / asrafowo ƒe dziɖuɖu ƒe tɔtrɔ ɖe wo nɔewo ŋu
 "Yitzhak Rabin" – woŋlɔe le ƒe 1995 me, le Israel ƒe Dukplɔlagã Yitzhak Rabin wuwu megbe, eye wotsɔe na eyama.

title: Hope Mwanake
text:
Hope wakio Mwanake(wodzi le ƒe 1988/1989) nye Kenyatɔ asitsala kple dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunyala. Wobunɛ [Amekae?] be enye Afrika sɔhɛ asitsala yeye siwo le ŋgɔ yim la dometɔ ɖeka. Le December 2019 me la, eva zu nyadzɔdzɔwo ƒe tanyawo le agbagba siwo wòdze le aƒewo tutu kple aŋetu siwo wotsɔ ƒu gbe me be yeatsɔ aɖe ɖiƒoƒo plastik ɖa le Kenya.

Agbemeŋutinya
Wodzi Hope eye wonyii le ƒome aɖe si te ɖe Mombasa ŋu me. Eyae nye ame gbãtɔ le eƒe ƒomea me si de yunivɛsiti be yeayi yeƒe suku kɔkɔ dede dzi. Exɔ eƒe BSc le Tsiŋutinunya me le Egerton Yunivɛsiti le ƒe 2010. Le ƒe 2013 me la, ewu Nutomeŋutinunya nu le UNESCO-IHE, si le Netherlands3.

Dɔwɔna

Ewɔ eƒe dɔ gbã abe hadomenuwɔla ene hafi va zu dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunyala. Enye Trace Kenya, si nye nutoa me habɔbɔ si wɔa dɔ aduadu kple sɔhɛwo tsɔ kpɔa nya siwo ku ɖe gbeɖuɖɔ sesẽwo dzi kpɔkpɔ ŋu gbɔ. Woɖo Trace Kenya ɖe Kenya ƒe titinadu si nye Gilgil me be woatsɔ akpɔ eƒe gbeɖuɖɔwo tsɔtsɔ ƒu gbe dzi ahalé be nɛ.

Eƒo ŋutega nuƒo aɖe hã le Xexeame ƒe Tsi Kwasiɖa
2015 me le Stockholm, Sweden. Le ƒe 2016 me la, eɖo adzɔnuwɔƒe si nye Eco Blocks and Tiles kple ehati dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunyala Kivin mureithi. Eva zu dɔwɔƒe gbãtɔ hã le Kenya si tsɔ aŋe kple ahuhɔ̃e gbegblẽwo wɔ xɔtaxɔwo kple xɔtunu bubuwo.

De dzesii kple nusiwo ŋu woƒo nu tsoe

title: Jōsei Toda
text:
Jōsei Toda (戸田 城聖, Toda Jōsei, 11 Dzove 1900 – 2 Afɔfiɛ 1958) nye nufiala, ŋutifafa taʋlila kple Soka Gakkai ƒe dukplɔla evelia tso ƒe 1951 va ɖo ƒe 1958.

Esi wodee gaxɔ me ƒe eve le Xexemeʋa II me le Ŋutifafa Takpɔkpɔ Sea dzi dada kple nya si wotsɔ ɖe eŋu be lèse-majesté tso tsitretsitsi ɖe aʋaa ŋu ta la, edo le gaxɔ me kple susu be yeagbugbɔ Soka Gakkai atu. Wogblɔ tso eŋu be eyae nye Soka Gakkai ƒe xɔtuɖaŋunyala amesi koŋ gbɔ eƒe anyinɔnɔ egbea tso.

Toda nye Tsunesaburō Makiguchi ƒe nusrɔ̃la kple Daisaku Ikeda ƒe aɖaŋuɖola, siwo nye Soka Gakkai ƒe dukplɔla gbãtɔ kple etɔ̃lia. Ezã nya "amegbetɔ ƒe tɔtrɔ" tsɔ xɔ Makiguchi ƒe susu siwo ku ɖe sukudede kple dzidzɔkpɔkpɔ yometiti le agbe me ŋu be "wodo ƒome madzudzɔmadzudzɔe le agbememɔzɔzɔ si yi edzi yi ameɖokui tutuɖo ɖaa me." Toda ƒe kplɔlanyenye le Soka Gakkai tutu me nye tanya si Ikeda ƒe babla 12 ƒe roman à clef, "Amegbetɔ ƒe Tɔtrɔ Kpata" ("Ningen kakumei")

Agbenɔnɔ le ɖevime
Wodzi Toda le ƒe 1900 me, eye wònye tɔƒodelawo ƒe ƒome aɖe ƒe viŋutsu wuiɖekɛlia le ƒuta kɔƒe si nye Shioya, le egbegbe Kaga, Ishikawa, le Japan Ƒua to. Le ƒe 1904 me la, eƒe ƒomea ʋu yi Hokkaido, eye wova nɔ tɔƒodekɔƒe si nye Atsuta me. Tso esime wòxɔ ƒe 15 la, ewɔ dɔ le suku me, eye wòxɔ ɖaseɖigbalẽ gbã abe gɔmedzesuku nufiala teƒenɔla ene esime wòxɔ ƒe 17 emegbe, le ƒe etɔ̃ megbe, abe ɣeyiɣiawo katã ƒe gɔmedzesuku nufiala ene. Le ƒe 1920 me la, eʋu yi Tokyo afisi wòdo go Tsunesaburo Makiguchi, si nye gɔmedzesuku )ƒe tatɔ, si ava zu eƒe aɖaŋuɖola le. Efia nu na Makiguchi vaseɖe ƒe 1922 me, emegbe eʋu suku si menye ame ŋutɔ tɔ o eye wòfia nu sukuvi siwo nɔ dzadzram ɖo ɖe woƒe titinasuku yiyi dodokpɔwo ŋu.

Toda kple srɔ̃a ƒe vinyɔnuvi si xɔ ɣleti 6 ku le ƒe 1923 me eye srɔ̃a ku le ƒe eve megbe le yɔmekpe ta. Toda hã xɔ dɔléle ma ke eye wòdzea dɔ zi geɖe.

Eƒe ganyawo trɔ esi wota eƒe akɔntabubu ŋuti nufiamegbalẽa dzidzedzetɔe eye woxɔe.

Ame tɔxɛ

Ne edze nufiafia gɔme le Yubari vɔ la, sɔhɛ tomenukulawo le nutoa me vaa eƒe aƒeme le dɔ megbe be yewoadzro nyawo abe dunyahehe kple ŋutinya ene me. Woŋlɔe ɖi be etsɔ sukudede ƒe ɖɔɖɔɖo ƒe aɖaŋuɖoɖo hã ɖo ɖe Sukudede Dɔwɔƒe si me susu siwo woatsɔ ana nufialawo ƒe nɔnɔmewo nanyo ɖe edzi kpakple sukukplɔla siwo si ŋutete geɖe wu tutuɖo le. Le ŋkekenyuigbalẽ aɖe si woŋlɔ le ƒe 1920 me nu la, susu si ta wòʋu tso Hokkaido yi Tokyo ƒe akpa aɖee nye didi vevie be yeazu "xexeme dukɔmevi."

Toda ƒe amenyenye si me kɔ la to vovo kura na eƒe aɖaŋuɖola, Tsunesaburo Makiguchi si nye agbalẽnyala kple nufialagã. Wogblɔ tso Toda ŋu be enye "ame si dzraa nu sesẽwo le eƒe xɔse ta--egblɔa nyateƒetoto, ŋusẽtɔ, zi geɖe la, amemabumabu, nuƒoƒo. Ŋutete nɔ esi be wòagblɔ Nichiren kple Makiguchi ƒe susuwo eme kɔ eye wòsesẽ. Eƒe nyateƒetoto kple dzonɔameme kpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe ame siwo wòdo goe dzi vevie. Toda hã ɖe ŋusẽ fia le habɔbɔ ƒe nu yeyewo dodo ɖe ŋgɔ me, le kadodomɔnu siwo le tsitrenu kple esiwo le tsia dzi ƒe ƒuƒoƒo aɖe ɖoɖo anyi si na ɖekawɔwɔ wɔ ɖeka le Soka Gakkai ƒe habɔbɔ ƒe ɖoɖoa me.

Nufialagã

Togbɔ be wonya Toda ƒe dɔwɔwɔ le sukudede me nyuie wu to eƒe ɖɔɖɔɖo kple gadodo na Makiguchi ƒe "System of Value-Creating Pedagogy" me hã la, ewɔ dɔ vevie abe nufiala kple agbalẽŋlɔla ene hã.

Dɔwɔwɔ le gɔmedzedzea me abe nufiala ene
Toda ƒe nufiafiadɔ gbãtɔe nye Mayachi Gɔmedzesuku, si le Ubari, Hokkaido, si nye du si me woɖea dzo le, ƒe akpa aɖe si sa ɖe aga. Edze dɔwɔwɔ gɔme le afima le ƒe 1918 me abe nufiala teƒenɔla ene eye le ƒe ɖeka megbe la, woɖoe klass 6 lia ƒe nufiala esi wòto ɖaseɖigbalẽ dodokpɔ aɖe me. Edzudzɔ zi ɖeka le ƒe 1920 me gake enɔ lɛta ŋlɔm kple eƒe sukuviwo ƒe 15 sɔŋ.

Toda ƒe sukudede ƒe susuwo gbɔ kpɔkpɔ bliboe wue nye Shiohara.[axa hiã] Le Shiohara ƒe nya nu la, Toda kpɔ nufiafiamɔnu aɖe tso eya ŋutɔ ƒe numekuku si wowɔ koŋ be wòakpɔ eƒe Miyachi gɔmedzesukuviwo ƒe nuhiahiãwo gbɔ, amesiwo tso teƒe siwo hiã tu eye wòkpe fu le dzesi siwo bɔbɔ ɖe anyi ta.

Makiguchi xɔ Toda be wòanye nufiala teƒenɔla le Nishimachi Gɔmedzesuku. Toda trɔ ɖoƒewo be yeayi edzi anɔ dɔ wɔm kple Makiguchi esime wotsɔ mamlɛtɔa yi Mikasa Gɔmedzesuku, si nye suku si me sukuvi dahewo le le Tokyo, me sesẽe.

title: Kimani Maruge
text:
Kimani Ng'ang'a Maruge (c. 1920 – August 14, 2009) nye Kenyatɔ si xɔ Guinness Xexeame ƒe Nuŋlɔɖi si nye ame tsitsitɔ kekeake si dze gɔmedzesuku gɔme. Ege ɖe eƒe ƒe gbãtɔ me le January 12, 2004 dzi, esime wòxɔ ƒe 84. Tɔgbuitɔgbui, tɔgbuiyɔvi 30 dometɔ eve de suku ɖeka me kplii.

Emeŋutinya

1 Nusɔsrɔ̃wo
2 Ŋutasẽnuwɔwɔ le tiatiawɔɣi megbe le ƒe 2007-2008 me
3 Sinima
4 Google ƒe Doodles
5 Nuŋlɔɖiwo kple nusiwo ŋu woƒo nu tsoe
Nusɔsrɔ̃wo
Maruge dea Kapkenduiywo Gɔmedzesuku le Eldoret, Kenya. Egblɔ be dziɖuɖua ƒe gbeƒãɖeɖe le ƒe 2003 me be woaxɔ gɔmedzesukudede le xexeame katã eye woaxɔ femaxee ye ʋã ye wòtiae.

Le September 2005 me la, Maruge ɖo yameʋu zi gbãtɔ le eƒe agbe me yi New York be yeaƒo nu tso gɔmedzesukudede femaxee ƒe vevienyenye ŋu le Dukɔ ƒoƒuawo ƒe le Akpe Ðeka ƒe Ŋgɔyiyi Takpekpe me.united.

Le 2007-2008 ƒe ŋutasẽnuwɔwɔ le tiatiawɔɣia megbeWoda adzo Maruge le eƒe aƒeme le ŋutasẽnuwɔwɔ le Kenya le tiatiawɔɣi megbe le ƒe 2007-2008 me. Le ƒe 2008 ƒe gɔmedzedze la, enɔ sitsoƒesaɖa aɖe si didi tso eƒe suku gbɔ kilometa ene. Eyi edzi le mamlɛtɔa srãm kpɔ gbesiagbe. Le ƒe ma ke ƒe June me la, woɖee yi Nairobi. Wozi edzi be wòadzudzɔ sukudede ayi ame tsitsiwo ƒe nɔƒe aɖe. Gake le ŋkeke ʋɛ aɖewo megbe la, Maruge ŋlɔ ŋkɔ ɖe klass adelia me le Marura Gɔmedzesuku, si le Kariobangi.

Maruge ku le August 14, 2009 dzi le dɔgbo me dɔdzẽ ta le Kenya Dukɔa ƒe Kɔdzi le Nairobi. Woɖii ɖe Subukia (en).

Sinii Sinima si nye The Oldest Schoolboy in the World, si me Oliver Litondo (en) kple Naomie Harris nye akpa vevi aɖe le la, nye esi wotsɔ na Kimani Maruge. Wodze Eŋlisiawo ƒe sinima sia gɔme le May 13, 2011 dzi, eye woɖe video le Kenya ƒe ta siwo le Great Rift Valley ƒe ɖoɖo me.

title: Ousmane Sembène ƒe ŋkɔ
text:
Ousmane Sembène (Ewe: [usman sɑ̃bɛn] ; 1 Dzove 1923 alo 8 Dzove 1923  – 9 Masa  2007), si wogblɔna zi geɖe le Franseawo ƒe atsyã nu be enye Sembène Ousmane le nyatiwo kple numekugbalẽwo me, nye Senegal sinimadzikpɔla, sinimawɔla kple agbalẽŋlɔla. Los Angeles Times bu eŋu be enye Afrika ƒe agbalẽŋlɔla gãtɔwo dometɔ ɖeka eye woyɔe zi geɖe be "Afrika sinima fofo".  Esi Ousmane Sembène dzɔ tso Serer ƒome aɖe me to dadaa dzi tso Matar Sène ƒe ƒomea me ta la, Serertɔwo ƒe subɔsubɔzãwo koŋue dzɔa dzi nɛ vevietɔ Tuurtɔwo ƒe azã .

Agbenɔnɔ le ɖevime 
Ousmane Sembène tso Lebou ƒome aɖe me eye wodzii le Ziguinchor, si le Casamance. Fofoa nye tɔƒodela. Tso eƒe ɖevime ke la, wofia nu tso Serertɔwo ƒe subɔsubɔ ŋu, vevietɔ Tuurtɔwo ƒe azã, si me woxɔe ɖe "subɔsubɔha ƒe subɔla" ƒe akpa dzi. Sembène xɔ ŋkɔ le notsi babla si wotsɔ na tɔgbuiawo nono ta, togbɔ be Tuurtɔwo bia tso subɔsubɔhawo si be woatsɔ notsi si wotsɔ ƒoe asa vɔe na tɔgbuiwo ƒe gbɔgbɔwo (Pangool) hã la, Sembène metsɔ eƒe akpa si nye subɔsubɔha me subɔla la nu vevii o eye wokpɔe dze sii le esia wɔwɔ ta. Tanya siwo tso Serer la me dze le eƒe nuŋɔŋlɔ tsitsi aɖewo me. Tɔgbuia si tso fofoa gbɔe nyii eye wòkpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe amesi wòva zu dzi vevie. Zi geɖe la, eƒe nuŋɔŋlɔwo ku ɖe nyɔnuwo ƒe agbenɔnɔ kple nuteƒekpɔkpɔwo ŋu.

Le Sembène ƒe madrasa kple Fransegbe suku dede vaseɖe ƒe 1936 me, esime wòwɔ dzre kple Fransegbe sukua ƒe tatɔ ta la, ete ŋu doa Fransegbe kple Arabgbe ƒomevi gbãtɔ aɖe tsɔ kpe ɖe Wolof ŋu, si nye... eƒe degbe. Wolof dzilawoe doa nu. Le ƒe 1938 me la, Sembène zɔ mɔ yi Dakar, afisi wòwɔ dɔ le le asinudɔwɔwɔ vovovowo me. Do ŋgɔ na ema la, ewɔ dɔ kple fofoa vaseɖe ƒe ma me; ke hã, ʋuʋu ƒe dɔléle aɖe nɔ Sembène ŋu.

Le ƒe 1944 me la, woxɔ Sembène be wòawɔdɔ kple Senegaltɔwo ƒe Tirailleurs, si nye Franseawo ƒe Asrafowo ƒe asrafoha aɖe me. Eƒe asrafodɔ si wòwɔ emegbe le Xexemeʋa II me la nɔ Franseawo ƒe Ablɔɖesrafowo gbɔ. Le aʋaa megbe la, etrɔ yi wo dedukɔ me eye le ƒe 1947 me la, ekpɔ gome le ketekemɔwo dzi dzedze ɣeyiɣi didi aɖe me. Ezã nuteƒekpɔkpɔ sia wònye gɔmeɖoanyi na eƒe agbalẽ si nye God’s Bits of Wood si to vovo, si wota le ƒe 1960 me.

Le ƒe 1947 ƒe nuwuwu lɔƒo la, esi yi France, afisi wòwɔ dɔ le zi gbãtɔ le Citroen dɔwɔƒe aɖe le Paris eye emegbe le melidzeƒe siwo le Marseille, afisi wòva ƒo eɖokui ɖe dɔwɔlawo ƒe habɔbɔ si le France me le. Enye dɔwɔlawo ƒe habɔbɔwo ƒe ʋiʋlila le France. Eva zu Kɔmiunist-ha kple CGT si Kɔmiunisttɔwo kplɔ la me tɔ, eye wòkpe asi ɖe ɖoɖowɔwɔ ɖe dɔmedzoedoname aɖe si woɖo be woatsɔ atɔ te aʋawɔnu siwo wozãna le Franseawo ƒe dutanyigbadziʋa si wowɔ le Vietnam me la ɖoɖo ɖe amewo ŋu. Le ɣeyiɣi sia me la, eva nya Haititɔ Marxtɔ agbalẽŋlɔla Jacques Roumain kpakple Harlem Gbɔgbɔyɔyɔ ƒe agbalẽŋlɔla Claude McKay ƒe agbalẽwo.

Agbalẽŋɔŋlɔdɔ ƒe gɔmedzedze 
Sembène srɔ̃ nuxexlẽ kple nuŋɔŋlɔ le Fransegbe me le eɖokui si, eye emegbe eɖo ŋu ɖe eƒe agbemenuteƒekpɔkpɔ geɖe ŋu le eƒe agbalẽ gbãtɔ si nye Le Docker Noir (The Black Docker, 1956), si woŋlɔ ɖe Fransegbe me la me. Dɔ sia gblɔ Diaw, si nye Afrikatɔ ʋukula aɖe si doa dzi le nazãbubu kple nuwɔna gbegblẽwo me le tɔdziʋudzeƒewo le Marseille la ƒe ŋutinya. Diaw wɔa agbalẽ aɖe, si nyɔnu yevu aɖe xɔ emegbe eye wòtae ɖe eƒe ŋkɔ te; edze ŋgɔ yevu nyɔnua, ewui le manyamanya me, eye wodrɔ̃ ʋɔnui hewui le nudzɔdzɔ siwo he susu yi Albert Camus ƒe The Stranger (si gɔme woɖe be The Outsider) dzi vevie me. Sembène klo nu le Arab kple Spain dɔwɔlawo ƒe ŋlɔmiwɔwɔ dzi, si na wòdze ƒã be nusiwo ŋu wotsi dzi ɖo la kpɔa ŋusẽ ɖe amedzrowo ƒe fuléle dzi abe alesi wòkpɔa ŋusẽ ɖe ameƒomevinyenye dzii ene. Togbɔ be agbalẽa ƒo nu tso Afrikatɔ siwo ʋu va dukɔ bubuwo me ŋudɔwɔwɔ ŋu koŋ hã la, Sembène ƒo nu tso alesi wotea dɔwɔla siwo tso dukɔ bubuwo me hã ŋu. Woŋlɔe le hadomenudzɔdzɔ ŋutɔŋutɔ ƒe gbeɖiɖi me, abe alesi eƒe agbalẽ bubuawo ƒe akpa gãtɔ le ene. Enye Sembène ƒe ŋkɔxɔxɔ le agbalẽŋɔŋlɔ ƒe gɔmedzedze eye wòna gakpekpeɖeŋu si wòhiã be wòayi edzi anɔ nuŋɔŋlɔ dzi le ema megbe.

O Pays, mon beau peuple! nye Sembène ƒe agbalẽ evelia, si wota le ƒe 1957. Eɖe Oumar, agbledela ameyibɔ aɖe si di vevie be yeaxɔ ŋkɔ, si trɔ yi eƒe aƒeme Casamance kple ŋugbetɔ yevu yeye aɖe eye wòɖoe be yeatrɔ asi le agbledede ƒe mɔnu siwo wozãna le nutoa me ŋu wòazu egbegbe tɔ la ƒe ŋutinya fia. Gake Oumar wɔ aʋa kple Franseawo ƒe dutanyigbadziɖuɖu kple hadomeɖoɖo si le kɔƒea me siaa, eye wowui mlɔeba le eƒe nuwɔnawo ta. O Pays, mon beau amewo! nye hadzidzi si xɔ ŋkɔ ŋutɔ le xexeame katã, eye esia wɔe be Sembène va nɔ ha dem le dukɔ siwo le xexeame godoo me, vevietɔ le kɔmiunist dukɔwo abe China, Cuba, kple Soviet Union ene me.

Les Bouts de Bois de Dieu (Mawu ƒe Ati Kakɛwo, ƒe 1960) nye Sembène ƒe agbalẽ etɔ̃lia si wonya nyuie wu; numetola akpa gãtɔ xɔe se be enye eƒe asinudɔwɔwɔ, eye Xala koe nye eƒe hoʋlila ŋutɔŋutɔ. Agbalẽa nye ketekemɔ ƒe dɔmedzoedoname si dzɔ le Dakar-Niger mɔa dzi tso ƒe 1947 va ɖo ƒe 1948. Dɔmedzoedonamea xɔ ƒe eve. Agbalẽa me tɔ vevitɔe nye dɔwɔhawo ƒe nyanuɖela Ibrahima Bakayoko si doa vivi ɖe ame ŋu eye wòklẽna; ke hã, agbalẽa ƒe kalẽtɔ ŋutɔŋutɔe nye nutoa me tɔwo katã, siwo ƒoa ƒu ɖekae le xaxa kple madzɔmadzɔnyenye me tsɔ ʋlia eƒe gomenɔamesiwo ta. Le esia ta la, agbalẽa kplɔ ame vovovo siwo ade blaatɔ̃ ɖo le Senegal katã kple dukɔ si te ɖe Mali ŋu me, eye wòɖe dɔmedzoedonamea fia tso nukpɔsusu ɖesiaɖe si woate ŋu abu me; le susu sia ta la, wotsɔa dɔa toa vovo na Émile Zola ƒe Germinal ɣeaɖewoɣi.

Esi Sembène ta Les Bouts de Bois de Dieu le ƒe 1960 me vɔ la, eɖe eŋutinya kpui siwo woƒo ƒu si ƒe tanyae nye Voltaque (Towo ƒe Abi) le ƒe 1962. Agbalẽa ƒo nu tso ŋutinya kpui vovovowo, gliwo, kple gliwo ŋu, eye wo dometɔ ɖeka ƒe tanyae nye "La Noire de." ...", si agbalẽŋlɔla la ayi edzi atrɔ asi le wòazu eƒe sinima gbãtɔ si me woɖea nu geɖe le. Le ƒe 1964 me la, eta agbalẽ nyanyɛ si nye L’Harmattan (The Harmattan), si ku ɖe ɖokuisinɔnɔ ƒe akɔdada si yia edzi le Afrika-dugã aɖe me ŋu.

Sembène zã ƒe ɖeka tsɔ srɔ̃ alesi woawɔ sinima le Gorky Film Studio le Moscow, Russia, kple Soviettɔwo ƒe sinimadzikpɔla Mark Donskoy. Esia nye tso ƒe 1962 va ɖo ƒe 1963 me.

Emegbe agbalẽŋɔŋlɔdɔ 
Sembène ƒe susu va nɔ tɔtrɔm esi wòɖe Le mandat, précédé de Vehi-Ciosane ɖe go (Ga ƒe Ðoɖo kple Yevuwo ƒe Mose Ƒe Agbalẽ Gbãtɔ) le ƒe 1965. Etsɔ agbalẽ eve siawo ɖo taɖodzinu na Afrika kplɔla ŋuklẽla siwo va le Franseawo ƒe dutanyigbadziɖuɖua megbe. Tsã la, eƒoa nu sesĩe tso alesi Franseawo ƒe dutanyigbadziɖuɖua mewɔ nu madzɔmadzɔ ɖe ameyibɔwo kple ganyawo ŋu o ŋu. Enye ame siwo wɔ dɔ le Lotus, si dze egɔme le ƒe 1968 me le Cairo eye Egipte kple Soviet Union ye xe fe ɖe eta la dometɔ ɖeka.

Le eƒe agbalẽ si wòŋlɔ le ƒe 1973 me si nye Xala me la, Sembène lé nyati sia me ɖe asi to asitsala kesinɔtɔ aɖe si ŋkɔe nye El Hadji Abdou Kader Beye si to nusi wòsusu be enye ŋusẽmanɔamesi ƒe fiƒode ( "xala" le Wolof me) me le ŋkeke si dzi wòɖe srɔ̃ kplii la ƒe ŋutinya gbɔgblɔ me eƒe ŋugbetɔ etɔ̃lia lɔlɔ̃tɔ si nye sɔhɛ. El Hadji va nɔa fiƒodea ɖeɖeɖa ŋu to marabouts yiyi me, gake esi wòbu eƒe kesinɔnuwo kple bubu ƒe akpa gãtɔ hafi wòkpɔnɛ be nusi gbɔ wòtsoe nye nubiala si mlɔa eƒe ɔfiswo godo eye wògblẽ nu le ye ŋu be yeaxɔ eƒe kesinɔnuwo.

Le Dernier de l’empire (Fiaɖuƒea ƒe Mamlɛtɔ, 1981), Sembène ƒo nu tso nufitifitiwɔwɔ kple asrafowo ƒe anyigbadziɖuɖu si kplɔe ɖo le Afrika-dukɔ aɖe si xɔ ɖokuisinɔnɔ nyitsɔ laa me ŋu. Niiwam et Taaw (Niiwam kple Taaw), siwo nye agbalẽ eve siwo wòta le ƒe 1987 me, yi edzi le agbenyuinɔnɔ kple hadome ƒe gbegblẽ si le Senegal dugã me la me dzrom.

Wobua Sembène be enye Afrikatɔwo ƒe dutanyigbadziɖuɖu megbe agbalẽŋlɔla veviwo dometɔ ɖeka le eƒe agbalẽ siwo nye Xala kple Les Bouts de Bois de Dieu ta. Samba Gadjigo gblɔ be woɖe Sembène ƒe agbalẽ ewo siwo wota dometɔ adre gɔme ɖe Eŋlisigbe me, togbɔ be Chinua Achebe kple Wole Soyinka, Nigeriatɔ agbalẽŋlɔla mɔɖela eve, ŋlɔ nu ɖe Eŋlisigbe me hã.

Nutata 
Sembène di be yeaɖo nyasela gbogbo aɖewo gbɔ elabena enye agbalẽŋlɔla si tsɔ ɖe le hadometɔtrɔwo me. Ese egɔme be togbɔ be dekɔnu me ame ŋkutawo ƒe ƒuƒoƒo sue aɖe koe akpɔ yeƒe agbalẽŋɔŋlɔdɔwo hã la, sinimawo nye "amewo ƒe zãsuku" eye Afrikatɔwo ƒe ƒuƒoƒo si lolo wu sã ate ŋu akpɔ wo.

Sembène wɔ eƒe sinima gbãtɔ le ƒe 1963 me, si nye sinima kpui aɖe si woyɔna be Barom Sarret (Tasiaɖamdzikpɔla). Ewɔ kpui evelia le ƒe 1964 me si woyɔna be Niaye. Etu eƒe ŋutinya kpuiwo dometɔ ɖeka dzi wɔ eƒe sinima gbãtɔ si nye La Noire de... le ƒe 1966. Enye sinima gbãtɔ si Afrika ƒe anyiehe Sahara sinimawɔla aɖe wɔ kpɔ. Togbɔ be aɖabaƒoƒo 60 koe wòxɔ hã la, Fransegbe me sinima sia xɔ Prix Jean Vigo, si na Sembène kple Afrika sinimawo katã de dzesii enumake. Sembène kplɔ dzidzedzekpɔkpɔ sia ɖo esi wòɖe Mandabi ɖe go le ƒe 1968 me, eye wòna eƒe agbeme didi vevie be yeawɔ sinima le ye degbe Wolof me la va eme.

Xala, si woɖe ɖe go le ƒe 1975 me eye wotu ɖe agbalẽŋlɔla la ŋutɔ ƒe agbalẽ dzi, Ceddo, si woɖe ɖe go le ƒe 1977 me, Camp de Thiaroye, si woɖe ɖe go le ƒe 1987 me, kple Guelwaar, si woɖe ɖe go le ƒe 1992. Wotrɔ asi le Ceddo ŋu ŋutɔ do ŋgɔ na eƒe... woɖe asi le eŋu le Senegal, si wogblɔ be le nya aɖe si ku ɖe Sembène ƒe agbalẽwo ŋu ta; ke hã, ɖeklemiɖela aɖewo gblɔ be asitɔtrɔ sia do ƒome geɖe kple nusiwo woate ŋu abu be wonye nusiwo tsi tre ɖe Moslemtɔwo ŋu le sinima la me. Woɖe Ceddo ɖe go le Senegal le ƒe 2005. Le go bubu me la, Sembène ɖe sinima la katã ɖe go be woamae le duta asiwo me, togbɔ be ema agbalẽvi siwo woŋlɔ ɖe sinimaxɔwo me siwo gblɔ nusiwo woɖe ɖe go ɖe wo nɔewo yome tsitotsito hã. Le ƒe 1971 me la, Sembène hã kpɔ sinima aɖe si ŋkɔe nye Emita, si woɖe le Fransegbe kple Diolagbe siaa me. Wotsɔ sinima sia yi Moscow Dukɔwo Dome nɔnɔmetatawo ƒe Ŋkekenyui 7 lia me, afisi wona Klosalo Nunanae le. Tsɔ kpe ɖe eŋu la, wode se ɖe enu le Franseawo ƒe Ɣetoɖoƒe Afrika katã. Ƒe 1975 ƒe Xala nye eƒe sinima siwo wòtsɔ yi Moscow Dukɔwo Dome Sinimawɔƒe 9 lia la dometɔ ɖeka.

Wotsɔ Ceddo, si nye eƒe sinima, yi Moscow Dukɔwo Dome Sinimawɔƒe 10 lia le ƒe si me woɖee ɖe go, si nye ƒe 1977. Le ɣeyiɣi ma ke me la, ekpɔ gome le Berlin Dukɔwo Dome Sinimawɔƒe 27 lia ƒe tiatia me abe adaŋudeha la me tɔ ene. Wona Bubu ƒe Fetu si wòna le sinima me le Moscow Dukɔwo Dome Sinimawɔƒe ƒe Ŋkekenyui 11 lia me le ƒe 1979. Wotsɔ kafukafu sia nɛ tsɔ de dzesi dɔ si wòwɔ le sinimawɔƒea.

Dutanyigbadziɖuɖu ƒe ŋutinya, mawusubɔsubɔ ƒe gbɔdzɔgbɔdzɔwo, ɖeklemiɖeɖe le Afrika-dukɔmevi siwo le dodom ŋu, kple Afrika nyɔnuwo ƒe kutrikuku nye nyati siwo gbugbɔna le Sembène ƒe sinimawo katã me.

Eƒe sinima mamlɛtɔ, si nye ƒe 2004 ƒe sinima si nye Moolaadé, xɔ fetu le FESPACO Sinimawɔƒe si wowɔ le Ouagadougou, Burkina Faso, kple eƒe 2004 ƒe Cannes Film Festival siaa. Sinima sia si woɖe le Afrika du sue aɖe me le Burkina Faso la ku nyɔnuwo ƒe vidzinuwo ɖeɖeɖa ƒe nya si ŋu nyaʋiʋli nɔ la me.

Eyae nye nyati si ŋu woƒo nu tsoe le ƒe 2015 me nuŋlɔɖi film si nye Sembene! .

Zi geɖe la, Sembène wɔa cameo le eƒe sinimawo me. Le kpɔɖeŋu me, le Mandabigbe me la, ewɔa lɛtaŋlɔla ƒe akpa le posudɔwɔƒe.

Ku 
Ousmane Sembène ku le Masa 9, 2007, esime wòxɔ ƒe 84. Edze dɔ tso December 2006, eye wòku le eƒe aƒeme le Dakar, Senegal, afisi woɖii ɖe avɔ si wotsɔ Quran ƒe kpukpuiwo ɖo atsyɔ̃ na me. Sembène gblẽ viŋutsu etɔ̃ ɖi le srɔ̃ɖeɖe eve me.

Pan African Federation of Filmmakers (FEPACI) ƒe agbalẽŋlɔlagã, Seipati Bulane Hopa, yɔ Sembène be "akaɖi si klẽ akaɖi na ame tsɛwo be woazɔ kekeli ƒe mɔ dzi...gbe si ƒoa nu heheɖemegbe manɔmee, ŋutsu." kple ŋutete si ŋu fɔɖiɖi aɖeke mele o si lé eƒe aɖaŋudɔwo ƒe gɔmeɖosewo me ɖe asi madzudzɔmadzudzɔe eye wòwɔe kple fɔmaɖimaɖi kple bubu gã aɖe." Hopa gblɔ tso Sembène ŋu be enye “akaɖi si klẽna na akaɖi na ame tsɛwo be woazɔ kekeli ƒe mɔ dzi.” 

Le eƒe bubudede Sembène ŋu me la, South Africa ƒe Aɖaŋudɔwo kple Dekɔnuwo ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla, Pallo Jordan, yi ŋgɔ wu esi wòɖɔe be enye "nunyala bibi kple amegbetɔŋutinunyala si si dekɔnu tɔxɛ aɖe le...hadomegbenɔnɔ ŋuti ɖeklemiɖela si nya nu tso eŋu [si] na xexeame." kple Afrika ŋuti sidzedze bubu."

Dɔwɔwɔwo

Agbalẽwo 

 Le Docker noir (agbalẽ) – Paris: Debresse, ƒe 1956; tata yeye si nye Présence Africaine, ƒe 2002; gɔmeɖeɖe. abe The Black Docker, London: Heinemann, ƒe 1987 ene.
 O Pays, mon beau peuple! (agbalẽ) – Ƒe 1957
 Les bouts de bois de Dieu (agbalẽ si woŋlɔ) – ƒe 1960; gɔmeɖeɖe. abe Mawu ƒe Ati Kakɛwo ene, London: Heinemann, 1995.
 Voltaïque (ŋutinya kpuiwo) – Paris: Présence Africaine, ƒe 1962; gɔmeɖeɖe. abe Towo ƒe Abi ene, Washington: INSCAPE, 1975.
 L’Harmattan (agbalẽ) – Paris: Afrikatɔ ƒe anyinɔnɔ, ƒe 1964.
 Le mandat, précédé de Vehi-Ciosane – Paris: Présence Africaine, 1966; gɔmeɖeɖe. abe Ga ƒe Ðoɖo si me Yevuwo ƒe Mose Ƒe Agbalẽ Gbãtɔ Le, London: Heinemann, 1987.
 Xala, Paris: Présence Africaine, 1973.
 Le dernier de l’Empire (agbalẽ) – L’Harmattan,  1981; gɔmeɖeɖe. abe Fiaɖuƒea ƒe Agbalẽ Mamlɛtɔ ene, London: Heinemann, 1983; "safui aɖe na Senegal dunyahehe" – Werner Glinga.
 Niiwam – Paris: Présence Africaine, 1987; gɔmeɖeɖe. abe Niiwam kple Taaw: Agbalẽ Eve (Oxford kple Portsmouth, NH: Heinemann, 1992).

Sinimawo ƒe nɔnɔmetata tiatia aɖewo

Nuxexlẽ bubuwo 

 Annas, Max, kple Busch, Annett: Ousmane Sembene: Gbebiamewo. Yunivɛsiti ƒe Nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe, Mississippi, 2008.
 Adeniyi, Idowu Emmanuel, kple ame bubuwo. "Ŋutsu Bubu, Nyɔnu Ðokui kple Nyɔnunyenye megbe Sidzedze le Sembène Ousmane ƒe Mawu ƒe Ati Kakɛwo kple Flora Nwapa ’s Efuru ." Ibadan Journal of Eŋlisigbe Nusɔsrɔ̃ 7 (2019): 57-72.
 Gadjigo, Samba, kple ame bubuwo. Ousmane Sembène: Dzeɖoɖowo Kple Ðeklemiɖelawo Kple Agbalẽŋlɔlawo . Amherst: Massachusetts Yunivɛsiti ƒe Nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe, 1993.
 Mumin, Nijla, kple ame bubuwo. "Caméras d'Afrique: Elvis Mitchell Le Ɣetoɖoƒe Afrika Sinema Ŋu Kple Sinemame Ðeklemiɖeɖe Vovovowo ƒe Hiahiã (Gbebiame)" . IndieWire, Dzove 4, 2013. Eƒe dukɔ nye [United States of America].
 Murphy, David, kple ame bubuwo. Mɔnu Bubuwo Kpɔkpɔ le Sinima Kple Nyakpakpawo Me – Sembene . Oxford: Afrika Xexeame ƒe Nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe Inc., 2001.
 Niang, Sada, kple ame bubuwo. Agbalẽwo kple sinimawo le afrique francophone: Ousmane Sembène kple Assia Djebar . Paris: L’Harmattan, ƒe 1996.

 Pfaff, Françoise, kple ame bubuwo. Ousmane Sembene ƒe Sinema: Afrikatɔwo ƒe Sinima ƒe Mɔɖela . Westport, Connecticut: Greenwood ƒe Nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe, 1984.
 Rubaba, Protas Pius, kple ame bubuwo. "Nyɔnuwɔwɔ ƒe kadodo ƒe ŋusẽkpɔɖeamedzi le hadometɔtrɔ wɔwɔ me: numekuku le sinima siwo nye Moolaade (Ousmane Sembene) kple Tsi (Deepa Mehta) ŋu." Nelson Mandela Dugã me Yunivɛsiti: PhD diss., 2009.
